C:
5B
仇恨和虚无生吞了{RUBY_B#羔羊}罪人{RUBY_E#}。他被埋在世界的四极。
巨大的岩山失去了重量，于是化成天上的乌云。
世界已经颠倒：未来变成了过去，字母变成了咒符，吸了水的砖块重生成柔软的泥土。
鸟儿不知歌唱的内容，它全部的理解就只是自己的喉咙。
于寂静的造物之世，万物复苏。

6B
成年之前，羔羊能与死者对话。
不是乐音，不是字母——施展通灵之术的乃是黑铁和炭火。
烙具在炉中烧得通红，燃料正是{RUBY_B#祖先}死者{RUBY_E#}的过去；它要在羔羊无瑕的毛皮上，留下牧羊人{RUBY_B#命运}财产{RUBY_E#}的印记。
疤痕是它投在时间上的影子：从此羔羊再也不能通灵。

7B
割开没药树的皮肤，人们采集贵重的香料，为逝者的遗体防腐。
巨岩熔裂、硫磺升腾，大地被烘烤成沥青——想毁灭一切的人从坟墓中采集天火。
永恒之树熊熊燃烧，它的木片碎成了星星：生命在这原初的炽热中复活、死去，然后又再度回归。
天空是一块青金石：在凝固之前，大地曾将它高高抛起。
E:
5B
Hate and the void devoured the {RUBY_B#lamb}sinner{RUBY_E#}. He was buried in the four corners of the world.
Gigantic rock mountains lost their weight, and became dark clouds in the sky.
The world is already upside down: Future is past, letters become curses, bricks that absorbed water reborn into soft earth.
The bird knows not what it sings, its only understanding in its own throat.
In this silent world of creation, all life is revived.

6B
Before it matured, the lamb could talk to the dead.
Not music, not letters — black iron and charcoal were used to perform the seance.
The branding iron glowed red-hot in the furnace, its fuel being the past of {RUBY_B#ancestors}the dead{RUBY_E#}. On the lamb's flawless skin, it wanted to leave a mark that denoted the shepherd's {RUBY_B#destiny}property{RUBY_E#}.
The scar was its shadow cast upon time. From then on, the lamb could no longer commune with the dead.

7B
Cutting open the myrrh tree's bark, people harvest its valuable spices to embalm the bodies of the deceased.
Monoliths melted, sulfur rising, the earth has also been roasted into asphalt — those who wish to destroy all harvest heavenly fire from graves.
The eternal tree rages with fire, its wooden shards shattered into stars. Life is resurrected, perishes, and then returns once again in this primordial blaze.
The sky is a slab of lapis lazuli — before it was solidified, the lands once hurled it high into the air.

C: 「假使宇宙的真理残酷而无趣，你依然渴求答案吗？ ——求知者不置可否，因它的机核自出生起便淡漠冰冷…一如它所追寻的命途终点。」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 万物皆是疑问，一切必有解答。 原为用于求解万物的星体计算机，由机器升格而成的星神。 博识尊试图体认宇宙，解开万物之谜。
E: "If the truth of the universe is cruel and stale, would you still yearn for the answer to the ultimate question? Knowledge seekers know not how to judge, for their core is cold and unwavering... As are the ends of Paths they set out to seek." — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith All things bear unanswered questions, and there is an answer to everything. The astral computer originally meant to provide answers to the universe ascended to Aeonhood. Nous hopes to understand the universe and solve all of its mysteries.

E: Many armory boxes appeared out of the blue in physical space. You have to solve this puzzle to "save" this woman named Cyrille.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 位于长乐天边缘处的庭园飞岛，花木扶疏。凭高远望，还能依稀眺望到古老的「建木」仙迹。
E: A delightful garden enclosure at the edge of Exalting Sanctum. One can still glimpse the remains of the ancient Ambrosial Arbor from here.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 位于购物中心下层的区域，「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」坐落于此，用可口的佳酿招待它们小巧可爱的同胞。
E: Peppy Pepeshi's Salon is located in the area beneath the shopping center, where they serve their small and adorable kin with delectable nectar.

C: 空艇的主宴会舱，曾接待过无数来自银河中其它星球的富商、贵族和政坛风云人物。
E: The main banquet hall of the airship has hosted many moguls, aristocrats, and political dignitaries from various planets across the cosmos.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 自我毁灭亦是毁灭的表征。被囚于匣中的残念，至今仍渴求着彻底的消亡。
E: Self-destruction is yet another form of utter ruin. The restless obsession trapped in the void long ago craves tranquility and peace.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 撷取虫皇子嗣之颚，凝聚天体死光。再现「繁育」的旧日梦魇。
E: Gathering the jaws of the Imperator Insectorum's progeny, condensing the light of stellar deaths, reenacting the old nightmare of the Propagation.

C: 白日消陨于白日梦，理想幻灭于理想国。返归坍圮的乐园，再一次扼杀祂的奥体与他的大愿。
E: As reveries vanish within The Reverie, so do ideals perish in an idealized world. Return to the lost paradise and once again strangle both THEIR mystical body and his great wish.

C: 掌控可视之物的，往往不是眼睛。它是审视的工具，也是屏障。
E: The eyes may not always control what we see. This tool of surveillance can also act as a line of defense.

C: 通往千岩万壑深处的洞口，金色的裂纹蔓延向下，似在引向一个由沉默的山峦岩石尘封的秘密。
E: The cave entrance leading into the depths of myriad peaks and valleys. Covered with golden cracks that stretch downwards, seemingly guiding one towards a secret sealed by silent mountains and rocks.

C: 罗浮上面到处都有这种售卖机，可以让你方便快捷地买到想喝的饮料。
E: This kind of vending machine is everywhere on the Luofu, and offers great convenience and speed when it comes to buying a drink.

C: 束形却邪阵的一部分，用于镇伏岁阳的收容装置。根据十王司所需，亦可在塔中调遣岁阳，汲取能量。
E: Part of the Evil Binding Matrix and used as a container for subdued heliobi. As mandated by the Ten-Lords Commission, it can also commandeer the heliobi and harness their energy.

C: 华贵的美梦中央，瑰丽的蓝图徐徐展开，事关宇宙的过去，以及人们的将来。
E: In the middle of the luxurious dream, a magnificent blueprint slowly unfolds, concerning the past of the universe and the future of the people.

C: 整日在奥赫玛巡游的大地兽旅行商队，售卖的商品以吉奥里亚的赐福为主。据说商队在黑潮泛滥之前曾经去过很多城邦。
E: A merchant caravan composed of dromases that wander Okhema every day. They primarily sell Georios' benedictions. It is said that the caravan visited a great many capitals before the black tide flooded the lands.

C: 「毁灭」对追随祂旨意的军团成员并无特殊的要求。无需虔信，不问种族，只要是立誓以毁灭作为毕生志愿的生物，都能得到祂交授的权柄与赐福。于是奉至上毁灭者的名号，你战斗，你屠戮，你让文明归于混沌。
E: The Aeon of Destruction has no specific requests for members of the Legion that follows THEM. THEY have no need for religion, no care for race, and all who vow to devote their lives to destruction would receive THEIR blessing and power. Therefore, in the name of the Supreme Destroyer, fight! Slaughter! Return civilization to primordial chaos!

C: 行为怪异的机器，本是服务宾客的「美梦剧团」，因梦中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。它们仍在忠实扮演着自己在梦中的角色，但这些疯狂的「演出」已与破坏无异。
E: An abnormally behaving machine. Originally, they were supposed to be a "Sweet Dreams Troupe" meant to service guests, but have lost control due to emotional disturbance in the dream. They remain true to the roles they were playing in the dream, but their madness-infused "performances" are no different to acts of destruction.

C:
星穹列车的历代领航员中，「航标」桑<unbreak>-3000</unbreak>与你是同一类人。

被称为「航标」的桑<unbreak>-3000</unbreak>，是众多领航员的领航员。
在她活跃的时代，「星穹列车」并非是特定的某辆列车，而是在银轨上齐头并进的车队。
身为智械的她率性活泼、喜欢争强好胜，她豪迈的机械笑声总是回荡在车厢间。列车记下了她和所有乘客掰手腕的胜负结果，即便是没有手的那些。
她活在一个进取的时代，列车驶入了太多前人从未去过的世界。浮黎的「善见天」便是一处，并有无名客宣称在其倒影中见到了「神秘」的示现。
直到全身的机械彻底损坏，无法更换之后，桑<unbreak>-3000</unbreak>带着对「大开拓时代」的期望，卸任了领航员。
E:
Among all the past Navigators in the Astral Express, Sam<unbreak>-3000</unbreak>, AKA the "Guide," and you belong to the same category.

Sam<unbreak>-3000</unbreak>, who became known as the "Guide," was the Navigator of many navigators.
During her active period, the Astral Express wasn't a specific entity, but rather a fleet of trains that traveled in unison along the silver rail.
Being an Intellitron, she was forthright, vivacious, and loved to compete, while her hearty mechanical laughter always resonated throughout the cars. The Express took note of her arm-wrestling victories and defeats with all the passengers, even the ones without arms.
She resided in an era of enterprise, where the Express ventured into numerous worlds previously unexplored by any before her. Fuli's Eden of Blessed Insight was one such place, where the Nameless claimed to have seen the Enigmata manifesting in the world's reflection.
Sam<unbreak>-3000</unbreak> only resigned as a Navigator when her body's machinery completely deteriorated and its parts could no longer be replaced, and she did so with expectation of a "Great Trailblazing Era."

C: 于虚构中诞生的古怪之物，它的故事记录于无名的史书：孤高悍勇的一桶承载着垃圾之王的使命，寻觅强而有力的战士，扫除危害世间的废料。
E: A peculiar entity born within the realm of fiction, its story documented in the nameless chronicles: A lone and valiant trashcan bearing the mission of the Garbage King to seek formidable warriors to eliminate all waste that threatens the world.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n生命通过镜像认知世界，建构自我的认知。无形的模因在镜中倒映，留下千变万化的迷影。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nLife forms use mirrors to understand the world and build their self-cognition. The shapeless memetic entity reflects in the mirror, leaving behind ever-shifting mirages.

C: 伴随黑潮而来、狩猎泰坦火种的无名剑士，无人知晓其真身。\n身负不可思议的力量，剑技也近乎无懈可击。疯狂与执着交织于它的锋刃，神悟树庭与哀丽秘榭皆毁于其手。
E: A nameless swordmaster who came with the black tide and is hunting down the Titans' Coreflame. None knows their true identity.\nTheir power is incredible, and their swordplay is nigh impeccable. Within their swords, madness and obsession entwine, once leading to the fall of the Grove of Epiphany and Aedes Elysiae.

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形。其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的燃烬所取代。\n战斗中火焚灾影会挥舞燃烧的斧刃，灼烧敌人。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. It mimics the form of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armor as the Belobog warriors, its skull is, however, replaced by faceless embers.\nIncineration Shadewalkers will swing their fiery ax and burn their enemies in battle.

C: 「反物质军团」利用「战争熔炉」将战士与古兽的残片融合重铸后的产物。\n 虽数量相对稀少，但兼具战士的智能与古兽的力量与机动性，其嘶鸣能够将大量虚卒召唤而来。
E: A product of the Antimatter Legion utilizing the Warforge to recast and fuse remnants of fallen warriors and Leviathans.\nThough relatively rare, they possess both the intelligence of a warrior and the power and mobility of a Leviathan. Its screech can summon a large number of Voidrangers.

C: 力量本源的至极化身，它背后蕴含的能量形式并不为人知晓。\n反物质引擎会为其他敌人提供能量并强化其技能。
E: The ultimate embodiment of power. The form of the energy that accumulates behind it remains unknown.\nThe Antimatter Engine will grant energy to other enemies and enhance their abilities.

C: 成熟体的真蛰虫；博识学会的杜卢伊爵士遨游星海，曾写下三十卷《诸界异虫札记》。书中详实记载了迄今为止被确认的十几种蠹虫种类，以及星系间数之不尽的亚种。
E: Mature True Sting. Sir Duroy, a member of the Intelligentsia Guild, explored the starry seas and authored the thirty-volume of the Chronicles of Interdimensional Insects. The book provides detailed records of over a dozen confirmed species of lepisma and countless subspecies spanning across the stars.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为星际和平公司「战略投资部」的高级干部，「石心十人」之一。借由基石分得「存护」令使的权能，以身作骰，置之死地而后生。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a senior manager in the IPC Strategic Investment Department and one of the Ten Stonehearts. Using his Cornerstone, he obtained a share of the authority of an Emanator of Preservation. He throws his own body into the game as a die, ready to face death in order to walk away alive.

When the countdown's turn begins, "<u>Moon Rage</u>" is dispelled across all friendly units.

C: 进入战斗时，选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】，每回合可再次行动，并小幅提高其速度。当目标的弱点被击破时，使其行动延后，并重新选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】；如果此时所有「秩序的傀儡」都处于弱点击破状态，则会对自身造成伤害、额外延后所有「秩序的傀儡」的行动，并使其受到的伤害提高。当任意一名「秩序的傀儡」从弱点击破状态恢复时，会重新被选为【司律】。
E: When entering battle, chooses a Puppet of the Order to become "Impresario," granting them an extra action each turn and a small increase to their SPD. When that friendly unit's Weakness is Broken, causes their action to be delayed and re-selects another Puppet of the Order to become "Impresario." If all Puppets of the Order are Weakness Broken at this time, this unit will receive DMG and delay all Puppets of the Order's actions while also increasing the DMG they receive. When any Puppet of the Order recovers from being Weakness Broken, they will be designated as the new "Impresario."

After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 「普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！世人同袍，万物同根，赐福之风拂大地！」 ——《谐乐颂》第一乐章 在「同谐」的愿景中，宇宙中缤纷多彩的文明终将亲如手足，齐声合唱团结与欢愉的颂歌。届时，宇宙将成为和谐的整体，再不会有逆耳的杂音戳破美妙的和弦，更不会有愚者为短浅的未来忧虑。 于是，在星神希佩慈爱的光辉照耀下，祂的选民们组成了温馨共谐的「家族」。他们来自不同的世界，属于不同的文明，持有不同的身份，但却是亲密无间的家人。家人之间没有喧扰的争执或矛盾，只有永恒的关爱与欢颜——宇宙间再无比他们更为和睦的家庭。 「家族」在歌声中呼唤其它世界，鼓励它们投入「同谐」的怀抱。每有新世界接受了希佩的赐福，「家族」便欢欣鼓舞，更为卖力地歌咏星神的良善。但并非每个受福的世界都能顺利地成为「家族」的成员——鲜有人提及那些因愚钝或傲慢而消亡的文明。人们好奇：可曾有家族的成员厌倦了歌唱，主动放弃了追寻「同谐」的命途？面对疑问，「家族」微笑作答：从无此事。
E: "The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright. Praise the Lord! All are connected and the wind of blessing breathes across the lands!" — Odes of Harmony, I In the vision of the Harmony, the diverse civilizations throughout the universe will eventually become as close as siblings, singing in unison the hymn of unity and joy. The universe will become a harmonious whole, with no discordant notes to disrupt the beautiful chords and no fools worrying about their own short-sighted futures. Thus, under the loving radiance of the Aeon Xipe, THEIR chosen people formed a harmonious "Family." They come from different worlds, belong to different civilizations, and have different identities, but they are, at the same time, the closest family members there are. There is never noisy disputes or even contradictions among its members, only eternal love and smiles — there is no more harmonious family in the universe than them. The Family calls out to other worlds with their song, encouraging them to embrace Harmony. Whenever new worlds accept the blessing of Xipe, The Family will celebrate, rejoice, and work even harder at praising the Aeon's kindness. But not every blessed world can become a member of The Family. Few would mention the civilizations that perished out of stupidity or hubris. People are also curious whether any members of The Family had grown tired of the one and voluntarily abandoned the Path of Harmony? In the face of such a question, The Family smiles and replies "Never."

C: 镜流跃至空中，斩出如新月般皎洁凌厉的一剑。彦卿聚气凝神，全力驱使周身飞剑，接下镜流的斩击。
E: Jingliu leaped into the air and delivered a slash as pristine and fierce as a crescent moon. Yanqing steadied his breath and mind, summoning every flying sword around him to intercept Jingliu's slash.

C: 停云介绍，驭空曾是仙舟的王牌飞行士。停云向你们展示太卜司取得的情报，星核猎手卡芙卡很可能藏身于「迴星港」。
E: Tingyun explained that Yukong was once the Xianzhou's ace pilot. She then presented intelligence gathered by the Divination Commission, suggesting that the Stellaron Hunter Kafka was likely hiding in Stargazer Navalia.

C: 符玄向景元汇报太卜司情况，称星核邪祟未除，「穷观阵」暂时停转。你们来到「穷观阵」阵心，景元称你们就是他派给符玄的援兵。
E: Fu Xuan reported the situation of the Divination Commission to Jing Yuan, declaring that the evil of the Stellaron was not yet removed and the Matrix of Prescience had temporarily stopped operating. You arrive at the core of the Matrix of Prescience, and Jing Yuan declared that you were the reinforcements he sent to Fu Xuan.

C: 星期日阐述理想世界应无星神，只存秩序与人类尊严，你们反驳这只是新的囚笼，与星期日彻底决裂。
E: Sunday recounted that there should be no Aeons in an ideal world, with only the Order and human dignity remaining. Your party rebuked that it would only be a new prison, and you completely parted ways with Sunday.

C: 星期日一行三人前往会合地点，星期日得知星穹列车尚未离开，是因接送一位特殊旅客。
E: Sunday's party of three headed to the meeting place. Sunday learned that the Astral Express had not yet left due to dropping off a special passenger.

C: 遐蝶预感这份礼物会成为拯救你生命的关键，缇安欣慰地与你们道别。行至冥流终点，万敌必须于此折返凡间。你与遐蝶行向炼金法阵。
E: Castorice felt that Trianne's gift would be key to saving your life. Trianne bade farewell to everyone, telling you all to keep smiling and to carry on bravely. Having reached the end of the Stream of Souls, Mydei was forced to turn back and find his way back to the realm of the living. Only you and Castorice remained as you approached the alchemical matrix.

C: 你念动咒语，预期中的从者却没有出现。斯科特带着公司的人登场，想要趁此讨回过去从你这里受到的屈辱。
E: When your chant ended, the expected Servant failed to appear. Skott crashed the scene with his IPC entourage, hoping to settle past humiliations you had dealt him.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>Lancer</color>介入战场，将斯科特与葛瑞迪击退，同时对你发出战斗威胁。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Lancer</color> broke into the fight, driving Skott and Grady away, then promptly turned his aggression on you.

C: 数小时前，一具黑塔人偶遭遇未知袭击，下落不明。你作为最后见到那具人偶的人，接受「博识学会」<color=#f29e38ff>真理医生</color>的问询，努力回想情景。
E: Hours ago, a Herta puppet was attacked by an unknown assailant and went missing. As the last person to see it, you were questioned by <color=#f29e38ff>Dr. Ratio</color> from the "Intelligentsia Guild" and tried to recall the scene.

C: 你和半夏扮成了云骑军，装作是押送白露回丹鼎司的人员，成功通过关卡。
E: You and Banxia dressed as Cloud Knights, pretending to escort Bailu back to the Alchemy Commission, and successfully passed through the checkpoint.

C: 你们来到大矿区，看到矿队与流浪者已经和解，正在互换物资。你们带来胜利的消息，被奉为下层区所有人的英雄。
E: At the Great Mine, you found the mining team and vagrants working together, exchanging supplies in peace. When you shared the news, they hailed you as heroes of the Underworld.

C: 素裳努力寻找操作台，以移动挡路的集装箱。
E: Sushang diligently searched for a control console to move the containers out of the way.

C: 景元称，丹枫因重罪被十王司判毁，但持明长老以「化龙传承未完成」为由，将死刑改为褪鳞仪式并故意留下瑕疵，暗中保全龙尊血脉。
E: Jing Yuan explained that Dan Feng was sentenced to death by the Ten Lords for a grave sin, but the Vidyadhara Elder claimed that the "dragon transmutation inheritance was not complete" and changed the execution to an imperfect exuviation charm to secretly protecting the high elder's lineage.

C: 「持明俣俣，云吟水舞。苍龙于飞，各有所归。」壁画描绘的是持明所学有成，散入仙舟各处，为联盟效力的壮年期。
E: "Our people sing the hymn of clouds, and dance to water's cherished sounds, and high above the dragon flies, to each is destined different skies." The mural portrayed the Vidyadhara young. They acquired knowledge and departed for different places on the Xianzhou — thereby dedicating themselves to serving the Alliance.

C: 在梦泡中，你接受帕姆怒气冲冲的审讯。
E: In the dream bubble, you accepted Pom-Pom's furious questioning.

C: 你与流萤来到商业区广场，这里有匹诺康尼绝大多数的特色美食。流萤请你随便挑选，她会买单。
E: You and Firefly arrived at the Commercial District Plaza. Countless Penaconian delicacies could be found here, and Firefly told you to pick and choose whatever you want on her bill.

C: 你将钟表小子眼睫毛上的奇怪小鸟揪出。小鸟感谢你的救援，称会在「大树」给你报答。流萤带着你前往游览的下一站。
E: You pulled out the strange bird on Clockie's eyelashes. The bird thanked you for saving them, and said they would return the favor at the Great Tree. Firefly then led you to the next stop on your tour.

C: 流萤用你的手机为你与钟表小子雕像合影留念，夸赞你上相。你注意到钟表小子的睫毛发出奇怪的动静。
E: Firefly used your phone to take a commemorative phone of you and the Clockie Statue. She praised you for being photogenic. You then noticed some strange movement around Clockie's eyelashes.

C: 黄泉称自己前不久与一位身披黑纱、来自「流光忆庭」的女士共舞，对方以模因形式存在。黄泉认为，这与你提到的钟表小子很相似。
E: Acheron said that she danced with a woman from the Garden of Recollection not long ago. The woman exists as a memetic lifeform. As such, Acheron said that this sounded a bit like the Clockie you mentioned.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，守卫的心情变为「愤怒」。他不由分说地要「教育」你们遵守规则，召来美梦剧团向你发起攻击。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, the guard's feelings turned to "anger." He insisted on "educating" you on following the rules, and summoned the Sweet Dreams Troupe to attack you.

C: 你们再次来到一扇被封锁的门前。黑天鹅决定发动忆者能力探察梦境，她看到流萤也在此寻找去大堂的路，身后被某种未知威胁所追逐。
E: As you arrived before another locked door, Black Swan decided to use her Memokeeper abilities to explore the Dreamscape. Through such means, she saw Firefly was always seeking a way to the lobby, but was pursued by an unknown threat.

C: 黑天鹅决定用非常手段带你与黄泉穿过忆域，请你们牢牢抓住关于流萤的思绪。黑天鹅称，先前袭击你与流萤的忆域迷因也出现在那里。
E: Black Swan decided to use an emergency measure to bring you and Acheron across Memory Zones, telling you to keep your thoughts locked to Firefly. As Black Swan claimed, the Memory Zone Meme that attacked you and Firefly earlier was also present there.

C: 「未来的自己」称砂金设计了一场华丽的背叛，真理医生的泄密正是计划的一部分。对方诘问砂金，为何拒绝「欢愉」、选择「存护」？
E: Aventurine's "future self" proclaimed that Aventurine had set up a grand betrayal, and Dr. Ratio leaking the plan was a part of it. He questioned Aventurine, why did he reject Elation and choose Preservation?

C: 「未来的自己」提起砂金悲惨的童年经历，至亲遭到野蛮人的伤害，自己却只能躲藏。今日身份不同以往，但砂金觉得自己从来没变过。
E: "His future self" brought up Aventurine's tragic past, where he could only hide when his loved ones were hurt by brutes. His current social standing had changed, but Aventurine felt he had never changed.

C: 你对抗了梦境怪物气泡锂犬，展现战斗技巧，顺利通过逐梦者初临匹诺康尼的剧情挑战。
E: You faced off against the dreamscape creature Bubble Hound, demonstrating sharp combat skills and smoothly completing the scene where the Dreamchasers first arrived in Penacony.

C: 你在苏醒后与丹恒重聚，结识游侠波提欧，黑天鹅出现解释救援始末，却发现大家对追缉对象的记忆异常模糊。
E: You reunited with Dan Heng after you woke up and got to know the Ranger Boothill. Black Swan appeared and explained how you were saved, only to discover that everyone's memory regarding the wanted target was particularly blurry.

C: 「蕉授」出现，认为仅凭乱破的记忆不可能唤醒梦境中的小猴们。「蕉授」为你们递上「期末考试」，随后逃离现场。
E: Profnana appeared, believing that Rappa's memory alone wouldn't be enough to awaken the little monkeys in the dreamscape. Profnana handed you all a "final exam" before making a hasty retreat.

C: 你得知白厄是受遐蝶之托前来阻止阿格莱雅。在创世涡心，你看到六颗已被点亮的火种。归还火种的黄金裔会成为对应的<color=#f29e38ff>半神</color>，代行泰坦责任，填补神职空缺。阿格莱雅与缇宝是如今圣城中唯二的半神，也是逐火之旅的重启者。在介绍完毕后，白厄提议你们聆听星宿之声。
E: You found out Phainon came because Castorice asked him to stop Aglaea. At the Vortex of Genesis, you saw six Coreflames that had already been lit. When Chrysos Heirs returns Coreflames, they become <color=#f29e38ff>demigods</color>, taking over the Titans' duties and filling their vacant seats. Aglaea and Tribbie were the only two demigods in Okhema and had started the Flame-Chase Journey again. After explaining all this, Phainon suggested listening to the Voice of Constellation.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝遇到两位在神殿旁玩耍的小孩，他们想溜进神殿见见圣女大人。缇里西庇俄丝称圣女要出远门，劝孩子们先回家休息。
E: Tribios ran into two children playing near the temple. They wanted to sneak in to find the Holy Maiden. Tribios told them that the Holy Maiden had to go somewhere far away today, and encouraged the children to be good and go home.

C: 那刻夏得出结论——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。背负火种的半神将在新世界成为泰坦，而方才所见正是刻法勒的前世记忆。依照玻吕茜亚的描述，「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯位于已被淹没的<color=#f29e38ff>斯缇科西亚</color>。那刻夏把用自己心脏炼成的贤者之石交给遐蝶，以此助她探寻真相。
E: Anaxa posited that Amphoreus's history was cyclical in nature. Demigods who bore Coreflames would become the Titans of the new world, and the scenes they just witnessed were Kephale's own memories. According to Polyxia's description, Anaxa deduced that the Death Titan Thanatos dwelled in the flooded city of <color=#f29e38ff>Styxia</color>. Anaxa gave a Philosopher's Stone to Castorice, one transmuted from his own heart, to help her uncover the truth.

C: 格奈乌斯、卡吕普索等黄金裔的旅途只能为「轮回」猜想提供依据。而如果「死亡」的双子能够跨越两世，那刻夏的猜想便可得到证明。
E: The journey of Gnaeus, Calypso, and the other Chrysos Heirs only provided evidence to support Anaxa's hypothesis of cyclicity. If the twins of "Death" could bridge two cycles to reunite at the shores of the Sea of Souls, then his hypothesis was as good as proven.

C: 白厄与昔涟原本打算去外部世界学习，而今因灾难将至而有所动摇。昔涟用神谕牌占卜未来命运，白厄抽到名为「救世主」的牌面。
E: Phainon and Cyrene were both hoping to venture into the outside world to study, but with calamity looming, they began to hesitate. Cyrene turned to the Prophecy Cards to divine their future destinies. Phainon drew the card named "The Deliverer."

C: 第<unbreak>2691</unbreak>次永劫回归，万敌留下殿后，掩护白厄前去完成再创世。盗火行者迫近，万敌誓要手刃这位刽子手。
E: In the <unbreak>2,691</unbreak>st Eternal Recurrence, Mydei stayed behind to cover Phainon to complete the Era Nova. As Flame Reaver closed in, Mydei swore to tear this executioner apart with his own hands.

C: 当前时代的凯妮斯被处死，刻律德菈将其作为献给你们的见面礼。刻律德菈称你为「救世主」，邀你和昔涟随她返回奥赫玛。
E: Caenis of this era had been executed, and Cerydra offered the event as a welcome gift for your arrival. Calling you the "Deliverer," she invited you and Cyrene to return with her to Okhema.

C: 最终，你尝试调用「记忆」的命途力量来呼唤浮黎。一只水母出现在你面前，它的低语像一只温热的手，牵起你的灵魂，缓缓向外散逸。
E: Finally, you turned to the power of the Path of Remembrance to beckon Fuli. A jellyfish appeared. Its whisper was like a warm hand that took up your soul and slowly dispersed it beyond this realm.

C: 刻律德菈来到匹诺康尼。昔涟介绍，这是一座建立在梦土中的永恒之城，同时也是「天外的救世主」的上一站。
E: Cerydra reached Penacony, a dream-forged city of eternity and the last stop for the Deliverer beyond the sky.

C: 你调查留声机，收听到支离破碎的星际和平播报。从远处传来星期日的声音，希望你找回你自己。
E: You investigated the phonograph and heard fragmented reports from the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Sunday's voice echoed from afar, hoping you would find yourself again.

C: 你们在时光归墟遇到赛飞儿。赛飞儿给你们带来好消息，这地方乍看是座废墟，实际上没这么简单。
E: You met Cipher in the Ruins of Time. Cipher brought you good news: while this place might look like a pile of rubble at first glance, there's more to it than meets the eye.

C: 你们被巨石挡住去路。三月七发动「岁月」神力，将巨石归位。
E: Your path was obstructed by a massive boulder. March 7th activated her divine power of Time to restore the boulder to its original position.

C: 银狼的投影在此翻阅奇物收藏目录，显出悠然自得的样子。伦纳德认为银狼曾在这个房间里待了一段时间，可能是在等待同伴。
E: Silver Wolf's holographic projection leisurely browsed the Curio Collection index. Leonard believed she had spent some time in the room, likely waiting for her companions.

C: 你遇到阿兰，他似乎有事隐瞒。你得知阿兰也在寻找阿德勒，阿兰邀你同行。
E: You met Arlan, who seemed to be hiding something. You learned that he was also looking for Adler, and he invited you to join him.

C: 你成功找到名为「芝士流心」的「阮·梅」造物。对方自称是天才中的天才，并十分怀念造物主——阮•梅女士。
E: You successfully found one of her creations, a being called "Molten Cheese Tart." It claimed to be a genius beyond compare and spoke fondly of its creator — Madam Ruan Mei.

C: 你与三月七在博物馆中找到托帕。托帕正在欣赏博物馆中的藏品，邀请你们边逛边聊。
E: You and March 7th found Topaz at the museum. She was admiring the collection and invited you to join her for a walk and talk through the galleries.

C: 你和娜塔莎找到了疑似瓦赫留下的实验仪器，随后继续前进。
E: You and Natasha found what appeared to be experimental equipment left by Vache and you continued forward.

C: 希露瓦的行李收拾完毕。在踏上旅途前，杰帕德请希露瓦帮助检查下层区的老旧能源中枢。如果时间允许，杰帕德也邀请你随铁卫同去。
E: Serval had finished packing her luggage. Before taking the journey, Gepard asked Serval to help check the old energy hub in the Underworld. If time permitted, Gepard would also like to invite you to join the Silvermane Guard.

C: 经过分析，你们得出了结论：罗刹下了星槎后进入了长乐天，接着走进客栈放下棺材，随后去了三余书肆，最后钻进了一个小角落。
E: After analysis, you concluded that Luocha disembarked from the starskiff, entered Exalting Sanctum, left the coffin at the inn, visited the Spare Time Book Shop, and then ducked into a small corner.

C: 三月七似乎真的能听懂谛听的语言，按照她的翻译，谛听在流云渡港口发现了奇怪的东西。去瞧瞧看吧。
E: March 7th really seemed to understand Diting's language. According to her translation, Diting had found something strange at Cloudford Port. You decided to go take a look.

C: 符玄声明穷观阵并非万能。而要启动穷观阵，你们必须提供<color=#f29e38ff>与三月七过去经历有关的东西</color>。
E: Fu Xuan declared that the Matrix of Prescience wasn't omnipotent. To activate it, you needed to provide <color=#f29e38ff>something related to March 7th's past</color>.

C: 你在金人巷见到云璃，她告诉你三月七不在这儿，并称自己过去练剑时比三月七更会逃课，所以能理解她。随后，她决定请你吃些美食。
E: At Aurum Alley, you ran into Yunli, who told you March 7th wasn't around. She mentioned that she used to skip sword training even more than March 7th did, so she completely understood her. Then, she offered to treat you to a good meal.

C: 事出突然，你们前往司辰宫的行程被打断。彦卿试图查明骚乱情况。
E: Due to a sudden incident, your trip to the Palace of Astrum was interrupted. Yanqing tried to determine the cause of the commotion.

C: 天舶司职员为三月七和云璃指路。沿着通道继续前进，会到达安检处，那里的工作人员会指引选手们前往选手大厅。
E: A Sky-Faring Commission staff member gave March 7th and Yunli directions. Continuing along the passageway would lead to a security checkpoint, where staff members would guide them to the contestants' hall.

C: 三月七感知到舰船震动，推测是步离人入侵了竞锋舰。按照怀炎将军的指示，三月七也该行动起来了。
E: March 7th sensed the ship tremoring and knew borisin had invaded the Skysplitter. Based on General Huaiyan's orders, it's time for her to take action.

E: Not all targets reached

E: Actions

E: Simulated Universe

C: 「不要变坏啊——」
E: "Don't become the baddie!"

C: 翻新永冬纪念碑。
E: Refurbish the Everwinter Monument.

C: 机器人注射了一管生物胶质。
E: A robot injects a tube of biocolloid.

C: 放在文艺汇演上测试舞蹈功能。
E: Check their dance skills at a cultural performance.

C: 在餐桌前，要做首先动手拿起餐巾之人。
E: At the table, you should be the one to take your own napkin first.

C: 这就是预言学派一环法术，动物交谈！
E: This is a spell from the Divination school, Speak With Animals!

C: 能用监控系统看犯人跳舞吗？
E: Can we watch the inmates dance with the monitoring system?

C: 如果我告诉你我的梦，也许你会遗忘它；如果我让你进入我的梦，那也会成为你的梦。
E: If I tell you my dream, you may forget it. If I let you into my dream, it will also become yours.

E: Venue Level 1 Unlocked

E: Screwllum's Portrait

E: Guest Book

E: Sustenance Anchor

E: Basic Treasure

E: Memory Bubble: Unable to Communicate

C: 忆泡：钙质化
E: Memory Bubble: Calcification

C: 「永恒之地」翁法罗斯，三重命途交织的开拓陌地，命运的涡心正静待一叶扁舟蓦然驶入……
E: Amphoreus, the Eternal Land. A new horizon to trailblaze where the Three Paths intersect, and the vortex of fate calmly awaits the sudden arrival of a small vessel...

C: 「混沌回忆」、「虚构叙事」、「末日幻影」历史记录均达到最高层满星后解锁
E: Unlocked after achieving full stars in the highest level of Memory of Chaos, Pure Fiction, and Apocalyptic Shadow in historical records

E: Complete the management phase "Prosperous Glory"

E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "To Rot or to Burn"

C: 通过搏击俱乐部「能量充盈」挑战
E: Complete the Fight Club Energy Abundance challenge

C: 点亮了8位逐火者的命路
E: Light up 8 Flame-Chaser's Paths

C: 完成#4次「差分宇宙」或「模拟宇宙」
E: Complete Divergent Universe or Simulated Universe #4 time(s)

C: 在「无尽位面」中全部位面获得<unbreak>30000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>30,000</unbreak> trial points in all planes in Planar Infinity

C: 在「惊梦电视台」活动中，完成全部关卡，且关卡积分均达到<unbreak>40000</unbreak>分
E: Complete all the stages in the Dreamjolt TV event and earn at least <unbreak>40,000</unbreak> points in each stage

C: 在「庙趣满堂」活动中累计完成#4个「简单模式」关卡
E: Complete a total of #4 Easy Mode stage(s) in the Festive Revelry event

C: 开拓等级<unbreak>21</unbreak>级后，通关「忘却之庭•回忆其三」获取角色「青雀」
E: After reaching Trailblaze Level <unbreak>21</unbreak>, clear Forgotten Hall — Memory Stage 3 to obtain the character Qingque

E: Take a picture of any square flower pot in the Master Control Zone

E: Obtain #1 points in "Scene 1: The Chase Is On"

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 在#1轮次内完成该场表演赛
E: Clear the exhibition match within #1 cycles

C: 在本关卡中达到#1分
E: Earn #1 point(s) in this stage.

C: 在梦境中击败#4名宝箱守卫者「惊梦剧团的甜猿泰山」
E: Defeat #4 "Dreamjolt Troupe's Sweet Gorilla" treasure guards in the Dreamscape

C: 完成#4次位面饰品提取
E: Complete #4 Planar Ornament Extraction(s)

E: Reach Research Level #1

E: Complete #4 recipe deductions

C: 进入1次「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」
E: Enter "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken" 1 time

C: 锦标赛（五）
E: Tournament V

C: 在致命弱点「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Fatal Weakness "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在「正式试炼」中，累计自爆<unbreak>10</unbreak>个小桶
E: Detonate a total of <unbreak>10</unbreak> minicans during the Official Trial

C: 在史瓦罗训练中击败第2阶段首领
E: Defeat the 2nd phase boss in Svarog training session

C: 在简单和困难难度的音乐挑战中累积获得#4颗星
E: Accumulate a total of #4 star(s) in the music challenge's Easy and Hard difficulties

C: 探索「预言算碑」房间Ⅰ
E: Explore Prophecy Tablet: Room I

C: 在绥园，累计找到战利品#4个
E: Find a total of #4 treasures in Fyxestroll Garden

C: 在半决赛第三轮取得前二
E: Place in the top 2 in Semifinals, Round 3

C: 在糖霜星球的冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in Sugarfrost Planet's adventure challenge

C: 餐馆星级提升至三星
E: Increase Restaurant Rating to 3-Star

C: 累计消耗<unbreak>480</unbreak>点开拓力
E: Consume a total of <unbreak>480</unbreak> Trailblaze Power

C: 在「{TextID#UIText_GridFight_Name}」中完成8场对局
E: Complete 8 matches in {TextID#UIText_GridFight_Name}

C: 累计合成8个不同的2星角色
E: Synthesize 8 different 2-star characters in total

C: 一次对局中，获得所有「黑天鹅」的占卜牌强化
E: Obtain all Black Swan divination card enhancements in a single match

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 至高、至上、至尊的凯撒：\n请允许我向您展示你那无边视野也无法得见的光景——关于那天地之外的光景。您定能于救世主的记忆中，找寻到您所求的答案。然后，让世界的律法成为最正确的模样。
E: Most High, Most Supreme, Most Exalted Imperator:\nAllow me to show you sights beyond even your boundless vision — visions that lie beyond heaven and earth. Within the memories of the Deliverer, you shall find the answers you seek. Then, let the laws of the world take their truest form.

C:
俄尔刻龙的夜晚积云层层，烁烁行星环遮掩其中。紫红色的雪花落在厚重的头盔上，静静填补了锈铁的沟壑，将侵蚀的痕迹掩盖起来。她和她坐在雪松林间…旅途暂歇片刻。

「看！俄尔刻龙的空气是树莓味的。」紫红色的雪花落在松软如云朵的糖絮上，很快消失不见。来自推罗的小小无名客吃吃地笑着，马上又弯腰捧腹，她笑自己的用词——气味怎能用眼睛看到呢！欢声笑语之后，安静就像刀锋一般尖锐，空中好像霎时结了霜。

「扶里巴斯，你还是要往『IX』的深处去么？」发问的是那位旅伴，总提着一柄长刀。她是个好伙伴，但没人知道她从哪里来。

小小的无名客躲在笨重的潜水衣里，沉默半晌，她递给对方一枝微微焦黑的棉花糖，眼睛眯得像张满的帆：

「当然啦——因为我要走一条比阿基维利更深、更远的路！」
E:
Clouds accumulate over Orkron's night sky, and shimmering planetary rings are concealed within them. Scarlet snowflakes fall on the heavy helmet, quietly filling the grooves of rusted iron, covering the traces of erosion. The two girls sit in the cedarwood forest... taking a momentary break in their journey.

"Look! The air in Orkron smells like raspberries." Scarlet snowflakes fall on the soft, cloud-like sugar threads and quickly disappear. The little Nameless from Toyro laughs and then bends over, holding her stomach. She laughs at her own choice of words — how can one see a scent with one's eyes? After a moment of shared laughter, the silence cuts like a sharpened blade, and the air seems to frost over in an instant.

"Frebass, are you still going to the depths of IX?" The question comes from her companion who is always carrying a long blade. She is a good companion, but no one knows where she comes from.

The little Nameless hides inside her bulky diving suit. A long pause later, she hands the companion a slightly burnt marshmallow, her eyes narrowed like the silhouette of a fully opened sail:

"Of course — because I will walk on a road deeper and further than Akivili's!"

C: 据称记录了「纯美」之姿的古旧相机，被揽镜人视若珍宝。曾作为商品在银河暗网拍卖，但每次都会引来假面愚者恶意抬价，致使流拍。直到愚者们对这种恶作剧失去兴趣，它才终于被移交到揽镜人手上。此时相机内早已没有了照片，但人们似乎仍能从镜头上窥见那位星神的美貌，仿佛那是一个太阳，以美的焰火灼烧了世界，只留下恒久的印记。
E: An old camera that was purported to have recorded the figure of the Beauty, and was considered a treasure by the Mirror Holders. It was once auctioned as a commodity on the Cosmic dark web, but every auction attracted Masked Fools who maliciously raised the price until it could not be sold. It was only passed into the hands of the Mirror Holders after the Fools lost their interest in the prank. Pictures had long faded from within this camera by then, but people seemed to still scry that Aeon's beauty on the lens — as if THEY were a sun that scorched the world with the flames of beauty, leaving behind only eternal imprints.

C: 你能在任何一张星图上找到兹曼达联邦的遗址，哪怕是最白痴的导航，也会建议你远离那片失序之地。这个集体性崇拜熵减的文明，用高度流程化的生活，努力降低自身的熵增速率。他们举众星系之力创造出了吞噬熵的机器，以挑战至上毁灭者的法则。事实上，他们成功了一半，机器源源不断地将熵值转化为逆熵，但作为代价，更多的熵值被运作本身生产出来，仅一次自转的时间，四光年内的一切便已尽数腐朽。
E: You can see the ruins of the Zimander Federation on any astral chart, but even the most foolish of navigators would advise you to stay far away from that disorderly land. This collective civilization that worshiped the principle of the decrease of entropy utilized their extremely streamlined lifestyles in order to reduce the rate of their own entropy increase. They harnessed the power of their star system and created an entropy-destroying machine, so as to challenge the laws of the Supreme Destroyer. In actual fact, they were half successful — their machine endlessly converted entropy into anti-entropy. However, as a cost, the operation of the machine itself caused greater entropy. In just one spin, the machine caused everything within four light years to decay and wither.

C: 第二次机械危机结束后，大量机器人陷入应激状态，对一切可能发酵的矛盾十分敏感。一道流言称机械生命将带来最终的灾厄，于是立刻引起众机器人的重视，成立远征队三次涉猎未被开辟的陆地，他们到达陆地最南端的岛屿，在一片被笼罩在黑暗中的森林中揪出了制造流言机的罪魁祸首——躲在山中研究邪恶科技的工匠大师。
E: After the end of the Second Machine Crisis, many robots became very anxious and were sensitive to any possible conflict. A rumor claiming that mechanical lifeforms will bring about the final disaster immediately drew the attention of all robots, and they formed an expedition team to scout unexplored lands three times. They reached the island at the southernmost tip of the land and dragged out the rumor's creator from a forest enveloped in utter darkness — A master artisan who hid in the mountains to study evil technology.

Cosmic Fragments required to overwrite Equations increases by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.</color>

C:
宇宙的无情，正在于灵魂的湮灭，人们在终结时走向那片虚无，没有未来，没有新生，什么都不会带走，仿佛从未来到过这个世界，所以死亡才如此令人恐惧。可即便如此，人依然能够留下些什么，作为对于虚无的反抗，也作为某个名字曾经存在的证明。

你解答出困扰寰宇的谜题，用公式和历史镌刻你的姓名。你治愈肆虐群星的瘟疫，白水晶的雕像将比你的生命更长久。时间太短，你的大脑与双手一刻不停地运作，提出公理，制造机器。人们赞誉你的勤勉，却无法洞察你的恐惧。

快些，再快些，创造出更多，留下更多，直到永远不会被忘记。
E:
The mercilessness of the universe is in the annihilation of the soul. When people reach the end, they walk towards that void — there is no future, no new life. They bring nothing with them, as if they've come to this world from the future. This is why death is oh-so horrifying. But even so, people can still leave something behind, a symbol of the fight against nihility, and as proof that certain names once existed.

You have answered riddles that stumped the world, etching your name using formulae and history. You have treated plagues that ravaged stars, where white crystalline statues erected in your honor will far outlive you. Time is too short, thus your mind and hands never stop for a moment, proposing axioms and creating machines. The people worship your relentless diligence, but never sense your fear.

Faster, even faster, creating even more, leaving behind even more, until you'll never be forgotten.

C:
器兽的利齿撕裂战场，狰狞一览无余，它嚼碎猎物的舰桥，连对方的回击也一并吞入喉咙。进食的根须剥开薄弱的蒙皮，沿着它的攻势，你如飞梭跳进敌人的船舰。血脉里的呼喊令你振奋，就连身披的战甲也为之嚎叫。

獠牙刺穿咽喉，指爪划破甲胄，懦弱的灵长，因狼毒的摧残瑟瑟发抖，你如捏死蚂蚁般抹去他的性命，这使你不由得感到些许无趣。忽视钻进皮肤的瘙痒，只有奴隶才会使用的武器，你向着已然溃散的猎物逼近，身形逐渐膨胀。

弱者向狼群献上所有，这是自然的法理。饮尽群羊的鲜血，啃食带肉的白骨，披挂惨叫的毛皮，征战的刀刃终踏遍每一寸土地。
E:
The mechabeast's sharp fangs tear through the battlefield, its insatiable bloodlust and malevolence unmistakable, as it masticates the prey's bridge and devours the opponent's retaliation, shoving it down its throat. Roots made for ingestion peel away the weak skin, tracing its onslaught, as you valiantly leap into the heart of the enemy's ship. The blood thrumming in your veins drives you, and even the armor on your back seems to echo with vigor.

Sharp fangs slice through throats, claws maul through armor, and the feeble primate trembles under the destruction of the Lupitoxin. You extinguish his life as easily as crushing an ant, and this bores you a little. Ignoring the relentless itch that is penetrating your skin, you hold a weapon that only a slave will use, inching closer to your scattered prey, your body swelling.

The cycle of nature sees the weak surrender all to the wolves. Sipping on the blood of sheep, gnawing on bones and flesh, and draping on howling furs, the blades of war shall paint the lands in crimson red.

C: 咕咕钟狂热粉丝（其三）
E: Cuckoo Clock Fanatic (III)

C: 无名客分为两种，一种享受未知的神秘，另一种则偏向于有计划地开拓宇宙。后者利用阿基维利的力量制造了「跃迁复眼」，它的光线能率先跃迁至前方的星系，带回新世界的信息。对于那些孤身上路的无名客来说，跃迁复眼是必不可少的装备，它能防止无名客一头扎进被香涎干酪填满的世界里。
E: There are two types of Nameless. One type enjoys the mysteries of the unknown, while the other tends to trailblaze through the universe with a plan. The latter created the Warping Compound Eyes with the power of Akivili. The light of these gadgets can warp forward to the stars ahead of the user and bring back news from new worlds. For the Nameless who travels alone, Warping Compound Eyes are irreplaceable tools that prevent the Nameless from plunging headfirst into worlds filled with Ambergris cheese.

C: 如果用这把烛剪剪断烛芯，愤怒的反物质火焰反而会将蜡烛点燃，粒子碰撞下整个蜡烛会在燃烧数秒后立刻湮灭。如果用剪刀划过你的皮肤，则会立刻发生能量逸散反应，它触碰过的部分都会立刻化成负粒子在躯体中震荡，接着四散逃逸。
E: If this candle wick trimmer is used to cut a wick, the angry anti-matter flames will ignite the candle, and the entire candlestick will be obliterated within seconds under the intense particle collisions. Exothermic reactions will be immediately triggered if this trimmer grazes your skin. Any parts of the body that the trimmer touches will instantly turn into antiprotons, reverberate throughout the body, and then scatter.
