C:
云骑军历史上最年轻的骁卫，景元将军的侍卫，工造司宝剑的大收藏家…如此多的头衔，如此多的街谈巷议汇于一身，让听者几乎无法联猜到，这个天才少年不过是个孩子。

自记事起，彦卿便如影随形地追随景元左右，为神策府分忧克难。而景元则传授他剑艺兵法。经年淬炼，彦卿的心智一如掌中三尺秋水，不染纤尘。

按云骑武经的评判，能在一息间分神御使六柄飞剑，收放自如，云骑军的教习首席再练百年也未必能办到。彦卿所拥有的战斗天赋实在令人生畏，可追仙舟先民「剑胎武骨」的评誉。
E:
Youngest lieutenant in the history of the Cloud Knights. Retainer to General Jing Yuan. Collector of antique swords from the Artisanship Commission... With all these auspicious titles and street gossip swirling around this one wunderkind, it's scarcely believable that he is still a child.

Ever since he could remember, Yanqing would follow Jing Yuan around like a shadow, helping the Seat of Divine Foresight resolve problems. And Jing Yuan in return taught him the art of swordplay — and the art of war. After years of training, Yanqing's mind is as quick and sharp as the spotless sword he keeps.

Cloud Knight combat drills attest that controlling six simultaneous flying daggers is something even Cloud Knight chief drillmasters can't master in a century. The phrase agreed among the Xianzhou people to describe the combat talents of Yanqing is "A gifted swordsman born to fight."

C: 在工炼房里旁观父亲炼剑时，剑炉喷薄的燥热会让她肚子饿得出奇得快，往往一两个时辰后就不见了身影——她要偷跑一趟集市，填饱肚子后才能好好观瞻学习。 「这家肉龙肠出食总比别家快，师傅串肠的手法干净利索，竹签一下串进肠心，不歪也不斜。如果他去练剑，剑风一定爽利。」这么想着，她排在了队伍末端。 胡麻饭团的铺子以往总是老板娘当厨，今天却是她的丈夫。他小臂的肱肌要比膀子肉更紧实，看着像是练过刀，因而抓起饭来也颇有大破大立之感——饭团一个顶平时三个大。她立马凑近：「两份，多抓点饭。」 青衣小哥卖的炸糖藕发挥总不稳定，但今天做得尚好，甜而不腻，外酥里脆。她吃完一个，没走远，站着又看了会儿。小哥今天边糊着糖汁，边有规律地转着手腕…居然是练剑的动作，他是几时学会的？「嗯…看来厨艺中亦有剑术……」 等她吃饱回到家，已是黄昏。院子里戴着铁盔的男人从父亲手上接过一把崭新的剑。 「多谢含光大师，鄙人定将…除恶务尽。」落晖渲染着那人汹涌的坚毅，却也添了份薄暮的无望。 残阳却未落入云璃眼中，她只注意到铁盔男人明明魁梧有力，腰胯壮健，这把剑却剑体轻薄，剑尖从坡度明显大于普通利剑，这样的构造更利于应对不同方向的敌人…但那男人接过剑后，第一件事却是检查剑缰的韧力…… 「他是冲锋的骑兵，对吗？这么轻的剑却还寄望于剑缰使剑不离手，一看就像会临阵脱逃的样子…而且骑术还不错。他配不上你的剑。」 含光讶然地看着云璃。 「吃那么多东西，不就是为了练眼力嘛。」
E: Watching her father refine swords in the workshop would always stimulate her hunger — more so than usual — probably because of the intense heat emitted by the furnace. As a result, she typically disappears within a few hours, sneaking off to the market to fill her belly, apparently so that she would be in a better frame of mind to observe and learn from her father. "This shop serves up meat sausages faster than their competitors. The chef easily skewers the sausages with mastery, piercing right through their centers with perfect symmetry. Hmm, if he were to learn swordsmanship, he would probably adopt a brisk style of fighting." She thought to herself as she joined the back of the queue. The sesame rice balls at this shop were usually prepared by the proprietress, but her husband took over the job today. His forearm was a lot more toned than his upper arm, possibly from regular blade training. Because of that, the way he squashed the rice together had a hint of almost destructive force in it — But each rice ball ended up three times larger than their usual. On noticing this, she eagerly walked over to place her order: "Two rice balls. More rice please~!" The fried sweet lotus root sold by the guy in green was never consistent in quality. But the one that was sold today turned out to be quite decent: Sweet but not cloying, and crispy on the outside while still retaining its crunchy bite. She had walked a short distance away by the time she finished the one she bought, that was when she stopped to observe the guy. He seemed to be rotating his wrist in a rhythmic fashion while coating the snack in syrup... He actually knew a move used in swordplay! When did he pick that up, though? "Hmm... Looks like the swordsmanship can be applied in cooking too..." It was already sunset by the time she had her fill and returned home. In the courtyard, her father handed over a brand-new sword to another man in an iron helmet. "Thank you, Master Hanguang. With this blade... I shall eradicate all evil." That man's raging determination shone bright in the afterglow of the sunset, yet was colored with the hopelessness of twilight. However, Yunli did not notice the setting sun. Instead, her focus was held by the man in the iron helmet. Before her was clearly a burly and robust man, yet he was given such a lightweight sword. The sword's tip was also broader than that of an average sword's. Such a design would be advantageous when fighting enemies from all sides. But strangely, after accepting the blade, the first thing that man did was to assess the tensile strength of the sword's tassel... "That man's an assault cavalry, right? Hmph, the sword's already so light, and he's still hoping to grab onto the tassel to keep his sword from flying...? He seems to possess decent horsemanship, but he also looks like someone who would flee on the eve of a battle. He isn't worthy of your sword." Hanguang stared at Yunli in surprise. "All that snacking is just for acuity training!"

C: 她循着声音来到工炼房角落，父亲不在，地上只有一把硕大的混铁剑骸，云璃拾了起来，那剑骸比她人还高。她好奇地抚摸着，模仿含光的样子，假装对它进行加工。 但这把大剑并未铸成——含光熔炼岁阳魔剑，招致焰轮铸炼宫的悲剧。云璃被及时赶来的怀炎救下，逃过一劫。她成为了怀炎的弟子，那剑胚也被她一同带离。 「云璃，原料若超出规范，剑也易折。」同窗的学徒忍不住提醒她，还有他的佩剑——正在娇俏地指责她的手法。 「你也太矜贵了，多刮刮树皮吧。」 同窗露出疑惑又尴尬的神情，云璃抬眼瞧了瞧同窗怀里噤声的剑，「不好意思，不是说你…是你。」 「我名芒光。剑头利如芒，恒持照眼光。」 她知道那剑将被主人藏于宝库，翳其剑光。 「我叫小茉莉，我喜欢剑柄上刻的那朵茉莉花。」 她知道小茉莉虽不满主人乱取名字，却为自己被珍视而感到欣喜。 人言莫辨，剑声更为单纯。 让人失智癫狂的魔剑和地上遍布的腥臭血迹…依然映刻在她的记忆，或许也映于那剑胚的记忆中。但它依旧无言，从未向她谈起那段往事。 「你也看见了那些浸满嗜血杀意的剑影，对吧？ 「现在想想，那些岁阳应该也使唤不了你，你闷得很，还又大又钝。」 剑胚忽然震颤，掀起一层乌黑的碳粉，落下却如令人凛然的星云。 「原来你是因为拒绝岁阳才被那人遗弃…连你这把未铸成的剑都懂的道理，父…他怎么就…… 「不过，剑什么时候算是『铸成』呢……」 她忍不住伸手抚摸它凹凸不平的剑锷，虽无剑脊，却满是凌厉。 「又不说话了？你还真是个铁疙瘩…不如，就叫你『老铁』吧。」 「别担心，也许你在他人眼里只是把没有剑锋的胚体，但剑意不分利钝。」 「我挥出的，就是利剑。」 「走吧老铁，随我出去见见世面。」
E: She followed the sound to a corner of the workshop. Her father was nowhere to be found, and on the ground laid the frame of a large sword made from an iron alloy. Picking it up, Yunli realized that the sword frame even stood taller than her. Curiously running her fingers over it, she then imitated how Hanguang normally worked, pretending to refine the sword frame. But this large sword never got forged: Hanguang smelt the heliobus-cursed sword instead, bringing a tragedy upon the Flamewheel Forge. Yunli narrowly escaped the fate of the others, only because Huaiyan arrived in the nick of time to rescue her. She became a disciple of Huaiyan thereafter, not forgetting to take the cursed sword billet with her. "Yunli, your sword's more likely to break if you use raw materials of non-standard composition." A fellow apprentice couldn't help but offer her some advice. His sword soon chimed in, though criticizing Yunli's smithing in a dainty manner. "Why don't you go out there and scrape more bark instead, snob?" The other students looked on with confusion and discomfort, prompting Yunli to look up at her fellow apprentice and the now silent sword. "Sorry, that wasn't directed at you. It was meant for your sword." "My name's Radiance because of my sharp blade and glistening hilt." But she knew the sword's fate: Its master would only chuck it into the vault, with its radiance forever concealed from the world. "My name's Jasminette. I like the jasmine flower that is engraved upon my hilt." She could tell Jasminette was annoyed at the frivolous name that its master chose, but it delighted at being cherished. While human intentions are indecipherable from their words alone, the voices of swords are much simpler to understand. Memories of the cursed sword that drove others to lose their sanity and the gruesome sight of blood all over the ground remain deeply etched in Yunli's mind... Perhaps also in that of the sword billet, though it had never once spoken or talked to her about the events that transpired on that fateful day. "You've also witnessed those blades that permeate bloodlust and killing intent being swung, right? "Now that I think about it, those heliobi will probably not be able to wield you either. You're big and blunt, and spiritless too." The sword billet trembled suddenly, kicking up a layer of dark carbon dust that fell like an awe-inspiring nebula. "So you were abandoned by that person because you rejected the heliobus... A theory that even an unfinished sword understands... Why didn't fath— he... "But when can a sword be considered 'finished'..." Unable to help herself, she reached out to run her fingers over the uneven edges of the blade. Despite the lack of a central ridge, the sword could still be considered sharp. "Not talking again? What a stubborn lump of metal you are... In that case, I'll just call you 'Old Mettle'." "Don't worry. To others, you might simply be a billet without a point, but that is immaterial to the intent of swordsmanship." "A blade that I swing will always be considered sharp." "Let's go, Old Mettle. Come with me to see the world."

C: 星际和平公司「战略投资部」的高级干部，「石心十人」之一，基石为「诡弈砂金」。\n个性张扬的风险爱好者，时常面带笑容，真心却难以揣测。\n靠着同命运的博弈赢得如今的地位，将人生视作一场高风险、高回报的投资，而他向来游刃有余。
E: Senior manager of the Strategic Investment Department at the IPC and one of the Ten Stonehearts. His Cornerstone is the "aventurine of stratagems."\nAn ostentatious risk-taker, he often wears a smile that masks his true motives.\nHe won his current position by wagering against fate itself. He views life as a high-stakes, high-return investment, and he plays this particular gamble with masterful ease.

C: 「秩序」的美梦已然消散，但仍有人不会放下初愿。\n——折翼坠地的旅人，他的脚步将迈向何方？
E: The dream of the Order has dissipated, yet there are still those who will not give up on their original intent.\n — The traveler whose wings were clipped... whereto shall his footsteps lead?

C: 「▇▇▇月▇▇日 逃离雅努萨波利斯，至今已有十年。 十年时光，*我们*以脚步丈量大地，不知不觉间已将翁法罗斯走遍。 黑潮的发展比想象的更严重。自西至东，自南向北，甚至连高居天空的城邦也无法幸免于难…*我们*看着边境的蕞尔小国在一朝一夕间便被疯涨的黑潮吞噬，将生灵化作它的养料，随后以更加迅猛的姿态向前推进…翁法罗斯辉煌的往日不复存在，到处是触目惊心的腐坏，泰坦疯狂，英雄陨落，人民流离失所。 但醉心于纷争的人们看不到。 不久之前，黑潮已然迫近内陆。那里的城邦富庶，彼此之间交通发达，商业繁盛，但有人将*我们*的预言视为狂妄的戏言，有人将*我们*视作口吐不祥之语的祭司，无人聆听，无人驻足…如若一定要流下滚烫的血才能使众人团结，从*我们*开始又何妨？ 缇▇呵，我知道你已飞向黑潮的前线，送回了最新的消息，却身中黑潮造物的利箭死去。 缇▇呵，我知道你掩护难民离开，却遭到贵族的仇视，在刺客的匕首下奄奄一息。 缇▇呵，我知道你护送迷失的孩童，只差一步便能抵达安全之所。那明丽的发辫浸没在血泊之中，*我们*再也不能为你编织，为你梳洗。 一座又一座城邦的陷落，使世人从无休止的内战中抬起头来，看清这世界濒临毁灭的面貌。 羔羊的鲜血不会白流，我等在一片荆棘踏出最初的路，希冀后来的人，比*我们*行向更远……」 ——一篇年代久远的日记 纸张已薄如蝉翼，由缇安放在一个娃娃的怀中
E: "Date: ▇▇▇ / ▇▇ It's been ten years since we fled Janusopolis. In those ten years, we measured the earth with our steps, unknowingly covering every corner of Amphoreus. The spread of the black tide has been far worse than expected. From west to east, from south to north, even cities high in the sky have not been spared... We watched as tiny nations were consumed overnight by the growing black tide, turning all life into its fuel, surging forward with even greater force... The once-glorious past of Amphoreus is gone, replaced by overwhelming decay, raging Titans, fallen heroes, and displaced people. But those consumed by the Strife fail to see. The black tide has drawn near the inland cities. These cities are rich and well-connected, thriving on trade, but some dismissed our prophecy as nonsense and saw us as mere priests of bad omens, with no one listening, no one caring... If it takes shedding blood to unite the people, why not let it start with us? Tri▇▇▇▇, I know you went to the front lines to send word of the black tide's advance, only to be struck down by the arrows of Black Tide Creatures. Tri▇▇▇▇, I know you helped the refugees escape, only to be despised by the nobility and left to die by an assassin's dagger. Tri▇▇▇▇, I know you escorted lost children, so close to safety. Your bright braids are now soaked in blood, and we can no longer braid or care for them. With the fall of one city after another, the people are beginning to look beyond their endless conflicts and see the world on the brink of collapse. The blood of the innocent will not be shed in vain. We've walked the first steps through thorns, hoping those who follow us will go farther than we ever could..." — An ancient diary entry The paper as thin as a cicada's wings, left in the arms of a doll by Trianne

C: 与世相隔的忆域，烛火映出过往，于迷雾中悄然熄去。\n自那影中而来的记忆之子长夜月，隐匿「岁月」火种的黄金裔，掀起「忘却」的浪潮，守护镜中人的心愿\n——「别担心，我会为你看护『开拓』的前路…不惜任何代价♭」
E: In the Memory Zone secluded from the world, candlelight reflects the past, silently extinguishing in the mist.\nEvernight, child of Remembrance emerging from those shadows, the Chrysos Heir who conceals the Coreflame of "Time," raises the waves of "Oblivion" to protect the wishes of those in the mirror\n"Don't worry, I will guard the path of Trailblaze for you... at any cost. ♭"

C:
谐乐引你跌入美梦，糖浆与汽水充盈你的喉间。
节日盛大，人群喧哗，那些未曾谋面的人们披上伪装于梦中相聚。
你们饱览光怪陆离的风景，在晨曦微露之时分别——
此刻，至暗的午夜才刚刚开始。

时针嘀嗒转动，死亡如影随形。
你被当作筹码押上台面，却为自己赢得了揭晓秘密的权利。
你带上已死之人的梦，继续着他们未竟的路，面对他们不曾战胜的对手——

伪神汇聚众人的渴望而升起，万千人的齐唱淹没了你的存在。
行于不同道路的人拉起彼此的双手，
你们的旋律互相交织，虽微茫却如同长夜的灯火生生不息。
一个又一个人于梦中惊醒，而那微小的歌声最终汇成震耳欲聋的呐喊，冲破梦的帷幕。

永恒的美梦消散于一瞬，而你终于明白人们为何而沉睡
——为了从梦中醒来的明天。
E:
The harmonious music guides you to stumble into the sweet dream, as syrup and soda fill your throat.
The festival is grand, the crowd boisterous, and strangers cast on disguises to meet up in the dream.
You view to your hearts' desires the wondrous and otherworldly views, and part ways when dewdrops shimmer with the break of dawn —
When the pitch-black midnight has just begun.

The clock hands go tick-tock, and death follows closely like a shadow.
You are placed onto the table as a bargaining chip, but manage to win for yourself the right to uncover the secret.
You bring with you the dreams of the dead and continue on the road that they did not walk, facing the enemies they could not defeat—

The false god rises in the conglomeration of the multitude's wishes, and the unanimous song of the gazillions drowns out your existence.
Those walking on different roads take up each other's hands,
your melodies interweave with each other, faint but imperishable like the lights in a long night.
One after one, people startle awake from their dream. That tiny song finally merges into a deafening roar in the end, tearing free of the dream's curtains.

The eternal sweet dream scatters in a fleeting instant, and you finally understand why people slumber
— They do so towards a dawn freed from dreams.

C: 卡芙卡的弱点被击破时，我方全体恢复能量及战技点。
E: When Kafka's Weakness is broken, all allies will recover Energy and Skill Points.

C: 托帕：飞行家
E: Topaz: The Aviator

C: 星期日：循此苦旅
E: Sunday: On This Arduous Journey

C: 飞霄：矢射天狼
E: Feixiao: Arrow Shot to Lupine Rue

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。\n不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。\n你们成功打开了铁门，接下来只需躲避铁卫耳目、谨慎寻找出路即可。
E: You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.\nDespite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.\nYou successfully open the metal door. All that's left is to carefully find a way out while avoiding being caught by the Silvermane Guards.

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处买了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你已经取得了第二级认证，距离打开大门还差一级。加油！
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected the Level 2 Certification, just one more level until the gate opens. Keep it up!

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓之旅终于圆满地告一段落了。\n一段旅程落幕，另一段旅程即将开始。\n坐稳扶好，列车要重新启动了！
E: The trailblazing expedition on Jarilo-VI has finally reached a satisfying conclusion.\nOne journey ends, just as another is about to begin.\nSit tight — the Express will be starting up soon!

C: 在引路人青雀的带领下，你们抵达了仙舟负责演算与信息的太卜司。此间飞阁连云，悬圃冲霄，颇有神秘气氛。\n更神秘的是，太卜司门关紧锁，毫无待客迎门的意思，连自己人青雀也被拒之门外。
E: Led by the messenger, Qingque, you arrive at the Divination Commission, which is responsible for calculation and information management in Xianzhou. The eaves of this building build upon each other like raising mountain peaks and exude an aura of mystique.\nMore mysterious still is the fact that the Commission's doors are shut and show no signs of being prepared for guests, and even Qingque is shut out despite being a staff member.

C: 按照景元所想，欲得知星核猎手的真正意图，普通的审问手法毫无作用。唯有借太卜司中名为「穷观」的法阵，鉴往知来，演算真相。\n如今，穷观阵的三大阵基再度周转如恒。万事俱备，只欠「审问」。
E: Jing Yuan postulates that ordinary interrogations will not be effective in learning the true motive of the Stellaron Hunters. Such a goal can only be achieved using the computational algorithm named Matrix of Prescience in the Divination Commission, which can examine the past and future and calculate the truth.\nNow, the three great base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience are once again in motion. All is ready for the "interrogation."

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 黄泉带领你来到了一座大厅。她为你指明路线，但在你看来这个房间里似乎并没有可供穿行的通道。\n四下探索，寻找真正的道路吧。
E: Acheron leads you to a lobby. She points out a path for you, but you see no clear path through this room.\nSearch around to find the true path.

C: 这次的跃迁过程似乎有些蹊跷——一眨眼，你便发现自己从观景车厢的柔软沙发上消失，转而来到了一处陌生的地方。一位陌生人将你唤醒，声称她和你偶然共享了一片梦境，并表示会带领你寻找出路。\n跟上她，离开这里吧。
E: This warp jump is quite unusual. In the blink of an eye, you transition from the comfortable couch of the Parlor Car to an unfamiliar location. A stranger awakens you, claiming that both of you coincidentally share the same dream, and offers to guide you to an exit. \nFollow her guidance and leave this area.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n跨越了重重阻碍，终点已经离你们不远了。只是路上有不少怪物盘踞，你们应当小心前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nAfter overcoming a variety of obstacles, your final destination lies just ahead. Unfortunately, there are many monsters occupying the path ahead. Proceed with caution.

C: 列车组的各位也平安抵达了「黄金的时刻」，并和你交换了各种信息。经过一番激烈的讨论，你们决定答应砂金的合作请求。列车组的各位似乎都各有心事，但也该到拟定下一步计划的时候了。
E: The Crew safely arrives at the Golden Hour and exchanges info with you. After an intense discussion, you all decide to work with Aventurine. Everyone on the Crew seems preoccupied, but it's time to plan the next move.

C: 视角又来到了另一边。有时候，你总觉得自己好像活在电影里——否则视角怎么会跳变得这样厉害呢？
E: Once again, the focus shifts. Sometimes, you feel as though you're living in a movie — nothing else can explain the constant switch of the point-of-view.

C: 你的礼金就快用光了，耳边的嗡鸣声也越来越响。这可不是什么好兆头——你得加快脚步了。
E: You are about to run out of money, and the ringing in your ears is getting louder. It does not bode well, and you need to hurry up.

C: 你们在探视的过程中遇见了一位尤为惹眼的女性——她装扮成你的样子，大摇大摆地走在格拉克斯大道上，不知是在酝酿什么阴谋。\n为了匹诺康尼，也为了捍卫你的肖像权，你们必须得和她理论一番。
E: During your exploration, you encounter an eye-catching woman... She is disguised as you and strutting brazenly down Glaux Avenue. You cannot fathom what kind of scheme she is brewing.\nFor the sake of Penacony and to protect your identity, you must have a firm discussion with her.

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 对于托帕来说，匹诺康尼这个项目还未开始就已经结束了。钟表匠的遗产争夺、砂金的盛大死亡、星期日的成神野心…这些大事件全都与她擦肩而过。\n但现在，她却必须走到台前，完成与家族代表的谈判。托帕对此并无怨言——一来她是个专业人士；二来，她享受踢出这临门一脚的感觉。
E: For Topaz, the Penacony project was over before it even started. The struggle for Watchmaker's Legacy, Aventurine's memorable demise, Sunday's ambition to become a god... She had brushed up against all of these major events.\nBut now, she had to step forth and complete negotiations with The Family's rep. Topaz had no complaints about this... First of all, she is a professional, and second of all, she loves the feeling of shooting that game-winner.

C: 又一次回到了白日梦酒店，曾经承载你诸多回忆的入梦港埠。入梦前不必回顾过去的痕迹，因为每次睡眠都会带来一场崭新的美梦…或噩梦。\n到前台办理入住手续吧，你应该很熟悉这个流程了。
E: Once more, you find yourself at The Reverie, the gateway into the Dreamscape that is imbued with many of your memories. There is no need to reflect on your past before diving into the Dreamscape, because each sleep births a brand-new sweet dream... or a nightmare.\nGo check in at the front desk. It's a process you should find very familiar.

C: 可怖！于梦境营销课上，种种歪理•邪说层出不穷，此番邪祟若是继续误忍子弟，后果不堪设想！球棒•忍者，快用你的忍术阻止它吧！\n对猴子用钟表把戏试试吧…你不禁好奇，钟表把戏到底能用在多少地方，下次对着垃圾桶试试？
E: Alarming! In the Dream Marketing class, deceptive and malevolent rhetoric is rampant. If this fiendling continues its misguidance of the students, it could cause serious consequences! Baseball Bat Ninja! Use your ninjutsu to stop it!\nTry using your Clockwork on the monkey... You can't help but wonder just how many uses Clockwork has. Maybe try it on a trashcan next time?

C: 这一点和现实世界极为相似——梦境开始向人们提出完全不合理的要求。\n尝试打破更多的规则，找到余音的来源。
E: This is very reminiscent of the real world... The Dreamscape is starting to make completely unreasonable requests of people.\nTry breaking some more rules to find the source of the Afterechoes.

C: 好一个不要笑挑战——我快笑得裂开了原来并非空谈。\n为了解决眼前的异状，先在附近和「停云们」谈谈吧，或许会有哪一位很好说话呢？
E: So much for a "try not to laugh" challenge... Turns out people can really split themselves from laughing.\nTo solve this anomaly at hand, go chat with these Tingyuns nearby. Maybe one of them will be easy to talk to?

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 为了医救城外的无名伤者，风堇暂时驻留奥赫玛，缇安、遐蝶与{NICKNAME}三人先行前往树庭——信仰{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的学术圣地。
E: With Hyacine remaining in Okhema to treat the unnamed wounded person, Trianne, Castorice, and {NICKNAME} head to the Grove — the academic sanctuary dedicated to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: *我们*感知到，缇安又使用神力了，*我们*很担心她的情况…阿雅感觉到*我们*的忧虑，答应一起去趟浴场散心。
E: We sense that Trianne used her divine power again. We're worried about her... Agy noticed our concern and agreed to go to the baths together to unwind.

C: 浴场中多人离奇昏倒，经风堇诊断，病因竟是水温过高。而其幕后黑手究竟是…？
E: Multiple visitors suddenly pass out in the baths. Hyacine's examination shows an unexpected reason: overheated water. But who is the culprit...?

C: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
E: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

C: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
E: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

C: 学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。\n别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。
E: Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch.\nDon't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: {NICKNAME}的思绪被拉回了创世涡心，回到了再创世的前一刻，与白厄一同，直面最后的来客——那位燃尽的救世之人，与它所践行的意志。
E: {NICKNAME}'s thoughts are pulled back to the Vortex of Genesis, to the moment before the Era Nova, to when they are standing beside Phainon and facing the final visitor: The one who burned to nothingness for salvation and the will they are carrying out.

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
E: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 在第一可疑藏匿点蹲守失败后，拉明娜继续履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹。在她的带领下，你结结实实地一脚踩入了水魈布设的圈套。所幸拉明娜随身携带治愈药剂，怪物突袭终成了一场虚妄的陷阱。\n经历连环挫败，你与拉明娜改换策略，重审「宓堂传语」，前往密信所指地点，这一次，绝不失手。
E: You have gained nothing at the first of the suspected hiding places. Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. Under her guidance, you step into the trap set by the Xenohydro. Thankfully, Lamina brought some healing potions with her. The surprise monster attack turns out to be a fabricated pitfall.\nAfter a series of failures, you decide to change your strategy and re-examine the Letter From Locus Silentii. You head to the place the letter points out, and you won't miss again this time.

C: 原来，伯纳德所做一切都是为了掩盖残酷的真相：引力效应使科考队所在行星的附近的时空曲率发生了变化，两位有情人已经被分隔在不同的时空坐标系。\n对他来说，她成了一个徘徊于未来的幽灵；对她而言，他早已垂垂老矣，乃至死去。他们之间的一次对话，也许需要他用一生的时间去等待。\n最终，将由你来决定是否将这个真相告诉他。
E: So everything Bernard did was to cover up the brutal truth: That gravitational effects have caused a change in the spacetime curvature near the planet the research team was on. The two lovers are now separated into two different space-time coordinates.\nTo him, she has become a ghost that wanders in the future. And to her, he has long grown old and perished. He may have to wait an entire lifetime for them to speak to one another just once.\nIn the end, it is your choice whether to tell him the truth or not.

C: 看看阿德勒对黑塔的委托有何见解
E: See what Adler has to say about Herta's commission.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n姬子来了。合同没签，布洛妮娅自有妙计。必须找到托帕。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHimeko is here. Didn't sign the contract. Bronya has a plan. Must find Topaz.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 你击败了倒卖假药的「互助会」会长和他手下的狗腿子们，粉碎了他们继续谋财害命的阴谋。\n娜塔莎对你提供的帮助表示了感激，她邀请你回到诊所和她再聊一次。\n这次，也许她终于能将瓦赫的故事完整地讲给你听了。
E: You defeat the president of the mutual aid society and his helpers, stopping them from ripping off and murdering people by selling counterfeit drugs.\nNatasha shows her appreciation for you and invites you to the clinic again to chat with her.\nMaybe she will finally tell you the whole story about Vache.

C: 克拉拉发短信邀你一同前往查看帕斯卡的状况。有空时不妨前往铆钉镇的「淬火工坊」与克拉拉会合吧。
E: Clara sent you an invitation to go check out Pascal. Go meet up with Clara at the Tempering Workshop in Rivet Town.

C: 卢卡的一连串反常行为引起了你和希儿的怀疑。\n为了一探事情的究竟，你们尾随他来到了铆钉镇。\n卢卡在孤儿院前留下了一个神秘的盒子。上去打开它，看看那里面究竟藏着什么样的秘密。
E: Luka's string of weird behaviors have made you and Seele quite suspicious.\nYou follow him to Rivet Town in order to find out the truth of the matter.\nLuka left a mysterious box before the orphanage. Go and open it, and see what kind of secret lies within.

C: 大毫似乎有事找你。可能是在见识了你的手腕之后，想请你协助解决一些麻烦吧。
E: Dahao seems to have something to say to you. Maybe he wants you to help with some issues after he witnessed your abilities.

C: 你击败了执信…或者现在该称他为「紫月季」。长乐天的药王秘传组织姑且算是被捣毁了，你的任务也暂告一段落。现在该去和青镞汇报一下情况了。
E: You defeated Zhixin... or Mauve Moon, since that's what he goes by now. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus Exalting Sanctum chapter's efforts can now be considered nullified, and your mission has concluded. Report to Qingzu about the current situation.

C: 陶德在光印拓迹里找到了一些新思路，但光靠文字与照片资料，这显然不足以催生出一个成熟而完整的课题。他央求你带他偷偷潜入鳞渊境，在你的陪伴下，他将亲眼瞧瞧照片中的考古资料……
E: Todd got some new ideas from the Optical Markings, but text and photos alone are not enough to generate a mature and complete research topic. He begs you to secretly take him into Scalegorge Waterscape to see with his own eyes the archaeological sites in the photos...

C: 你的机警令陶德相信了你，并将逃离仙舟的计划和盘而出。现在你所需要做的，就是等待他主动联系你……
E: Your careful behavior makes Todd trust you, and he reveals all his plan to escape from Xianzhou. All you need to do now is to wait for him to contact you...

C: 檀檀决定与你分头行动，他去追缉肇事星槎，而你去照顾伤者。丹鼎司医馆的医士正在赶来，去问问伤者，看看能否联系上亲属。
E: Tantan decides to split up with you. He dashes off to chase the speeding starskiff, and you are tasked with looking after the wounded. Healers from the Alchemy Commission apothecary are on their way over. Speak with the wounded and see if you can contact their next of kin.

C: 不出所料，只要是有能让你来修理玉兆的机会，罗浮人都会毫不客气地让给你，去给他们露一手看看吧。\n你已经玩过好几次了，说真的，这也不难，为什么大家都不肯自己动手呢？
E: As expected, whenever there is an opportunity to make you fix jade abaci, Luofu residents will take it. Go and give them a hand.\nYou've done it a few times by now. Honestly, it's not difficult to fix, but why does nobody want to do it themselves?

C: 修复「建木」封印是罗浮持明的职责所在，罗浮持明的龙尊和拥有前代龙尊力量之人，需要在建木玄根前共同承担职责。\n丹恒说过自己想要将力量还给持明龙尊，但这力量哪里是想借就借，想还就还的呢？
E: It is the duty of the Luofu Vidyadhara to repair the Ambrosial Arbor's seal. The high elder of the Luofu Vidyadhara and the one who possesses the power of the previous high elder must shoulder this duty together before the roots of the arbor.\nDan Heng said he wishes to return his power to the Luofu high elder, but such powers cannot simply be borrowed or returned on a whim.

C: 将灵感收集完成的玉兆交给小聪，他能通过「大数据训练」的方式创造出最棒的「诗仙机器人」。\n想到小聪费了这么大的力气就是为了写出一首体面的情诗，你不禁感到有些疲惫。\n这就是闲着没事的仙舟年轻人吗？
E: Give Cong the collected Inspo Jade Abaci so that he can create the best "Poetic Genius Ingenium" through "big data training."\nThinking about how much effort Cong has gone through just to write a respectable love poem, you can't help but feel a little exhausted.\nIs this what it's like being a Xianzhou youth with too much free time?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 你与希露瓦许久未见，没曾想却要因为这样可笑的理由再会。这也许算是祸兮福之所倚，也许只是命运的荒谬在作祟。
E: You haven't seen Serval in a long time, but you never thought you would meet again for such a ridiculous reason. This may be a blessing in disguise, or it may just be the absurdity of fate.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 云璃的爷爷怀炎将军似乎打算瞒着云璃接收异乡送回的宝剑。不管有没有什么隐情，云璃是不会错过「传奇宝剑」的。\n约好与云璃在司辰宫前碰头，可别忘记了。
E: Seems like General Huaiyan is planning to accept the repatriation of the sword while keeping it a secret from his granddaughter, Yunli. Even if there's a catch, Yunli would never miss an opportunity to lay her eyes upon the legendary sword.\nDon't forget that you've agreed to meet Yunli at the Palace of Astrum's entrance.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n跟随孤云继续前进。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nFollow Guyun and continue onward.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 于司辰宫顶端，天击将军一击定鼎。而此时此刻，在金人巷中，你和貊泽从大战的余波中起身搜寻幸存者……以及椒丘的下落。
E: Atop the Palace of Astrum, the Merlin's Claw brings the battle to an end with a single attack. Meanwhile, Moze and you emerge from the battle's aftermath in Aurum Alley and begin the search for survivors... as well as for news about Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.

C: 在剑锋及体的瞬间，凭着往日淬炼与历次惨败所得之剑艺，年轻的剑士终于胜出。该是将狼重新囚禁起来的时候了。
E: When steel finally touches flesh, the young swordmaster emerges victorious at last, thanks to the swordsmanship skills that she has gained through diligent training and countless defeats. It is time to put the wolves behind bars once more.

C: 螺丝咕姆成功说服了家族，取回了查德威克的记忆。\n回到空间站，和黑塔、螺丝咕姆一起同查德威克博士道别。
E: Screwllum has convinced The Family and retrieved Chadwick's memories.\nReturn to the space station and bid farewell to Dr. Chadwick, accompanied by Screwllum and Herta.

C: 佩德罗与你一起到尾翼视察，提出更换尾翼涂装与为飞艇命名的事项，你心中浮现了几种方案……
E: You and Pedro inspect the airship's empennage. As he raises the business of changing the empennage paint and naming the airship, several ideas come to your mind...

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n拍张纪念合照，不知道摆什么动作的时候，记得单手手指插兜…好吧，你用不着如此拘谨。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nWhen taking a commemorative picture, if you don't know what pose to do, then you can put one hand in your pocket... Scratch that. There's no need to be so formal.

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊。你想起和缇宝他们收留的那批难民…重渊可不是个适合生活的地方。
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss. You cannot help but think of the refugees that Tribbie and the others accepted into their land... The Abyss is no place to live.

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nSometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n去上层区找到贝洛伯格教育部的官员，看看对方有没有本事把你这个天才难住。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nGo to the Overworld to find officials of the Belobog Ministry of Education and see if they are able to have you stumped.

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 请与地概科的老前辈伯纳德沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the veteran of Department of Cosmic Geography, Bernard, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 试着向希露瓦打听乐队专辑的事吧！
E: Ask about Serval's band album!

C: 你再一次通过了禁区演练。\n和「少校」聊聊，领取你的奖励吧。
E: You passed the restricted zone training once again.\nTalk to the Major and collect your reward.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「追猎行动」。\n地衡司以行医市集为陷阱布置饵食，希望由你抓住引起异象的扑满……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "cloudhymn magic imitation" is a Warp Trotter's doing. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to go on a "hunt."\nThe Realm-Keeping Commission has placed baited traps all over Healer's Market, and they hope you can capture the Trotter causing the abnormalities...

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 拦路八卦的两位黄金裔向你透露了维吉妮娅与阿波罗尼的一些旧事，你手中的这封信似乎愈发沉重了。
E: Two gossiping Chrysos Heirs who stopped you slipped some history between Verginia and Apollonius. The letter in your hands now seems even heavier.

C: 这次的「异常」扑满和以往的都不同，雷金也很担心你是否遭遇了意外情况。返回歌德宾馆，让彼此都安个心！
E: This anomalous Trotter is different from the ones before. Regin is concerned that you might have gotten into an accident. Return to the Goethe Hotel and put each other's minds at ease!

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据旧照片找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on an old photo.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是磐岩镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Boulder Town...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 一位名叫维尔德的公司员工向你强烈推荐一款名叫《以太战线》的游戏，并对你发出参加「星际决胜庆典」的邀请。\n维尔德声称，必须前往专门的服务大厅注册账号才能体验这款游戏。不如去看看他还能搞出什么名堂。
E: An IPC worker named Wilder is passionately promoting a game named Aetherium Wars to you, and sent you an invitation for the Interastral Tournament Festival.\nWilder claims you can only play this game by heading to a specific lobby to register an account. Why don't you go and see what tricks he has up his sleeve...

C: 除了你以外，本次大赛还有四匹实力非凡的黑马。若想挑战冠军，必须先将他们一一击败才行。
E: Aside from you, this competition also has four other dark horse contenders with serious prowess. If you want to make a run for the championship, you need to take them out one by one first.

C: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「凶宅」的帖子引起了你们的注意。桂乃芬私信发帖人之后，认为这个选题不仅与岁阳有关，还是涨粉的大好选题。你们决定去丹鼎司与发帖人见个面……
E: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning a haunted residence catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sent a private message to the poster, she now believes this issue is not only related to heliobi but also great content that can get more fans. You decide to go to the Alchemy Commission to meet up with the poster...

C: 与岁阳一番交流之后，你们意识到，那个自称是「房东」的家伙并不单纯。你们应该将房产证交给他，但同时，你们也有些问题要问个清楚。
E: After conversing with the heliobus, you realize that the man calling himself the "landlord" is not as simple as he looked. You should give the deed to him, but he also needs to answer some questions.

C: 房东所说的房产证应该就在这保险箱之中，解开保险箱上的密码，就能找到房产证，完成任务。\n至于打开密码的线索，也许石碑上会有解谜的信息……
E: The deed the landlord spoke of should be inside this safe. Crack the password on the safe, and you will be able to find the deed and complete the mission.\nMaybe there is some information on the stone monument that works as clues for the password...

C: 观众们似乎都对《美梦往事》有着不同的看法，「钟表匠」的目的应该也实现了，去把好消息告诉皮斯吧。
E: It seems that all the viewers have their own thoughts on Dreamjoy Memoir. This should have also completed the Watchmaker's vision. Go and tell Pisce the good news.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 无名客在梦里落入了人间，人间在梦里接住了无名客。
E: Nameless falls from the dream into the mortal realm, while the mortal realm catches Nameless in dreams.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C:
你应该猜得出这位「独立参赛者•铁臂」是谁，所以这里还是不要欲盖弥彰了。

和你聊些无关紧要的星天演武仪典幕后八卦吧。
你可能发现了，虎克和史瓦罗没怎么在故事中登场。这其实是因为他们有自己的事要忙。
除了偷偷参赛，史瓦罗还要带着虎克在罗浮四处逛街。他想给克拉拉带一些伴手礼，但不知道该买些什么。于是他就「计算」了一下——同为女孩子，虎克一定知道该给克拉拉买什么伴手礼！听她的准没错！

十数日后，机械聚落。
克拉拉看着面前整整六箱子苏打豆汁儿，陷入了沉思。
E:
You can probably guess who this "Independent Contestant — Iron Arm" is, so there's no need to play up the mystery here.

Let's chat about some unimportant Luminary Wardance behind-the-scenes gossip instead.
You might have discovered that Hook and Svarog didn't make much of an appearance in the story. It's because they are busy with their own affairs.
Apart from taking part in the competition, Svarog is also visiting the shops in Luofu with Hook. He wants to bring some souvenirs to Clara but doesn't know what to buy, so after some "calculation" — He figures that Hook, as another female child, must know what to buy for Clara! He can't go wrong listening to Hook!

A few days later in the Robot Settlement,
Clara sinks into deep thought as she gazes upon the six boxes of mung bean soda before her.

C: 完成「枘凿六合」简单模式III
E: Complete Hexanexus Easy Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n和乐队成员们会合，交流当前的进展并商量后续行动。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nMeet up with the band members, discuss what you have so far, and figure out what to do from here.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n舞台附近突然发生了骚动，去看看情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nA ruckus suddenly starts near the stage. Go check it out.

C: 要如何解开一道没有题目的难题？
E: How do you solve a puzzle that lacks a question?

C: 你似乎好久没探索过「派对车厢」了。今天难得清闲，去看看吧。\n什么？你说你根本不记得列车上有这么个车厢？呃哈哈…一定是你记错了！
E: It's been so long since you explored the Party Car. It's rare to have free time like today, so let's go take a look.\nWhat? You say you don't remember a car like this on the Express? Ahahah... You must have misremembered it!

C: 三月七声称有要事需要你帮忙，邀请你在折纸大学见面。快去看看吧，可别让她等急了。
E: March 7th wants to meet you in Paperfold University, citing her need for your help. Go check it out. Don't make her wait for too long.

C: 你的梦境被神秘的力量打断，是时候回去继续预言梦了。
E: Your dream is interrupted by a mysterious force, and so it's time to return to the prophetic dream.

C: 公司高管们齐聚一堂，看来这个项目对他们非常重要。
E: All the IPC executives have gathered. Looks like this project is a big deal to them.

C: 参观永冬铭碑
E: Visit the Everwinter Monument

C: 寻找裂界出口，逃脱追捕
E: Find a way to leave the Fragmentum and shake off the pursuers

C: 给希露瓦和克拉拉看看照片
E: Show the photo to Serval and Clara

C: 绕路穿过流云渡，和列车组汇合
E: Go around Cloudford and reconvene with the Express Crew

C: 搜寻可能与卡芙卡有关的线索
E: Search for any clues that may be related to Kafka

C: 帮助太卜司，重启穷观阵的三座阵基
E: Help the Divination Commission to restart the Matrix of Prescience's three base terminals

C: （可选）找砂金聊聊
E: (Optional) Talk to Aventurine

C: 跟随桑博，体验「大人的世界」
E: Follow Sampo and experience "the adult side of things"

C: 继续跟随流萤，抵达筑梦边境深处
E: Continue following Firefly to reach the depths of the Dream's Edge

C: 向引导员了解挑战内容
E: Learn about the challenge from the guide

C: 寻求拼图绅士的帮助
E: Seek the Puzzle Gentleman's assistance

C: 抵达终点
E: Reach the finish line

C: 跟随米沙，帮助米沙拾回记忆
E: Follow Misha and help him recover his memories

C: 打听「慈玉典押」的位置
E: Ask about the location of the Bonajade Exchange

C: 查看来自列车组的短信
E: View the message from the Crew

C: 阻止筑梦蕉师的错误「蕉学」
E: Stop the Dreamweaver BananAdvisor's misleading banacademic lecture

C: 前往艾迪恩公园
E: Head to Aideen Park

C: 唤醒昏迷的丹恒
E: Wake up the unconscious Dan Heng

C: （可选）远眺万径之门
E: (Optional) View the Gate of Infinity from a distance

C: 去吧！直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利
E: Go and meet Nikador, Lance of Fury!

C: 替三月七拍摄巨木留念
E: Help March 7th take a picture of the giant tree as a keepsake

C: 觐见欧洛尼斯，恢复记忆
E: Have an audience with Oronyx and regain memories

C: 跟随传令兵，与元老凯妮斯会面
E: Follow the Messenger and meet with Elder Caenis

C: 前往「呓语密林」神悟树庭，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Murmuring Woods" Grove of Epiphany and continue your adventure

C: 操作西风罗盘，重新架设道路
E: Use the West Wind Compass to rebuild the path

C: 与丹恒汇合
E: Meet up with Dan Heng

C: 追上逃跑的斯科特
E: Chase down the fleeing Skott

C: 前进，延续漫长的旅途
E: Go forth. Continue the long journey

C: 返回「神话之外」，继续冒险

E: Silver Wolf increases all training levels to Lv. 5, as will slightly increase other stats during training

C: 椒丘提供的药膳价值不菲，却并非灵药，于是他提到了「赤龙血」……
E: The medicinal dishes provided by Jiaoqiu are quite expensive, but they are no miracle potions. So, he mentioned the "Crimson Dragon Blood"...

C: 你从冰里醒来？
E: Rescued from the ice?

C: 对不起。
E: Sorry.

C: 意思就是…列车组有活要干啦！
E: That we've gotta get busy!

C: ——而且，在四十五系统时前，一颗星核在罗浮上…爆发了。
E: Not to mention, <unbreak>45</unbreak> system hours ago... a Stellaron burst occurred on the Luofu.

C: 坐标在这里，一切交由你们自己决定。
E: Here are the coordinates. It's up to you how to proceed.

C: 你要多加小心，{NICKNAME}。卡芙卡不会永远对你视而不见。
E: You must be extra vigilant, {NICKNAME}. Kafka won't always turn a blind eye.

C: 不过在房间里耽搁了一会，就又发生意外了啊。
E: ...Seems like the longer I spend in my room, the stranger things are when I emerge.

C: 你这个没有原则的女人！
E: You're so capricious!

C: 请耐心等待接驳…请耐心等待接驳…请耐心等待接驳……
E: Please await transfer... Please await transfer... Please await transfer...

C: 这家伙看着就有神秘的过去，这回又恰巧让咱们撞上了罗浮，可不得一探究竟！
E: That guy sure has a mysterious past. We gotta take this opportunity on the Luofu to dig into it!

C: 此去仙舟，多多小心。我整理了一些仙舟情报，希望有所助益。
E: You need to take extra care on this expedition. I've compiled some intel on the Xianzhou for you, I hope it comes in useful.

C: （说谎）拿到了。
E: We got it.

C: 这可是我们三个的功劳哦，对吧{NICKNAME}！
E: The three of us actually pulled it off, huh {NICKNAME}!

C: 这就是平凡且伟大的赞歌。但愿雅利洛-Ⅵ的人们也能从自己的经历中参会同样的精神。
E: This goes to show how much of a difference ordinary people can make. I hope Jarilo-VI sees that too.

C: 说实话，我不知道他有什么成绩。他的著作和发明完全没有流传下来——但总要有个位置留给俱乐部的创始人，不是吗？
E: Frankly, I don't know what he has achieved. None of his books and inventions have survived, but there's gotta be a place for the founder of the Society, right?

C: 内里似乎还蕴含着能量，有待进一步研究。
E: It seems to contain a certain kind of energy. Pending further research.

C: 太空植物，你没见过，但很熟悉。
E: Some space plants. You've never seen them before, but they feel familiar.

C: 我发了很多封信件，全都石沉大海。姬子小姐了解她的，空间站就是她收容追随者和奇物的仓库，完全没放在心上。
E: I sent multiple letters, all met with silence. You know her, Himeko, the space station is but a mere warehouse for followers and rare items. She doesn't really care about it.

C: 很多事她都没告诉我这个「站长」。
E: Even from me, the lead researcher, there are many things she keeps secret.

C: 哈哈，和你聊天，我的心情似乎也平静了一些。果然多和人交流，心情就会变好。
E: Huh, chatting with you seems to have lightened my mood. It seems like talking can really raise one's spirits.

C: 我不是很懂科研，但能保护珍视研究的人们顺利完成他们的研究，就足够了。
E: I don't know much about science, but I'm glad to be able to protect people in pursuit of their research.

C: 那我再说一遍。
E: Don't worry, I'll go over it again.

C: 这不是你的错。
E: It's not your fault.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着托帕：「2分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Topaz: "2 points!" it announces.

C: 这位就是空间站真正的主人，「天才俱乐部」#83，黑塔。
E: This is the true master of the space station — Genius Society number <unbreak>83</unbreak>, Herta.

C: 唔…现在想想，好像也挺惊险的哦…可能因为和大家在一起，所以有任何问题基本都不是什么问题啦。
E: Huh... looking back now, it all seems quite dangerous... But I had the crew there with me, so the problems didn't seem all that bad.

C: 不是想吓唬你，但说实话：只要它还在你体内，就谈不上获救。
E: ...I don't want to frighten you, but the truth is you won't ever be in the clear while it is still inside your body.

C: 先等等…
E: Wait...

C: 对哦，这还是你第一次的旅行，那…应该是双倍的兴奋？
E: Wait, this is your first trip! So that should be double the excitement, right?

C: 来得太慢了！不过这下人总算到齐了。
E: You took long enough! But at least everyone's here now.

C: 而这种畸变侵蚀现象传播的形式，则是「星核」。
E: The mechanism whereby this mutation and corrosion spreads is the Stellarons.

C: 甚至没有三月七。
E: Not even March 7th is there.

C: 哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
E: Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 谢谢您，「大守护者」。
E: Thank you, Supreme Guardian.

C: 他的原话是「偶尔会有演出」，你把最关键的两个字给屏蔽了。
E: He said "you can sometimes catch an outdoor performance..." "Sometimes" being the operative word.

C: 三月，当时在克里珀堡——
E: March, earlier in Qlipoth Fort—

C: 那不可能逃过丹恒的眼睛啦。
E: Well, there's no way he'd get past Dan Heng's sharp eyes.

C: {NICKNAME}，三月，做好逃跑的准备。
E: {NICKNAME}, March, be ready to make an escape.

C: 他们冲进去了！
E: They charged straight in!

C: 先去会一会他们吧，在这里瞎猜也无济于事。
E: Let's go and meet them. We won't know until we're down there.

C: 噢，这样啊……
E: Oh, I see...

C: 真威风呀…我以后也想成为和他一样强壮的银鬃铁卫！
E: So impressive... I want to become as strong a Silvermane Guard as him!

C: 杰帕德？可别…他人很正直，但可是出了名的一根筋。
E: Gepard? Not a chance... He's a decent guy, but also famously uncompromising.

C: 硬攻不成，不妨智取。这样吧，我亲自带你们过去，如何？
E: This calls for brainwaves, not "brawnwaves." How about I take you over myself?

C: 想到说服杰帕德的办法吗？
E: Have you thought of a way to persuade Gepard?

C: 要不…咱就直接把它拆开呗？
E: Or... we could just dismantle it?

C: 让我们出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我，布洛妮娅•兰德，贝洛伯格第十九任「守护者」，在此宣誓——
E: I, Bronya Rand, the nineteenth guardian of Belobog, hereby take my oath...

C: 好主意，拍完也给她们看看。
E: Good idea. Let's show them the photos once we're done.

C: 上任仪式进行得很顺利。我是没想到，居然会有那么多下层区居民跑来听宣讲。
E: The inauguration ceremony went very smoothly. I didn't expect so many Underworlders to come and listen to the address.

C: …不过？
E: ...But?

C: 只是对我来说，缺少了「星核」这个曾经疯狂追逐的课题…心里难免有点空落落的。
E: I just... feel a bit empty now that we've lost the Stellaron — I spent a long time pursuing it, after all...

C: 这些积灰的文件…
E: These dusty papers...

C: 那我可要敞开喝了。
E: Well, I'll help myself to the tea then.

C: 真的吗，你就这么答应了？
E: Really? You're gonna say yes just like that?

C: 不过姐姐的话你也别全信。就算真的有剪报，大概率也已经被她弄丢了。
E: I'd take that with a grain of salt. Even if they do exist, odds are she lost them.

C: 你舍得让杰帕德一个人留着吗？
E: Can you bear to leave Gepard here by himself?

C: 听好了，这件事你可以告诉你的夫人，但不许报警，不然你这个月的工作成果将会变成一桶废纸，领导会怎么看待你？相信夫人一定不愿发生这种事吧。
E: Feel free to tell your wife about this, but refrain from raising the alarm... unless you want your achievements for the month to become confetti? I'm not sure your boss or your wife would like that to happen.

C: 好看的垃圾桶，但也只是个垃圾桶。
E: A nice-looking trashcan, but that's all it really is: A trashcan.

C: 那就好。你一直不醒，说些奇怪的梦话，我都开始担心了呢。
E: Good. You were out for a while, I was beginning to worry. You were saying some strange things.

C: 嗯哼，地下的环境很不好，这里的人很容易生病，而我就是他们唯一的医生。
E: Mm-hmm, I'm afraid the conditions underground are terrible. People get sick easily here, and I'm the only doctor.

C: 我听人说，这个小哥是银鬃铁卫的高手。
E: I heard someone say he's an elite Silvermane Guard.

C: 那是「炉心」，也是连结上下层区的支撑柱。以前人们会通过那根柱子上下往来，不过后来……
E: Oh, that's the Furnace Core, and it's also the pillar that connects the Underworld and the Overworld. People used to travel up and down that thing, but then...

C: 桑博说得对，不能袖手旁观。
E: Sampo's right, we can't just stand here.

C: 嘿，来得挺快啊。
E: Hey, you came. That was fast.

C: 是指和反物质军团的战争吧。
E: You mean the war with the Antimatter Legion?

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I can think of.

C: 兄弟！哈哈，感觉怪怪的。
E: Yeah! Haha... Wait, do you mean it?

C: 但如果一切灾厄只要封印了星核就能结束，我希望它是真实存在的……
E: But if all this catastrophe could be brought to an end simply by sealing it, then I hope its existence proves to be real.

C: 桑博提过一座「炉心」，人们通过那根柱子上下交通。而如今，上下层已经完全封锁了，只有地髓和物资的自动传输管道还在运转。
E: Sampo mentioned the Furnace Core, which people would use to travel in both directions. Yet now, each realm is sealed off from the other. Only the automatic transport line for Geomarrow and goods is still in operation.

C: 床摸上去不太柔软，但相比上层区宾馆室内冰冷的装潢，这间客房显然更有家的味道。
E: The bed isn't very soft, but this room feels more homey than the coldly-decorated Overworld hotel.

C: 越想越乱，越乱越想，根本找不着方向…我只是希望贝洛伯格的人民能过上更好的生活……
E: The more I think about it, the more disoriented I get, which in turn makes me think about it even more... I just want a better life for the people of Belobog...

C: 再者，你不是说了吗？有些矿工伤势很重，时间就是生命啊……
E: Besides, didn't you say some of the miners were gravely injured? Lives are on the line...

C: 啊，记得你之前也提过做了怪梦什么的……
E: Oh, I remember you mentioned something about strange dreams before...

C: 对了，布洛妮娅让我把这个交给你们。
E: Oh right, Bronya told me to give you this.

C: 希露瓦…啊，原来她是杰帕德的姐姐！
E: Oh, Serval! So she's Gepard's older sister!

C: 所以…原谅我的冒犯，我认为下令剿杀外来者是错误的选择。为了解决「星核」带来的问题，筑城者已经等了几百年，而他们几个可能就是——
E: So... I ask you to forgive my defiance, but I believe that the order to dispatch the outsiders was a mistake. To solve the problems brought on by the Stellaron, the Architects waited hundreds of years, and those outsiders may be the... the—

C: 那就这么约好了，我们在铆钉镇里见！虎克会到安全的地方等你的，可不许不来哦！
E: Then it's settled, let's meet in Rivet Town! I'll be waiting for you in a safe spot. You're not allowed to not come!

C: 你这高高在上的语气是怎么回事呀！
E: Hey, are you patronizing me!?

C: 说不定平时的样子才是装的…
E: Maybe she's actually a well-behaved kid pretending to be naughty...

C: 还是…自不量力，除了徒增新伤之外白跑一趟？
E: Or is {M#he}{F#she}... going beyond {M#his}{F#her} depth just to get some new scars for a show?

C: 你说的有道理，但是关我屁事。
E: You're right, but it's none of my business.

C: 「怪物盔甲」才赢了几场而已，看你激动成这样，差不多得了！
E: Monster Armor's only got a few wins. Look at you all worked up!

C: 我要参加揭幕战，可以吗？
E: I want to be in the opening match, is that OK?

C: 那是雪崩了吗？
E: What about an avalanche?

C: 真是奇怪…坐在缆车上的时候，脑海里明明堆满了回来以后想做的事……
E: It's funny... The moment I boarded the cable car, my mind was filled with everything I wanted to do on the surface...

C: 我明白了。请转告布洛妮娅，「地火」会尽一切努力协调治安工作的交接。但考虑到下层区的复杂状况，还请做好应对各种意外的准——
E: I agree. Tell Bronya that Wildfire will work with the Silvermane Guards on security matters. However, things aren't simple down here — please also tell her to draw up plans in case the situation demands—

C: 原来是这样…前线的战况我了解了。当然，我们这边也没歇着，一直忙着照顾矿区那边送来的伤员呢。
E: I see... Thanks for bringing me up to speed. The clinic has been busy while you were gone. We've treated many people — soldiers and civilians alike.

C: …所以，你其实一直在独自照看弟弟？真是太辛苦了。
E: ...So you're looking after your brother on your own? That must be hard.

C: 应该说，你让我彻底想明白了——我之所以会有离开的想法，更多是出于逃避的心理…那才是不成熟的体现。
E: What you said was the last piece of the puzzle for me. I suddenly realized that my decision to leave was just me trying to run away from my problems... Wasn't a mature decision.

C: …抱歉抱歉！我保证，这绝对是最后一次！
E: I'm so sorry! This is the last one, I promise!

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》里有各种各样的冒险故事，…不过这本《冒险鼹鼠队》有些奇怪，只有前言和目录，你先看看这页前言。
E: There are all kinds of stories in The Adventurous Moles... But this edition is a bit strange. It's only got the preface and the table of contents. Here, read the preface.

C: 它好像是在说这一本《冒险鼹鼠队》是有书页的，但是被藏了起来，但是想要找到书页的所在地，就必须得通过目录来发现线索。
E: It seems to be saying that this edition is meant to have book pages, but they are hidden somewhere, and we have to use the table of contents to find clues about those hidden pages.

C: 冒险故事就是会有吸引力。
E: Adventure stories are indeed fun to read.

C: …我不告诉你。
E: ...I am not telling you.

C: 你依稀记得某部电视剧里，律师钻进这样的垃圾箱，等待目标的犯罪证据从天而降。
E: You vaguely recall a television series where a lawyer hid inside a dumpster such as this and waited for an incriminating piece of evidence to appear out of thin air.

C: 打开。
E: Open.

C: 「你是个淳朴的人。」那个声音赞许地说，「我将给你你想要的。」
E: "You are a simple person," the voice says in an approving way, "I will give you what you want."

C: 公司将在未来的日子里，投入更多资源聚焦精神疾病问题，愿每个人、每个世界都能以积极健康的心态面对每一天。
E: In the days ahead, the IPC will allocate more resources towards addressing mental health issues, with the hope that every individual and every world can face each day with a positive and healthy mindset.

C: 把犯人带进去就没问题吗…
E: But it's okay for a wanted fugitive to find out...?

C: 就像有人提醒了她。
E: It's like someone told her it would happen.

C: 随便吧，我只在乎当下。
E: Whatever, I only care about the present.

C: 这都在她预料之中。
E: It was all within her expectations.

C: 记得，过程中一定要减少接触，免得你们的人也受那不明邪祟的侵蚀——
E: Remember to minimize contact — we don't want your people to succumb to the same evil...

C: 看照片应该就是这里了。这…是个牌馆？！在这儿能有什么麻烦？
E: It's the place in the photo alright. Is this... a games parlor!? What kind of problem can they possibly be facing?

C: 本小姐要专心救人
E: I need to focus on healing

C: 行商没有所属，四处漂泊，星海为家。但如果你好奇…我在联盟的注册地是仙舟「玉阙」；在公司的登记号隶属于北谷星：星和商城分部。
E: Merchants don't belong anywhere — we wander and make the stars our home. But if you're curious... Within the Alliance I'm registered at the Xianzhou Yuque. Within the IPC, I'm registered at the Star Unity Mall branch at the North Valley Star.

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 没多久…但本姑娘从小就接受严格的云骑式训练了！
E: Not that long ago... but I've been receiving strict Cloud Knight military training since I was a child!

C: 好吧，你快点哦。
E: Okay. Please be quick!

C: 不清楚，戴眼镜的人很多。
E: Sorry, that could be anyone around here...

C: 我是行商啊，来过这里很多次了。倒是你一个云骑，好像全不熟悉本地的路线似的。
E: I'm a traveling merchant, I've been here many times. Now, for a Cloud Knight to be unfamiliar with the local topography...

C: 这船是通往哪里的？
E: Wh—Where does it go?

C: 这根本就是借机推销吧？是敲诈吧？
E: You just want us to buy your things! This is extortion!

C: 我可是一直在等你们呐。
E: I've been waiting for you.

C: 卡芙卡似乎完全料中了我们每一步行动…各位，当心陷阱。
E: It seems like Kafka predicted our every move... Stay alert, all of you. We could be walking into a trap.

C: 景元吩咐过，各位是因缘际会而来的奇兵，端得一个「奇」字。适才云骑的强攻，乃是示敌以正。用奇之时，就在此刻。
E: Jing Yuan's orders. He said that the value of unexpected guests lies in the unexpected. The Cloud Knights' assault was to demonstrate our power to the enemy head-on... now it is time for the unexpected.

C: 何不早说药王秘传的事？
E: Why didn't you tell us about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus earlier?

C: 杨叔的意思是，真正的停云还……
E: You're saying that the real Tingyun is still...

C: 可、可是，这不应该啊。我们还没有到岁数，还没到魔阴身的岁数……
E: B—But this shouldn't be happening! We're still so young — we're not old enough to be stricken with mara yet...

C: 持箓，方可行动…
E: Command Talisman required for operation...

C: 走了，不打扰你练习了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 持明蜃影…这些过去的影子还没有消散吗？
E: A Vidyadhara Mirage Echo... Have these shadows of the past yet to disperse?

C: …那些情绪出现了，卡芙卡，我感觉到了。又是这种感觉！这种……
E: ...That feeling, Kafka — it's welling up within me. That feeling! I—It's...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>能做到的事情，我未必做得到。
E: I may not be capable of the things that <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> was capable of.

C: 我懂我懂，要是为难就不说了。谁还没点自己的秘密嘛。何况现在也不是刨根挖地满足好奇心的时候。
E: Okay, okay, I won't push you — everyone has their secrets. Besides, given the circumstances, my curiosity can wait.

C: 这里描绘的是持明族蜕生后，受年长同胞提携启蒙的成长岁月。
E: The mural depicts the Vidyadhara being guided by their elder, wiser kin after their rebirth.

C: 我也希望能以这场仪式告别停云。这是我的私心。虽然她并非殁于战场的云骑，但她依然是我天舶司的人，也是这场灾变的受害者。
E: It's also my way of saying farewell to Tingyun. I know, I'm selfish. She may not have died a Cloud Knight, but she's still one of us here at the Sky-Faring Commission — a victim caught up in a wider conflict.

C: 我和丹恒会先一步返回列车。你和三月办完了事可要早点回来啊。
E: Dan Heng and I will go back to the Express first. You and March finish up here and come back soon, alright?

C: 哦，原来如此！「闷葫芦」说来仙舟上与朋友汇合，那个朋友就是你吧？
E: Ahh, I see! Silent But Deadly told me something about meeting up with a friend. You must be them?

C: 我是米沙，匹诺康尼的服务生，很高兴为您服务。如需搬运行李……
E: I am Misha, a bell boy, working here on Penacony. Pleased to be at your service. If you need help with your baggage...

C: 我有点头晕……
E: I feel a bit faint...

C: 聆听、触碰、思考，由此你将获得感受——珍惜它，凭借感受，我们做出选择。所以回到最初的问题……
E: Hearing, touch, thought — through these, you gain emotions — cherish them. With emotions, we make choices. And so we return to the original question...

C: 但请相信，在那黑白的世界中会有一点红色稍纵即逝，但在你做出抉择之时，它必将再度示现……
E: But please believe me that in that monochrome world, there will be a glimpse of fleeting red, and when you make a choice, it will reappear before you once more...

C: 所以你也不信任我，这不就行了？还有，我没读过书，我父母也确实没教过这个——很遗憾，他们还没来得及教就走了。
E: So you don't trust me either. Now that was easy, wasn't it? Also, I didn't go to school, and my parents didn't teach me any of that. A pity, they left before they could impart any life lessons.

C: 我的话…会期待「热砂的时刻」，那里的野风、酒馆和{RUBY_B#「苏乐达™盛会海选•热砂分会场」}盛会海选{RUBY_E#}更有无名客的开拓色彩。「朝露的时刻」也是个不错的选择，可以借机拜访下家族。
E: As for me... I look forward to the Moment of Scorchsand — its wild winds, taverns, and {RUBY_B#SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions • Scorchsand Venue}festive choices{RUBY_E#} have more of a Nameless Trailblaze vibe. The Moment of Morning Dew is also a decent choice — I can use that chance to visit The Family.

C: 不好意思，可以告诉我回大堂的路该怎么走吗？这附近的走廊实在太像了……
E: Sorry, can you point me in the direction of the lobby? All these hallways really look the same to me...

C: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
E: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

C: （真是个奇怪的要求——但没关系，爱德华医生总会满足您！）
E: (What an odd request... but no matter! Dr. Edward will make it happen!)

C: 小意思。
E: Just part of the job.

C: 你先玩哦，我去买点喝的。
E: You keep playing. I'll go and get some drinks.

C: 一群居心叵测的人，挤在一片狭小的舞台上，谁都不想暴露在聚光灯下，就把可怜的小灰毛推到台前——
E: A small stage is crowded with a bunch of scheming people. None of them want to be exposed under the spotlight, so they all push you to the front...

C: 是、是！
E: S—Sure!

C: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
E: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

C: 人总有情绪失控的时候。
E: Everyone loses it once in a while.

C: 对，就是那个卡通人物…好像出现在了现实——我的意思是——梦境里。
E: Yes, that cartoon character. I think he's shown up in reality — I mean — in the Dreamscape.

C: 天哪天哪天哪…
E: Oh my, oh my, oh my...

C: 开玩笑的，来吧。
E: I'm kidding. Let's do it!

C: ——滴答！救命！救命！有人能帮帮我吗？
E: Tick-tock! Help! Help! Can anyone help me?

C: 我们是不是已经死了…
E: Don't tell me we're dead...

C: 米哈伊尔，你在里面吗？
E: Mikhail, are you in there?

C: 这里过不去，从旁边的走廊绕行吧。
E: We can't get through here. Let's take the way around from the side.

C: 我也想去…
E: I want to go too...

C: 好吗，米哈伊尔？
E: Okay, Mikhail?

C: 而你们，星穹列车的无名客，「开拓」之道的践行者…我相信你们的潜质，也相信你们将在这片舞台上绽放出的…独一无二的光辉。
E: As for you all, Nameless of the Astral Express, and practitioners of the Trailblaze... I have faith in your potential, as well as in the... unique splendor you will unleash on the stage.

C: 不，黄泉就在现场，不会是她。
E: No way. Acheron was right there at the scene. It couldn't have been her.

C: 这里…到处都是烧焦的残骸？
E: These are all... charred remains?

C: …收回前言。我们得尽快赶去那片烙印了流萤小姐身姿的忆域。以这位朋友的做事风格……
E: ...I take back what I said. We have to hurry to that Memory Zone where Miss Firefly's presence was imprinted. Considering what this person can do...

C: 这是…流萤？
E: Is that... Firefly?

C: 也许是想要侵吞遗产，也许是为了让知情者再少一人，也许…是因为这片忆域中隐藏更深的*秘密*，而为了钓起大鱼…需要浮饵。
E: They might have had their eyes on the legacy, or wanted to silence another who knew too much. Or, there could be a deeper secret tucked away in this Memory Zone, and to hook that elusive prize... one needs the right bait.

C: 我会保护你。等从他手中获取了更多信息，我再护送你回到同伴身边也不迟。
E: I will protect you. Once I gather more information from him, I'll make sure you're safely returned to your companions.

C: 等回到现实，记得告诉所有人——
E: Once you're back in the real world, remember to tell everyone —

C: 谁能做到？朋友，只能是她，那个自称巡海游侠的女人…一位冒名顶替的不速之客，隐瞒了真实身份的「令使」……
E: Who could have done it? Friend, the only one is her, the girl who calls herself a Galaxy Ranger... An imposter, an unsought guest, an Emanator who hides her true identity...

C: 我一个人没法做主…
E: A decision like this is way above my pay grade...

C: 交给命运吗？你的想法倒是与那位赌徒有几分相似了。
E: Leaving it up to fate? It's just how that gambler thinks.

C: …茨冈尼亚，茨冈尼亚。焦渴的暴风眼，诸神唾弃之地……
E: ...Sigonia, Sigonia. Ravenous eye of the storm, spurned by all the gods...

C: 所以我才确信，这事背后一定藏着更大的秘密。
E: That's why I'm convinced that there are a few big secrets lurking behind the scenes.

C: 但你似乎不知道，所以该我提问了：你究竟是什么人？
E: However, you appear to be ignorant of this, so it's time for me to inquire: Who exactly are you?

C: 什么？
E: Don't what?

C: 但紧随其后的第二起事件，显然超出了他们的预料，以致家族不得不顺势而为，向外来者求援。谐乐大典在即，他们一定分身乏术了。
E: But the murder that followed closely after was obviously beyond their anticipation. The Family had to try and turn things to their advantage by bringing in reinforcements from outside. The Charmony Festival is nearly here — they must be snowed under.

C: 他确实不怀好意。
E: He really is up to no good.

C: 跟我走，我带你去他的会客厅。别说多余的话，家族的人交给我来应付。
E: Follow me, and I'll bring you to his parlor. Hold your tongue and let me deal with the members of The Family.

C: 我的意思是…这连门都没有。你之前怎么进去的？
E: I mean... there isn't a door. How did you get in before?

C: 劳驾。
E: I appreciate it.

C: 又怎么了？
E: What is it now?

C: 请回吧，各位，我们真没必要这样为难彼此，对吧？
E: Everyone, please leave. There's really no need for us to make things difficult for each other, right?

C: 即便发生了那样耸人听闻的惨案，这片美梦也依旧在有条不紊地运作啊。
E: Even after that chilling tragedy, this dream is still running effortlessly.

C: 没关系，如果这能消解你的疑虑，我不介意。
E: It's fine. I don't mind, so long as I can alleviate your suspicions.

C: 一醉解千愁，无梦便无忧…嘿，我果然该去当个诗人……
E: A sip of liquor, a blissful reprieve... To drown a thousand sorrows, let worries leave... Hah, I know I have what it takes to become a poet...

C: （脑袋里的声音…有点要命啊，越来越近了。）
E: (The disturbing voice in my head... it's getting closer.)

C: 机会难得，你们可要给这个老家伙出点难题啊。
E: Don't go easy on this old man. Give him a real challenge.

C: 你是舒翁的客人吧，有什么事？如果想劝我走就免了，除非她答应我的请求……
E: You're one of Siobhan's guests, right? What can I do for you? If you're here to convince me to leave, please stop it. I'll never leave until she accepts my proposal...

C: 自然，那其中也有日后的「钟表匠」。
E: Among them was the person who would eventually be known as the Watchmaker.

C: 对口才很自信嘛。在欺骗博识学会时，你也是这么想的？
E: You're pretty confident on your eloquence. Did you also think that when you lied to the Intelligentsia Guild?

C: 哼，颠覆一切？
E: Hmph, everything?

C: 真是够了…你就没有别的话题可聊吗？
E: Enough... Do you not have anything better to talk about?

C: 我当然会。但在那之前，我希望能再好好介绍下今晚的主角……
E: I will, naturally. But before that, I've got to introduce our guest of honor.

C: …你将在这里亲自化身「死亡」。
E: ...You will become the personification of "Death."

C: 可太阳杀不死我，流沙反将我送向学会和公司的怀抱。记住，我不是偶然赢了一次，我从来没有输过。
E: But the sun could not kill me, and the quicksand sent me back to the embrace of the Guild and the IPC. Bear in mind, my victory wasn't just a stroke of luck — I've never been defeated.

C: …那我也该走了。
E: ...Then I shall get going.

C: 这由不得你。
E: That's not up to you.

C: 听起来，你要请我离开匹诺康尼了。
E: From the sound of it, it seems like you're asking me to leave Penacony.

C: 这种回答得不到信任，只会让你的处境更加危险。
E: This reply does not instill trust, and only makes your predicament more precarious.

C: 可…那真的是事故吗？我们都看见了如雨滴般坠落的筹码，还有划破天空的红光。说是特效未免也太逼真了吧？
E: But... are you sure it was actually a mishap? Everyone saw those chips descending like rain and the red light tearing through the sky. Claiming it was merely special effects seems a bit farfetched.

C: 因为我正在一辆疲劳驾驶的车上…我希望它能安全抵达。
E: Because I'm currently in a car with a sleep-deprived driver... I just want to get there in one piece.

C: 在找到你之前，她已向我们表明了星核猎手的身份，并分享了许多信息。
E: Before we found you, she'd already revealed her Stellaron Hunter identity, and shared a lot of information.

C: 有两个原因，其一是「剧本」——在艾利欧看见的未来中，萨姆和星穹列车的对立无可避免。我试着打破预言的桎梏，也只能做到现在这样。
E: Two reasons: Firstly, the script — in the future that Elio saw, Sam and the Astral Express' confrontation was inevitable. I tried to break the shackles of the prophecy, but this is as far as I could go.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: …话说回来，米凯先生，您所说的墓碑是指？我们来时似乎没有看见墓园。
E: ...On that note, Mr. Micah, which tombstones are you referring to? We didn't come across any graveyard when we arrived.

C: 知更鸟小姐，是否存在另一种可能——家族理念的变化，是有另一股势力参与其中？
E: Could there be another force influencing The Family's shift in philosophy, Miss Robin?

C: 我会去拜托家主，给它造个鸟笼。
E: I'll ask the family head to build a cage for it.

C: 你凭什么觉得能和我合作？
E: Cooperate? What makes you think I'd cooperate with you?

C: 哈哈哈，瓦尔特先生说的不错，确实到了该开诚布公的时候。
E: Hahaha, you're right, Mr. Yang. It is indeed time to come clean on everything.

C: 故事要从很久以前说起，「钟表匠」一行解放了边陲监狱后，对如何从无到有建设匹诺康尼一筹莫展，内忧外患也没完没了。这时便有人打起了星核的主意。
E: It all started a long time ago. Back when the Watchmaker and his crew liberated the frontier prison, they faced countless challenges as they began building Penacony from the ground up. That's when the idea of using the Stellaron came into play.

C: 砂金？他真的还活着么…找梦主谈判又和他有什么关系？
E: Aventurine? Is he still alive...? And what does he have to do with our mission to confront the Dreammaster?

C: 视死如归啊，那男人是个真英雄。
E: Spoken like a true hero.

C: 那最后一位无名客，他启程，停下，又启程…绕了一大圈，最后还是回到了起点。
E: As for the last Nameless... he embarked, disembarked, and embarked again... traveling in a great circle and ending up back where he started.

C: 哥哥…！
E: Brother...!

C: 看来方才那位宾客的说辞也没能让你满意。
E: Seems like that guest's perspective didn't resonate with you either.

C: 人们总以为自己命中注定要实现某种价值。为自己挣得价值便意味着强大的力量，相反，无价值的人则被贬为弱者。
E: People believe they have a predetermined value to fulfill. Gaining value means gaining power, and those deemed worthless are seen as the weak.

C: 这样啊。那…我也选「齐响诗班」好了。
E: I see. Then... I would summon the Harmonious Choir, too.

C: 还记得刚才那位老人吗？如果没有这场梦，他可能已坠入万劫不复的境地了。
E: Remember the old man we met earlier? Without this dream, he might have completely lost himself.

C: 嘿嘿，就那程度，在我们亚楠利亚早就见怪不怪了！父皇当年给我办的生日会，阵仗绝对不比这谐乐大典小。
E: Well, back in my homeworld, Anaria, we have festivals like that all the time. My dad threw me a birthday party one time that was just as extravagant as the Charmony Festival.

C: 事？什么事，不会把谐乐大典给搅黄了吧？别啊，我期待好久了！
E: Unsettling things? What could possibly go wrong? It better not ruin the Charmony Festival. I've been looking forward to it!

C: 我看看你们这有什么单一麦芽果汁…给我来杯「欣嫩子谷<unbreak>40</unbreak>年」吧，纯饮，不加冰。
E: Let's see what kind of juice malts you all have here... Well, give me a glass of Hinnom Valley <unbreak>40</unbreak> Years. I'll have it neat, no ice.

C: 但星神不会。星神只会一条路走到黑，不撞南墙不回头——撞了也不回头！
E: But Aeons don't. THEY stick to their determined path and never turn back, even if THEY reach a dead end!

C: 就像是…海面上的那些影子。
E: Like... those shadows on the ocean.

C: 但我知道的是，总有一天，我也会与世长辞。我发自内心地希望，在那个时候……
E: What I do know is that one day, I too will pass away. I hope that when that day comes...

C: 好凶残的生物！直接撞过去！
E: A brutish creature! Quick! Let's run it over!

C: （讲一个冷笑话）
E: (Tell a dad joke)

C: 这不像要逗我笑，倒像是要抛下我了……
E: You look less like you want to make me laugh, and more like you want to abandon me.

C: 呵呵…好久不见，哈努兄弟。你看起来可真是着急，想来上一场紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」释放一下么？
E: Long time no see, Hanu. You look pretty stressed out. How about an intense and thrilling game of Dream Jigsaw to blow off some steam?
Hmm...

C: 勇敢的哈努兄弟绝不会束手就擒！他立刻奔向储藏室，准备与坏蛋们决一死战……
E: But brave Hanu won't go down without a fight! He instantly sprints for the storage room, ready for a do-or-die showdown against the baddies...

C: 不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。
E: I do not deserve such praise! Unfortunately, that dashing IPC Ambassador, whose radiance matches that of a beautiful peacock, remains in a woeful state... How I wish he too could partake in this splendid occasion.

C: 「她现在怎么样了？！」
E: "Is she alright!?"

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你们还会支持知更鸟踏上「同谐」的旅途么？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Would you still support Robin's journey on the Path of Harmony?</color>

C: 我们到流梦礁了。然后，要去哪里？
E: We've arrived at Dreamflux Reef. So, where to next?

C: 哦，那等你休息好了，我们再出发？
E: Oh, so we'll set out again when you're rested?

C: 老头，你要去哪里？
E: Where are you going, old man?

C: 因为其中一行写着…我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
E: Because one of the lines said... I'll experience "death" three times in the land of the dreams.

C: 受「虚无」影响，我很难受到其他命途力量的影响，反倒能无意识地侵染它们…这或许就是他们不想看到的「变量」。
E: Because of the Nihility, I'm rarely affected by the power of other Paths, but somehow I can unconsciously infiltrate them... Maybe that's the "risk" they're trying to avoid.

C: 「直到歌斐木带领家族来到流放之地，五大家系先后皈依，匹诺康尼才得以拥抱它的新名——梦想之地。」
E: "Only when Gopher Wood led The Family to land of the exiles and earned recognition from all five major lineages did Penacony earn its new name, the Land of the Dreams."

C: 这是匹诺康尼逐步变为家族属地的过程，「同谐」到来后，流放之地发生了翻天覆地的变化，这些变化…并不全都是正面的。
E: This is how Penacony fell under The Family's control. Since the arrival of the Harmony, the land of the exiles has undergone dramatic changes, not all of which have proven... beneficial.

C: 我改不了它的情绪…
E: I can't change the emotions...

C: 不管怎么说，既然你还记得刚才发生的事…那我放心咯。
E: In any case, since you remember what happened just now... Well, that's put my mind at ease.

C: 很复杂，但一言以蔽之，他现在是前橡木家系家主了。
E: It's complicated, but in a nutshell, he's now the former Oak Family head.

C: 下次还填非常简单。
E: When the next survey comes, I'll be checking the "Too Easy" box... AGAIN.

C: 我手中与你有关的记忆还太少，远不能助我占卜太过遥远的未来。
