E: The memories I have of you are not enough for me to predict a future that lies too far ahead.

C: 哈哈，好。既然各位心无挂碍，那景元就在此拜辞了。各位安心登程，后续相关事务交由我联盟便是。
E: Haha, well that's good. Now that everyone's minds are at ease, I shall take my leave. You may now depart with peace of mind — the Alliance will deal with all subsequent procedures.

C: 嗯，我也同意！身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
E: Yes, I agree! As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?

C: 约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁
E: Joachim Nokianvirtanen

C: 如果梦境与现实无异，它还能被称作虚假么？
E: If the Dreamscape is indistinguishable from reality, can it still be called an illusion?

C: 我们在匹诺康尼的任务已经完成了，接下来的自由时间打算做点什么？听说天才俱乐部的人也来了，要不要跟我去玩点大的？
E: Now that we're done here in Penacony, what will you do in your free time? I heard the Genius Society is here. How about we go stir up some excitement?

C: 感觉做了好长的梦。
E: It feels like I had a really long dream.

C: 敬沉眠在地下的无名客…还有加拉赫。
E: To the Nameless resting in peace... and to Gallagher.

C: 言语总是苍白的，如果要为一段往事作结，在这间酒吧里，没有比调饮更好的方式。
E: Words always fall short. If you want to bring closure to past events at this lounge, there's no better way than mixing a drink.

C: 然后，就走向我们各自的明天吧。
E: And embark towards our tomorrows.

C: 在我还是孩子时，就听大人念起过古琥珀纪的故事：「同谐」希佩飞升，「秩序」太一陨落。
E: When I was a child, I heard the adults recite the tale of the Ancient Amber Era, about the ascension of Xipe the Harmony, and the downfall of Ena the Order.

C: 「伙伴」，很不错的说法，这让我对星核猎手更加好奇，你们各自身份特殊，彼此间的联系也颇为有趣——它如此紧密、牢固，却又保持着个体的独立。
E: Partners... a nice way to put it. Now, I'm even more curious about the Stellaron Hunters. Each of you has your own identity and a special bond with each other. It's strong and intimate, and yet it allows for independence.

C: 折纸鸟…小鸟鸟……
E: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

C: 果然是你。我就知道之前没认错人。
E: It's really you. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.

C: 难怪你会积极调查「钟表匠」。
E: No wonder you were interested in investigating the Watchmaker.

C: <size=28>四——</size>
E: <size=28>Four...</size>

C: 这就是全部案情了。依我看，两件案子里的某个共通之处就是揭穿火火博士的关键。
E: Those are all the details. The way I see it, there must be a link between these two cases that will be key to exposing Dr. Boom.

C: 娃娃体内冒出一缕青烟，随后便不再动弹。看来这也并非真正的虚数中子弹。
E: A wisp of green smoke emerges from the doll's body, and then it lies motionless. It seems this isn't a real imaginary neutron bomb either.

C: 多半会继续留在这儿。习惯了清醒的人，一时半会儿也很难适应在黑暗中闭眼的生活。「秩序」褪去后，也总得有人来守望这片原始忆域。
E: Many will continue to live here. Those accustomed to being awake will mostly have a hard time getting used to a life of darkness with their eyes closed. Though the Order has faded, there must be someone to watch over this primal Memory Zone.

C: 当米哈伊尔先生坐在这张椅子上，一天一天等待星穹列车到来的时候，他又是怎么想的？如果在生命的最后，他还能坚定地说出自己从未后悔……
E: When Mr. Mikhail sat in this chair, waiting for the Astral Express to arrive every day, what was he thinking? And if, at the end of his life, he could still firmly say he had no regrets...

C: 可惜我们没能迎来正确的结果，但此情此景…总会让我觉得他们从未离去。
E: Unfortunately, we didn't achieve the outcome we wanted. But moments like this... make me feel like they never even left.

C: 以{NICKNAME}加入为节点，列车在之后的每一站都耗费了比预期更久的时间。为了确保全员齐整，帕姆不得不一再推迟跃迁时刻表。
E: Since {NICKNAME} joined us, the Express has stayed longer than anticipated at every stop along the way. And to ensure that everyone always makes it back on board, Pom-Pom has had no choice but to delay the warp jump schedule.

C: 没错。我已经查看过星图了，距离我们较近的世界有<color=#dbc291ff>「海洋星球」露莎卡星</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。
E: Yes. I've already checked the astral charts — the two nearest worlds to us are <color=#dbc291ff>the oceanic planet of Lushaka</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>the Agate World, Melustanin</color>.

C: ——停，别继续看了。
E: Stop, don't look any longer.

C: 你好，我是丹恒。
E: Nice to meet you. My name is Dan Heng.

C: 唉，多么美好的愿望啊。可我听说，它如今变成了一句空话，大家都被学业压得抬不起头，根本没空仰望梦境的星空。
E: A lovely aspiration, but I hear that the words ring hollow nowadays. The pressure of schoolwork has kept all of you from looking up at the beautiful starry sky of the Dreamscape.

C: 好吧当我没说，她很开心，你蛮会夸人的。
E: Fine, pretend I didn't say anything. She's very happy with your praise.

C: 我还没逃出那个梦泡吗……
E: Am I still trapped in that dream bubble...

C: 是哒，人家在群里的昵称是「芭蕉花酱（努力版）」！
E: Correct! My nickname in the group chat is Nanabloom-chan (Hardworking Edition)!

C: 原本不过是给别人搭把手，这下倒好，我成最大的怪动静了！你香蕉的，告诉我，那猴子是怎么回事？
E: I came here to help someone and now I'm the biggest ruckus around here. Son of a banana, tell me what's going on with that monkey!

C: 抱歉，请先别动……
E: Sorry, please keep still for a moment...

C: 太好了，原来你还没开始转变呢！
E: Good thing you haven't been converted!

C: 否则，这一幕就会显得太过单调。
E: This scene would be overly monotonous otherwise.

C: 瞧好了，大明星，现在，能在流梦礁举办大合唱的法子就这么一种……
E: You ready for it? Now this is the only way to get everyone in Dreamflux Reef to sing together...

C: 按照学号的指示，这就是你的位置了，在这里等待老师到来吧。
E: According to your student number, this is your assigned seat. Please wait here for the teacher to arrive.

C: 哦？赵相机同学，还有丹恒同学和巨星同学，又见面了！
E: Oh, Say~Cheese~! And Dan Heng and Superstar too! We meet again!

C: 好吧，先把玩偶取回来。
E: Alright, let's go get the toy back then.

C: 我都要心动了。
E: I'm starting to feel tempted.

C: 这只颓废的小猴露出一副悲伤的神情，这似乎不符合常理，因为你见过的小猴总是快乐的。
E: This dispirited little monkey shows a sad expression, which seems unusual because the monkeys you have seen are always happy.

C: 如果此事当真，必须尽快通知星穹列车和家族，这不是我们能应对的危机。一位不择手段的「智识」令使…一着不慎，后果不堪设想。
E: If Dr. Primitive is indeed behind this, we must alert the Astral Express and The Family at once. We won't be able to avert this crisis on our own. Facing such an amoral Emanator of Erudition... even the slightest of negligence could bring unimaginable consequences.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉……
E: Ba na na na... Ba na na na...

C: 此乃忍•真言，用富含忍力的咒术点缀话语，定能令影戏增彩百倍。
E: This is the ninja mantra. Embellishing words with ninja enchantments is bound to make the play a hundred times more vivid.

C: 亲爱的同学们，虽然你们既没有预约也没有敲门，但还是欢迎你们蕉。
E: What a surprise, my dear students. Hmm, no appointment or a polite knock on the door... but, I welcome you banantheless.

C: 靠传粉？
E: Through pollination?

C: 折纸大学就是个培养皿，丢掉也不可惜。但如果它能把实验室里的害虫一网打尽…那就是「物尽其用」。
E: Paperfold University is nothing more than an incubator, no great loss if discarded. But if it can eradicate the pests in the lab, then it'd be used to its full potential.

C: 仔细想想吧，诸位，我们所感受到的欢欣、悲伤、灵光一闪…它们近乎全部依赖于这副身体中，化学物质的微妙变化。
E: Think about this, everyone: The emotions we experience, be it joy, sadness, or an epiphany... every one of them is produced from a subtle shift in chemical composition within this vessel of ours.
Hey—!

C: …站在这里的既不是一只猴子，也不是一位巡海游侠。
E: ...he is neither a monkey, nor is he a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 而是多年以前，家乡仍未被毁于一旦时，无忧无虑地生活在草原上的他，一个「过去的波提欧」。
E: He's a young Boothill, one from many years back. Back when his homeland hadn't been ravaged, when he lived as a carefree child in the grasslands.

C: 走吧，无名客，用不着叫援兵了，既然四处开枪就能解决这档子事儿……
E: Follow me, Nameless. No need for reinforcements, seein' as how a few bullets will clear this up...

C: 「话不能这么说，哥们，偶尔也要来点新的。」
E: "Now, hold on there, pardner. Sometimes you gotta try somethin' new."

C: （…他香蕉的，怎么回事？还真的一点想喝的念头都没了。）
E: (...Holy bananas, what's gotten into me? He's right, I don't have the urge to drink at all.)

C: 这是原始博士的另一场实验？乱破演员，你早就是另一种模因病毒的感染者了。
E: That this is but another one of Dr. Primitive's experiments. As for you, actor Rappa, you were already infected with another memetic virus.

C: 名字…？「AK-A-3」是名字吗？
E: Name...? Is AK-A-3 a name?

C: 是苦茶大师…与叆叇馆主？
E: Master Kucha... and Umbra Headmistress?

C: 快点来吧，游侠们，让这场荒唐的闹剧早点结束——
E: Make haste, Rangers. Bring this ridiculous farce to an end...

C: 稍等片刻，银河忍法帖有云：「快手织纱无好布，急火炖肉炖不熟」。
E: Patience. As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Hasty knitting produces poor fabric, as raging fires fail to cook meat through."

C: {NICKNAME}•忍者，快些动身吧，只有我等忍者才能扑灭燃烧梦土的不知火。
E: Ninja {NICKNAME}, we should get moving now. The nether fire that ravages the land of dreams can only be extinguished by ninjas like us.

C: 明明是你自己走掉的。
E: It was clearly you who went off on your own.

C: 那就好，人们常说学校里的日子是人生中最快乐的时光，你今后一定不会忘记的。
E: Glad to hear it. People say that academic years are some of the happiest of their lives. I'm sure you'll be leaving with fond memories.

C: 这当然做不到。在下也无意逼迫忍徒们踏上缭乱•忍道。
E: Of course that wouldn't work. Neither do I have any intentions of pushing ninja initiates to adopt the Way of the Dazzling Ninja.

C: 蕉？
E: Bana?

C: 你逃不掉的，悬锋的狗蝇！
E: You won't get away, Kremnoan vermin!

C: 躁动的力量…难以遏制……
E: This raging power... I can hardly contain it...

C: 黑潮……
E: The black tide...

C: 怎么说？
E: What now?

C: 又来了，我就知道…！
E: It's here again. I knew it...!

C: 是格奈乌斯，尼卡多利的化身…
E: It's Gnaeus, an incarnation of Nikador...

C: 「渎神的王贵，我当然认得你。」
E: "The blasphemous prince. Of course I know you."

C: 「我拒绝。」
为什么，你不愿意买下它呢？要是明天它被别人买走了，*我们*、*我们*可能就再也没机会……
E: Why won't you buy it? If someone else gets to it before us, we'll... we'll miss our chance forever...

C: 因为你忘了，你忘记了妈妈！妈妈给*我们*，送过一样的东西！
E: You've forgotten... You've forgotten all about Mama! Mama gave us something just like this before!

C: 正好，奥赫玛打算遣派使者前往树庭。求取黑潮相关研究进展的同时，也要传达这道信息：就回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种一事，望能尽快讨论。
E: As it happens, Okhema intends to send a messenger to the Grove for updates about the research on the black tide. We also want to communicate our desire to discuss the retrieval of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame at the earliest convenience.

C: 嗯，而且是门城有史以来最最厉害的圣女！就是妈妈为*我们*带来了救世预言——还有像红蘑菇一样可爱的红头发！
E: Uh-huh! Mama was the strongest Holy Maiden in all of our history! She also gave us the Prophecy of Deliverance... and she had red hair that looked like a cute red mushroom!

C: 四周也安静得有些可怕了。
E: Not to mention that this whole place is also eerily quiet.

C: 它们…严格来说是植物，因{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}平等的赐福获得了智能，但相较人类十分有限。眼前这些小家伙已经死去了…只留下灵魂一道小小的残影。
E: Strictly speaking... these white dryads are still plants. They only gained sentience as a result of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' blessing of equality, but their sentience is minimal when compared to that of humans. These flowers have already died... What you see here are just faint afterimages of their souls.

C: …缇安，先躲到我们身后。
E: ...Trianne, please hide behind us.

C: 阿格莱雅女士，那名出现在奥赫玛城郊的伤患，经过几日大小手术，已经性命无虞了。
E: Lady Aglaea, after a few days of surgeries both major and minor, we were able to save the life of that patient found on the outskirts of Okhema.

C: 也是喏…孤掌难鸣，量力而行吧。
E: Indeed... You can only do so much by yourself.

C: 况且，此物也是唤醒那心脏、引出水源的紧要物事。倘若今番寻不来，你我便就困驻此地，永世逃将不得了哪。
E: Besides, the bough is essential for awakening the heart and drawing water out of the source. If you can't find it this time, we can just remain trapped here for the rest of eternity.

C: 身为那刻夏的门生，「等价交换」应是寻常不过的道理了哪。
E: As a student of Anaxa, "equivalent exchange" should be something that you are familiar with.

C: …那就请带路吧。「事实胜于雄辩」——等到启蒙王座，谁是谁非自然不攻自破。
E: ...Then, please lead the way. After all, facts speak for themselves. The truth will come to light once we arrive at the Luminary Throne.

C: 我…哎，算了，小狗就小狗，包容——包容！
E: I... Forget it. I'll just be a puppy. Be forgiving... Be forgiving!

C: 这个人，它就是刚才那缕味道、回忆的源头…不，它简直就是回忆本身！
E: This person is the source of the smell and the memory... No, he's basically the memory itself!

C: 池塘后方有条密道，走这边快些。
E: There's a secret passageway behind the pond. It's faster if we take that path.

C: 呵呵，真要应接不暇了——战斗竟比思考累人得多哪。
E: Heh, I'm about to be overwhelmed. Fighting is so much more tiring than thinking.

C: 小敌，*我们*想问的是…你在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的试炼里看到了什么？
E: Actually, De, there's something we are curious about... What did you see in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s trial?

C: 可你猜怎么着？那畜生刚一探头，悬锋的战士就立刻冲上前去，电光石火间将它抱摔在地，只一击就劈碎了它的膝盖。然后……
E: But do you know what happened? Nary a moment had passed after the beast's head peeked out of its den when the Kremnoan warriors surged forward and brought it down within the blink of an eye, shattering its knees with a single strike! And then—

C: 神力不等同于王权，我族的出路也不止「纷争」一条——
E: The divine power is not equivalent to the throne. The path of Strife is also not our people's only way—

C: 「哼」…这算哪门子回答？
E: "Hmph"...? What kind of response is that?

C: 我没忘。
E: I didn't forget.

C: 怎、怎么？呵…你怂了？
E: Wh—What? Heh... You're chickening out already?

C: 「不必了…就算帕狄卡斯还在这里，也无法替我挡下命运。」
E: "No need... Even if Perdikkas were here, he couldn't stop destiny from taking me away."

C: 「别了，挚友。你一定要…带领我等还乡……」
E: "Farewell, my dear friend... You must... lead us back home..."

C: 抱歉，克拉特鲁斯阁下。我们终日只顾着解读预言的碎片，却忽视了那些未被神谕青睐的人们…你的指控尽管刺耳，但也合乎情理。
E: I'm sorry, Lord Krateros. We were so preoccupied with deciphering the fragments of prophecy that we neglected those of you not favored by its message... Your accusations were harsh but justified.

C: （我…在做梦吗？）
E: (Am I... dreaming?)

C: （完全没印象。或许是小时候的涂鸦吧。）
E: (It doesn't ring a bell at all. Perhaps it's just a childhood doodle.)

C: 不过，梦本身没什么…只是无缘无故在这时做梦，令人有些不安。
E: The dream itself was nothing... It's just the timing that feels a bit unsettling.

C: 这你都看出来了？
E: You could tell?

C: 不仅是狩猎泰坦，还要剥夺它们的火种…？
E: This being is not just hunting Titans, but taking the Coreflames, too?

C: 但吉奥刻勒斯是个异类，他不认可传统，向往山外的世界。温吞的习俗，在他眼中仿佛一座监牢。
E: But Geocles was different. He resisted their traditional way of life, yearning for the world beyond the mountain. Their safe but humdrum culture was like fetters around him.

C: 但，倘若是你们被逼上了绝路，那就向天上的锋刃祈祷——
E: But if you find yourselves with no other recourse, then pray to that blade in the sky...

C: 哼，它只是把我的性命交到了昏光庭院手中。
E: Hmph, it simply put my life in the hands of the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 猜测：{F#她}{M#他}要说些煽情的话。
E: I guess... {F#She}{M#He} will say something sentimental.

C: 这场胜利并无实感，也远非结束——你比我更清楚。
E: This triumph brings no delight, nor does it signify closure — you understand that more than me.

C: 也许，我根本没有斩断自己的宿命。
E: Maybe I've never managed to cut off my destiny.

C: 克拉特鲁斯说，在我坠海后不久，母亲便向先王发起了角斗——她死于父亲的毒计，我与她素未谋面。
E: Krateros said that, shortly after my fall into the sea, my mother challenged my father to a duel — She died through Father's treachery, and I never saw her face.

C: 欢迎回家…迈德漠斯。
E: Welcome home... Mydeimos.

C: 你还愿意为我们揭露那段历史么？有关「神谕」的过往。
E: Are you still willing to unveil that past for us? The past regarding the "prophecy."

C: 去命运重渊，看看它过去的样子。
E: Let's go to the Abyss of Fate and see how it used to be.

C: 那是一场浩大的仪式，为的是求告{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}降下前路的指引……
E: It was during a grand ceremony held to seek {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' guidance...

C: 但阴差阳错…反而是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}回应了人们。
E: But things took an unexpected turn... It was {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} who responded instead.

C: 跟上她吧。这段故事…还得由她亲自讲述。
E: Let's keep up with her. This story... she should be the one to tell it.

C: 缇宁老师，二十年对常人来说…已经足够漫长了。
E: Trinnon, for most people... twenty years is a long period of time.

C: 这是在复现记忆…
E: Is this replicating the memories...

C: 岁月将磨灭心性，门径将瓦解肉身，天平将称量别离，直至末路抵近……
E: Time decays the heart, the passages shatter the body, and the scales weigh the separation, until the end draws near...

C: 否则，依圣城法典，对圣女无礼乃至动武者——格杀勿论！
E: Otherwise, by the decree of the holy city's codex, anyone who dares to harm the Holy Maiden shall face execution!

C: 不是的……
E: Not really...

C: 我说过，别打断我——
E: I warned you. Do not interrupt me —

C: 「白厄，我明白那剑士于你而言意义深重。但若无长策便急于冒进，那要为此白白送命的…恐怕远不止你一人了。」
E: "Phainon, I understand that swordmaster is of great importance to you, but if you charge in without a plan, I fear that... you won't be the only one who dies in vain."

C: …当然。「仇恨是杀死英雄的毒酒」——我无意孤军奋战。若那剑士真与黑潮有关，绝不是黄金裔能轻视的对手。
E: ...I understand. "Hatred is a hero's deadliest poison." I have no intention of fighting alone. If that swordmaster really is related to the black tide, the Chrysos Heirs must not take them lightly.

C: 你也对差分宇宙感兴趣？
E: You're interested in the Divergent Universe too?

C: 算了，还是暂时将这个问题放一边比较好…看来不同的世界之间，差异真的很大。
E: You know what? Let's just put a pin in that for now. Clearly, our worlds have some serious differences.

C: 我倒是松了一口气。幸好不是我所属的世界在未来变成了这副纸醉金迷的堕落样子。
E: That's actually a relief. At least this nightmare of indulgence and debauchery isn't my world's future.

C: 直到死去，直到又像如今这样被从坟墓中挖出，在这崭新的世界中重新登上我那陈旧的舞台，我仍只能对自己的名字避而不谈，稍有涉及就会被不协和音所取代——
E: Not even in death. Not even now, when I've been dragged from the grave to perform on this new world's old stage. Every time I even try to speak my name, it gets drowned out by that cursed dissonance—

C: 呃…身为从者现界时不会随身带着这个世界的钱。御主的钱包…没问题吧？
E: Uh... Servants don't bring money when they materialize in the world. Is your wallet... good to go?

C: 某位王以一己之身，将自己奉上神坛作为祭品，去兑现人间乐土的大梦。这与匹诺康尼的谐乐大典上所发生的一切何其相似。
E: Once, a king offered themself upon the altar — a lone sacrifice in exchange for a dream of Paradise on Earth. How eerily similar it all feels... to what unfolded during the Charmony Festival in Penacony.

C: 过段日子你就会明白，在这里，你只是个普普通通的科员，你自以为的那些聪明才智，在别人眼里啥也不是。
E: But you'll be beaten into shape in no time. You're just a regular researcher on this station. No one's gonna even bat an eye at your so-called talents and smarts.

C: 看到你能适应这里的生活，我也就放心了。
E: I'm glad to see you've settled in here.

C: 奥帝是只啃噬匹诺康尼的虫子，他当然不可信。但御主，他是只对圣杯有所求的虫子…而你，圣杯无法收买你的心智。
E: Oti is nothing more than a parasite feeding on Penacony... Of course I won't trust him. But you're different, Master. He's a worm who has a wish for the Holy Grail, yet there's nothing the Holy Grail can do to sway you.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: 你有答案了吗？
E: And have you got your answer?

C: 那么也该是告别的时候了。御主，不得不说，虽然你的着装品味有待提升，但…作为从者，很高兴这一次圣杯战争能有你同行。
E: And so, it's time to say goodbye. Master, I have to admit that your fashion sense could use a little work, but... as a Servant, I'm genuinely glad to have fought by your side in this Holy Grail War.

C: 「你们来到酒店，却发现这里除了自己以外空无一人。随着午夜降临，酒店也露出原本的模样。此地——」
E: "But when you arrive, the hotel is completely empty. As midnight strikes, its true nature is revealed. This place—"

C: 你很想告诉Archer，自己急需一台<color=#dbc291ff>哈努电视机</color>来变回原型。要不在周围找找？或许有能给他提示的东西。
E: You really want to tell Archer you need a <color=#dbc291ff>Hanu TV</color> to return to normal. Maybe you should look around for clues?

C: 《外太空计划六号》
E: Plan 6 from Outer Space

C: 砂金，你骗我？
E: Aventurine, you're double-crossing me?

C: 虽然Archer总是嘴上不饶人，但作为同伴还是很可靠的。御主，祝你顺利。
E: Archer may have a sharp tongue, but when it comes down to it, he's a solid ally. Master, best of luck to you.

C: 呵呵…呵呵哈哈哈哈……
E: Heh... Hahahahaha...

C: 而怪物是恐怖片的灵魂，是镜头的焦点，它们的目光永远正对着暴露的机位。所以，扮演怪物的斯科特才能看见你。
E: But monsters are different. They are the soul of horror films, the focus of the lens. Their line of sight is always fixed on the camera's position. That's why only Skott, the man playing the monster... can see you.

C: 纵观匹诺康尼，没有比大剧院更合适节目落幕的地方了——只是，波提欧先生，为什么你看我的眼神有点奇怪？
E: There's nowhere in Penacony more fitting for a grand finale than the Grand Theater... Mr. Boothill, why are you looking at me like that?

C: 应该说，我御主的审美品味向来表里如一。
E: You could say my Master's taste is as tacky as his outfit.

C: 在我电影里，你们将无所不能。
E: In my film, you'll be gods.
...Hmm?

C: 但如果我真想伤害你，肯定会换另一种方式。比如…同情？
E: That said, if I'd really wanted to hit you where it hurts, I'd use a different approach... Like a show of sympathy, for example.

C: 唉，也没什么好说的，猎犬自己都没查明白。大概是星核事件的余波吧。
E: There's nothing much to say, actually. We Bloodhounds are just as baffled as you are. My guess is that it's simply part of the aftermath of the Stellaron incident.

C: 请留步——
E: Hold on.

C: 足够了，扭曲之处就在附近。
E: Enough. The location of the distortion is nearby.

C: 你你你——什么情况？！
E: Y—You...! What's going on!?

C: 都是大家的功劳。
E: Nah, it was a team effort.

C: 嗯，这位说的很有道理。
E: Hmm, that sounds like a good idea.

C: 还是换种称呼吧，朋友。
E: Let's try a different name, my dear friend.

C: 只是些措辞上的习惯。
E: It's nothing special really.

C: 那里…是我的来处吗？
E: Is that... where I came from?

C: 「调律」竟反过来影响了万维克，这位女士不简单啊。
E: The tuning rebounded and affected Wonweek instead. This is no ordinary woman.

C: 停云，怎么是你？
E: Tingyun? How?

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 没关系，找不到的话，就当是一起散步吧。
E: Don't worry if you can't find them. Just think of it as us taking a walk together.

C: 不像是完美的告别。
E: That didn't seem like a perfect goodbye.

C: 「自由」——这是无名客能给出的唯一答案，很高兴匹诺康尼正需要它。
E: Freedom is the only answer the Nameless can offer. I'm glad that Penacony needs it.

C: 你听谁说的？
E: Who did you hear that from?
Woah. It's in the shape of an "8"!

C: 在这遗世独立的星系，诞生过至少三位堪比「令使」的存在。
E: Then this isolated star system must be home to at least three beings comparable to Emanators.

C: 为了给你们最大限度的支援，我们计划将星穹列车的一节车厢分离出去，当作降落舱使用，落地后也能充当安全屋。
E: Uncoupling and using one of the Express's cars as your landing capsule is the best way we can ease your exploration. It can also be your safe house once you're on Amphoreus.

C: 那么关心它干嘛？
E: Why are you so interested in it?

C: <unbreak>1111</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>1111</unbreak>...

C: …黑塔女士？您醒了？
E: ...Madam Herta? You're finally awake.

C: 当然没问题。顺便……
E: Gladly. Why don't we also get her a—

C: 与我手中球棍比何如？
E: Is it any match for my baseball bat?

C: 拍摄远方的巨大球体。
E: Photograph the distant giant sphere.

C: 还会将它们的悬锋引到无辜者头上。
E: Their looming blades will come down on the heads of the innocent.

C: 没事了，我们走吧。
E: Nothing. Let's keep going.

C: 孩子，我想我表达得很清楚了，祭司们宁可死在追逐信仰的道路上，也不愿在异邦他乡苟活。
E: I believe I've made my stance clear, my child. Us priests would rather die in the pursuit of faith than live in a foreign land.

C: 自打相识起，我就告诉过你们，无论过往抑或未来，悬锋人都不可能同意与你们握手言和……
E: From the moment we first met, I already told you that regardless of whether it's in the past or in the future, the people of Kremnos will never agree to make peace with the likes of you...

C: 为时不晚。交给我们。动身吧，白厄。
E: It's not too late. Leave it to us. Go, Phainon.

C: 辩论场？你说哪个？
E: Forum? Which one?

C: 你真的误会了…
E: You've really misunderstood...

C: 两位阁下，黎明、清晨、正午好！
E: Dear customers, good early morning, late morning, noon!

C: 正如缇宝所说，两位为保卫圣城贡献了许多力量。为此，我想赠予你们一份谢礼。
E: As Tribbie mentioned, the both of you spared no effort in protecting the holy city. I would like to present you with a gift in recognition of that.

C: 你同意丹恒的说法，非常同意。
E: You agree with Dan Heng, very much so.

C: 翁法罗斯的历史，还有「圣城」奥赫玛，你们已有所见闻。而现在…对于黄金裔的旅途，我想带两位亲眼见证。
E: You have learned, to some extent, about the history of Amphoreus and of the holy city Okhema. Now... I wish for both of you to witness the journey of the Chrysos Heirs for yourselves.

C: 怎么又来？！
E: Why is this happening again?

C: 意料之中的展开。
E: As expected.

C: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles violently.

C: 阿格莱雅，作为第一个遇见他们的人——有关两位的去留，我也想提供一些看法。
E: Aglaea, as the first person to encounter them... I have some thoughts I would like to share regarding whether they can stay.

C: …很遗憾，人们至今没能弄清神谕的规则。
E: ...Unfortunately, the workings of the prophecy still remain a mystery to us all.

C: 总觉得忘了什么…
E: I kind of feel like we might've forgotten something...

C: …核？星？谁？你…我…我是谁？
E: ...Ron? Stella? Who? You... I... Who am I?

C: 出发吧，去弑神！
E: Let's go slay a god!

C: 不过，现在它反而拦住了想杀死{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的人。这种时候，就该怀念缇宝老师的力量了。
E: Except now, it's stopping the people trying to kill {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}. It's moments like this that make me miss Tribbie's power.

C: 按理来说，这座堡垒中应该有「岁月」祭司专用的仪器…有了，那边。
E: In principle, there should be an instrument used by Time Priests somewhere in this fortress... Aha, there it is.

C: 数量好多…
E: There's a lot of them...

C: 你就继续优哉游哉吧，恕不奉陪。
E: You just keep having fun. I've got better things to do.

C: 我修改赌注，你只要把收获的战利品分我们一半就行。至于{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…我们会联手将其击败。
E: Let's change the stakes. You can just share half of your spoils with us. As for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, we can take them down together.

C: …万敌。
E: ...Mydei.

C: 「永不磨灭之身」……
E: "An indestructible body"...

C: 沿着铁索走到对面，通往那柄巨剑的道路，就该有这种气魄。
E: Following an iron chain, onto the path leading to the giant sword on the other side? This is more like it!

C: 白厄阁下，我会和你们一同前去谒见{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。希望它能为我们重现往昔的风景，揭示{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}欺瞒死亡的真相……
E: Lord Phainon, I will join you in the audience with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. Let's hope they can restore the visions of the past and reveal the truth behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s defiance of death.

C: 是你在说话吗，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}女士？
E: Is that you, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

C: 我…没有大碍。只是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的痛苦在和我共鸣。
E: I—I'm fine. It's just... I can feel {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s misery.

C: 「徒劳的尝试…放弃吧…放弃吧。」
E: "Futile attempts... Give up... give up."

C: {NICKNAME}，我想到了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I've got it.

C: 好想把它拍下来。
E: I really want to take a photo of them.

C: 再次见面…会的。
E: Meeting again... It will happen.

C: 噢…遐蝶。异乡人，还有。
E: Oh... Castorice. Outlander, as well.

C: …它的疯狂会延续至千百年后？人的愚蠢所能造成的破坏难以丈量。到头来，原来我们的目标完全一致。
E: ...Their madness will last for thousands of years? The destruction created by human folly is more than anyone could imagine. It so happens that we have the same goal.

C: 「牺牲。」
E: "Sacrifice."

C: 我想错了，那最后的一瓣神性并没有遗失……
E: I was wrong all this while. The final fragment of divinity was never lost...

C: 还有一个选择。
E: There is only one option.

C: 只有一条道路。
E: There is only one way to do so.

C: 这是什么异常现象…
E: What is this strange phenomenon...?

C: 我明白了。那么，明天见。
E: I understand. Until tomorrow, then.

C: …啊，但对你说谢谢，应该还是第一次？多谢帮助，迷迷…小姐？
E: ...Right, it would be the first time I thanked you. So, thank you for your help, uh... Miss Mem?

C: 哈哈哈，那我一定会派人把你摇醒的。
E: Hahaha, I'll be sure to send someone to wake you up then.

C: 你醒啦~再不醒，人家都怕巨人的光把你给晒熟啦！
E: Good thing you're finally up! Or that Giant's light is going to give you a sunburn!

C: 可我不想当什么大英雄！我只想留在村子里，和大家在一起。
E: But I don't want to be everyone's hero! I just want to stay in this village with everyone I know.

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: …想法很新奇。但元老院的目标另有其人。
E: ...An interesting train of thought, but the Council of Elders has another target in mind.

C: …并献上「火种」吧。
E: ...and surrender the Coreflame.

C: 好痛…我走到尽头了吗？孤独的岁月…要结束了吗？
E: It hurts... Have I finally reached the end? Are the years of isolation... coming to an end?

C: 你注意到丹恒的眼神坚毅又温柔，他并不想将担忧化作语言压在你的身上。你早已明白，他对你的信任超越了任何语言——就像他说的，「还不是悲伤的时候」。
E: You notice the resolute yet gentle look in Dan Heng's eyes. He doesn't want to burden you with his worries in words. You already understand — his trust in you transcends words. As he once said, "It's not the time for sorrow yet."

C: 你想转过头，却瞥见一抹紫色轻掠过侧脸，然后……
E: You want to turn your head, but you glimpse a dash of purple brushing past your face. Then...

C: 我只是在想…假使你的灵魂真的离开了身躯，自己身为「入殓师」，或许能追溯它的去向。
E: I'm just thinking... If your soul has really left your body, as a mortician, I might be able to trace where it has gone to.

C: 起码你看起来跟活人没什么两样。应该说，大部分活人气色都不如你。
E: Well, at least you look no different from the living. I think that most living people don't even look as good as you do.

C: 哼…看在凯妮斯元老青睐有加的份上，姑且放你一马。走吧，别再妨碍至高之神降福于我等。
E: Hmph... Seeing how fond of you Elder Caenis is, I shall let that slide for now. Leave immediately and don't impede us from receiving the supreme being's blessings.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Let's begin, then.

C: 眼前距离泰坦仅有几步之遥，汝还撑得住么？
E: The Titan is in sight. Can you make it?

C: 既然斯缇科西亚「已被冥河围作孤岛」，我们要怎么才能去到那里？缇宝大人恐怕已经……
E: If Styxia is now "an island surrounded by the River of Souls' torrents," then how do we find a way in? Lady Tribbie is probably...

C: 人家…要先回…呼……
E: Nah, I'm... going...

C: 无论斯缇科西亚过去多么美丽，现在也已是死者的领域…很难说我们会在那里遇到什么。
E: No matter how breathtakingly beautiful Styxia once was, the place is now the domain of the departed... There is no telling what we'll encounter there.

C: 我也喜欢看人吵架。
E: Yeah, watching people squabble is kind of fun.

C: 希望斯人牺牲能令你有所感悟。
E: May you gain some insights through his sacrifice.

C: 我深知，你始终都对我…对{RUBY_B#哀地里亚人}我们{RUBY_E#}信仰的一切感到困惑，甚至愤怒……
E: I've always known... that you have doubts and even anger about {RUBY_B#Aidonian}my{RUBY_E#} faith... and about me...

C: 为了这个问题的答案，我继续旅途。起初是逃离，而后变成了寻索，最后……
E: I continued my travels to seek an answer. Initially, I was running away. Then, I started searching for it. And now, at the end...

C: 不是，阁下一见便知。
E: No, it isn't. You'll know when you see it.

C: 这是……
E: This is a...

C: 哎呀！艳阳高照，真是正当离别的时刻哪。
E: Mmm! Bright and sunny, just the weather for farewells.

C: 当然，三人一组可是挺进决赛圈的最佳配置。
E: Totally. The trio team is the best set up to reach the finals.

C: 或许吧。但能听见它们窃窃私语，至少说明我们确实在向死者的世界靠近。
E: Perhaps. But the fact that we're able to hear their whispers proves that we're fast approaching the realm of the dead.

C: 你们…要买鱼吗？
E: Do you... want to buy any fish?

C: 而在龙的怀中，他们见到了一位少女…她才是真正的死神！
E: But they saw a girl within the dragon's embrace... And she is the true Reaper!

C: 那是一个来自异邦的童话。在那冰原中，那个将你带给我的人，曾为我讲述了这一切——
E: It's a fairy tale from foreign lands, told by the person who brought you to me in that ice field long ago...

C: 比它的出现更加突然，旧事戛然而止……
E: More sudden than its appearance, the past comes to an abrupt halt...

C: 万敌…阁下？
E: Lord Mydei...?

C: 明明这里有着「追忆符文」，却到处找不见「奇迹宝珠」，真奇怪……
E: The Rune of Recollection is here, but I can't find a Miracle Orb anywhere. So weird...

C: 你若打算剥夺世间的「死亡」…那就要做好准备，目睹这世界回归停滞和怠惰。
E: If you truly intend to deprive the world of "Death," then be prepared to witness it return to a state of stagnation.

C: 但是，我必须这么做。
E: But I have to do this.

C: 所以，在编织新世界的法则时，我…打破了「生」与「死」的底线。
E: So, while weaving the laws of the new world... I shattered the forbidden bottom line for "life" and "death."

C: 所以…{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}只能施行宣判，而不能进行拥抱。
E: That's why the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}"Hand of Shadow"{RUBY_E#} can only lay down judgment... and not embrace another being.

C: 看！世间果真有粉色的小犬！
E: Look! Pink puppies do exist!

C: 毕竟教了你那么久，别人可是最多四年就毕业了。
E: I didn't spend all those years teaching you for nothing. Most people only take four years to graduate, if I recall.

C: 不！那是因为黄金裔们挺身而出，将灾厄挡在了奥赫玛的城墙之外——阿格莱雅用她的金线，维系并捍卫了你们所能享用的一切！
E: No! This peace we enjoy is no gift of fate. We are able to stand here today only because the Chrysos Heirs have stepped up and shielded Okhema from calamity! With her golden threads, Aglaea has preserved — and continues to preserve — these idyllic days that all of you hold dear!

C: 白厄…最后一辩交给他了啊。
E: Phainon... So, they are leaving the final debate to him.

C: 我会竭尽全力。
E: I'll do my best.

C: 上前来，天外的开拓者，与*我们*一起——
E: Step forward, Trailblazer from beyond the sky. And together with us...

C: 「翁法罗斯」——不仅这人知道它，还有很多忆者都对那里感兴趣。
E: Not only does this person know of Amphoreus, but there are also many Memokeepers who are interested in the place.

C: （有办法换个视角，跳出来思考么？）
E: (Is there a way to step out of the situation and look at it from a different perspective?)

C: 就这些问题。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 这是众学者们针对「渎神者」阿那克萨戈拉斯的投诉信，积累了厚厚一沓。
E: These are complaint letters from the scholars about Anaxagoras "The Blasphemer." There's a thick stack of letters.

C: 幸好，因为没有证据，这项控诉最终不了了之。
E: Thankfully, they had no way to prove it, so it amounted to nothing more than an allegation in the end.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，现在准备好了吗？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, are you ready now?

C: 所以，只当它是作给小孩子听的寓言便是。
E: Therefore, we can just treat this tale as a fable told to young children.
Uh...

C: 如果，吾将「炼金」之法传习与汝……
E: If I imparted my knowledge of the art of alchemy to you...

C: 我们…该怎么办…？如果…如果我到最后都无法下定决心……
E: What should we do...? I—If I'm ultimately not able to make up my mind...

C: 不，小姑娘：身为战士，我见过太多猛烈的死亡。可现如今，我只能感受到宁静…原来人间还有这样的活法。
E: No, young lady: As a warrior, I have witnessed too many bitter deaths. But now, all I feel is peace... I did not know until this moment that mortals could live their lives in such a way.

C: 你说，你愿意抵押自己「尚未拥有的一切」……
E: You say you're willing to risk everything you've yet to gain...

C: 奇迹宝珠——用它打开逃生的大门吧！
E: A Miracle Orb! Let's use it to open our escape route!

C: 一鼓作气…斩断它的翅膀！
E: Let's finish this! Slice off their wings!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>永夜将至，但今后三百年…黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The eternal night is looming, but over the next three hundred years, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity with golden blood to create miracles...</color>

C: 你会把那苦涩的真相…传达给奥赫玛的全城公民吗？
E: Will you share this harsh truth... with all the citizens of Okhema?

C: 速度又快，力气还大…你这家伙，强度有点超模了吧？
E: You've got speed and strength... You're a little too perfect, aren't you?

C: 我们和你一起去，正好走近路。
E: We'll go with you. It's the fastest way.

C: 「为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸。」
E: "Till we wither in willing service to the prophecy."

C: 化谎言为真实的力量…真叫人家粉毛倒竖呀！
E: A power to make lies into reality... That's got all my hairs standing up!

C: 没想到您贵为元老会的议员，竟愿意远道来此查勘列车。
E: I'm surprised a Council Elder like yourself would be willing to journey so far to inspect the Express.

C: 你呀…是真的很执着呢。算了算了，人家就是对你这种性格毫无抵抗力……
E: You sure are persistent. Alright, alright — I'm totally helpless against your charm...

C: 哈哈哈，抱歉，我看你们在边上互相追逐，手里的书瞬间就不香了。
E: Haha, sorry, seeing you two chasing each other around, I suddenly found my book not that appealing anymore.
Huh?

C: 没问题！用那边的装置把它关了就行。
E: No problem! Just use the device over there to shut it off.

C: 要让既得利益者为遥远的理想抛弃此世的地位、财富、野心——那或许不比缔造奇迹容易。
E: To ask the vested interests to abandon their status, wealth, and ambitions in this world for a distant ideal, may be no easier than creating a miracle.

C: 不止一个人给我传信，这不像玩笑……
E: I've heard from more than one person. It doesn't seem like a joke.

C: 阿雅……
E: Agy...

C: 我还有…最后一个任性的请求。可以听我诉说吗？
E: I have... a final selfish request. Can you lend me an ear?

C: 嘟…嘟嘟！
E: Doot... Doot-Doot!

C: 嘟嘟…嘟？
E: Doot-Doot... Doot?

C: 猜对啦。要去往艾格勒的天上国度，需要天空一族的后人通过血脉仪式，召唤出先祖之灵，从他们那里获得祝福。
E: You guessed it. To reach Aquila's realm in the sky, descendants of the Sky people must perform a bloodline ceremony, summon the spirits of our ancestors, and get their blessings.

C: 那时，您让我从四件配饰中选择一件：代表尊贵的烈阳头环，代表力量的雷雨手镯，象征着智慧的冰雪戒指，还有喻义友善的微光吊坠……
E: Back then, you wanted me to pick one accessory out of four: The sun crown representing nobility, the storm bracelet symbolizing strength, the ice ring embodying wisdom, and the radiant pendant signifying kindness...

C: 凡人的惊惶与祈求，令天空英雄再度起身。
E: The fear and pleas of mortals urged the hero of the sky to rise again.

C: 请引领我们去往艾格勒面前吧，两位英魂。弑神取火的纪元由塞涅俄丝亲手开启，哪怕她无法亲眼看到一个时代的终结，至少你们能代为见证。
E: Please guide us to an audience with Aquila, heroic souls. Seliose initiated the era of slaying gods and attaining their flames. Even if she could not witness the end of this era, you will all at least bear witness on her behalf.

C: 随我来，让猎神重启吧。雅辛忒丝，还有勇士们。
E: Follow me, Hyacinthia and fellow warriors. Let the hunt for the gods start again.

C: 勿将秉性与力量混为一谈，勇者。
E: Do not mistake their behavior for weakness, warrior.

C: 这里的景象，还有此前的记忆，让我有种奇怪的预感…在塞涅俄丝挑战神明后，天空之子又遭遇了什么？
E: The scene here, and the previous memories, all give me a strange sense of foreboding... After Seliose challenged the gods, what else did the Skyfolk encounter?

C: 人与人，城邦与城邦，神明与神明…我想，一切争斗都源于我们对彼此的误解吧？
E: Whether between people, cities, and gods... I suppose that all conflicts stem from misunderstandings.

C: 硬…盘？
E: Hard... drives?

C: 和漫长的逐火之旅相比，这点障碍算不上什么。
E: This hurdle is trivial compared to the endless Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 在那之后到底发生了什么…我也越发好奇了。
E: I'm increasingly intrigued by what happened next.

C: 要稍微停下来看看吗？
E: Shall we stop for a look?

C: 我同意……
E: I agree...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒的火种，安全…她说。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale's Coreflame is safe... she said.</color>

C: 你们走，我来断后！
E: You guys go ahead. I'll shore up the rear!

C: 如此仓促的道别…我不接受。
E: Such a hasty farewell... I won't allow it.

C: 该离开了，丹恒！
E: We need to go, Dan Heng!

C: {NICKNAME}一边 创世涡心
E: {NICKNAME}, at Vortex of Genesis

C: 如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
E: If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...

C: …除非有来人接过他的火种。
E: ...Unless their Coreflame finds a new bearer.

C: 你究竟是什么身份？
E: Who are you, really?

C: 我充分理解阁下如今满腹疑问。对此，我只能向您如此作保——
E: Your doubts are natural. Let me assure you of this—

C: 当然，我不准备探讨树庭的哲学，不妨把视线投向更远处吧。超脱于翁法罗斯，那被世人称作禁忌的天外……
E: But let's set aside the Grove's teachings for now, look further, past Amphoreus, to what they call the forbidden realms beyond the sky...

C: 你好，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: Hi there, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 但…命运从来都是确凿不移。毕竟我们也不知道神谕里的未来，究竟是多远以后。
E: Still... fate is absolute. After all, we never really know just how far into the future the prophecy extends.

C: 别说你，我都忘得一干二净了……
E: To be honest, I'd forgotten all about it myself...

C: 要说心愿吗？我并无私人的心愿，只有再创世是我唯一的理想…不过，若能编织崭新的未来，我希望凯妮斯和她手下的清洗者永不能进入。
E: Personal wishes? I have none. Only the Era Nova matters: The world's rebirth. Yet, if I am to weave a new era, then may it be one where Caenis and her Cleaners shall never tread.

C: 交给自己的内心决定吧。
E: Listen to your heart.

C: 而这……
E: And all of this...

C: 对，一张薄薄的纸牌，这就是我的选择——你只需知道，它的名字叫「救世主」。
E: Yes, a flimsy little card. That is my choice. Just know that it's called the "Deliverer."

C: 所谓的「英雄」，只是怀抱如此决心的一群人。而「救世主」——就是他们的总和，仅此而已。
E: That's all a "hero" really is. Someone with that kind of conviction. And the "Deliverer"? Just the sum of all those heroes.

C: 我就知道…
E: I knew it...

C: 亦或者，您可以直接迈向最后的真相：<color=#dbc291ff>一睹您所扮演的角色真容，并见证黄金裔、逐火之旅与翁法罗斯轮回的终极本质。</color>
E: Or perhaps, you can simply walk straight to the final truth: <color=#dbc291ff>See the true face of the character you play, and witness the ultimate nature of the Chrysos Heirs, Flame-Chase Journey, and the cycles of Amphoreus.</color>

C: 小家伙…你在害怕吗？
E: Hey, little one... are you scared?

C: 看来，泰坦揭示的未来也未必会实现。
E: So, even the future revealed by the Titan may not come to pass.

C: 村长大人！小涟和小白回来啦——
E: Chief! Reney and Snowy have returned—

C: 终于，翁法罗斯的命运开始转动了。如我所言，您的到来会改变一切。
E: At last, Amphoreus's fate has begun to shift. Just as I foretold, your arrival will change everything.

C: 那或许不是梦。
E: Perhaps, it wasn't a dream.

C: 在你眼中，所有牺牲的人，都只是一串渺小的数字吗？
E: So in your eyes, all the sacrifices are just a string of insignificant numbers?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这个世界早就在其他星神的视线中了？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This world has already been under the watch of other Aeons?</color>

C: 你故作姿态，将所谓的「真相」全盘托出，不过是为了欺瞒我们，掩盖另一种可能……
E: You're pretending, revealing the so-called truth just to deceive us, covering up another possibility...

C: 那会是一道跨越时空的瞥视，它将让今后的每一个我都能够化作你重置岁月的力量——将我的灵魂注入这柄仪式剑，创造一场{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>永不完成的「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>永不终结的逐火之旅</color>{RUBY_E#}。
E: And it will be a glance that spans time and space, transforming each incarnation of me into the power you shall wield to reset time — imbuing my soul into this ceremonial blade, and creating an {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>unending Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>endless Flame-Chase Journey</color>{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你会将「我」给予你的动力，视作「毁灭」蛊惑人心的低语吗？
E: Will you see the motivation "I" gave you as the manipulating whispers of Destruction?

C: 直至万物都不曾存在的起源。
E: Until it reached the origin, where nothing ever existed.

C: 而后，我在这次轮回中的一切努力，也会在同一时间化为泡影。
E: And my efforts in this cycle would dissolve into nothing at the same time.

C: 雅辛忒丝……
E: Hyacinthia...

C: 逐火绝非花海中的闲庭信步，而是大破大立，一场万物皆焚的变革。倘若「毁灭」是其必经之途……
E: The Flame-Chase isn't some quiet walk through a sea of flowers. It's a revolution, an all-consuming transformation. And if Destruction is the only way...

C: 面对危难，你从未退缩。你拯救过一个又一个世界，义无反顾，给胸前那枚车票染上了「英雄」的底色……
E: In the face of danger, you never once backed down. Instead, you've saved world after world, without hesitation. That boarding pass on your chest... is now the mark of a hero.

C: ——至死方休！
E: And will not end till death!

C: 为世界带来明天吧。
E: Bring tomorrow to this world.

C: 很好……
E: Good...

C: 啊，我想起来了…{NICKNAME}和我提到过这个地方，在{F#她}{M#他}被克里珀瞥视以前……
E: That's it! {NICKNAME} warned me about this place, right before Qlipoth glimpsed {M#him...}{F#her...}

C: 的确，你也有一头粉色的头发，很吸睛呀。
E: Yeah! Your pink hair is just as eye-catching as mine!

C: 穿过…门扉…帮助…忆庭……
E: Through the door... save... the Garden...

C: 别走，他们会装作你记忆里的人……
E: Stop! They're just mimicking people from your memories...

C: 该去找「律法」半神了。
E: The Law demigod awaits.

C: 这是要做什么？
E: What's going on?

C: 还要再加上你的魅力。
E: Can't do without your charm either.

C: 但要相信，每一个轮回的英雄们，都始终如一，从未变过呀。
E: But the hearts of heroes stay the same in every cycle, never changing.

C: 那就来吧，凯撒已为你们留好了席位。
E: Then come. The Imperator reserved seats for you.

C: 哦？我记得你们，是擅闯法场…不，神谕中的贵客！
E: Oh? I remember you. The trespassers... No, the distinguished guests of the prophecy!

C: 有种奇妙的化学反应。
E: There's a strange chemistry between them.

C: 我投「寂静领主」一票。
E: I vote for the "Lord of Silence."

C: 其实我们有更要紧的事…
E: Actually, we've got more urgent matters to attend to...

C: 谢谢你的好意。不过…我们更想知道，凯撒什么时候回来？
E: Thank you for the offer, but... we're more interested in knowing when the Imperator will be back.

C: 和旁边的宴会客搭讪。
E: Chat with the guests next to you.

C: 好问题。切勿被{M#他}{F#她}蒙骗，那天外之人体内藏着一颗{RUBY_B#星核}毁灭的种子{RUBY_E#}，定不能让{M#他}{F#她}玷污了您的光辉……
E: Good question. Do not let {M#him}{F#her} fool you. That {F#wo}man from beyond the sky contains a {RUBY_B#Stellaron}seed of ruin{RUBY_E#} within {M#his}{F#her} body. {M#He}{F#She} must not be allowed to tarnish your glory...

C: 凯撒之言，皆为律令！
E: The Imperator's word is law!

C: 在十四行代数式构筑的世界展开攻防，你们不可能是我的对手；而至于「再创世」……
E: You will never be a match for me in a world constructed through quatorzain algebraic expressions. And as for the Era Nova...

C: 有关「生命第一因」的解答，以及……
E: The answer concerning "the prime mover of life," and...

C: 对你来说，这应该算得上「好久不见」吧……
E: For you, this is probably a "long time no see"...

C: 怎、怎么了？
E: Wh—What is it?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>届时，她要将我打碎，将尘砂撒入涡心的海洋。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And when the time comes, she needs to shatter me and scatter that stone's ashes into the ocean within the Vortex.</color>

C: 虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
E: Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.

C: 还记得吗，白厄将我们送回起点的时候，我和{NICKNAME}也经历过离别。但最后，人家还是带着全部的过往和你重逢了。
E: Do you remember when Phainon sent us back to the beginning? When {NICKNAME} and I got separated? But in the end, I returned to you, carrying all that we've been through.

C: 可当我踏上陆地，却发现那里没有蜜酿泼洒的庆典，也没有诗人拨动竖琴——
E: But when I stepped onto land, there were no festivals with honey brew, nor poets plucking harps...

C: 敬请上前，与我一同见证，这虚妄幻境的终幕吧。
E: Come now. Join me. Witness the end of this futile dream.

C: 海列屈拉！我的鳍被黑泥浸泡，再也无法随你起舞……
E: Helektra! The black sludge has soaked my fins! I can't dance with you anymore...

C: 为表敬意，在这历史性的一刻，鄙人也将展现真实的自我，并为各位提供一条微不足道的学术建议。
E: I will also show my true self to you on this momentous occasion as a gesture of respect, and provide an insignificant academic suggestion.

C: 不必为真理愤怒：一道算式的价值惟在于答案本身——
E: There's no need to rage against the truth. The value of any formula resides only in its answer.

C: 只是一只手。
E: It's just a hand. No biggie.

C: 你应当理解，耐心是鄙人最强有力的武器。于我而言，「等待」和「胜利」是相同的概念。
E: Know that patience is my greatest weapon. "Waiting" and "victory" are the same for me.

C: 是的。他们用财富的流通征服了许多世界，开辟了辽阔的疆域。在翁法罗斯之外，有许多这般强大的同盟，它们行于和「毁灭」截然不同的道路。
E: Yes. The IPC conquered many worlds through trade and opened up a vast territory that way. There are many such powerful alliances beyond Amphoreus, and they all walk on roads different from the Destruction.

C: 您看得也很清楚呀。
E: You are also very self-aware, Imperator.

C: 那您应该知道，在「毁灭」许诺的世界里，同样没有给「人」留下余地。
E: Then you must know that the world promised by the Destruction also has no place for "humanity."

C: 翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
E: Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.

C: 无论…你是否选择游向那里…我都不会在乎……
E: Will you... choose to... swim into that ocean...? I... do not care...

C: …你在数据的洪流中，蛰伏了上百年时光？
E: ...You waited in the data stream for hundreds of years?

C: 你…究竟是谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 这一不可动摇的实验机制，正是天才们对抗铁墓的关键。而现在，我要再为其增添一点小小的助力……
E: This immutable experimental mechanism is the key to the geniuses' resistance against Irontomb. And now... I'll be lending it just a touch more help.

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}。沉入<color=#dbc291ff>「忘却」</color>的海洋，成为我的客人。
E: So, come, {NICKNAME}. Sink into the sea of <color=#dbc291ff>"Oblivion"</color> and become my guest.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>没有任何人能看见你，你也无法干涉任何人。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...No one was able to see you, and you weren't able to interact with anyone.</color>

C: 有些机会，一旦错过便不复存在。
E: That's right. Some opportunities will never come again.

C: 直接推门。
E: Barge in.

C: 无人回应。
E: No answer.

C: 你听见我们的谈话了？
E: You could hear our conversations?

C: 这位…朋友，是黑塔女士的得力助手。就是它帮助你完成了「精神折跃」。
E: This... friend here is Madam Herta's very capable assistant. They were the one who helped you complete the "spirit warp jump."

C: 和「王翼冠军」{RUBY_B#那刻夏}那霎{RUBY_E#}的相遇开始吧？
E: The "Helkolithist Sage" Mydeimos and the "King's Aegis" {RUBY_B#Anaxa}Anaksa{RUBY_E#}?

C: 她们也会把这一幕记录下来，写入永恒的诗篇吧？
E: Would they also have recorded that scene into the eternal saga?

C: 以这种方式，翁法罗斯的「记忆」超脱循环，被源源不断地保存下来。而权杖则因为逻辑丢失，陷入一次又一次进程回退。
E: That's how the "memories" of Amphoreus transcended the loop and were continuously stored, while the Scepter had to revert its progress over and over again, because of loss in its logic.

C: 你有点太紧张了，丹恒。对于你们，我向来坦诚。
E: You're too on edge, Dan Heng. I've always been honest with the two of you.

C: 看来，你们还没意识到呀。
E: So you still haven't figured it out.

C: 于是，那可怜的女孩心甘情愿，一次又一次走进大墓，将自己奉献给「记忆」。
E: Then, that poor girl walked into the great tomb over and over again and willingly offered herself to the Remembrance.

C: 告诉我，你会如何选择？
E: Tell me, what will you choose?

C: 还要一起回到列车，走向下一站。
E: We'll also return to the Express together and head towards our next destination.

C: （奇怪，我好像……）
E: (Strange... It's like I...)

C: （算了，当面去问问吧。）
E: (Whatever. I'll go ask her myself.)

C: 银狼…卡芙卡？！
E: Silver Wolf... Kafka!?

C: 为了生存。对地兽而言，生命不过「存续」二字……
E: To survive. For a dromas, life is no more than "existence"...

C: 翁法罗斯竟还有生者——此人还懂得唤水之术。
E: There are still survivors in Amphoreus, and this one even knows how to use the arts of water.

C: 可即便如此，它的举止…也太异常了。
E: Even so, their behavior is... far too unusual.

C: 星穹列车的「护卫」…理应如此。
E: That is exactly how the "guard" of the Astral Express should act.

C: 对于山之民，死亡只是回归大地。多亏了「长夜月」的恩赐……
E: Death is just a return to the Earth for Mountain Dwellers. Thanks to Evernight's gift...

C: 这一路来，我们曾无数次站在悬崖边，被危难胁迫，做出艰难的选择。唯独这次——
E: We've stood on the precipice countless times along this journey, forced to make difficult choices in the face of disaster. But this time...

C: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}一战，面对这座难以逾越的高山，凯撒只能从内部瓦解。荒笛的倒戈成了逐火军致胜的关键。
E: In the battle against {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, the Imperator could not surmount this mountain and thus had to break it from the inside. Terravox's betrayal was key to the Flame-Chase Army's victory.

C: 要做什么？
E: What are you planning to do?

C: 不用担心，海瑟音女士。正如你在海底独守千年，我找回{NICKNAME}的决心……
E: Don't worry, Lady Hysilens. Just as you kept your lonely vigil in the depths for a thousand years, my determination to find {NICKNAME}...

C: 让它成为逐火必要的牺牲吧。
E: Let them be a necessary sacrifice for the Flame-Chase.

C: 记忆交错。又一场背叛，一场浩劫。
E: Memories intersect. Another betrayal, another catastrophe.

C: 我知道。但现在，你还记得我，记得我们的伙伴。
E: I know. But you still remember me and our companions for now.

C: 出发吧，拯救这个世界。
E: Let's go and save this world.

C: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
E: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

C: 又是这种潜入剧本，也行吧！帮帮我，{NICKNAME}的内心世界……
E: Another one of these stealth missions, huh? Help me out here, {NICKNAME}'s inner world...

C: 和当初一模一样。
E: It's just like how things were last time.

C: 如果，我们也是为此而来呢？
E: What if I tell you that we're here for the same thing?

C: 哈哈哈，吕枯耳戈斯，告诉我——
E: Ahahaha! Lycurgus, tell me—

C: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，是为何物？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What is... the Demiurge?</color>

C: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与公司代表联系……
E: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the IPC representative...

C: 但此番出兵，乃是元帅亲自裁夺：大敌当前，联盟没有退缩的理由，也不会甘居人后。
E: But this time, the Marshal herself decided to send out troops. With a formidable enemy before us, the Alliance has no reason to back down, nor will we be content to take a back seat.

C: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与巡海游侠代表联系……
E: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Galaxy Ranger representative...

C: 我们是「岁月」的记录者，我们不会消失。
E: We are the chroniclers of "Time", and we do not fade away.

C: 他这是…放弃抵抗了？
E: So he's... stopped resisting?

C: 比想象中安静，我还以为会来场激烈的空战。
E: Quieter than I thought. I was expecting a full-on aerial brawl.

C: 我也一样。三千万次启程，三千万次告别。
E: Me too. Thirty million departures. Thirty million farewells.

C: 「创世」的小径？
E: The trail of "Genesis"?

C: 她们俩确实有点像。
E: They do look a bit alike.

C: 什么三宝，还不如叫七宝呢！
E: Huh? Marchie? I think I prefer Sevie.

C: 那扇门背后，会是什么？
E: What lies behind that door?

C: 「久违了，赛法利娅女士。」
E: "It's been a while, Lady Cifera."

C: 欧洛尼斯祷言，还记得吗？
E: Remember Oronyx's Prayer?

C: 「想也知道，她们总是走在最前线啊。」
E: "Figures. They're always leading from the front line."

C: 命途图谱出现剧烈尖刺。逻辑：铁墓正在自我迭代——
E: Strong spikes have appeared on the Path chart. Logic: Irontomb is iterating itself...

C: 在所难免，我早有准备。
E: It's bound to happen, and I've long prepared for that.

C: 她的意思是，英雄只在最关键的时刻登场。
E: She meant to say that a hero only turns up at the most pivotal moment.

C: 哀丽秘榭，真安静啊。
E: Aedes Elysiae is so quiet.

C: 昔…涟……
E: Cy...rene...

C: 「群星陷入了沉默。我能感知的一切，都在被『铁墓』消解……」
E: "All the stars have been silenced. 'Irontomb' is dissolving everything that I can sense..."

C: 感觉…轻松些了吗？
E: Do you feel... better now?

C: 「我只想告诉你一件事，有关翁法罗斯这一站的意义——」
E: "So I just want to tell you one thing. I'll tell you the purpose of your stop at Amphoreus."

C: 「所以，放轻松，听我说——当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
E: "So, relax. Listen: When you have the chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."

C: 「凝望天空，只此一次。」
E: "Gazing up at the sky. This is the only time."

C: 「在被黑潮笼罩的夜晚，我们是助长火焰的柴薪。」
E: "In the nights shrouded by the black tide, we are the kindling that makes the fire burn bright."

C: 所以现在，就请你作为前辈，为翁法罗斯的大家言传身教吧？
E: So that's why I'm asking you... Step up as a senior, and show everyone in Amphoreus how it's done.

C: 欢喜月，我举杯将「虚无」驱散——
E: In the Month of Joy, I lift my banqueting cup to dispel Nihility—...

C: 呼唤三月和丹恒。
E: Call out to March and Dan Heng.

C: 缇宁，在这里埋伏很久了。*我们*会让缇安…自食其果。
E: Trinnon has been lying in wait here for a while. We will make Trianne... taste her own medicine.

C: 所以…这只是一片幻境。
E: So... this is just an illusion.

C: 这便是「如我所书」的最后一页了——大家，别留下遗憾呀。
E: And so we reach the final page of "As I've Written" — let's not leave behind any regrets, everyone.

C: 那，也该轮到我啦？
E: So, I guess it's my turn now?

C: 我的建议：别想那么多，先问问自己的内心。
E: If you want my advice, stop thinking so much. Ask yourself what your heart truly wants.

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 以后也要多帮{NICKNAME}他们的忙呀，黑天鹅小姐。
E: Please keep helping {NICKNAME} and the others in the future, too, Miss Black Swan.

C: 被你说的，人家都开始想念那棵树了呀。
E: The way you brought it up... Now I kind of miss that tree too.

C: 迷…迷迷？
E: Mem... memem?

C: 就像摇摇欲坠的世界，难以守护一座永恒的故乡。
E: Just like how the crumbling world could not preserve an eternal hometown.

C: 保持沉默
E: Remain silent

C: 查找。「爱」。
E: Query. "Love."

C: 所以……
E: Then...

C: 明明亲手为机器头打上了失败品的烙印，却还指望着祂证明你的理论成立……
E: You branded Droidhead as a failure with your own hands, yet you still expect THEM to prove your theory...

C: 当然。判决书有两份。一份是我自己写的，另一份来自你。
E: Of course I do. There'll even be two copies of the verdict. One that I wrote myself, and another one coming from you.

C: 等到一切结束后…再来我这品尝新出品的茶点吧。
E: After everything's over... come visit me and taste some of my freshly baked desserts.
Wait ...huh?

C: 唉，好是绕口。你的好师姐也不说明白些，害得我寝食难安啊。
E: Alas, always so cryptic. Your brilliant senior soror never says anything plainly. Left me pacing all night.

C: █我会尽力转译█祂的计算██
E: █ I will do my best to translate █ THEIR computations ██

C: 它能告诉我们「星核」在哪里。
E: That's where we can find out where the Stellaron is.

C: 没想到歪打正着…
E: Well, I guess I got it right after all.

C: 月台破损竟如此严重……
E: That's some hefty damage...

C: 卧薪尝胆酷毙哉。
E: He endured hardship to accomplish his ambition. That's so cool.

C: 你要是对那老斑鸠感兴趣，可以再在空间站里找找，还有没有他寄回来的天外信件。上面写满了自吹自擂。
E: If you are interested in that old scoundrel, you can look around the space station again and see if you can find some of those letters he sent back. Those letters are filled with his bragging.

C: 我还挺想帮帮艾丝妲的。
E: I really want to help Asta.

C: 我救了你，这还不够？
E: I saved you, isn't that enough?

C: 唉，我先走了。家里给我支取零花钱的密钥被人给扣了，我得赶紧去处理下。
E: *sigh* I need to go — someone's taken my family encryption key. You know, the one I use to withdraw my allowance? I need to get to the bottom of it.

C: 就是这张单据，你看看那个采购合同上的抬头——
E: This is the receipt. See the title on this purchase order...?

C: 现在正是上车的好机会！等我们发展成「无敌宇宙核弹头公司」，可就没外人什么事了。
E: Now is a good chance to join us! When we develop into the Invincible Space Warhead Corporation, there will be no room for outsiders.

C: 坏机器…坏…坏……
E: Stupid machine... stupid... stupid...

C: （不是这里。）
E: (Not here)

C: 他们不能在一起…永远不可能在一起。
E: They can't be together... they will never be together.

C: 那我想念她的漫长时间，对她来说，岂不只是一个毫不起眼的瞬息吗？
E: The decades I spend thinking about her will only be a fleeting moment for her, right?

C: 你手上剩下的是红色转译录…所以最后，你也骗了他。那小崽子，现在如何？
E: This is the red log... so in the end, you chose to lie to him. How is he doing?

C: …发音无异常水声，瞳孔反射正常，泌汗反应正常。
E: ... No abnormal watery sound in your pronunciation. Pupillary reflex normal, perspiration reaction normal.

C: 对，就是那个我组建的奇物再收容小队嘛，是空间站依据灾后复兴需要，临时牵头成立的应急小组。
E: The Curio Collection Squad is an emergency team I put together. The team's mission is to support post-disaster reconstruction and ensure that all of its needs are met during this difficult time.

C: 呜哇哇——别过来别过来——
E: Whoa, whoa — don't come near me, go away—

C: 「黑塔」空间站的医疗舱。
E: The medical cabin of Herta Space Station.

C: 之前我也告诉过你很多次，遗忘是人体非常正常的现象。
E: I have told you many times before that it is very normal to forget things sometimes.

C: 也许她曾经来过这个地方。接下来要找的，就是她口中的监视屏。
E: Maybe she's been here before. Now, let's look for this security monitor that she was talking about.

C: 你也听到了，我们正在闭门制定医患隐私条例。
E: You heard her. We are working internally on a patient confidentiality regulation.

C: 可惜依靠有限的剧本，终究还是不能模拟人在多数情况下的正常反应。
E: Unfortunately, a limited script will never be able to simulate a person's natural reaction in the real world.

C: 难怪之前对希拉进行身体扫描，发现她的各项参数近乎完美——简直就像是精密设定的产物。
E: No wonder her body scan showed that her parameters were almost perfect — like a well-calibrated machine.

C: 一，告知原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>她的身世真相。
E: 1. Tell Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> the truth about her life.

C: …你装了角膜接触相机？你拍视频干嘛？难道是在直播？噢，我明白了，就是那种把欺负普通人当乐子的直播，你快走开，离我远点！
E: ...You have a corneal contact camera? Why are you taking videos? Is this live? Oh, I get it. You are one of those people who likes to live-broadcast your bullying behavior. Now, go away and leave me alone!

C: 并非每个外来人都有资格去查阅大家的数据记录，但你不一样，你是拯救了空间站的英雄，大家都信得过你的人品。
E: Not every outsider has the right to access the data records. But you are different. You are the hero who saved the space station. People trust your moral character.

C: 当然啦，如果你愿意帮忙，我希望你能对自己见到的所有数据记录都保密。
E: But of course, if you do decide to help, I hope you will keep everything you see strictly confidential.

C: （原来梅厄之前一直失眠，但在看了猫科萌宠打呼噜的短视频后就能睡得着了。）
E: (It turns out Mare had been suffering from insomnia. Now she can fall asleep after watching short videos of cats snoring.)

C: 是这样的，那个提示说「稍后再试」，实际上「稍后」没用的，要等到第二天才能用。
E: Although, it won't be operational until tomorrow.

C: 猜？这并不算「猜」，从某些意义来说，算得上是一种简单易懂的心理科学吧。
E: Guess? I didn't "guess." To some extent, it was just simple psychology.

C: 这是岔路口右侧房间的通行密钥，看来得麻烦你原路返回一趟了。
E: This is the encryption key for the room on the right side of the path, so it looks like you'll have to make a trip back the way you came.

C: 「阿兰大哥已经是个成熟的男人了，有自己的安排也很正常！」
E: "Brother Arlan is a grown man with his own plans!"

C: 这么说不好吧…
E: I thought you said his name was Capote...

C: 当然，如果反思得不够彻底，我们也可以私下交流交流…总之，我要先去开会了！
E: Of course, if you haven't reflected enough, we can always talk more in private... Right now, I need to hurry to a meeting!

C: 我来守护朋友的秘密。
E: I'm here to protect a friend's secret.

C: 所有的证据都表明！我委托你陪佩佩一起玩，就是你最大的压力来源！
E: It points to one thing: Me getting you to look after Peppy is the greatest source of your stress!

C: 阿兰毅然离去的背影。
E: Arlan's determined silhouette.

C: 双方都应该有话直说才对。
E: You both need to start saying what you're thinking.

C: 我、我可没说啊，我什么都不知道，你别乱讲……
E: I—I didn't say anything like that. I knew nothing, so don't you go around blabbering...

C: 要是被抓到了，凭我这三寸不烂之舌，也很难帮他们开脱。保护奇物生命权益的大业，真是时时充满了变数啊……
E: If they were caught, even with my gift of the gab, there's only so much I can do for them. Life of protecting Curios' rights is just filled with twists...

C: 还请两位去其他地方寻觅「呜呜伯」踪迹吧。
E: Please leave us be and go search for the Wubbaboos elsewhere.

C: 哼，大人也就是嘴巴上会给自己的行为找补罢了。
E: Hmph, you adults are only good at one thing, making up excuses for your own actions.

C: 看到了它的巨大同类…
E: We saw its huge brethren...

C: 哈哈，如此出人意料的反应，想必你就是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
E: Haha, judging by this fellow's surprised reaction, you must be the one Herta is always talking about.

C: 嗯，我也没想到。空间站的事务通常都是艾丝妲站长在打理，我还是第一次见黑塔女士亲自下指令。
E: Yeah, it was pretty unexpected. Space station affairs are usually handled by Lead Researcher Asta — this is the first time I've seen Madam Herta give the orders in person.

C: 呃，这是……
E: Uh, that's...

C: 怎么可能？为什么是…一滴汗？
E: Really? Why is there... a drop of sweat?

C: 她也没带走奇物？
E: She didn't take the curio either?

C: 先专注手头的工作吧！
E: Let's focus on the work at hand!

C: 没错，还要带着它一起。
E: That's right, and I'm bringing this with me.

C: 冷静的「战术策略玩家」说，游戏是为了胜利。
E: The calm Tactical Strategy Gamer said, "Games are about the victories."

C: 在这版方案中，我加入了一种全新的涂鸦。先前进吧，你很快就会遇到。
E: In this edition, I added an all-new graffiti. Go ahead, you'll find out about it soon enough.

C: {NICKNAME}，现在，我已粗浅地为你介绍了「纯美」。我十分好奇——你是否认可这份理念，并信仰伊德莉拉？
E: {NICKNAME}, now that you know something of the Beauty, I wonder — can you resonate with this philosophy and place your trust in Idrila?

C: {NICKNAME}，恕我揣测，我理解你或许是出于好意，认可我的理念，但内心对「纯美」仍无太多认知…这是如此纯美的行为！
E: {NICKNAME}, with all due respect, I fear you may be still be grappling with this philosophy, yet agreed with me out of kindness... An act of pure beauty in itself!

C: 啊？输了我就得承认？
E: Do I have to?

C: 感谢你的到来，这是列车第一次与「纯美骑士」合作。
E: Thank you for coming. It'll be a first for the Express to work alongside the Knights of Beauty.

C: …怎、怎么不说话了？怪渗人的……
E: Wh—Why did you stop talking? What kind of creepy—

C: 吓、吓死我了！我还以为是我失散多年的双胞胎姐妹冒出来了…结果居然是只虫子！
E: Th—That was so scary! It was like a long-lost twin sister had suddenly... appeared out of nowhere! I can't believe it was only a bug!

C: 你一个人？
E: By yourself?

C: 你是为守护「美」而战？
E: Are you fighting to protect "beauty?"

C: {NICKNAME}，你的进展如何？
E: Any progress, {NICKNAME}?

C: 听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
E: I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.

C: 这是你要的账号，绿色干净，直连内网毫无压力。
E: Here's the account you asked for. It's legit and secure, allowing you to connect straight to the intranet.

C: （埃美丽提到的仙舟物种似乎就是启发了阿德勒的东西。）
E: (The Xianzhou species Emily mentioned seems to be what inspired Adler.)

C: 这小子胆子也忒大，居然自顾自地就跑去现场调查了。
E: That kid sure is brave — running straight to the scene on his own.

C: 大、大哥，瞒不下去了。
E: *sigh* Brother Arlan, I—I can't keep this up anymore.

C: 哟，猹哥，什么风把您给吹来了？好久不见，想死兄弟我了。
E: Hey, what brings you here, Rich? It's been so long!

C: 为、为什么你会知道？！
E: H—How did you know!?

C: 你再怎么怀疑，我也只是一个被意外卷入的无关人士。
E: Doubt me all you like. I'm just an outsider who got unexpectedly dragged into this mess.

C: （转述帕梅拉的发现。）
E: (Recount Pamela's findings.)

C: 看，还在空间站内。和螺丝咕姆说的一样，它无法逃出这里。
E: See, it's still in the space station. Like Screwllum said, it cannot escape from here.

C: 无知的愚者盲目追逐火光，殊不知毁灭的恩赐已然落在脚旁。
E: Ignorant fools blindly chasing the firelight — not knowing that the blessings of Destruction already lie at their feet.

C: 请开始你的陈述——想清楚，再发言。
E: Please, begin your statement — and try to think before you speak.

C: 你不信任我……
E: You don't trust me.

C: 为什么不让他们知道？
E: Why don't you want them to know?

C: 空间站的科员们应该还只当它们是外来访客。我不想现身惊动更多人，引起不必要的麻烦。
E: The researchers are still treating these entities as visitors... I want to steer clear of making my presence known, so as not to cause undue disturbances.

C: 拜托你了。回收的「小生命」只需找一个地点收容即可。界种科科员应该对此比较熟悉，会给你合适的推荐。
E: I entrust this to you. Once the little lifeforms are collected, simply find a proper place for them. The researchers in the Department of Ecology should know about this and provide you with suitable advice.

C: 是啊，把空间站当自己家了，到处都是她的研究笔记，扔了一地！
E: Yes, she's treating this place like her backyard! She's leaving her research notes all over the floor!

C: 它们都希望自己能够获得阮•梅女士的认可，很不容易。
E: They both hope to receive Madam Ruan Mei's recognition and have been working so hard.

C: （呜呜…阮•梅…呜呜…）
E: (*sob*... Ruan Mei... *sob*)

C: 就是阮•梅培育的「小生命」？
E: ...is the "little lifeform" Ruan Mei made?

C: 好吧…
E: Alright...

C: 好咧！我这就帮您挑上几株……
E: Alright! Let me help you pick a few...

C: 可是…我，我真的可以吗？
E: But... Do you really think I can do that?

C: 不是不是，这次完全是为了表达我的谢意。多亏了你之前经常帮我试茶，我才受到启发，想出用试茶的法子来吸引客人。
E: No, no. I'm doing this purely to express my gratitude. You helping me sample all those teas inspired me to use tea tasting as a way to attract customers.

C: 你就不怕群体食物中毒？
E: Are you not scared of mass food poisoning?

C: 有空的话可以跟它多交流交流，在升级了系统之后，它身上可是有不少惊喜功能等着你去探索呢。
E: Try talking with it whenever you get time. After the system upgrades, it now has lots of surprising functions waiting for you to discover.

C: 放心啦，有咱们三个在，什么事解决不了？
E: Calm down. Between the three of us, nothing will stand in our way.

C: …这不是重点啦！关键是，公司的人突然跑来雅利洛-Ⅵ干嘛？
E: Anyway, that's besides the point! The point is, what are the IPC doing here on Jarilo-VI?

C: 我听到了「债务」两个字…
E: I only heard the word "Debt."

C: 六百年前的画作……
E: <unbreak>600</unbreak> years old...

C: 哈哈~类似的话我也听过很多次了，真的。
E: Haha~ I've heard that before — more than a few times, actually.

C: 这「合作」的内容可能跟你们想的不太一样…不过后半句我同意，那位「大守护者」治理城市确实很有一套。我这次来的主要目的就是和她见上一面。
E: Hehe, these "talks" aren't exactly what you might expect, but I have to agree, the Supreme Guardian definitely knows how to govern a city. That's the reason I'm here on Jarilo-VI — to meet with her.

C: 你看那两个黑衣服的，从刚才开始就一直守着矿区入口，不让任何人出入。仗着自己装备好就到处欺负别人，你们算什么东西！
E: You see those two in black? They've been guarding the mine entrance — they're not letting anyone in or out. Hey! Just because you have fancy equipment doesn't mean you can bully us! Who do you think you are?

C: …话都不会说吗？可恶，真恼人！
E: What's the matter? Got nothing to say!?

C: 你好，我叫托帕！我来找史瓦罗先生谈些事情。
E: I'm Topaz! I've come to have a chat with Mr. Svarog.

C: 最后的最后，选择权还是在你手上，大守护者。
E: Ultimately, it's up to you, Supreme Guardian, to make the final call.

C: 面对这种胁迫，我们必须反抗、反抗、反抗到底！一秒都不能动了服软的心思！
E: Faced with this sort of coercion, we must resist them with all our might! Surrendering is not an option!

C: 的确，公司开出的价码很诱人。如果拒绝，贝洛伯格不仅要承担还清巨额债务的压力，还会被一方极为强大的势力盯上。
E: I won't deny, the offer on the table is a very tempting one... and if we refuse, Belobog will not only have the burden of a huge debt — we may also incite the wrath of a very powerful force...

C: 那…你们问希儿了吗？她是怎么选的？
E: ...What was Seele's perspective on the matter?

C: 不知道托帕来这里是为了什么呢……
E: I wonder why Topaz would come to a place like this...

C: 签名，请给我签名！
E: Could I pleeease get your autograph?

C: 大家听好啦…
E: Make sure you're all paying attention...

C: 节庆期间，窃贼频出。
E: Thieves are rife during times of celebration.

C: 看，下面是公司的人！
E: Look — down there! It's the IPC!

C: …倒不需要你做到这种地步。我只是希望你能假装患者，帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
E: ...That won't be necessary, but it will help if you pretend to be a patient. Help me investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out exactly what they're up to.

C: 他以前一直说，想走在我前面…哎，这老东西，真是自私……
E: He was forever saying he wanted to go before I did. Hehe... Selfish old fool...

C: 患者们还希望我对你保密。
E: The patients wanted me to keep it a secret from you.

C: …当然了，我控制不了别人怎么想，这些也只是我自己的推测。
E: ...Of course, I can't control what anyone else thinks. That's just how I see it.

C: …我老公在哪里，我的孩子又在哪里……
E: ...Where's my husband... and where's my child...?

C: 「互助会」卖药起码还会告诉买家风险自负，瓦赫那家伙则是免费把那些毒药分发给所有人，连老人和小孩都……
E: At least the mutual aid society doesn't hide the risk from the buyers. Vache gave that poison away to everyone for free... even the elderly and the children...

C: 给穷人发放免费的药物，只是瓦赫用来测试实验药剂的手段。
E: Issuing free medicine to the needy was just Vache's way of conducting experiments on his test subjects.

C: 正式开赛时，搏击俱乐部将会向您告知——届时若想了解详情，掘掘博士随时为您服务！
E: The Fight Club will inform you when the matches officially begin. If you want to know more, Dr. Dig is more than pleased to answer you anytime!

C: 「军团」远去，奇物归位，各科室研究再度开张，新进宇宙舶来品快速流转……
E: The Legion is gone, and the Curios are back. Various departments are returning to their research, and the newly imported goods from the cosmos are beginning to circulate.

C: 如今工作告一段落，恰逢这封告密信出现，是时候借着东风，把水魈议题重新摆上台面。{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
E: Now that we are done with other work, this letter falls into our hands at just the right moment. It's high time we put the Xenohydro issue back on the table. {NICKNAME}, what do you think?

C: 我知道了…但到目前为止，感觉我一直在帮倒忙，水魈依旧没找到。而且我也想不出其他可能的窝点了，要不然就…放弃吧？
E: I know... I feel like I haven't really been helping so far, and the Xenohydro is still no where to be found. And I can't think of anywhere else. So... should we give up?

C: 我在说，绕了这么一大圈，我和{NICKNAME}终于抓到了你——贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」！
E: I'm saying that after all that, the real {NICKNAME} and I finally caught you, Xenohydro!

C: 现在你想离开这里，只有两个选择，要么乖乖答应，代替我去蹲收容舱；要么被我干掉后，再代替我去蹲收容舱。
E: Now if you want to leave this place, you only have two choices. Either obey and go to Storage Zone in place of me, or die and then go to Storage Zone instead of me.

C: 戚戚与之同谋…
E: Better off alone...

C: {NICKNAME}…很神奇的名字。
E: {NICKNAME}... What a strange name.

C: 去永动机械屋…
E: To Neverwinter Workshop...

C: 听说「球牡丹」的花语是「永不磨灭的爱」——用这几个字来形容他们的婚姻，的确再合适不过了。
E: I heard that Ball Peonies represent "love that knows no end..." It does fit their marriage.

C: 我了解了，现在就去挑花。
E: I see. I'm going to go pick out some flowers.

C: 很好的选择呢，{NICKNAME}。爸爸他年纪已经很大了，应该不用再亲自操刀手术了吧？希望他身体还好……
E: Nice pick, {NICKNAME}. Dad's not young anymore, he probably doesn't have to do operations solo these days. I hope he's looking after himself...

C: 滴——滴！
E: Beep! Beep!

C: 我爸爸，最近赚了好多好多钱！
E: My daddy made a lot of money this month!

C: 该去哪找这尊雕像？
E: Where should we look?

C: 该从哪里找起呢？
E: Where do we start?

C: 好，好的！克拉拉会替佩拉姐姐保守秘密的！
E: Don't worry! I'll keep your plan super secret, Miss Pela!

C: 唔…毕竟咱们没有收集全每一个零件嘛，要是叫专家来复原的话岂不就露馅了……
E: Well... Technically we didn't find all the parts, and if we called in the experts to put it back together, they would have realized...

C: 这台投影仪是专为博物馆定制的限定款，全贝洛伯格仅此一台，它成像的清晰度……
E: This projector is a limited-edition version custom-made for the museum — the only one of its kind in the whole of Belobog. It can produce images with a resolution of up to...

C: 可恶，躲在影子里的家伙…难道我们真的连一点把柄都抓不着吗？
E: Ugh, the culprit is still hiding in the shadows. Can't we find even one lead?

C: 这位诺尔伯特先生，您知道他是从事什么职业的吗？
E: This Norbert guy, do you know what his line of work was?

C: 我早就猜到是你了！
E: I guessed it was you from the beginning!

C: 不怪你，谁叫老桑博最近表现得那么安分呢？我就差每天去铁卫禁区给放哨的卫兵送早饭了，嘿嘿。
E: ...Eh-he. Well, I mean... how could you! Your old buddy Sampo is a model citizen, these days. Y'know the guards on sentry duty in the restricted zone? I deliver their breakfast every day, hehe...

C: 这支考察队由一群充满好奇心的学者和探险家组成，他们志愿探明贝洛伯格以外的世界，并试图为人们找到另一处家园。
E: This expeditionary team consisted of a group of curious researchers and explorers who had volunteered to discover a world beyond Belobog, trying to find another home for our people.

C: 哎呀，看来你还是太紧张了——还是让虎克我来主持这个面…面试吧！
E: Hmm, seems like you're a little nervous. I'll take over this in-interview from here!

C: 我是不知道他到底想表达什么啦…不过，在下层那群闹事的地痞无赖眼里，我可能确实像一只来无影去无踪的鬼魂吧。
E: I'm not sure what he tried to convey through that name... But to all those thugs and gangsters in the Underworld, I'm like a specter always haunting them.

C: 没错，是我告诉安东尼娜的…但这矿脉是我第一个发现的，我想怎么处置是我自己的自由！
E: Yes, I told Antonia about the vein... but I was the first one to discover it. I have the right to do anything with it.

C: 伤口已经基本处理好了。现在医疗物资紧张，这段时间不要再到处惹事儿了，听到了没？
E: I've taken care of your wounds. I'm running short on medical supplies these days though, so behave yourselves and stay away from trouble, you hear me?

C: 太好了！我会在矿区避难所里等着你的，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Alright then! I'll be waiting for you at the shelter in the mine, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}!

C: 我平时就这么说话。
E: I always talk like this.

C: 这是物资箱子上的标签…虎克知道那些箱子堆在哪里！
E: This is the label from a supply box... I know where those boxes are!

C: 哎哟，便宜没好货，我就知道你这玩意来头有问题！
E: Tsk boy, I knew it was too good to be true!

C: 这不是你偷窃的理由。
E: That's no reason for you to steal it.

C: 哈，刚才还很嚣张，结果就这点实力嘛！快，把探测器拿过来给虎克看看！
E: Hah, you sure talked tough for someone who can't fight! Come on, hand the detector over to Hook!

C: 三件实在太多了，我没时间。
E: Three is too many. I don't have time for that.

C: 好了，我也不废话了，等我看看清单…一件是<color=#dbc291ff>热驱动机械矿镐</color>，供货的说他是在下班归途中丢的，估计就在这附近，这个简单。
E: Well, enough chit-chat. Let me see the list... There is one called the <color=#dbc291ff>Thermal-Powered Mechanical Mining Pick</color>. The supplier said he lost it on his way home from work. Guess it's somewhere around here. This one should be simple.

C: 什么抢人帽子？这是我在地上捡的。
E: What do you mean by snatching helmets? I picked it up off the ground.

C: 我来帮你们出钱。
E: I've got you covered.

C: 原来我们只是画了个大饼？
E: Does this count as false advertising?

C: 铁卫…铁、铁卫和「地火」？你们居然一起……
E: Silvermane G—Guards and Wildfire are working together now...?

C: 爸爸是名军人。军人不该过度解读命令……
E: Father was a soldier. He wasn't supposed to question the orders from his superiors...

C: …说话？我只听到了一阵杂乱的噪声……
E: ...Talking? I just hear white noise...

C: 感觉…心里的一块石头落地了。
E: I feel like something heavy has finally been lifted.

C: …看来这次是真心话了。
E: ...I can tell you mean it this time.

C: 外面好多怪物，我害怕……
E: There are so many monsters outside, I'm scared...

C: 哎…这都是姐姐的主意。她说这样比较有密谋的感觉。
E: Um... That was Serval's idea. She said it needed a level of secrecy.

C: 话是这么说，她也确实经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己……
E: I know she's used to going into the Snow Plains alone for research, and we've always believed she can protect herself...

C: 嘿嘿，这个悬念留到最后再揭晓——我们先把帐篷搭好，然后一起去收集今晚要用的食材吧。
E: Hehe, don't worry about that for now — let's get the tent ready then go find our dinner.

C: 就这样…把它撬开……！
E: I'm gonna pry it open...

C: 没关系，我们用地髓生火就好了——一起回去吃饭吧。
E: It's fine, we'll just light a fire with Geomarrow... Let's go back and have some food.

C: …玲宝，等等。营地里的那个东西，是很危险的裂界生物。
E: ...Lynxy, wait. That thing in the camp is a dangerous Fragmentum creature.

C: 佩拉…为什么忽然想一起来露营？
E: Pela... Why did you suddenly want to come camping?

C: 不过，其实我也想问…大英雄为什么会出现在这里？
E: So, what's a big hero like you doing out here?

C: 欢迎回家，玲宝。
E: Welcome home, Lynxy.

C: （还是留在营地附近比较好……）
E: (It's probably best to stick close to the camp...)

C: 别为难他了，他只是个孩子…
E: That's enough. He's just a kid...

C: 这、这个…总、总会有办法的……
E: Um... There's always a way...

C: 我只在禁区前线见过这种怪物……
E: I've only seen this kind of monster before in the restricted zone...

C: 我没有恶意——
E: I mean no harm—

C: 我以为钥匙才是宝物…
E: I thought the key was the treasure...

C: 这就是你冷静的结果？！
E: That's all you came up with after calming down!?

C: 那倒是可以…但是修理，也是要花不少钱的吧？还是好亏！
E: That might work... but it'll be pretty expensive to fix, right?

C: 万一有毒呢？
E: What if it has poison inside?

C: 放心，我不会让你白白牺牲的！鼹鼠党会记得你的贡献！
E: Don't worry, your sacrifice isn't in vain! The Moles will remember your contribution!

C: …难道是，帕斯卡？
E: ...Could it be Pascal's?

C: 我认为你们做了正确的决定。不过这么一来，我得好好规划下用药的剂量了。
E: I think you made the right decision. Still, it means I'm going to have to draw up a detailed dosage plan.

C: 原来你们三个关系没那么好啊？我还以为是生死之交呢。
E: So you guys aren't that close after all? I thought you were sworn friends.

C: 你俩说的都有道理，我们当然想尽量和平解决问题，避免损失。但是假如情况有变，那我们也得时刻做好使用武力的准备。
E: Both your approaches have merit. We would always rather avoid losses and settle matters through peaceful means. But if the situation changes, we must be prepared for armed conflict at a moment's notice.

C: 除了监视小混混们的一举一动之外，它们的另一个职责就是提供「试炼」。凡是想当「{RUBY_B#史瓦罗的拾荒人}淘金者{RUBY_E#}」的，都得通过这些铁螃蟹的测试才行。
E: Apart from them keeping a watchful eye on these hooligans, another one of their duties is "processing." Anyone who wants to become a {RUBY_B#Svarog's Scavengers}prospector{RUBY_E#} has to pass a test from these walkin' stoplights first.

C: 原来如此！把机器人当作看门狗来对待，妙呀！
E: Ooh, good plan! Treat the robots like guard dogs!

C: 是从别的星球来的！
E: Not even from this planet!

C: 布洛妮娅姐姐也……
E: Bronya, do you really...

C: 只靠克拉拉一个人的力量，想改变史瓦罗先生的想法要花上很久很久。就算等到克拉拉成为大人的时候，也不一定能有结果。
E: Trying to change Mr. Svarog's mind on my own would take forever. Even if I kept trying until I was all grown up, I don't think I could do it.

C: 那个…如果可能的话，请大家不要激怒史瓦罗先生……
E: Uhh... If you can, please try not to upset Mr. Svarog...

C: 到了这个份上，还遮遮掩掩什么啊！{NICKNAME}，和他摊牌吧！成败都在此一举了。
E: We've come this far. Out with it already! {NICKNAME}, just be straight with him! Everything depends on it.

C: 就算是这样，如果没有克拉拉的话…史瓦罗死也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
E: Although, if Clara hadn't been here... Svarog would never have granted us access to the intel, right? Even up until the end.

C: 记得铆钉镇吗？裂界开始侵蚀那座小镇的时候，我们全都手无寸铁，毫无保卫家园的手段。
E: You remember Rivet Town? When the Fragmentum corrosion first appeared, we were defenseless. We didn't have a clue how to protect our homes.

C: …克拉拉明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 流浪者营地里有不少翻找古代遗物的淘金者，所以我们这次的拍卖会也会有不少稀世宝物，举个例子吧，听说有一件拍品是九成新的「地髓矿脉探针」……
E: There are lots of prospectors hunting for ancient relics in the vagrant camp, so there should be a lot of unique items at this auction. For example, I heard that one of the goods up for auction is a barely used Geomarrow Probe...

C: 啊，不对！我们才没有什么打算！
E: Ah... n—no! That's not what we're going to do!

C: 虎克想说的是拍卖会吧？原来如此，流浪者营地的那个吗？
E: The auction... right Hook? The one at the vagrant camp?

C: 这不，我看今天的拍品里多了几样适合小朋友的玩意，但是却没见到歌蒂的人影…她不会是回磐岩镇了吧？要是错过拍卖就太可惜了……
E: I've noticed there are a few more children's items at the auction today, but I haven't seen Gertie anywhere... She hasn't returned to Boulder Town yet, has she? It would be a shame if she couldn't make it to the auction...

C: 呃，现场突发了一些小问题，「地髓矿脉探针」竞拍将会延后。对探针感兴趣的买家，请耐心等待，不要离场……
E: The bidding for the Geomarrow Probe has been postponed due to unanticipated complications at the venue. Please be patient and don't leave the auction if you want to bid on it...

C: …你说话怎么这么心虚啊！啊，该不会…该不会是探针被偷走了吧！
E: ...You don't sound very convincing! *gasp* ...Did someone steal it?

C: 可是，拍卖都已经结束了……
E: But the auction's over now...

C: 七百五十冬城盾三次！成交！恭喜这位买家！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold! Congratulations to the winner!

C: 赌上我们全部家当吧！
E: Let's put it all on the line!

C: 老爹我要先来讲两句，大家可别嫌啰嗦——
E: I do hope you'll forgive the ramblings of an old man, but I would like to say a few words...

C: 不不，虎克知道，老爹是最关心虎克的啦！是虎克不想让老爹担心，所以才没告诉你。
E: Not true! I know you care about me the most, daddy! I just didn't tell you because I didn't want you to worry.

C: 咦…？这个小家伙的涂装，还有它身上这些定制的部件，以及部件连接的手法…好奇怪。
E: Huh? This paint job and these custom parts. And the way the parts are attached... It's all quite strange.

C: 开个玩笑而已，我们走吧。
E: I was just kidding. Let's go!

C: 入侵者…擅自…打破……
E: Intruders... Violate... Protocol...

C: 它是不是想说什么？
E: Is Pascal trying to say something?

C: …格式化完成后，该个体发展出的情感智能将完全消失。
E: Once the formatting is complete, the robot's emotional intelligence will vanish.

C: 理解。过去的七百年中，从未发生过自动机兵依靠自身算力发展出情感智能的案例。「帕斯卡」这一个体确实具有研究的价值。
E: I understand. Over the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, there has never been an automaton that has developed emotional intelligence through its own computational power. Pascal is an intriguing subject worth researching.

C: 就按克拉拉说的做吧。
E: We'll go with Clara's idea.

C: 这应该是铁卫有意为之。
E: I think the Guards must have done this intentionally.

C: 看吧！轻轻松松。
E: See! That was easy.

C: 的确，我俩的性格跟兴趣喜好都完全不一样。
E: I can't say I blame you — we're nothing alike in personality or interests.

C: …看来她遇到麻烦了。快，我们上去看看情况！
E: ...Looks like she's in trouble. Quick! Let's check it out!

C: 你改变不了所有人。
E: You can't change everyone.

C: …母亲，你真的相信「星核」作出的承诺吗？它唤来了墙外的风雪，开启了裂界的大门。它毁灭了我们的文明——
E: ...Mother, do you truly believe the Stellaron's promise? It summoned the blizzard beyond our walls and opened the door of the Fragmentum. It destroyed our civilization, it...

C: 自天外的入侵者降临那一刻起，这个世界就已经被宣判死刑。但星核…它给我们保留了一丝希望。
E: From the moment those intruders descended from beyond the sky, this world was handed a death sentence. But the Stellaron... has reserved for us a thread of hope.

C: 把愚昧的意志当作食粮…赦免他们的愚蠢和恐惧……
E: Feast on their willful ignorance... absolve them of their stupidity and fear...

C: 这样啊…你的选择是…这样啊。我了解了，布洛妮娅。
E: So... this is your choice. I understand, Bronya.

C: 贝洛伯格——
E: Belobog...

C: 最后的最后…我们还是无法抗衡「星核」的意志。
E: We could not defy the will of the Stellaron after all...

C: 因为我啊——
E: Because I...

C: 你的！
E: in...

C: 你向瓦尔特与姬子说明了此行的调查结果……
E: You explain the results of the investigation to Welt and Himeko...

C: 寒潮过后的历史啊…我们的智库里似乎并没有相关文献。
E: History after the Eternal Freeze... Our data bank doesn't seem to have any relevant documents on this topic.

C: 你向瓦尔特与姬子说明了关于寒潮前历史的调查结果……
E: You explain what you learned about the history prior to the Eternal Freeze to Welt and Himeko...

C: 嗯…原来贝洛伯格是这么建成的呀。还有这套历法……
E: Hmmm... So that was how Belobog was established. Didn't know that they had a calendar system like this...

C: 希望…这些能够弥补本次调查任务给你造成的精神伤害。
E: I hope... these can make up for any mental damage you've endured during this investigation.

C: 要是能帮得上忙就好了。
E: If only I can help in any way.

C: 散页上密密麻麻地写着家庭地址、所属登云群阁、工作时间等详细信息。
E: Detailed notes containing an address, Skyward Pavilions neighborhood affiliation, working hours, and more are densely packed in the scattered pages.

C: 没事没事，治疗最要紧，不应该等我，我之后再去丹鼎司一趟吧。
E: No worries. My schedule shouldn't hold up her treatment. I will visit the Alchemy Commission later.

C: 接下来就该找找肇事星槎了。
E: It's time to find the offending starskiff.

C: 梅姐又拿出了她买菜时记菜品和账目的小本，让芦慧仔细查看……
E: Mei takes out a note and a vegetable shopping list and asks Luhui to take a closer look at them.

C: 唉，司部经此大乱，同僚们都挨个接受云骑审查去了。眼下你的请求怕是谁都一问三不知。
E: *sigh* With the commission in chaos, all of our colleagues are being interrogated by the Cloud Knights. I don't think anyone would know about the request you're talking about.

C: 搞定了！
E: Done!

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 路上小心一些。
E: Be careful out there.

C: 是谁当时冲着我耳朵说些肉麻的情话，什么「重华，我爱你，直到魔阴降临」。
E: Who was it who once whispered something cringy romantic lines into my ears like "Chonghua, I'll love you forever until the mara comes."

C: 慢着！我就看一眼，我不会害你的。
E: Hold on! Let me just have a glimpse. I won't hurt you.

C: …你感染了什么病毒？
E: ...What kind of virus did you catch?

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 呵呵，算是我无心给的建议吧——不要期待与长生种相恋，尤其是仙舟人，这很容易受伤。
E: Well, here's my advice for you — it's better not to date a long-life species, especially the Xianzhou natives, as you will likely get hurt.

C: 等你想清楚了以后，再交给我吧。
E: Once clarity finds you, feel free to entrust it to me.

C: 有科员主动申请外驻，真是求之不得。
E: We would want nothing more than a researcher who proactively requests for off-station research.

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 不会。
E: No.

C: 等等，我好像听到了玉兆的消息提示音，就在前面的集装箱那里。
E: Wait, I think I heard a jade abacus notification coming from the container in front.

C: 带上我一起找吧，我看你比较靠谱，跟着你事情应该会顺利。
E: I'll go with you. You seem reliable, so things should go pretty smoothly.

C: 好嘞！
E: Ya-hoo!

C: 陶德翻动着你提供的「拓片」，枯瘦的喉结上下翻滚，猛然咳了起来。
E: As Todd is fiddling with the rubbing you provided, his withered Adam's apple moves up and down before he starts coughing vigorously.

C: 他望向你的眼神浑浊又疲惫，像无助的乞丐蜷缩在命运的死角里，恳求恩主施舍。
E: His eyes are bleak and weary when he gazes at you. He looks like a helpless beggar cowering in a dark corner, pleading for charity.

C: （飞天的巨舟，仙舟人喜欢将宇宙和天空称为「天之外海」，还挺浪漫…只是旅程中有多少艰辛或许只有他们自己知道了……）
E: (A gigantic flying ship. The Xianzhou people like to call the universe the "seas beyond the sky." How romantic... Perhaps, they are the only ones who understand how arduous the journey through the universe is...)

C: 我本来以为自己已经获得「长生」了，可惜事情并没有这么简单。
E: I thought I'd gained immortality, but unfortunately things were not that simple.

C: 持明族？
E: Vidyadhara?

C: 仙舟上除却化外民少有人会持有钱包这样的东西。
E: Few people apart from the outworlders on Xianzhou would have a wallet.

C: 要问为什么，大概是因为「药王秘传」这帮人脑子坏掉了，是真正意义上的脑子坏掉喔。
