E: Why were they eliminated? Because they held an incredibly dangerous notion.

C: 你怎么变成这副模样了？
E: How did you turn into... this?

C: 疼——好像…能够理解您了…
E: Argh... I think... I can understand you...

C: 你们为伤重晕厥的云骑军进行了救治，又手忙脚乱凑齐合身的甲胄，穿在身上。
E: You gave medical treatment to the wounded Cloud Knights that have lost consciousness, then grabbed some armor and put it on.

C: 不好！我们赶紧过去。
E: Oh no! Let's hurry over.

C: 龙师们听闻了丹恒大人回来的消息，一时不知吉凶。但大家都在猜测，罗浮龙尊传承或将失而复得，重归一统，可喜可贺。
E: The Preceptors heard of Master Dan Heng's return, and were uncertain whether it constituted good or ill fortune. However, many have surmised that the Luofu's high elder succession tradition will soon be back in force. If true, that is indeed something worth celebrating.

C: 我看她也不是很想做龙尊。
E: I don't think she even wants to be the High Elder.

C: 这事不问问白露自己吗？
E: Shouldn't you ask Bailu herself about this?

C: 你既有此一问，看来成行前已有人来打过照面了？
E: ...but your question would suggest that there are others interested in dissuading you from such a venture.

C: 龙女没有力量，丹枫一介罪人，另选龙尊合情合理。
E: The Dragon Lady has no power and Dan Feng is a criminal. One can understand their desire for a new high elder.

C: 保守！
E: Very conservative of them!

C: 怎么样，开始吗？
E: Well, shall we begin?

C: 你这怒气打哪来的呀！
E: Where's this anger coming from?

C: 我没太听懂你们在说什么。
E: I'm not sure I follow.

C: 啊？小店长？你说隐书啊？是啊，怎么了？有事？
E: Huh? Young shopkeeper? You mean Yinshu? Yeah, I am. Something wrong?

C: 呵呵。情报和信息是最值钱的，你懂不懂啊？
E: Hehe, come on. No one ever tell you that information and intelligence are the most valuable commodities?

C: 给你钱，可不许骗我们。
E: I'll pay you, but don't even think about lying.

C: 我有点没跟上，撕书还和星核有关系？{NICKNAME}，你听明白了吗？
E: I don't understand. What does tearing out a page have to do with the Stellaron? Are you following Mr. Yang, {NICKNAME}?

C: 没关系，是我的思路有点跳跃。
E: That's alright, this is a bit of a conjectural leap.

C: （哦哦，好的。）
E: (Oh, sure.)

C: 我来送一件东西，必须亲自交给你们老板，帮我联系一下他。
E: I have a delivery for your boss — I need to give it to him in person. If you could let him know I'm here.

C: 慢慢来，我不急。
E: Take your time.

C: 会做出这样的举动，说明他真的很喜欢《渔公案》。而喜欢这本书的人、喜欢渔公这位神探的人，又怎么会去做坏事呢？
E: He must be a fan of this book too... I knew Angler Mystery fans couldn't be bad!

C: 买家在那里等我。过去看看情况吧。
E: The buyer is waiting there, time to head over.

C: 虽然遭遇了尴尬的开场，但这番会面你们与驭空倒也谈的尽兴。
E: Though things didn't get off to a great start, everyone enjoyed this meeting with Yukong.

C: 喝不下可千万别勉强了。咱们到别处去看看吧，我知道星槎海有个地方特别适合观赏星槎。
E: Well, don't force yourself. Let's go somewhere else — I know a really great place in Starskiff Haven to starskiff-watch!

C: 这一定是驭空司舵相当珍重的东西。晴霓小姐，我们送你回去，请你亲自将它还给令堂吧。也借此契机，和她好好聊聊。
E: It must be very close to Helm Master Yukong's heart. Let's head back, Miss Qingni — I think you should return this trinket in person. This is an opportunity for the two of you to talk.

C: 妈妈，我说了很多遍，那是情势所迫！我想帮您，想帮天舶司一次，我不想只是坐在桌前每天面对写不完的文件！我不适合干那个……
E: I already told you — I had no choice! I want to help you and the Sky-Faring Commission, not sit at my desk dealing with never-ending papers! That job doesn't suit me...

C: 乱丢垃圾不好…
E: I think that counts as littering...

C: 所以，按照你的心意去做就好，{NICKNAME}。我想，卡芙卡不会伤害你的。
E: So, {NICKNAME}, do as you see fit. I don't think Kafka intends to do you harm.

C: 我想了解情况…
E: I want to understand the situation...

C: 我留下来帮你。
E: I'll stay and help you.

C: 你返回卡芙卡和刃的藏身处，耐心等了一会儿，直到卡芙卡中断了「言灵」。
E: You return to Kafka and Blade's hideout, and wait patiently for a while until Kafka cuts the Spirit Whisper short.

C: （沉默）
E: (Silence)

C: 我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
E: Elio ordered Sam and I to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.

C: 你这贼子，也敢冒充元帅大人！众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: You dare to pretend to be the Marshal? Scoundrel! Everyone, take them down!

C: 胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Utter nonsense. Everyone, take them down!

C: 对了，那个…罗刹。你的大箱子里面是很重要的东西吗？咱们最好轻装上阵，非贵重物就别带啦，会拖累你的。
E: Hey, Luo... Luocha, what's in the box? Is it important? If not, you should leave it behind, we need to travel light.

C: 什么…小忙？我不干啊，要是一个不小心，你又要差云骑大哥们来押我们了。
E: Favor...? Count me out. What if we do it wrong and you get your cloud cronies to throw us in jail.

C: 想必是驻守的士卒动了那些集装箱，将它们当作路障。
E: The soldiers stationed here must have moved these into a roadblock.

C: …果然没那么简单，让{NICKNAME}先行离开是明智之举，不能再因这件事让他们涉险了。
E: Just as I thought, there was more than met the eye... Letting {NICKNAME} leave first was a wise choice — I can't put them in danger again because of this.

C: 而你要我做的，我一定会做到，哪怕为此要斩落天上的星星，我也绝不毁诺。
E: I will fulfill what you asked of me. I will keep my word, even if it requires me to cut down the stars in the sky.

C: 真是不可貌相，瞧她柔柔弱弱的样子，怎么会是…重犯？算了算了，不该本小姐知道的事情，不问便是。
E: Talk about not judging a book by its cover — she looks so kind and elegant... How could she be a criminal? Meh, not my concern.

C: 那么我们俩只能继续这场追逐了，这就是你我应付的代价。
E: We have no choice but to continue the pursuit. This is the price the two of us must pay.

C: 嗯…可说认识，也可说不认识。这副淡漠冰冷的口气，倒是和当年那家伙如出一辙。
E: Hmm... the answer to that is both yes and no. However, your cold and indifferent tone is identical to the person I knew back then.

C: 你也想恢复龙尊传承？
E: Do you also wish to restore the high elder succession?

C: 联盟奉帝弓诰谕，除魔不止，为的正是有朝一日能铲除药师，令生死重回正轨。
E: The Alliance follows the Reignbow Arbiter's edict — to continue ridding the world of evil, so that one day Yaoshi might be vanquished and the cycle of life and death restored.

C: 你是怎么翻出这么长一串的？
E: You got all that from a few woofs?

C: 恕我不能透露，见谅。
E: *sigh* Forgive me, but I cannot disclose this information.

C: 对了，你有没有见过一个黑衣长发的男人——
E: By the way, did you see a man with long hair and black clothes around here...?

C: 彦卿啊彦卿，一本小说就拖住了你。竟把将军的嘱托抛在脑后……
E: Focus, Yanqing! You can't let novels distract from your duty to the general... especially not ones as crummy as this...

C: 下一个心跳间，少女已不见形影，原本立足之处只余下一枚锐利踏印。一闪而逝的剑光后，是突破音障的鸣啸……
E: In the next heartbeat, the lady disappeared. The spot she stood before was only left with a sharp footprint. With a flicker of a sword flash, comes a loud sonic boom...

C: 答案是，并无区别。一剑贯穿丹腑，断其生息。
E: The answer is: There is no difference. The sword pierces the body and severs its life.

C: 若这一剑向你刺来，你能否挡下？！
E: If this sword came for your throat, would you be able to deflect it!?

C: 怎么定胜负？
E: How do we tell who's won?

C: 开门见山吧，有什么事？
E: Let's cut to the chase, shall we?

C: 在抄写第五遍时，旁边的那位云骑终于按捺不住，悄悄蹭到了你的身边。
E: As you write out the fifth copy, the Cloud Knight near you no longer can wait in silence. He quietly comes up next to you.

C: 好，战吧！
E: Okay. Let's fight!

C: 去问问丹枢大人吧，我们的丹士长。
E: Go and ask Lady Dan Shu. She's our chief alchemist.

C: 你刚刚说「云骑久久不来」。本姑娘身为云骑，这不就赶来了嘛。
E: You just said "there's no hope of the Cloud Knights arriving." I happen to be a Cloud Knight — wouldn't you call this a timely arrival?

C: 素裳姑娘，咱们就是「外人」啊。
E: ...Are we not outsiders here, Miss Sushang?

C: 「敬之终吉」…乖乖，穷观阵都体贴地算到这份上了，看来咱们真是缘分不浅。
E: "Ultimately auspicious..." Wow, sounds pretty good to me — seems like we really were destined to meet today, then.

C: 唉…只能动用非常手段了。
E: *sigh* You leave me no choice but to resort to unconventional means.

C: 对星穹列车的记忆？应该可以。
E: Memories from the Astral Express? That should do the trick.

C: 这张空间站工牌上，赫然显示着三月七的个人肖像，下面备注着「三月七，Ⅰ级科员」。
E: March's unapologetic smile is displayed on the permit. The note below reads "March 7th, Lv. 1 Researcher".

C: …给我整无语了。
E: ...Seriously?

C: 嗯？应该没有吧？为什么突然问这个？
E: Huh? I don't think so. Why are you suddenly asking me that?

C: 我们初到贝洛伯格的第二天，银鬃铁卫对咱们几个穷追不舍，然后才遇到了希儿。
E: I remember our second day in Belobog was mostly us being hunted down by Silvermane Guards... We didn't meet Seele until way later.

C: 也许「后退」才能找到你的过去。
E: Maybe the only way for you to find your past is to take a step back.

C: 欢迎光临「梦境贩售店」，星穹列车的开拓客！
E: Trailblazers from the Astral Express — Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store!

C: 好久不见，历劫佳人。
E: Long time no see, diamond in the rough.

C: 不用找了，就当她是逃课成功好了。
E: Nope, let's just assume she successfully skipped class.

C: 就是平日里冷了些，饮食单调了些，房子也没庇尔波因特那么高。但是不打紧！咱们那儿发现了储量巨大的超钛矿藏，要不了多久就会繁荣起来的！
E: Sure, it's a bit cold, and the food is a bit repetitive, and our houses aren't as fancy as those on Pier Point, but that doesn't matter! We've discovered massive supernium deposits, and we're on the path to prosperity!

C: 不管爷爷是出于什么原因选中了那柄剑。我都不能让它落入别人的手里。
E: It doesn't matter why Grandpa chose that sword, I won't let it fall into anyone else's hands.

C: 这魔剑可不止是你一人的问题。
E: You know, this cursed sword isn't just your problem.

C: 记得我向你解释过，今天赠剑仪式上被送出的孤云，正是一柄被铸入岁阳的魔剑。而铸造它的匠人含光，是我的父亲。
E: I already told you about Guyun, the sword that was returned during the ceremony. It's a cursed sword with a heliobus inside. And Hanguang, the swordsmith who forged it... is my father.

C: 星槎海码头的一角，你们找到了身着银甲的骑士。应该说，是他找上了你们。
E: In a corner of Starskiff Haven, you stumble upon a knight clad in shimmering silver armor. Or rather, it seems he has sought you out.

C: 老朽虽然听使团讲过这柄剑的传奇。但深入剑的记忆，其中的故事仍有一番离奇。云璃，我相信孤云的经历会让你有所改变。
E: Even though I had heard the legends of this sword from the delegation, delving into its memories was still fascinating. Yunli, I trust Guyun's experiences have changed your mind.

C: 呃，让我找找…银枝登记的星船「希世难得号」的停泊位置……
E: Um... let me see... the docking location of Argenti's ship, the One and Only...

C: 哦？
E: Oh?

C: 云璃说自己没有偷剑，我愿意信她。
E: Yunli says she didn't steal the sword, and I am willing to believe her.

C: 与你告别后，她假意离开，实则孤身闯进了武库，窃走了宝剑孤云。
E: After bidding farewell to you, Yunli pretended to leave but snuck into the arsenal alone and stole Guyun.

C: 整个案件没有别的嫌疑人，我们也没有找到其他证据。
E: We haven't found any other suspects or evidence.

C: 呃，也许…等等，让我再考虑一下。
E: On second thought... maybe let me think about it again.

C: 三人九死一生，好不容易捡回一条命，但货物却被劫得不剩多少了。所以他们每个人都有为了逃避责任而杀害花火大人的动机！
E: They narrowly escaped and barely got away with their lives, finding their supplies almost completely raided. So they all shared a motive for killing Miss Sparkle — to escape punishment!

C: 这次的小剧场是现代风格呢。
E: The skit this time is a modernist one.

C: 而现场共有三位嫌疑人，分别是皮皮西店员阿佑、狐人赌徒钟珊、和智械富商佐罗。
E: There were three suspects on the scene, namely a Pepeshi shopkeeper named Wright, a foxian gambler named Zhongshan, and a wealthy Intellitron trader called Lefton.

C: 这就是全部的信息了。需要我再复述一遍吗？
E: That's all the information we have. Do you need me to repeat it?

C: 比常人小一半的脚印，应该是皮皮西人留下的吧。
E: The footprints, which are half as big as standard, must belong to a Pepeshi person.

C: 不指认凶手。
E: Do not identify the murderer.

C: 非常精彩的推理，已经无限接近真相了…只不过，我这还有另一个谜底，您想听听看吗？
E: Exquisite reasoning, and very close to the truth... But I have another answer. Would you like to hear it?

C: 最后是阿佑，这家伙贪得无厌，好不容易逃出生天，竟打算私吞剩下的货物，谎称是被山贼全部抢走了…佐罗和钟珊气不过，就<color=#dbc291ff>把他的腿打断了</color>。
E: Last of all comes Wright. This guy was so insatiably greedy that he still came back to try and embezzle the rest of the supplies after they narrowly escaped with their lives, lying about how the gang had taken off with everything... Lefton and Zhongshan were so incensed that they <color=#dbc291ff>broke his legs</color>.

C: 哦…您已经找到答案了吗？
E: Hmm... Have you solved the case?

C: 点击R键查看案情
E: Press R to view case details

C: 嗨呀，杨先生真厉害！一个外人轻而易举地拿下了这扇门。我正式将太卜司「逍遥门掌门」的头衔移交给你啦！
E: Wow, you're amazing Mr. Yang! You handled that well for an outsider. I officially hand over the title of "keeper of the loafing gate" to you!

C: 升职加薪，尽在眼前！
E: I sense a promotion and a raise!

C: 我知道你还有很多疑惑想找卡芙卡问个明白。
E: I know you still have many questions for Kafka yourself.

C: 好啊，都依你。就当作我们不怎么熟吧。
E: Fine, if you prefer. Not friends.

C: 所以我一定要把你骗来这里。我需要你直接接触罗浮将军，帮助他们解决星核之乱，让联盟欠下一份人情。这样，在未来的未来，在最为关键的时刻，仙舟将助你一臂之力。
E: ...and that's why I had to trick you into coming here. I needed you to meet the Luofu's general in person and help him resolve the Stellaron crisis. I needed the Alliance to owe you a favor. That way, in the future, at the most critical moment, the Xianzhou will offer you their help.

C: 星核促成了「建木」的重生……
E: The Stellaron facilitated the resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 怪不得仙舟人随星舰流浪宇宙，从不在某个星球定居……
E: No wonder the people of the Xianzhou wander the universe, never settling on a planet...

C: 我不知道如今这炉中是否还有妖物存在。也许是我多心了吧。不过自从我随师傅学艺起，我便每日前来打点照看洪炉的运转。
E: I don't know if there are demons in the furnace — perhaps it's all just superstition. However, from the day I started learning from my master, I've looked after the operation of the furnace.

C: 还有事么？神策府那厢不是急着想要知道药理么？
E: Need something else? Isn't the Seat of Divine Foresight anxious to learn about the prescription?

C: 再次感谢出手相助。
E: Thank you again, for all you've done.

C: 因为对于很多像仙舟人这样的生物来说，「智齿」都是需要尽早拔除的。可仙舟人做不到，仙舟人的智齿像竹子一样顽强，除之不绝，是一个终身的顽疾。
E: For most living creatures, wisdom teeth need to be removed as early possible... but for we long-life species, they are as stubborn as boulders. We must endure them for as long as we live.

C: 我一直以为她是朋友…
E: I thought she was my friend...

C: （对了，丹枢给我的药盒上残留了她的气息，用青镞给我的谛听找找看吧。）
E: (I've got it. Dan Shu's medicine box has her scent on it — I'll ask the Diting that Qingzu lent me to track her.)

C: 他们那里的羊肉都没你这里的好吃，你让我怎么相信你这里只是普通的浮羊肉！
E: Their lamb don't taste as good as yours. I find it hard to believe you only use ordinary Puffergoat meat in your food!

C: 行行行。我明白了，羊要吃草，人要吃好。既然有人愿意放弃功德，兑换成更直接、更冰冷的信用点数字，那么我就满足{F#她}{M#他}好了。
E: Fine, I get it. Both sheep and humans have to eat well to survive. Since someone is willing to give up merits in exchange for cold hard credits, I'll fulfill {F#her}{M#his} wish.

C: 等等…这不是我请去调查法乌努斯红毛羊失踪案的那位高人吗？失踪案的真相查清楚了吗？
E: Wait a minute... Isn't this the person I hired to investigate the disappearance of the Faunus Red Sheep? Have you got to the bottom of it?

C: 嗯？找我有什么事吗？
E: Oh? Anything I can help you with?

C: （购买贝洛伯格的机械生物啊…该去问谁呢？先问问希露瓦吧，她毕竟是开机械屋的。）
E: (Who should I turn to if I wanna purchase Belobogian mechanical creatures? Serval, maybe. After all, she owns a workshop.)

C: 是啊，可不要排除那些对人类特别感兴趣的星神。
E: Exactly. Don't forget about those Aeons who are particularly interested in humans.

C: 去吧…茂盛生长吧，呃，小铁花们……
E: Go ahead and thrive, um, my little blossoms of steel...

C: （他们似乎沉浸在自我感动的氛围中…还是不要打扰他们了。）
E: (They seem to be deeply moved by their own actions... I'd better not disturb them.)

C: 唉…但这也不完全是一件坏事呀。那三个魔怔的家伙不在了，地衡司盯「放生帮」也没那么紧了，现在我的日子倒是舒服了不少。
E: Well, it isn't entirely a bad thing. Now that the obsessed trio isn't here, the Unshackled will be off the radar of the Realm-Keeping Commission. It makes my life a lot easier.

C: 后面怎么就第三人称视角了？
E: Why is it in third-person perspective at the end?

C: 有这个可能。但我和素裳很快就被判官们赶走了，而在临走前，我留意到那些判官似乎正打算在绥园里布置些什么。
E: Possibly... but the judges kicked me and Sushang out of there straight away. It looked like they were setting something up in the garden before we left.

C: 判官大人，冒昧问下，这火焰团子到底是个什么东西？该如何防范它暴起伤人？还有还有…为什么判官大人会随身带着这么个东西……
E: Your Honor, if I may ask, what exactly is this... fire thing? How can we prevent it from hurting people? ...And why is a judge carrying one around with her...?

C: 我们岁阳一族本来是无忧无虑的生命，就因为接触了人类才感染上了「人性之病」——都怪人类，拥有如此浓烈的情绪和欲望，害得我们再也回不到过去纯洁无染的心境。
E: We heliobi were carefree lifeforms, but were tainted with the illness of humanity once we came into contact with it. It's humanity's fault for having such intense emotions and desires — now, we can never, never return to the purity of our past.

C: ——不好！
E: Oh no!

C: 总有一天我会找到机会，将你们撕得粉碎，将你们骨头咬得嘎吱作响，抽干你们每一分力气，再把你们像痰一般唾进地缝里……
E: ...one day, sooner or later, I'll tear you all to pieces. I'll crunch your bones to dust, sap every drop of your strength, and spit you out into the dirt where you belong...

C: 礼数未至，不可开门，客人请回吧。
E: The door will not open without the proper courtesies. Return from where you came, visitors...

C: 呜哇啊啊啊啊！那边的门自己打开了。
E: Wahhhh! That door just opened on its own!

C: 藿藿为什么能当十王司判官？
E: How did Huohuo manage to become a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 虽然我对自己辨别能力没什么自信…但是，这三面镜子……
E: I'm not the best judge of things... but these mirrors...

C: 尾～巴——
E: Tail...

C: …嘀嗒！快过来！快过来！
E: ...Tick tock! Over here! Quickly!

C: 努力向前吧，孩子…不要回头。你属于更广阔、更美好的舞台。
E: Work hard and walk forth, child... and don't look back. You belong to a grander, more magnificent stage.

C: 你这孩子，怎么这么执拗？在匹诺康尼聊「梦想」，你自己不觉得奇怪吗？
E: Kid, why are you so stubborn? Mouthing off the word "dream" in Penacony... do you not think yourself strange?

C: 在窃窃的笑声和嫉妒的眼光中，柯柯娜回到了现实，并开始惧怕第二天的到来。
E: Amidst low snickers and jealous stares, Cocona returns to reality, dreading the next day's arrival.

C: …娜娜？你怎么哭了，娜娜…我们应该高兴才是啊……
E: ...Cocona? Why are you crying, Cocona... We should be happy...

C: 躺在掌心中的小小车票那么轻，又那么沉重，仿佛拥有拽动未来的力量。
E: The palm-sized ticket rests in her hands — so light, yet so heavy, as if it possesses a power to drag the future along with it.

C: 扔掉唱片。
E: Throw away the record.

C: 哇，你居然在梦里还随身带着？！没想到你才是我们中间最狂热的那个……
E: Woah, you carry it on you even in a dream!? I didn't realize you were that kind of crazy fan...

C: 莱斯利•迪恩抬起他纤长的手指，轻轻拂去自眼角泛起的一颗珍珠泪。你听到他身旁的几位粉丝——包括那位智械——同时倒吸了一口气。
E: Lesley Dean raises his slender finger to gently wipe a pearlescent teardrop from his eye. To your side, you hear a number of his fans, including the Intellitron, gasp in unison.

C: 确认，他的存在已经违反了入梦协议上的多个条款。
E: I am certain. His existence here has already violated multiple conditions in the Dream Agreement.

C: 眼下我正被漫无边际的焦虑纠缠着，无法冷静地思考未来。您是我的恩人，我愿意相信您的判断。
E: Right now, I find myself wracked with incessant anxiety. I cannot bring myself to calm down and carefully consider my future. You are my savior, so I trust your judgment.

C: 糟、糟了——您、您看上去是位通情达理的{F#小姐}{M#先生}，求您别把这件事告诉家族的人！
E: Oh—Oh no! Pl—Please... you seem like a reasonable person... Please do not tell The Family about this!

C: （不知道这会不会对莱斯利造成影响…回梦境里看看吧。）
E: (I wonder if this will affect Lesley in any way... I should return to the dream and check on him.)

C: 无论梦境多么甘甜，沉溺其中也只会带来窒息的结局。该帮他们回归现实了。
E: No matter how sweet the dream, delving in too deep will only lead to suffocation. I should help them face their realities.

C: 你希望他能等来苏醒的一刻。
E: You hope that he will see his awakening.

C: 或许我们以后很难再见了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。但——「愿温柔的宇宙祝福你的每一次呼吸，我的朋友。」
E: We may never meet again, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. But... "I pray that the gentle universe blesses your every breath, my friend."

C: 放心，为了表达我们家系对星穹列车的诚意，我在苜蓿草的人才库中，为您筛选出了几位合适人选——
E: Don't worry, as a show of sincerity from The Family to the Astral Express, I have selected a few suitable candidates from the Alfalfa's talent repository...

C: 我来为您介绍一下——
E: Allow me to introduce them...

C: 开摆开摆！
E: Do it!

C: 我要整顿匹诺康尼的职场！
E: I will straighten out Penacony's workplace!

C: ——但转念一想，这台自动化服务终端是酒店的财产——它属于匹诺康尼集团，换句话说，它也属于你这位大股东……
E: ...On second thought, this automated service terminal is hotel property. It belongs to the Penacony Conglomerate — in other words, it also belongs to you, a major stakeholder...

C: 哼…哼唧……
E: Oink... Oink...

C: 等会儿，所以{NICKNAME}的意思是…这群皮皮西就是我们在找的那帮恶棍？
E: Wait, so what {NICKNAME} means is... these Pepeshi are the thugs we're looking for?

C: 波提欧，银枝——这是青雀。
E: Boothill and Argenti, this is Qingque.

C: 皮皮西人的口气如此热情真挚，毫无表演的痕迹——一时间，你觉得他或许真的笃信着自己的布道。
E: This Pepeshi's words sound warm and sincere, devoid of any pretense... For a moment, you wonder if he genuinely believes in his sermon.

C: …干嘛？没看见我在打牌啊？一边凉快——
E: ...Stop disturbing me! Can't you see I'm in the middle of a game? Just get out of...

C: 好好好，就喜欢这种痛快的！
E: Great! That's the attitude!

C: 哼唧！哼唧！
E: Oink! Oink!

C: 谢谢你，三月！
E: Thank you, March!

C: 很可惜，没能跟将军交手。
E: It is a shame that we never got that duel.

C: 嗯嗯。
E: Hmm...
Huuuuh—!?

C: 青雀小姐，那我也拜托你了！
E: Miss Qingque, I'm begging you!

C: …我也没打算闲着。
E: ...I don't plan on slacking off.

C: 没想到你竟然如此不在意，真希望你有勇气当着工匠们的面大声说出来。
E: I didn't expect you to care so little. I really hope you can find the courage to speak out about it in front of the craftsman.

C: 我现在根本没有办法去想别的事。就让我仔细看看星槎，然后彻底死心吧。
E: I'm simply incapable of thinking about anything else. Take me to see the starskiffs close up, and maybe I'll have some closure.

C: 太好了，事不宜迟，我们这就出发去迴星港！
E: That's great. This cannot wait, so let's get going to Stargazer Navalia!

C: 一来这迴星港里还有妖物滋扰。我需要你们保护我；再有就是，我想要迴星港里的视觉资料来辅助手稿。
E: First up, there're monsters causing trouble around Stargazer Navalia, so I need your protection. Next, I need some visual data in Stargazer Navalia to complement this manuscript.

C: 老夫就帮你看看，免得你们费了些没必要的功夫。
E: I'll check it to spare you guys from taking unnecessary steps.

C: 我看，我留在这里也只是尴尬，老夫就先去忙了。你要是有什么不懂的，就多来问我。
E: Well, I think I should get going. Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

C: 那还是有可能出错的嘛。
E: That doesn't mean he wouldn't make mistakes.

C: 铖杰师傅你不是想造出一艘星槎，只是想完成它寻求解脱，这很危险。
E: Chengjie, building a starskiff is not your true intention, given that you only want to finish it for a sense of closure. This is a dangerous mindset.

C: 你先去零件区翻翻，那里应该有一些可用的金人零件，我去借一台金人过来，再看看要怎么做才能把技术移植上去……
E: You go check the parts area. There should be some usable aurumaton parts there. I'll go borrow an aurumaton and see how I can transfer the technology over...
Uh...

C: 怎么样，{NICKNAME}？准备好陪我走一遭特训之旅了吗？
E: How about it, {NICKNAME}? Are you ready to head out for the special training?

C: 他可能有什么不能说的原因。
E: Maybe he has his reasons.

C: 嗯。
E: Mm.

C: …喂，你哪来的自信？
E: ...Hey, how can you be so sure?

C: 哔——叭！「小飞」——已完成重启！
E: Beep - bing! Little Fay re-initialization complete!

C: <size=36>「——再次维护了公正跟和平！」</size>
E: <size=36>"...upholding justice and peace once again!"</size>

C: …行吧，我知道了。既然你这么坚持……
E: ...Fine, I get it. If you insist...

C: …红方选手被击倒！十，九，八，七……
E: ...Red contestant down! Ten, nine, eight, seven...

C: 哈…哈…多谢……
E: Ha... ha... thanks...

C: 这些年里，他们的活动渐渐不再像往日那般猖獗了。谁能想到……
E: Their presence has faded over the years, but who would have thought...

C: 若是能胜过仙舟所选的守擂人，不仅能赢得赏金和奖品，还能扬名立万。
E: If you can defeat the ringmaster selected by the Xianzhou, you'll not only win rewards and prizes but also be making a name for yourself.

C: 丹恒，我都想假装不认识{F#她}{M#他}了。
E: Let's just pretend we don't know {F#her}{M#him}, Dan Heng.

C: 赔钱是不可能赔钱的
E: Pay you compensation? You wish!

C: 兄弟们，快拦住他！为了琥珀王！
E: Stop him, guys! For the Amber Lord!

C: 至于这三位，想必就是来自星穹列车的客人吧？你们救罗浮于水火之中，好生令人钦佩呀。
E: As for you, you must be the guests from the Astral Express, right? Saving the Luofu from that crisis, it's so impressive.

C: 你们俩自个儿安排吧，我和一位多年没见的老战友有约了。
E: You guys figure it out for yourselves. I'm due to catch up with an old war friend I've not seen for quite a long time.

C: 如果挑衅是你的目的，彦卿就奉陪到底！
E: If you're trying to pick a fight, just ask, because I'm ready for you!

C: 看来真被飞霄说中了。
E: Looks like Feixiao was right.

C: 知道你一切平安，我就放心了。那么，这次你和怀炎老先生前来，想必是领了元帅的命令吧？
E: I'm relieved to know that you're safe and sound. Well then, since you and Elder Huaiyan are here, I imagine you must have received orders from the Marshal?

C: 想必你也知道，消失多年的逃犯镜流再度出现了。这次她带来一个化外民和一具棺材，自称向元帅献上「与神相争的法子」。
E: As you know, the fugitive Jingliu, who mysteriously disappeared many years ago has resurfaced. This time, she has brought along an outworlder and a coffin, claiming to offer the Marshal "a method to fight against the Aeons."

C: 你暗暗猜测这里究竟能关押多少犯人？三千？三万？三十万……？也许这里只是幽囚狱系统小小的一角。
E: You hazard a guess on the number of prisoners they are capable of holding here... Three thousand? Thirty thousand? Three hundred thousand? Wait, this may not even be the entire Shackling Prison!

C: 它能看到什么肉眼不能见之物吗？你忍不住打了个寒颤。
E: Is there something that cannot be seen with the naked eye? You can't help but shudder at that thought.

C: 三月小姐瞧好了！
E: Pay close attention, Miss March.

C: 尽管如此，我却从未因艰辛而退缩。在短短几周的时间里，我的剑术突飞猛进。两位师父都夸我是世间少有的剑术奇才，争先恐后地用各自的方法教导我。
E: Still, I didn't let the difficulty get to me. In just a few weeks, my sword skills have improved a lot. Both my masters think I have unique talents in swordplay and are literally fighting each other to teach me their skills.

C: Harr zaa xi？谁，谁在那儿？！
E: Harr-zaa-xi? Wh—Who's there!?

C: 三月小姐，别靠太近了，会被发现的！
E: Don't get too close, Miss March! They might spot you!

C: 星核猎手警告我们，如果不前往仙舟，至少会有一半罗浮住民死于非命。
E: The Stellaron Hunters warned us that if we didn't hurry to the Xianzhou Luofu, half of its inhabitants would die.

C: 你担心我出尔反尔，将你们扣在幽囚狱里？那大可不必…我要是想做早就做了。一旦完成证言，诸位来去自由，礼遇如常。
E: Worried that I might go back on my word and keep you in The Shackling Prison? Relax, if I wanted to do that, you'd already be behind bars. Once you're done with your testimony, you're free to come and go as you please.

C: 虽说{NICKNAME}与我有一面之缘，但十王御下，不容徇私。前往「录事厅」留下证言以及之后的一切流程，请两位务必听我号令，不得擅自行动。
E: Even though {NICKNAME} and I have met before, we can't show any favoritism under the Ten Lords. So, please do as I command as we head to Scrivener Hall and beyond. Don't do anything without my permission.

C: 如果在所有人无法察觉的时候，这些东西已经开始行动。那整座监狱现在的状况就非常危险了。
E: If these things already started taking action while nobody was paying attention, then the whole prison is in trouble, I'm afraid.

C: 你误会了。蒙十王恩赐，姐姐在数百年前早已成了机巧之身。死亡后其「灵魂」回归因果殿的案牍库，对她来说早已是家常便饭。
E: You misunderstand. Thanks to the Ten Lords' blessing, my sister turned into an ingenium centuries ago. Dying and returning as just a soul to the Hall of Karma's document office has become a routine for her.

C: 老朽当然不会闲着，但我要去的地方却不是竞锋舰。
E: Of course I'll do my part, but not on the Skysplitter.

C: 不，这应当是个步离人。没来得及变回原形，就被狱卒当场格杀了。
E: No, this is a borisin in disguise. A guard killed him before he could return to his original form.

C: （检查武弁的遗体）
E: (Examine the remains of the warden)

C: 因为同样为了一念私心，为了所谓的利人善举，罗浮上曾经发生过一桩足以警示后人的悲剧。
E: Because such selfish pursuits in the name of "good intentions" once led to a tragedy on the Luofu that served as a warning to future generations.

C: 让我看看伤势。我能帮上忙的。
E: Let me take a look. I can help you out.

C: 好，我这就找人。
E: Alright, I'll call for reinforcements.

C: 有些人追求力量是为毁灭他的仇敌，有些人追求力量却是为了变成他的仇敌…椒丘，你是哪一种？
E: Some seek power to destroy their enemies, while others seek power to become their enemies... Which one are you, Jiaoqiu?

C: 身为狼，我们是恐惧的制造者，而不是恐惧的奴隶。如果你无法看见道路，我将成为高悬的赤月，为你们照亮道路的所在——
E: As wolves, we create fear. We don't become servants to it. If you're blind to the path, I will be the crimson moon that lights the way for you.

C: 场面不大，又怎么能吸引别人前来观看呢。三月，你没忘记自己是来做什么的吧？
E: Well, how could they expect to attract people to come and watch if they didn't make a huge spectacle? March, you haven't forgotten what you came to do, have you?

C: 云璃师父，性格很暴力。
E: Master Yunli has a fiery temperament.

C: 明白！
E: Understood!

C: 貊泽，你没事吧？
E: Moze, are you okay?

C: 它不在抵达竞锋舰的星槎航班表上，不过星槎上本身通牒文件都是正式的。
E: It wasn't on the Skysplitter starskiff registry, but all the documentation checked out.

C: 按照爷爷的安排，咱们俩的好徒弟三月会代替你登台守擂——是不是感到很骄傲啊？
E: Following Grandpa's plan, our disciple March is taking your place as ringmaster... Aren't you proud of her?

C: 我可不想让景元将军失去他的得意弟子。当我察觉到呼雷不在地面上时，我就争分夺秒地赶来这儿了。
E: I wouldn't want General Jing Yuan to lose the disciple that brings him so much pride. When I sensed that Hoolay was not on the ground, I raced to get here as quickly as I could.

C: 你以为自己伴着「正义」的旗号冲锋行军，你以为只要杀死足够多的步离人，就能成为新主人中的一员。
E: You thought that you now marched into battle under the flag of "justice." You thought that if you only murdered enough borisin, you could be just like your new masters.

C: 你明白了吗，萨兰…你我的相似之处，远比你想得更多。
E: Do you understand now, Saran... You and I are similar in more ways than you think.

C: 我会用你的风暴吞没你！
E: I will devour you with your own storm!

C: 丹恒先生，还有灵砂姐姐！大家…都在这儿啊？
E: Mr. Dan Heng, and Sister Lingsha! Everyone's... here?

C: …抱歉，椒丘。我没想到你会用「以毒饲狼」的做法，多么失策，要是我能早一点找到你们…要是我没有派你去幽囚狱……
E: ... I'm sorry, Jiaoqiu. I didn't expect you to use poison that way. What a miscalculation. If only I'd found you sooner... If only I hadn't sent you to The Shackling Prison...

C: 蛮可爱的想法。
E: It's a pretty adorable way of thinking.

C: 上尉用尽力气高声呼喊。然后吐出一口鲜血…再没了气息。
E: The lieutenant musters all his strength and yells at the top of his lungs, then coughs up blood... and stops breathing.

C: 蒂索克二世让侍卫们暂时退下，王座室内只余下了三人。
E: Tizocic II motions for the retainers to leave them, leaving just the two of them in the throne room.

C: 先用冰淇淋麻痹朕的舌头，这样朕就尝不出肉里毒药的味道了！你当朕是傻子吗？
E: Using ice cream to numb my tongue, so I would not be able to taste the poison on the meat! You think me a fool?

C: 誓言大于一切。
E: My oath is unbreakable above all.

C: 怎么样？都想起来了？
E: So? You remember everything now?

C: （黑塔的反应好像有点意外，那位老先生究竟是…）
E: (Herta sounds surprised. Who on earth is that elderly man...)

C: 像是被闪电击中一般，查德威克的瞳孔突然放大了一倍——然后又迅速地收缩。笼罩他眼白的灰雾开始散去，他神态中的一切都变得明朗起来。
E: As if struck by lightning, Chadwick's eyes suddenly widen and quickly contract again. The gloom covering his eyes dissipates, and he appears bright-eyed.

C: 啊…我明白了。这里不是现实…你也不是公司派来的人，对吗？
E: Ah... I get it. This isn't reality, and you aren't an IPC lackey, are you?

C: 被软禁的唯一好处，就是随着岁月和痛苦的累积，压在我身上的负罪感似乎减弱了一些。
E: The passing of time and the increasing pain seem to have alleviated my guilt, which is the only good thing about being confined here.

C: 拜托了，客人！请你帮忙去找找那孩子吧，啾！
E: Please, guest! Help look for that child, tweet!

C: 醒醒吧。就算没那孩子捣乱，也没人敢用你发明的东西做饭吃。
E: Wake up. Even if that child wasn't causing a fuss, no one would dare to eat anything you make.

C: …或许，这孩子比我们想象的都能干。
E: ...Maybe this child is more capable than we thought.
...Hmph!

C: 这可真是…令人惊叹。
E: This is... shocking.

C: 这是…克劳克影城的周边玩偶？你果然不想见我。
E: This is... a Clock Studios Theme Park merchandise doll? You really don't want to see me.

C: 奥尔拉？
E: Orla?

C: 听不见，大点声！
E: I can't hear you. Say it louder!

C: 不认识我了？是我杀了疯王！
E: Don't recognize me? I'm the one who slew the Mad King!

C: （说起来，重渊的小女孩还真送了我一个苹果…要交给他吗？）
E: (That reminds me, that girl in the Abyss gave me an apple... Should I give it to him?)

C: 如果吾师真被判了重罪，那笔钱估计也……
E: If my master is truly convicted of a serious crime, I think that money will likely...

C: 若不惩罚苏克提瑞斯，便无以向律法和人民交代；但若判罚过重，又会显得圣城不近人情、独断专横。
E: Failing to punish Soctires, it will be unjust to the people and the law. But if the punishment is too harsh, it will cause the holy city to be seen as cold and tyrannical.

C: 但至少，它会去往明天。
E: But at the very least, it heads towards tomorrow.

C: 是你啊，贵客。没能见到你发言，有点可惜。
E: It's you, honored guest. It was a pity that I was unable to witness your speech.

C: 讲素质，做文明眷属。
E: Have some class and be a civilized Titankin.

C: 这次能不搞断章了吗？
E: Please don't leave us hanging this time!

C: 但在这情感面前，我却觉得这幅石身中愈发空虚，仿佛热情的温度正在蒸发我纷争的金血。
E: However, in the face of these emotions, I felt my stone body becoming more and more hollow... As if the warmth of this kindness was evaporating my golden blood of strife away.

C: 而我们彼此也不应该是什么战友，而应该是更重要、更浪漫的存在。
E: We were never meant to be allies in battle. Our relationship is something more important, something more romantic.

C: 在城外的厮杀声中，在戍卫长尚未瞑目的尸首旁，两人相拥，像是躲入了看不见的茧里。
E: Surrounded by the sounds of the fighting outside the city, the two embrace as if wrapped in an unseeable cocoon. They stand beside the corpse of the captain, his eyes open past the precipice of death.

C: 和敌国的女子相恋，背弃一切私奔，这在我读过的故事里很浪漫，所以我才迷了心窍……
E: To fall in love with a woman from a rival city and abandon everything as I flee. This is the kind of romance I read in my stories, and that's how I became obsessed...

C: 是纷争…纷争已经来到，神赐的金血在翻涌，命定的欲望在沸腾……
E: It is strife... Strife has come. The golden blood you were gifted begins to stew, and the fated desire boils up within you...

C: 我不知道，这路的两端都是命运…一端是我的纷争，一端是他的浪漫……
E: I don't know. Both of these paths are my fate... One is my Strife, and the other is his Romance...

C: 嗡…我明白了…真遗憾，希望塞纳托斯能早日把她送回我们的茧中。
E: Buzz... I understand... What a terrible shame. I hope that Thanatos will allow her to join our cocoon soon.

C: 在记忆的更深处，传来了市集的议论声……
E: From the depths of the memory comes the vibrant bustle of the marketplace...

C: 许久后的奥赫玛城中，无休止的纷争再度苏醒……
E: A long time later, within the city of Okhema, the echoes of endless strife resurface once more...

C: 它坚不可摧，甚至韧性条都没动。
E: It is indestructible. Not even a dent appears on its Toughness bar.

C: 她还曾让一位老人在耕耘月的头天到奥赫玛的城门边去，在那儿，他找到了在战争里失散的两个兄弟。
E: She even had an old person go to Okhema's city gates on the first day of the Month of Cultivation. There, he found the two brothers he thought lost during the war.

C: 她写了什么？
E: What did she write?

C: 去告诉他们，那些财宝进了谁的口袋，绝不会为他们带来好运——去告诉他们，泰坦不会庇佑他们，黑潮会照常涌上大地——
E: Go tell them whose pockets those riches now line and how the offerings will never bring them fortune... Go tell them the Titans won't protect them and the black tide will inevitably surge across the lands...

C: 她现在在哪儿？
E: Where is she now?

C: 逃不掉的，终究是逃不掉。
E: No escape. It is inevitable.

C: 自两位血亲死去以来，这或许是它最为慷慨的一次启示，悲惨的景色映入你的眼眸。
E: Ever since your two kin passed, this could be the Titan's most generous revelation as the tragic scene reflected in your eyes.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}，我也有件事要拜托你。待会儿跟我来一趟。
E: Oh right, {NICKNAME}. I've got something to ask you. Come with me later.

C: 何况联盟这些年四处征战，骁勇克敌的故事也讲了不少。英雄一词，在民众心中本就有分量。
E: Besides, the Alliance has been fighting battles everywhere in recent years, and there's been plenty of tales about their valor and victories. The word "hero" already carries weight in people's hearts.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们在「记忆」的路上一起走出了很远很远的距离。虽然*我*记忆中的翁法罗斯会永远轮回下去，将铁墓封印在过去……
E: {NICKNAME}, we've come such a long, long way together on the path of Remembrance. Even though the Amphoreus in my memories will forever continue its cycles, sealing the Irontomb in the past...

C: 我相信，我们一定会重逢。
E: I believe we'll meet again.

C: 群星静静呼吸。你确信，翁法罗斯的「果」已经种下。
E: The stars breathe silently. You are certain that the fruit of Amphoreus has been planted.

C: 这道理谁不懂？可、可我能怎么实践嘛……
E: Who doesn't understand that? B—But how do I practice it?

C: …虽然说是在夸人，但我凭直觉感觉哪里不对，好像…更像是在骂人？
E: ...It sounds like flattery, but I intuitively feel something's wrong. Like... it's more of an insult?

C: 哎，饿死我了！
E: Oh, I'm starving!

C: 那是一个空间站的照明设备突然短路的寂静时刻…一个连续通宵加班工作的科员漫步在空间站的走廊。
E: It was a quiet moment when the lights in the space station suddenly shorted out... and a researcher who had been working overtime for many consecutive nights was walking along the corridors.

C: 这样吗？可惜……
E: Oh, too bad...

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 摄影需要故事方能吸引人的眼球，而站在你眼前的恰巧是一个有故事的男人——你要做的就是把我散发魅力的瞬间捕捉下来。
E: A photo needs a story to attract attention, and you're looking at a man full of stories. All you have to do is capture the moment when I exude charm.

C: 干巴巴的讨论永远比不上实际行动。走吧，我已经物色好了今天的拍照地点。
E: Meaningless discussion can never be compared to real action. Come on, I've found a photo spot for today.

C: 我现在手头还有些工作要处理——麻烦你转告华劳斯公子，等我有空了就会联系他。
E: I still have some work to do. Please tell Mr. Wallace that I will contact him when I am free.

C: 大致的地点我已经标出来了。拿到之后直接回我这儿来，别告诉任何人！
E: I've marked their rough location. Bring them back to me once you've found them. Don't tell anyone!

C: 先告诉我你的目的…
E: Tell me what you're up to first...

C: 收件人是…哇，字迹歪歪扭扭的，完全看不清楚！
E: The recipient is... ugh, the handwriting is terrible. I can't figure it out!

C: 多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
E: Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!

C: 晕…有人在跟我说话吗？哎哟…我的药怎么还不来……
E: Oh... Is someone talking to me? Ah my medicine... when can it arrive...

C: 莉拉…原谅老爸。不过几个月的时间，一眨眼就会过去的……
E: Lila... Forgive dad. It'll just be several months. It won't be long...

C: 就来一束「七彩虹」吧。
E: Then I'll take a bouquet of Rainbows.

C: 这花…真美，不愧是贝洛伯格最名贵的花。可惜妈妈她好像对这种花过敏……
E: They're gorgeous... Now I understand why they say Marquises are the most precious flowers in Belobog. It's a pity that Mom's allergic to it...

C: 题面看完了吗？请答题——提问，一共有几辆车被偷走了轮子？
E: Mmm? Finished yet? Answer me, how many cars have had their wheels stolen?

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: 话说回来，你听说了吗？整个贝洛伯格科学界都在疯传——教育部那个最难搞的波瓦大臣好像准备退休了！
E: Speaking of which, have you heard? The entire Belobog scientific community is going crazy with gossip... Because apparently the crankiest, oldest codger of them all — Minister Bova — is retiring!

C: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
E: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……
E: Hmm? Where'd you hear that? I haven't heard anything...

C: 喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！
E: Hooboy... you really are Minister Bova's rising star, huh! What an intellect!

C: 托你的福，越来越顺利了~小女子越来越能理解塔米拉小姐的灵魂了。
E: Thanks to you, things are getting better and better~ I'm getting a clearer picture of Tamila's soul.

C: 按照希露瓦小姐的说法，塔米拉可是亲自拖着加热器去机械屋的~不是仆人、助理或经纪人，而是亲自拖着去的……
E: Based on Serval's story, Tamila dragged the heater to the workshop all by herself~ No servants, assistants, or a manager helping her out — just her dragging it herself...

C: 喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
E: Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.

C: 好说，好说。跟我来后台吧，咱们交流一下。
E: Interesting. Come backstage with me, and let's have a chat.

C: 哎，真是的…我都多大了，又不是小屁孩！你至于管得这么严吗，我又不可能偷偷看那什么《奇谭》……
E: Seriously... I'm not a child anymore! You can't tell me what to do all the time. It's not like I'm gonna go read that Tales series...

C: 另外…这是今天罗希一事的报酬——请你笑纳。
E: And this is the reward for Rossy's business today — with warm regards.

C: 难道…你那朋友正好是个医生？那可是帮大忙啦！
E: Is your friend a doctor? That's awesome!

C: 你很快明白，该男子恐怕是一名小偷。你莫名有些气恼，却又感到一丝可怜——想必他绝不知道你那口袋里装的都是些什么东西。
E: You soon realize this man is probably a thief. You feel upset, but also a bit sorry for him — He probably has no idea what items you are carrying.

C: …不过，很可惜——你的想法很好，但这套护具的防护效率似乎并不如我们现役的制服。如果把它强行挂在制服外面又有可能限制行动……
E: Your idea is good, but... this gear doesn't seem to be as protective as our current uniform. And if we wear it outside the uniform, it may restrict our movement.

C: 我来帮你看看。
E: Let me have a look.

C: 「放生帮」行事，我略有耳闻。
E: I've heard a little about The Unshackled.

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 那、那是什么呢？
E: Wh—What wine jar?

C: 懂了，这是只「里拉精」——依照经验，你给出判断。
E: You've got it, it's a Lyre Fairy — your experience lends weight to your deduction.

C: 你总觉得它的设计实在眼熟——即使突然开始播放「失物招领」的通知，你恐怕也不会感到意外。
E: You find its design very familiar — you wouldn't be surprised, even if a Lost-and-Found notice is suddenly broadcast.

C: 这种乐器名为水漫琴，拥有法吉娜的赐福，旋律醉人。据说个别信奉「海洋」的城邦会把它抬上战场，作为扰乱敌人军心的手段使用。
E: This instrument is called a water lyre, and its enchanting melody has Phagousa's benediction. Rumor has it that cities worshiping "Ocean" would carry one into battle as a means of chipping away at enemy morale.

C: 奥瑟顿星突发智械植入体溶蚀事件，现已得到控制。
E: A sudden incident involving the corrosion of Intellitron implants occurred on the planet Oceton. It has now been brought under control.

C: …这当然不难，阿格莱雅。
E: ...This is simple, Aglaea.

C: 侍奉您这么多年了，这点儿事还是清楚的。把象征世界的<color=#dbc291ff>天球</color>放在<color=#dbc291ff>右侧</color>，对吧？
E: After all these years serving you, one thing I'm sure of. The <color=#dbc291ff>celestial sphere</color> that symbolizes the world should be on the <color=#dbc291ff>right</color>, isn't it?

C: 哈哈哈！什么都瞒不过你。如果说世界上有什么人能将我杀死，那只有我与你的孩子了。
E: Hahaha! I cannot hide anything from you. If there were anyone in this world that could kill me, it could only ever be our child.

C: 你记住了「曾使用过欧洛尼斯的祷言」
E: You remembered "Using the Prayers of Oronyx."

C: 绘制着各种奇思妙想的小黑板。粉尘勾勒出孩童对世界的华丽想象，却也封存着她被禁闭于此十数年的苦闷与孤寂。
E: Dusty blackboard adorned with whimsical sketches. The chalk captures a child's grand imagination of the world, though it also betrays her years of confinement and isolation.

C: 你决定顺应心中的欲念，但先别急，在成为王之前，你还有必须要做的事。
E: You decide to yield to the desire in your heart. But not so fast — before becoming king, there's something you must do first.

C: 布利萨王深信不疑，回乡后就散尽国财，拉拢了附近不少小城邦。
E: The King of Bulsa trusted every word, returned to his city, and distributed his wealth to win over many small neighboring cities.

C: 祭司。
E: The priest.

C: 呼呼…生存还是毁灭？不管怎么选都是一件辛苦事啊。
E: Phew... Survive or be destroyed, either way, it's a tough choice.

C: 茫茫星海间，似乎每个世界都有这种愿意用生命换取真理的学者。他们用身躯构成了通往进步的阶梯，不在乎自己是否倒在黎明之前。
E: In this vast, endless Stellar Sea, it seems each world has scholars willing to trade their very lives for truth. They construct the path toward progress with their own bodies, indifferent to whether they fall before the first light of dawn.

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 别急别急，本狮的腹中还在酝酿新的问题，去其他狮子那里接受考验吧！
E: No rush, no rush. I am brewing new riddles in my belly. Go accept challenges from other lions!

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 阳光尚未远去的雅努萨波利斯…真是美丽。托您的福，我才得以亲眼看见这幅景色。
E: The sunlight has not yet faded from Janusopolis... How charming it is. Thanks to you, I'm able to witness this view with my own eyes.

C: 欧洛尼斯的祭司能用预言占卜失物，雅努斯的祭司能靠预言走出迷宫，塔兰顿的祭司能凭预言昭雪冤情……
E: The priests of Oronyx use prophecies to locate lost things, those of Janus use them to navigate mazes, and those of Talanton use them to prove innocence...

C: o((^'ω´^ )っ「发福利了！发福利了欧~」)∋
E: o((^'ω´^ )っ "Freebies here! Come get your freebies~" )∋

C: 且慢，有话好好说。
E: Hold on, let's talk it out.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Enter the horse's stomach)

C: 为了重建庭院，风堇小姐确实花了很多心思。无论在树庭还是奥赫玛，当她为昏光庭院选址的时候，总是会跑遍每一处角落，只为找到环境最优美的一隅。
E: She truly put in a lot of effort to rebuild it. Whenever she was choosing a location for the Twilight Courtyard, whether in the Grove or Okhema, she'd search every corner, just to find the most beautiful spot.

C: 他的身影一转眼便消失在了视野尽头，你不确定那坛递最后有没有升上天空……
E: In the blink of an eye, his figure disappears beyond the horizon, and you're unsure if the amphora ever ascended into the sky...

C: 白厄不会辜负你的期待。
E: Phainon will not disappoint you.

C: （为了救人，对这个木马使用冲拳吧。）
E: (Give this wooden horse a solid punch to save a life.)

C: 按下按钮。
E: Press the button.

C: 「律法之半神」，「凯撒」刻律德菈…逝于光历3960年。
E: Cerydra the Imperator, the Demigod of Law... Deceased Light Calendar 3960.

C: 「海洋之半神」海列屈拉，生于光历3860年，逝于光历    年。
E: Helektra, "Demigod of Ocean." Born Light Calendar 3860. Deceased Light Calendar .

C: 经历了那么多故事后，你的内心已不再有彷徨。望着眼前的黄昏——亦或是朝阳，你决定迈开脚步。
E: After all these stories, your heart no longer wavers. Before you — whether this be twilight or dawn — you take the first step.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 遐蝶拂动花瓣，动作比最微弱的风更为轻柔。
E: Castorice brushed against the petals, with motion gentler than the faintest breeze.

C: 三月七的路就是我的路。
E: March 7th's path is my path.

C: 老友，你关注着我们眼前那迫近的命运，这正是我们并肩走到了现在的原因……
E: Old friend, you've been watching that approaching destiny before us, and that's exactly why we've made it this far together...

C: 这么高科技还怕水？
E: With this level of technology?

C: 钱给我，我替你花。
E: Give the money to me, I will spend it for you.

C: 稍等我的电池老化越来越严重了，请你帮我找个充…「电量不足」。
E: Hold on, my battery's deteriorating more and more, could you help me find a char... "Insufficient Power."

C: 下次记得收好你的棒球棍，先文明问好嗡！
E: Next time, keep your baseball bat in check, and try a civilized greeting first, buzz!

C: 小心一点，不要掉下去嘤~
E: Be careful, don't fall, eep~

C: 花不完…根本花不完~
E: Can't spend it all... I'll never spend it all!

C: 继续前进吧…
E: Let's continue onward...

C: 所以你是…肉体窃贼？
E: So, you're a... burglar of physical bodies?

C: 第一次都会这样的啦。
E: That's how it is the first time.

C: 那我怎么交差呢？
E: Then what should I tell everyone?

C: 你要进入「忘却之庭」吗？
E: Do you want to enter the Forgotten Hall?

C: 啊，原来你是来赴这个约的，太好了，我就知道能指望你。
E: Ah, so you're keeping this appointment, then. That's great. I knew I could count on you.

C: 下一场演练什么时候开始？
E: When's the next drill starting?

C: 能、能认识您，我倍感荣幸！
E: I—I'm honored to meet you!

C: 太、太好了！奥列格兵长说了，只要您出手，裂界怪物就只有逃、逃命的份儿……
E: G—Great! Captain Oleg said, if you're here, then the Fragmentum monsters will h—have to just flee in fear...

C: 他说的句句属实。
E: That's true.

C: 北边的状况不、不容乐观。裂界的反攻更加猛烈了，裂界怪、怪物的数量超出了铁卫的预期……
E: The situation in the northern front is not looking g—good. Counterattacks from the Fragmentum monsters are getting more violent, and their numbers far exceed our initial estimates...

C: 我会在身后祝福他们。
E: I will pray for their triumphant return.

C: 一种强烈的眩晕感朝你袭来，你扶额，低头望向自己的鞋尖——
E: An intense wave of dizziness hits you. You clutch your temple, lowering your head, and stare at the toes of your shoes...

C: 你和佩佩转身准备离去，自动门升起，却尴尬地停滞在半空中。
E: As you and Peppy turn to leave, the automatic door rises, yet suspends awkwardly in midair.

C: 门禁系统激活中，请稍等片刻。
E: Access control activation is in progress. Please hold.

C: 「管家」将你和佩佩赶了出去。
E: The butler kicked you and Peppy out.

C: 「管家」说外面来的…都是坏家伙…你…你别过来！
E: The "butler" said that everyone from the outside... are bad... You... Don't come any closer!

C: 考考你，{NICKNAME}——你觉得那刻夏和我们是什么关系？
E: Time for a quiz, {NICKNAME} — what do you think is the relationship between Anaxa and us?

C: 不行…不行！早安可是很重要的，要再认真点！跟着人家念——早，上，好！早上好哦！
E: No, no! Good morning is important, so let's take it seriously! Repeat after me — good, morning, okay? Good morning!

C: 这次怎么没有思考人家的事情了呀！改回去呀，把这个选项改回去嘛！
E: You're not thinking about me this time? Change it back! Change this option back!

C: （这是什么东西……）
E: (What is this...)

C: 来来来，老夫就很欣赏你这样有动力的年轻人。
E: Come here. I love youngsters with motivation like you.

C: 也不知道是最近老夫太忙了还是太累了，刚才我看你在那里调试承接器的时候，不小心就恍然入梦了。
E: I don't know if I've been too busy or too tired recently. When I saw you debugging the receiver, I accidentally fell into a dream.

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do it!

C: 这一次算的是我自己。
E: This time, it's me.

C: 「枘凿六合」是系列作品？
E: Hexanexus a serial work?

C: 重做之后，我们考虑过副标题要用「Remake」、「Rebirth」、「Remastered」还是「Return」、「Recall」……
E: After the remake, we considered whether to use the terms "Remake," "Rebirth," "Remastered," "Return," or "Recall" in our subheading...

C: 十王司同意你随处乱放魔方？
E: Did the Ten-Lords Commission approve of you leaving Hexanexus lying around?

C: 我的内心确实存在故障，我能清楚感受到…它在我的脑中留下了一道裂痕，一道刻印，无时无刻不在提醒着我，去思考那个动摇我们存在意义的问题——
E: There is indeed a fault in my inner world, and I can feel that clearly... It has left a scar in my mind, a mark, constantly reminding me to consider the problem that makes us question the meaning of our existence...

C: 根据你的选择，我能解读出你未来的运势。总之，让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
E: According to your choice, I can read your future fortune. Anyway, let's see... This omen means...

C: 人台并没有对你的打扰表示不满——它根本没有能做出表情的脸。但突然降临的沉默告诉你，或许是时候离开了。
E: The mannequin doesn't express displeasure at your interruption — it doesn't have a face capable of making expressions. But the sudden silence tells you that perhaps it's time to leave.

C: 只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
E: But this act... is destined to be futile.

C: 它的边缘还算平整，不像被外力破坏过，更像是有意制作成了这般模样。
E: Its edges are relatively smooth and doesn't seem to have been damaged by external force. It appears like it deliberately been made to be this way.

C: 嗯…有位织者醉心角斗，在赛场看入了迷。金丝带来消息，它在<color=#dbc291ff>角斗场前的火炬上</color>，刚从长眠中醒来，是时候唤它回来了。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who revels in the thrill of brawls and is captivated by watching tournaments. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside on <color=#dbc291ff>the torch in front of the arena</color>, having just awakened from a long sleep. It's time to summon them back.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 这块金织上确实有字，但每一句都断断续续、像是被污泥糊住了似的，根本不具备可读性。
E: Surely, the golden fabric is adorned with words, yet each sentence appears fragmented as if muddied by sludge. They are completely unreadable.

C: 伴随着悉悉索索的声音，一只若虫从角落里爬出。
E: With a rustling sound, a nymph crawls out from the corner.

C: 桀桀…不过，把才华浪费在正道上实在可惜，您有没有兴趣和我合作合作？
E: Hehe... It would be such a shame to waste your talents on the right path. Would you be interested in a little collaboration?

C: 不错不错，这敢情好……
E: Now this is getting interesting...

C: 呵呵…不愧是你。连这么拐弯抹角的地方也无法逃脱你的魔爪。
E: Hehehe... Not bad at all. Even this secret place couldn't hide from you.

C: 只不过…老巴特鲁斯最近手头着实有点紧，眼前的这个宝贝，您能不能高抬贵手，就当是提前发一点工资……
E: Although... poor old Bartholos here is rather strapped for coin. Might you consider this treasure an advance on my future services?

C: 啊…我悟了，原来你也和我一样的卑鄙！桀桀桀桀桀……好好好，简直太棒了。这宝箱我可以送给你！
E: Aha... Now I see! You're cut from the same cloth as me! Hehehe... Brilliant, absolutely brilliant. Take the chest — consider it a gift between rogues!

C: ——嗷！嗷呜呜！
E: Oww! Awoooo!

C: 嘿，你这伙计倒是精明，想来个四两拨千斤，套出老巴特鲁斯的话。
E: Heh, you're a clever one, aren't you? Trying to bait old Bartholos into spilling the beans with a flick of the wrist!

C: 离去。
E: Leave.

C: 桀桀，您说得对，咱还就是这个味儿！
E: Hehehe, you're right! That's just how I roll!

C: 不过这么说来，能被一只小小的宝箱怪威胁…外面的宇宙还真是病入膏肓了呀。你要走的道路还真是艰难呢，来自天外的朋友！
E: Come to think of it, being threatened by a tiny mimic... The universe out there must really be in dire straits. You've got your work cut out for you, my friend from beyond the sky!

C: 哦，对了对了…说到这个，就让老巴特鲁斯再告诉您一个小小的秘密……
E: Oh, yes, that reminds me... allow ol' Bartholos here to let you in on one more tiny little secret...

C: 诶，别这么开玩笑啊…就我这小身板，怕不是叠起来十个也不够你一棒子打？
E: No way! You can take on ten of me easily!

C: 很高兴认识你{NICKNAME}，想必我们将来会有更多的缘分。
E: Pleased to meet you too, {NICKNAME}. I'm sure we'll cross paths more often in the future.

C: 抱歉…事情好像并不顺利。
E: Apologies... it seems something has gone wrong.

C: 《落木逐火英雄纪》
E: Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase

C: 飞走了…
E: It flew away...

C: 我会。
E: That I do.

C: 时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
E: There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

C: 所以余火到底在哪里？
E: So where exactly is the ember?

C: 母亲，您曾说…冬、雨、晖，彼此间别无二致。
E: Mother, you once said... winter, rain, and sunlight, they are all the same.

C: 「我想看看你的数据可以疯狂<color=#dbc291ff>『膨胀』</color>到什么地步，{NICKNAME}！」黑塔饶有兴致，「我要把你的丰功伟绩都存档下来！放心，我会给你报酬。」
E: "I want to see how crazy the <color=#dbc291ff>memory leak</color> can get with your data, {NICKNAME}!" Herta is interested! "I am going to save all of your glorious achievements! Rest assured. I'll reward you."

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
E: How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?

C: 怎么了？
E: Something the matter?

C: 「别太受挫，下回我把祂的社交属性调高点。」黑塔有些失望，「祂动作太快了。不过，足够我捕捉些祂的数据了。」
E: "Don't be too discouraged. I will increase THEIR social attribute next time." Herta was a little disappointed, "THEY move too fast. But I was able to intercept some of THEIR information."

C: 「是啊，『丰饶』的星神，药师。」黑塔冷漠地说，「全宇宙最大的善神，要么是个怪物。祂治愈看见的一切，小到一个原子，大到一个星系。没准祂能帮你解决星核的问题呢。」她玩笑般地补了一句。
E: "Yeah, Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance," Herta answers indifferently. "The kindest being in the whole universe, probably also a monster. THEY would heal everything THEY see, be it as small as an atom or as large as a star system. Perhaps THEY can solve your Stellaron problem for you." She adds jokingly.

C: 不用，我没兴趣。
E: Nah, I'm not interested.

C: 你根本无法听懂神的声音！但那里不止一种、两种、三种……！
E: You cannot understand the Aeon's voice! There are more than one, two, or three voices!

C: 你顺着那巨锤席卷而起的剧烈风暴，触摸到碎裂的白色布料…几片随风而动的拼图…剧烈太阳下模糊的身影宛若庞大静默的雕塑，在这异常强大的压力下…
E: You follow the violent storm conjured up by the giant hammer and come into contact with the tattered white cloth... There are several puzzle pieces that sway with the wind... Under the blazing sun, the blurry figure resembles a massive and silent statue. Under the immense pressure...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了一群哭泣的伶人。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice changes into a chorus of weeping Mourning Actors.

C: 理解别人的头脑总是十分困难…你开始困了。
E: Understanding someone else's thoughts is never an easy task... You are starting to get drowsy.

C: 光是活着就足已造成心理创伤了。
E: Merely staying alive is traumatic in itself.

C: 很久以后，你会想起它。
E: In the years to come, the memory of it will be relived in your mind.

C: 3.弗朗伯罕星人类血书：\n弗朗伯罕星泯灭于奥博洛斯与虫皇的第二次擦肩。\n最后一位弗朗伯罕人在被吞没前留下一笔血书：「房贷还没还完，密码还没交代；还没谈过恋爱，买车欲送外卖——生活虽烂还没过够，好死不如赖活着。怎么啦？我就是不想死！」
E: 3. A letter written in blood, discovered in Flamborghan:\nFlamborghan was obliterated during the second war between Oroboros and Imperator Insectorum.\nThe last survivor on Flamborghan left a letter written in his blood before he was swallowed. "Wait, I haven't even finished paying my mortgage or had a romantic fling yet! I know my life sucks, but I'm just not ready to kick the bucket yet! What's wrong with that!?"

C: 虫潮掠过世界尽头的酒馆时，假面愚者们正醉心于研究如何用虫子泡酒…
E: As the Swarm passed through the tavern at the world's end, the Masked Fools were intoxicated with their research on how to make tinctures out of insects...

C: 于数个琥珀纪的航行中，最早一批的船员已经死去，他们的子嗣也已苍老。在酒杯中波纹的引领下， 贡多拉终于抵达航行的终点：伊莱狄希纳星域。你们发誓要做一件事情——用来庆祝几代人齐心协力的壮举！
E: The voyage started several Amber Eras ago. The earliest crew members have long since passed away, and their heirs have aged. Guided by the ripples in your goblet, your gondola has finally reached its destination: The Elydichna Starzone. You have vowed to celebrate the feat of generations coming together!

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了金属与黄金互相碰撞而发出的轰鸣。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into a cacophonous clash between metal and gold.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了泯灭帮火焰般的嘶吼。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the crackling howls rising from the throats of the Annihilation Gang.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了泯灭帮火焰般的嘶吼。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the crackling howls rising from the throats of the Annihilation Gang.

C: 所以我打算把宇宙时间固定在某个历史片段里，缩小范围，对研究某一位星神更有帮助。不过我也不知道把你丢进哪段琥珀纪里好——
E: So, I plan to lock the cosmic time within a specific historical segment, narrowing down the scope to study a particular Aeon more effectively. However, I'm not sure which Amber Era to throw you into...

C: 「听见你这么说，我很高兴。」螺丝咕姆说，「你的到来像画面中点缀上一只缺少的蝴蝶，完整的图景令模拟宇宙变得栩栩如生。我十分期待与你共同前进的旅程。」
E: "I'm glad to hear that." Screwllum says, "Your presence is akin to a butterfly that completes the scenery that brings the entire Simulated Universe alive. I look forward to the journey ahead with you."

C: 你想要什么？
E: What do you want?

C: （他为什么长胡子？）
E: (Why did he grow a beard?)

C: 祂出现了：祂必然会在这一秒出现。千变万化的演算中，祂的光辉在众目睽睽下，降临于茫茫宇宙中。祂的身躯庞大若神物，齿轮与纤缆精妙绝伦地纠缠在一起。祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。除此之外，祂什么都不做。
E: THEY have appeared: THEY will definitively appear at this very second. In myriad extrapolations, THEIR radiance descends upon the vast universe for all eyes. THEIR figure is mythically massive, gears and cables marvelously intertwined together. THEY observe, calculate, and seek to understand all. THEY question, verify, and obtain resolution. Apart from these, THEY do nothing else.

C: 你听到一声枪响！在银河图书馆「伊斯梅尔」，来自「赛普鲁戈星球」的枪手击中了第一位有机生命——顷刻间，人群骚动。
E: You hear a gunshot! A gunman from the planet of Cyprogo has hit the first organic life in Izmael, the cosmic library. Within but a moment, chaos ensues.

C: 这场骚动死了多少人？后来人们只知道，血液染红了图书馆内所有的书籍。
E: How many people have died in this turmoil? The only thing known later was that the blood spilled had painted all the books and tomes in the library red.

C: 毫无意义，什么也没有剩下。
E: The war was meaningless as nothing was left.

C: 「我得找点法子，搞明白我到底是不是一件…*物品*，或者是不是个*东西*！」年轻人恶狠狠地说，接着他启程。
E: "I must find a way to determine whether I'm an item or a thing!" The youngster vows vehemently and sets off.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我可以拯救「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」吗？
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Am I capable of saving Andatur Zazzalo?

C: 据说，弹射降落法的成功率在百分之八点二左右，远低于飞船软着陆、跳伞、滑翔等传统降落方式…如果没有那张锁定天幕的激光网的话。
E: Apparently, success rates for ejected landings are only about <unbreak>8.2%</unbreak>, which is far lower than traditional landings like spaceship soft landings, parachutes, or hang-gliders... that is, so long as there's no laser grid combing the night sky.

C: 男人若有所思，他焚尽书籍，修撰历史，将反逆的词句从字典里删去。
E: He looks to be mulling something over, then incinerates the books, revises history, and deletes the revolutionary vocabulary from the dictionary.

C: 你看着导师和小雅挥汗如雨，挖出了一个比人还高的深坑。
E: You see the teacher and Xiaoya dripping with sweat, having dug out a crater deeper than the height of a man.

C: 「哦，这真是太糟糕了，朋友。告诉我们，你会怎么做？」
E: "Oh, well, that's too bad, my friend! Tell us, what will you do?"

C: 「今天我们来学习计算圆的周长，掌握了这个方法，就能算出绕我们星球旅行一圈的距离……」
E: "Today, we are going to learn how to calculate the circumference of a circle. Once we do this, we can learn how far we'd have to walk to go all the way around the planet..."

C: 「可爱的阿尔娃，你们还没有上过地理课，不过请相信老师，我们的星球确实是圆的。」
E: "Little Arwa, you haven't started geography classes yet, but you have to trust teacher. Our planet is round."

C: 齐奥尔科夫学士放下观测仪，他对这里的能量密度很满意。「即便只看当下，这项技术也能结束星际能源战争。」
E: Scholar Cholkov puts down his detector, satisfied with the concentration of energy here. "Even if it is temporary, this technology could end the Interstellar Energy War!"

C: 「本来还想找个地方躲起来，再读取一些关于『权杖』构造的信息，结果帕提维娅还没动身就被赶出来了。唉，我和她一样，这运气也太背了。」
E: "I wanted to find a place to hide and do some reading on the Scepters' structure, but Patavia was shooed out before she could even act. Bah, her luck is just as bad as mine."

C: 无法成为天才的凡庸者。
E: A Mundanite who could never become a genius.

C: 碧蓝的光晕停留在地平线上，垂垂老矣的妇人伏在窗前，门扉敞开。一名陌生的少女穿过学会的层层封锁，径直来到了帕提维娅的病房。
E: As a sapphire halo hangs over the horizon, a frail old woman leans through her window, her door wide open. An unfamiliar girl passes through layers and layers of Guild blockades, making her way directly to Patavia's hospital ward.

C: 这次你们的目标是？
E: What is your objective this time?

C: 「真是恶趣味。」
E: "You sure have a twisted sense of what you find interesting."

C: 你闭上双眼，尝试脑海里描摹出真实的世界。
E: You close your eyes and attempt to picture the real world in your mind.

C: 一旦睁眼，就会被虚假的现实欺骗。你蜷缩着身子，向虚无的深处沉没，属于自己的，封闭而美好的雪景球。
E: The moment you open your eyes, you will be taken in by the deceit of the false reality. You curl into a ball and find yourself pulled deep into the depths of the void, into your own personal, sealed-off, and perfect snow globe.

C: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在你的脑髓里穿梭。爆炸的艺术宏伟瑰丽。你吸入化学废气，神清气爽。
E: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and steel weapons and blazing bullets jet through your cerebral fluid. The art of explosion is spectacular. You breathe in the chemical exhaust gas, feeling refreshed.

C: 你明白，是奇物「降维骰子」攻击了你。你身处模拟宇宙墙壁上的涂鸦里——黑塔随手创作的蜡笔画。
E: You realize you've been attacked by the Curio "Dice of Dimensionality Reduction." You are now a part of the graffiti — casually drawn by Herta with crayons — on the wall of the Simulated Universe.

C: 「我是奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德的徒弟。我们来自星际和平公司的信仰狂热部！」他不着调地说。「你知道银河里的贸易是如何产生的吗？」
E: "I'm the disciple of Oswaldo Schneider. Both of us are from the Fanaticism Department of IPC!" The man says out of nowhere. "Do you know how commercial activities in the cosmos started in the first place?"

C: 你又一次在夜市看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟，你嗅到他的贪婪——他选用批发矿瓶来节省成本，周身散发着硫磺气味。
E: Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. You can smell his greed — he reeks of sulfur as he uses wholesale mineral bottles to save costs.

C: 在翁瓦克岛，一群星际外来者拦住你——你打量着来人，这些家伙不属于这里。翁瓦克土著仍使用石器，而这群人全身裹着科技行星材料。
E: In Vonwacq, some outsiders block your path. You size them up and realize they aren't locals. While the Vonwacq still uses stone tools, these people are wearing materials from a technologically advanced planet.

C: 你也不受控制地走近它。你听到碎裂缓慢的树涛声。你看到树根旁的一块木牌：「用…浇灌…它将…盛开。」
E: You can't help moving closer to the tree. You hear the slow, crackling sound of the tree waving to and fro. There is a wooden board next to its roots that reads, "Water it... and it will... bloom."

C: 骑士的长发缓缓垂下。
E: The knight's long hair hangs down slowly.

C: 骑士向你伸出一只圆手。
E: The knight extends a spherical hand to you.

C: 遨游模拟宇宙八百万里，从没有人真正理解过你的内心…
E: Despite having traversed the Simulated Universe for eight million miles, you did not find anyone who truly understood you...

C: 你将孢子全部收纳进你的无限背包中。这可是珍贵的研究样本…你庆幸着。
E: You put all the spores into your limitless backpack, feeling lucky to have stumbled upon the precious research samples.

C: 你看着它消融的身体，打趣地想着：下次该为它们准备些*下酒佐餐*…
E: Watching its body melt, a fun idea pops up in your head: You should prepare some "appetizers" to go with the course you just fed it next time...

C: 你看到一幅魔幻现实主义的景象，有机体店长高喊鲁珀特万岁，张牙舞爪地向你冲来。
E: You glimpse a vision of magical realism as the organic shopkeeper launches themself at you in a violent rage, screaming: "Long live Rubert!"

C: 「烛墨学派，无名无姓的学士，你没有记住我的理由。」
E: "I am a nameless scholar of the Candelagraphos, and you have no reason to recall who I am."

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 第Ⅸ机关单位大院。
E: Device IX unit compound.

C: 虫鸣在洞窟中回响，无论人类，彗星蝉还是虫群的子嗣，通通是饱腹的食粮。
E: The cries of the insects echo throughout the caves. No matter if you're human, comet cicada, or Swarm pupa, you are no more than food here.

C: 飞船在前半程中都保持着压倒性的优势，可就在还差三十光秒就能获胜的时候，却突然开始了减速。
E: The ship possessed an overwhelming advantage during the first half of the journey, but when it is <unbreak>30</unbreak> light seconds away from victory, it suddenly begins to slow.

C: 在盗贼公国的废墟里，你被一台星际和平公司的自动售货机拦住了去路。虽然它并没有眼睛，但你确信，此刻，这台售货机正孤零零、惨兮兮、可怜巴巴地望着你。
E: You are stopped by an IPC vending machine in the ruins of the Kingdom of Banditry. It does not have eyes, but you are certain that this vending machine is looking at you with a lonely, miserable, and piteous gaze right at this very moment.

C: 「应该在这里新增一个镜片，向内偏折，修正对永夜之帷的观测误差。」
E: "There should be a lens added here, folded inward, to correct the observational error on the Veil of Evernight."

C: 偶然性与无限的可能，这就是国王的发明。市民们一拥而上，竞相为一夜暴富的可能性投入金币。
E: Chance and infinite possibilities — this is the king's invention. The citizens surge forth, eager in the notion that they may strike it rich overnight with the toss of a coin.

C: 公正之秤的赐福永远伴随着代价，在狱门洞开的瞬间，巡逻的守卫也发现了你们。
E: The Scale of Justice's blessing always comes at a cost. The instant the prison gates swing open, the patrolling guards catch sight of you as well.

C: 为人子的胆魄所震撼，泰坦掷出长矛，焚灭了入侵的敌军。至此百年以内，再未有邻邦的僭主胆敢逾越神与人的约契。
E: Awed by humanity's courage, the Titan launched their spear, vanquishing the invaders. For the next century, no tyrants dared defy the sacred pact between mortal and god.

C: 它的谎言足以替代真实。
E: Their lies could supplant the truth.

C: 诸神的战争尚未平息，有几位神明敢于直面纷争的投枪？但别以为法吉娜有多勇敢，它不过是顺路邀老友喝上一杯，不得已在盛怒的尼卡多利面前想出此等伎俩。
E: The war of the gods raged on, and few dared to face the spears of Strife. But do not mistake Phagousa for being brave. They merely seized the chance to invite an old friend for a drink, forced to conjure such a ruse before the wrath of an enraged Nikador.

C: 可蝴蝶爱而不得。
E: But the butterfly loved in vain.

C: 王子和邻邦公主的私奔，战场上所向睥睨的夫妻，人类与泰坦的不伦之恋，墨涅塔的鳞粉轻触，赐予众生恋美的眸与求爱的心。
E: The prince and the neighboring princess eloping, the married couple commanding the battlefield, and the forbidden love between humans and the Titans — all are brought to life by Mnestia's touch of golden wing dust, bestowing upon all beings the eye for beauty and the desire for love.

C: 墨涅塔的金蝶收集来残存的爱意，熔铸进工匠的造物，它们在白日追逐晨昏之眼的光辉，在夜幕下凝视爱人的睡脸。
E: Mnestia's golden butterflies gather the lingering affection, forging it into the craftsman's creations — creations that chase the Eye of Twilight by day and watch over his lover's sleeping face by night.

C: 今年又是个丰年，收割完的农作物堆满田垛，急需运往市场。但远洋贸易的船队也到了港口，一捆捆木材和石料在召唤你。
E: This year has been a season of abundance. The fields overflow with freshly harvested crops, stacked high and ready for transport. But just as the last sheaf is gathered, the distant call of the harbor reaches your ears — the overseas trade fleet has arrived, bringing timber and stone in need of urgent delivery.

C: 欧洛尼斯低吟一段关于铅铁的预言，这预言为堕落的世界平添迷惘。
E: Oronyx murmured a prophecy of lead and steel, this revelation deepened the confusion of a fallen world.

C: 现在的欧洛尼斯变成了一位聋哑人，既听不到人们的祈求，也说不出任何神启。无论祭祀们如何祷告，它都三缄其口，空旷的神殿里只有人类自己的回音。
E: Now that Oronyx has turned wordless and deafened, hearing no prayers, speaking no revelations. No matter how fervently the priests plead, they keep silent. Only the echoes of human voices remain in the hollow temple halls.

C: 他用尽最后的力气，举起信仰的神明赐予的那把种子，并未放入自己的口中，而是将其扬洒在空气之中。
E: Using his last ounce of strength, he raised the seeds given by his god, and instead of putting them in his mouth, he scattered them into the air.

C: 法吉娜多少有点调皮了。
E: Phagousa is a wee bit naughty.

C: 你将废纸扔进印有「可回收」标识的桶中。
E: You toss the paper scrap into a trashcan marked as Recycling.

C: 只有你锲而不舍，一直坚持了下来！欢迎加入我们科室！
E: You're the only one who stuck it out to the end! Welcome to our department!

C: 再拍一拍。
E: ...tap it again.

C: 「我」最后到底有没有消散在风里？作为读者，你很在意这个故事是否烂尾。
E: Did "I" finally disappear like dust in the wind? As a reader, you care deeply about whether or not this story remains unfinished.

C: 科室同事
E: Coworkers

C: 你选择了「打榜」，然而它的排名却依然垫底。你注意到，原来大家的票数已高达几十票，你的一票看来不会改变它被埋没的宿命。
E: You choose to upvote, but it's still ranked near the bottom. That's when you notice that the other contestants already have a few dozen votes or so. It's no wonder a single vote won't change this song's destiny of being buried in the bottom rank.

C: 宝贵的学习机会岂能浪费。
E: Valuable learning opportunities cannot be squandered.

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，可怎么就没有第二株会说话的植物陪陪我呢。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. How do we not have any other talking plants to keep me company?

C: 你想着，被飞行器底部传来的剧烈震动吓了一跳。看来是落地了——接下来只要找到学会的那帮混球，溜之大吉…你拿起射线枪，跟着队长翻出舱门。
E: While being absorbed in your thoughts, you are jolted back to reality by a violent shudder from the bottom of the aircraft. It seems like you have landed. Now, you just need to look for the rascals from the Guild, then get out of here... After picking up a ray gun, you hop out of the hatch after the captain.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 「他们怎么说？」你百无聊赖，把玩着手中的黏质定向炸药，「那帮老古板还是不让我们开炮？」你将炸药保险销拔下，又在炸裂读秒结束前将其插回。
E: "What did they say?" You feel bored to death. You fiddle with the adhesive explosive charge in your hand. "Those old geezers still aren't going to give us the green light to open fire?" You pull out the pin on the explosive, only putting it back in a few seconds before the countdown ends.

C: 并非专家！
E: I am no expert!

C: 又是那个男人——就是那个自称从「后巷」来、被某种怪异现象纠缠着的可怜男子——想必你还记得他。
E: It's that man again — the one who claimed he came from the "back alley," the poor fellow harassed by supernatural stuff. You remember him, surely.

C: 莫非我不是预言中的勇者喀？我不能接受喀！
E: Could it be that I am somehow not the hero of prophecy? I can't take it!

C: 请赐予我！
E: Please grace me!

C: 你羞恼不已。你打算再去找一次那位女工头…无论如何，这个场子必须由你亲自找回来。
E: You feel extreme embarrassment. You plan to go back to the supervisor... No matter what, you have to personally regain your honor.

C: 还有大胃王挑战赛——
E: We also have the Competitive Eater Championship!

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 那个…{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}，我知道你现在感觉很糟……
E: So... {F#sister}{M#brother}, I know that you feel terrible right now...

C: 你将手举到眼前，仔细端详掌心里那一撮五颜六色的晶石。
E: You bring your hand up to your eyes and closely examine the multicolored crystals in your palm.

C: 三小时过去……
E: Three hours later.

C: 这时，一道粗哑且刺耳的怪异声音悚然响起：「丹尼不在这里，托伦斯太太。」
E: Then, a rough, unpleasant voice says hauntingly, "Danny isn't here, Mrs. Torrance."

C: …然后丹恒就会不理我。
E: ...Then Dan Heng will ignore me.

C: <size=36>我们都能拥有希露瓦大人的玉照！</size>
E: <size=36>We all can have a picture of Lady Serval!</size>

C: 就像天秤的两端，倘若楼梯另一侧有宝箱，那这一侧也必须有东西才行…比如一只虫！
E: Just like the two ends of a scale. Suppose there is a treasure on one side of the stairs then so, too, must there be something on this side... like a bug!

C: 可恶，我怎么又被埋住了？快救我出来喀！
E: Darn it, how have I been buried again? Quick, dig me up and save me!

C: 在我的威严下颤抖吧，卑微的人类！就连那些怪物都不敢靠近我，你又岂能……
E: Cower before my power, puny human! Even those monsters dare not approach. How could you possibly...

C: 你上次把我吓到了…
E: You frightened the socks off me the last time...

C: 在你的脑海中，关于「后巷」的一切记忆似乎正在快速消褪。你已经无法回忆起许多细节，但有一点你却无比确信——
E: In your mind, all memories of this "back alley" are seemingly being quickly purged. You already can't recall many details, but of one thing, you are certain...

C: 我已经听到{M#他}{F#她}的声音了！
E: I heard {M#his}{F#her} voice!

C: <size=36>做什么！</size>
E: <size=36>Why?</size>

C: 我可以伪装成一名商人…
E: I can pretend to be a merchant...

C: 换个地方。
E: Find another spot.

C: 我看看…<unbreak>8000</unbreak>信用点，怎么样？
E: Let's see... How about <unbreak>8000</unbreak> credits?

C: 得赶快收拾干净才行，小主人不知道什么时候就会回来喀……
E: Need to tidy up fast. The young master might come back any moment, crrrk...

C: 或许我应该到最后和她分别的地方去看看。
E: Perhaps I should go to the place where I last parted with her.

C: 喀喀——如此美丽的舞蹈，是为了传递思念吧喀。
E: Crrrk crrrk — Such a beautiful dance must be meant to convey longing.

C: 「Re」…这应该是最后一个音了。
E: "Re"... this should be the final note.

C: 反抗？这说明你很了不起，将来…不，现在你可能就是个大人物。
E: Resistance? This shows that you are incredible. In the future, you will become... No, you are probably a great person right now.

C: 我知道它们放在哪里，所以我会将你带过去。但是我没法打开集装箱，就只能全靠你了，我们能抢救多少抢救多少！
E: I know where they're holding the photo books, so I can take you there, but I can't open the containers. That'll be up to you. Let's save as many of those books as we can!

C: 你说一句真话一句假话吗？
E: Are you telling one truth and one lie?

C: 你不必非得回到鹤运物流。
E: You don't have to go back to Heron Express.

C: 判定成功。守护着金银财宝的巨龙仍在酣睡，似乎它还没有察觉到你的接近。你也注意到前进道路上有一些能够发出声响的障碍，应该能够提前避开。
E: Successful. The dragon remains sleeping on its treasure, as if it hasn't sensed your approach. You also notice some potentially noisy obstacles in your path, and should be able to avoid them.

C: 你没有放弃，还找到了我…你要是一只机巧鸟的话，肯定是一只尽责但痛苦的机巧鸟吧。
E: You didn't quit, and ended up finding me... If you were a cycrane, you'd be a conscientious but tormented one.

C: 既然你诚心诚意地发起了挑战。
E: Since you've accepted the challenge on your own accord...

C: 我曾听闻吾主述说往事，天空中的人们会与翼兽为伴，一同走完一生的路途。真是令人羡慕的情谊喀！
E: My master once spoke of the olden days, when those who dwelled in the sky lived alongside winged beasts, journeying through life together. What enviable bonds they share!

C: 怎么样，非常有策略性吧？
E: How incredibly strategic, right?

C: 是不是已经跃跃欲试了？这就是角色扮演游戏的魅力所在！
E: Ready to jump straight in and give it a try? That's the beauty of role-playing games!

C: 是{NICKNAME}选手！你已经完成「外交」了吗？
E: It's {NICKNAME}! Have you completed the Diplomacy phase yet?

C: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
E: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

C: 不过话又说回来了，为什么不砸别的虫，唯独只砸我呢？一定是吾主对我的考验喀！
E: But then again, why me? Of all the bugs around, why did it have to hit me? This must be my master's trial, crrk!

C: 这一刻，我就是自己的主角喀！
E: At this moment, I am the hero of my own story, crrk!

C: 这上面的颜文字说<color=#dbc291ff>光靠自己解不开</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
E: The emoji here says they <color=#dbc291ff>can't solve it on their own</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

C: 那还是算了。
E: Forget about it.

C: 走吧，真没劲。
E: Let's go. This is boring.

C: 在许多年以后，有的星星变冷，有的星星诞生，这块小小的湿润之地，也会迎来独属于它的生命。
E: As the years pass, some stars will be extinguished and others will be born. This small and moist patch of land will also see life bloom — life that only belongs to this place.

C: 只要坚持一天喝十罐水。
E: Just drink ten vats of water a day.

C: 全靠法吉娜的伟力。
E: It's all thanks to the power of Phagousa.

C: 里面似乎有什么动静？
E: Something's going on inside?

C: 不知道还能持续多久。
E: I wonder how long this will last.

C: 新世界就要来了！
E: The new world is almost here!

C: 三月七乘客回来以后，有好几次看到我就捂着嘴偷笑，还说什么「星芋啵啵和帕姆很配嘛」之类的怪话…就连瓦尔特乘客也对着我笑。
E: Several times since March got back, she covered her mouth and laughed when she saw me, saying something about "startaro bubble tea suits you"... Even Welt was smirking at me.

C: 这些事…等丹恒乘客想说的时候，他自然会说的。帕姆见过不少有故事的乘客…过去的事就让它们过去吧。
E: All that... Let Dan Heng tell Pom-Pom himself when he's ready. I've met many a passenger with stories to tell... Let bygones be bygones.

C: 以后可不许当面喊我这个！我会生气的帕！
E: You can't call me that to my face! I'll get angry next time!

C: 可不可以给帕姆讲个睡前故事？{NICKNAME}乘客成天在外冒险，想来一路上有不少故事吧。
E: Can you tell Pom-Pom a bedtime story then, {NICKNAME}? You're always off adventuring. Pom-Pom's sure you've come across many stories during your journeys.

C: 嗯嗯，这个故事好像有点耳熟，真的是发生在空间站的真事吗？
E: Mmm-hmm, this story seems familiar somehow. Did it really happen on the space station?

C: 想不到{NICKNAME}乘客也是这么感性的人呢！
E: Pom-Pom never thought you were such a sensitive person!

C: 是关于「是否能携带宠物上车」一事的，有些乘客在旅行中会带上自己的宠物。
E: This one's about whether or not pets should be allowed on the Express. Sometimes passengers bring their pets with them on the Express.

C: 我最近在想，乘客们每次上车的时候，我应该注意检查下大家的个人情况。
E: Pom-Pom has been thinking that every time someone gets aboard the train, Pom-Pom should check in on their personal situation.

C: （建议帕姆按摩）
E: (Suggest Pom-Pom that they massage their neck)

C: 帕姆不是故意的，抱歉！
E: That wasn't my intention! I'm very sorry about that!

C: 你的睡姿也太「妖娆」了。
E: Your sleeping posture is too weird.

C: 你听听你说的还是人话吗？！怎么可以这么对待你的列车长！
E: Listen to yourself! How could you do that to your conductor?

C: 嗯？怎么了？
E: Hmm? What's up?

C: 为什么不行？
E: Why?

C: 帕姆在想，身为列车长，接下来得加强对列车的管控，这需要管理学知识……
E: Pom-Pom is thinking, as the conductor, Pom-Pom needs to strengthen my control of the train, which requires knowledge of management...

C: 我是谁，我的过去？你问这些有什么意义吗？
E: Who am I and what is my past? Is there any point in you asking about such things?

C: 哔——啵。看来栈桥的终端被锁住了。必须使用特定的<color=#dbc291ff>终端密钥</color>才能解锁。
E: Beep — boop. It seems that the bridge terminal is locked. Only a special <color=#dbc291ff>terminal encryption key</color> can unlock it.

C: 你会怎么选，{NICKNAME}教官？
E: What'll it be, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?

C: 有奖励都好说。
E: As long as I'll be rewarded, I'm open to any missions.

C: （趁乱直接抓住扑满）
E: (Take advantage of the chaos and catch the Trotter directly.)

C: 无路可逃的次元扑满在你的面前瑟瑟发抖，它没有想到「寻味丹鼎司之旅」竟是它的穷途末路。噢，可怜的次元扑满。
E: Cornered and trapped at a dead end, the Warp Trotter trembles before you. Obviously, it didn't expect its "gourmet-crawl across the Alchemy Commission" to end like this. Oh, what a poor little guy.

C: *电波滤音*…没想到您竟然放跑了所有的扑满，是故意的，还是不小心？
E: *electronic voice* ...I didn't think you would let all the Trotters slip away... Was that intentional, or did it just happen by accident?

C: 短暂的交锋以你率先投降告终。逃避可耻，但有用——至少你不用再承受与陌生人谈天带来的巨大压力了。
E: You give up quickly. Embarrassing, yes, but at least you don't have to worry about talking to a stranger.

C: 你这小孩子怎么说话呢？！
E: Why would you say that, kid?

C: 高手都不说话，他是我们「四大天王」里最高的高手！
E: Silent waters run deep, and he's the best of the Formidable Four!

C: 没有人发现你的小动作。你赢了——而且赢得很痛快。
E: No one notices the move. You win, and in much delight.
...Ugh.

C: 一大片森林——大到难以置信，大到几乎占有和海洋近似的面积。肯定有不少反物质军团的兵卒在那里迷了路。
E: It's a forest so unbelievably large that it could almost match the size of an ocean. There must've been a great many soldiers of the Antimatter Legion who got lost in it.

C: 你直起腰，与布洛妮娅四目相对。
E: You lift your head and stare straight into Bronya's eyes.

C: …你怎么这么积极啊？放心，情况没有你想象得那么夸张。
E: ...No need to make it weird. Don't worry. It's not as bad as you think.

C: 不过作为朋友，能保持一定的新鲜感倒也不是什么坏事……
E: But as a friend, it's not always a bad thing to have such fresh opinions...

C: （算了吧）
E: (Forget about it)

C: 一个男人从你身后现身，带着心痛如绞的表情，虽然表情中多了几分例行公事的意思。
E: A man appears behind you, wearing a pained expression, but something in his expression betrays a sense of practice.

C: 嗯？哦…我忘了，你对「生命」缺乏了解。是我不好。洪钧陶万类，大块禀群生，如是而已。
E: Eh? Oh... I forgot your lack of understanding about "life." My bad. Nature sculpts us all on its potter's wheel, and the land creates the masses. That's all.

C: 欠债还钱，天经地义…
E: Repaying debts is only natural...

C: 呃…忘了确认了，您肯定会修理栖木吧？
E: Um... I forgot to check with you. You do know how to fix the roost... right?

C: 反正闲着也是闲着…
E: I was having some free time anyway...

C: 只要找到最后的遗失物，就可以下班回家啦！太好了，今天没发生任何意外状况～
E: We can wrap things up after retrieving the last missing item! It's great that everything went well today.

C: 栖木信号连接中…
E: Connecting to roost signal...

C: 另外，那些地方现在算不上安全，所以途中可能会遇到一些危险，也请您最好准备。
E: Side note, these places are not entirely safe, so there might be some dangers along the way. Please be prepared.

C: 你们面面相觑，六目相对，气氛颇为尴尬。这时，你问出了那个此时最该问的问题——
E: The three of you all look at each other in blank dismay and the vibe starts to feel a little awkward. Right then, you decide to ask the most appropriate question of all at that time:

C: 直到听到路上有人尖叫，我才意识到，自己竟然忘记穿衣服了！我一路逃窜，躲到了这个货船里……
E: It wasn't until I heard a piercing scream that I realized I'd forgotten to put on my clothes! I scurried away in a flash and ended up hiding here in this freight skiff...

C: 男人先是沉默，随后用复杂的眼神看向你，很难判断那眼神中传达的是怜悯还是惊奇。
E: The man falls silent before shooting you a complicated look with his eyes. It is impossible to tell whether it is a look of pity, or wonder.

C: 真、真的吗？我觉得还好啊，几个懂搭配的朋友也都觉得不错……
E: R—Really? I think it's fine, and a few fashionable friends all thought it was fine, too...

C: <size=28>但什么用都没有！</size>
E: <size=28>But it's no use at all!</size>

C: 嗯，也祝你玩得开心。
E: Mmm, you have fun too.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 在匹诺康尼，筑梦师们负责铸造梦境世界的基建，为宾客们提供满意的游玩体验；而我们鼓励师则负责保障宾客的精神稳定，确保「美梦」的繁荣能够延续。
E: In Penacony, the Dreamweavers are responsible for crafting out the foundations of the Dreamscape and providing guests with a satisfactory entertainment experience. Meanwhile, we Dreamscape Motivators are responsible for maintaining the guests' mental stability, ensuring that the prosperity of the sweet dream can continue to flourish.

C: 但实话实话，匹诺康尼的影视圈现在简直一团乌烟瘴气！看看现在的那些后辈，简直一蟹不如一蟹！
E: But honestly, Penacony's movie industry is simply in tatters at the moment! Just look at the younger generation now. They're getting ever worse by the year!

C: 哎——不用一天到晚挂着个假笑、对宾客点头哈腰的感觉可真好！
E: Hey — it feels great not having to wear this fake smile and grovel for guests all day!

C: 那孩子因为性格的原因没什么朋友，我工作又太忙，很难和她见上一面。
E: That kid has no real friends due to her personality issues, and I'm too busy with my work, so I never get a chance to see her.

C: 于是我继续向垃圾场中央行驶，一路上尽是大大小小的刻字石，以及…修建在小行星上的房子。
E: So I continued on into the center of the trash dump, passing blocks with glyphs carved into them along the way as well as... little houses built onto the asteroids.

C: 嗯…一般来说，这片宇宙发生的一切都只是巧合的堆砌，人类很难从中学到什么道理。
E: Well... generally speaking, everything that happens in this universe is just a pile of coincidences stacked up, and it's difficult for humans to learn anything from that.

C: 是啊，也很有{RUBY_B#「欢愉」}乐子{RUBY_E#}。为祸一方的机械海盗王，最后落得个这样的死法。
E: Yes, truly an {RUBY_B#"Elation"}enjoyable{RUBY_E#} moment. The Mechanical Pirate King, a menace of the era, meeting his end like this.

C: 也许吧，但相比之下，我更不希望这里的故事被永远埋没。
E: Maybe. But in comparison, I'd rather this story wasn't buried forever.

C: 有种波澜壮阔的美。
E: There's a kind of majestic beauty to it.

C: 大概十个琥珀纪前，星际间还流传着「机械海盗王」韦兰的臭名……
E: About <unbreak>10</unbreak> Amber Eras or so back, the notorious "Mechanical Pirate King" Wyland roamed the galaxies...

C: 哎，你这答应的也太快了吧！
E: Hey, you agreed to that far too quickly!

C: 我要去寻找他——不是为了钱，只是想站到他的面前，看看所谓的传奇人物到底有怎样耀眼的光芒，会不会把我这阴沟里的老鼠融化。
E: I'm going to look for him — not for money, but to stand before him and see how dazzling the so-called legend really is, and whether it's strong enough to melt even a rat in the gutter like myself.

C: 它说自己是一个智慧生物，希望能与我们讨论哲学和艺术，而不是被切成零散的肉块——是它主动向当地人要求上船的。
E: It said that it's an intelligent species and hoped to discuss philosophy and the arts with us — instead of being carved up into pieces of meat. It also said, it was its own idea to join everyone on the ship.

C: 科琳船长面色沉重地凝望着天空——又或是比天空更高的什么东西。
E: Captain Colleen stares up at the sky with a sullen face — or perhaps at something even higher than the sky.

C: 为了应对辐射，当地的筑城者在仅存的定居点上建起屏障，将内与外永远隔绝——光射不进屏障，人们只能在黑暗中苟且偷生。
E: To deal with the radiation, the local architects erected barriers around the remaining settlements to permanently separate the inside from the outside. No light could penetrate the barrier, and the people could only eke out a miserable existence in darkness.

C: 从外界角度看来，我不仅兑现了一个看似不可能的承诺，而且还秉持了一般开发商根本不具备的工匠精神——两分加上。
E: From an outsider's perspective, not only did I deliver a seemingly impossible promise, but I also exhibited the craftsmanship spirit that most developers lack — that's two plus points.

C: 这可能算不上什么大问题。但最让我受不了的就是…就是……
E: That's not the deal-breaker. What truly makes me sick is...

C: …电视播报？我也许该<color=#f29e38ff>去吧台前找台电视</color>看看……
E: ...On TV? I should probably <color=#f29e38ff>head to the front of the counter and find a TV</color> to watch...

C: …嗯，有事？
E: ...Um, is there anything I can do for you?

C: 让我猜猜…他叫你来套我的话，找些「证据」，留到以后伺机报复我？
E: Let me guess... Did he send you here to trick me into saying things he can use against me in the future?

C: 真是的，一个两个，整天盯着我使绊子是什么意思！嫉妒我能干、敢干是吧？
