E: What's wrong with these people? Seems like they just can't wait to see me mess up! Are they jealous of my talent?

C: 你——对，别东张西望了，说的就是你！我现在需要你帮忙！
E: Hey, you! Yeah, stop lollygagging! I need your help, now!

C: 对我有什么好处？
E: What's in it for me?

C: 真奇怪，我手上有这么厉害的发明，之前怎么没想着用呢…算了，想那么多干嘛？现在动手也不算晚！
E: Weird... I have such an awesome invention, yet I didn't think of using it before... But never mind! It's better late than never!

C: 我已经准备好了，您随时可以开拍。
E: I'm ready for my photo.

C: 你说笑了，我已经为鸢尾花家系干了几十年的经纪人了，哪能说走就走。
E: Come on, I've been working as a manager for the Iris Family for decades. I can't just up and leave.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 想想看，当你未来意外成为宇宙中的焦点，站在人生的巅峰之时，一位皮皮西女士突然曝光了你过去的丑闻…一夜之间，亿万声赞扬变成亿万份责骂，那滋味肯定不好受吧？
E: Just imagine — you are at the epitome of your life, being the center of the universe's attention, and then a Pepeshi lady suddenly reveals a scandal from your past... Overnight, all the praise would turn to criticism. It won't be an easy pill to swallow.

C: 让我再跟他说几句…
E: Let me have a few more words with him...

C: 好了，波波特先生，你现在决定跟我走了吗？
E: Mr. Popott, are you ready to come with me?

C: 对不起，我失败了…
E: I'm sorry for failing to make him stay...

C: 有次我在萨兰陨石带的一颗彗星酒馆中驻唱，一位皮皮西女士突然打断了我的表演，说我的歌喉不应该浪费在这种地方，应该走向更大的舞台。
E: Once, while I was singing at The Comet tavern in the Saran Meteorite Belt, a Pepeshi lady interrupted my performance, saying that my talent should not be wasted in a place like that, and that I should move on to a bigger stage.

C: 这就是艺术，让你这种俗人听出来了就不是艺术了！我看她唱的就是你这种生活不如意的人！
E: That's art, surpassing your mundane grasp! In my humble opinion, she was singing about people like you, whose lives aren't as fulfilling as they wish them to be.

C: 拉洛丝的表情逐渐平和下来，笑容凝固在了嘴角，低声呢喃了起来。
E: Larose's expression calms down, her smile fading at the corners of her mouth as she murmurs in a low voice.

C: 轻生…可惜，这不过是毫无意义的表演罢了。
E: Take my own life... Alas, it's a shame that this is nothing more than a meaningless show.

C: 到头来，这种表演既不能让我心安，也不能挽回我做过的错事……
E: In the end, this kind of performance neither brings me peace of mind nor undoes the wrongs I've done...

C: 嘘，小心点，你看见路上那个东西了吗？
E: Shh, be careful. See that thing on the road?

C: 太可怕了。哪怕我已经不再是警探，这种消息也不能当作耳旁风。
E: How horrifying. Even though I'm no longer a detective, I can't ignore it when I hear things like that.

C: 卢•阿彻凛冽地皱起了眉头，就像撞见扒手的警探。或许这是她的工作状态也说不定。
E: Lew Archer knits her eyebrows into a stern expression, just like a detective who sees a pickpocket. This is probably how she looks when she is at work.

C: 你就是谜语人？
E: Are you a Riddler?

C: 你知道——啊！救命——！！！
E: You know—Ahhhh! Help!!!

C: 现在还想跳吗？
E: Do you still want to jump now?

C: 当我再次醒来时，我已经换上了这副人形的躯壳，思维与计算也灵敏了许多。
E: When I woke up again, I was already in this human body. My ability to think and calculate improved a great deal.

C: 女人的表情变得柔和，嘴角浮现出一抹若有似无的笑意，让你不由好奇——
E: The woman's expression turns soft, an inscrutable hint of a smile flashing across the corners of her mouth — a most curious detail...

C: 麦考先生陷入一阵甜蜜的回忆，似乎无法自拔。
E: Mr. McCoy has fallen deep into a sweet memory. He seems unable to pull himself back from it.

C: 愿世界和平。
E: May peace come to all worlds.

C: 军火商都是群两头下注的鬣狗，伤亡越多钱袋越鼓。但我们不在乎！我们只在乎比暴民更好的武器装备，只在乎能不能赢。
E: Arms dealers are like hyenas hedging their bets — they make money the more casualties there are. But we don't care! All we care about is having better weapons and better gear than those scoundrels, and whether or not we can beat them.

C: 生活是这样，总是会有不顺心的事发生，可我们还是得继续努力下去。如果连这点挫折都经受不住，那些还生活在战争里的人又该怎么办？
E: That's just life. There'll always be something annoying happening, but we have to keep soldiering on. If even we can't endure such setbacks, what hope do those living in actual war zones have?

C: 没见过？我甚至被自己的亲爹骗过！
E: Witnessed? No, worse than that, I've even been lied to by my own dad before!

C: 感觉你说的有些偏颇…
E: You sound rather biased...

C: 看他们饿不着肚子，我也就不担心了，哈哈！
E: But since I see that they're able to fend for themselves, there's nothing for me to worry about, haha!

C: 堂堂银河球棒侠当然不会被这点问题难倒——你将那垃圾桶从厚厚的积雪中拔出，力气之大甚至震开了它顽固不化的盖子。
E: Of course, the almighty Galactic Baseballer would not be deterred by a mere trashcan. You yank it out of the snow with all your might, its lid popping open.

C: 「王座」在哪儿？
E: Where is this "throne"?

C: 一只路过的虫子挡住了你的去路，你注意到有微弱的声音从它的口器中传来——

C: 这次你总算说对了。别在这匹木马上耗费时间，还是去做点更「开拓」的事吧。
E: That's right for once. No more wasting time on this wooden horse. Time to go and do something more fitting of the Trailblaze.

C: 我猜也是。呵，「门」的侍奉者却如此守旧，实在配不上雅努斯的名号。
E: Just as I thought. Hmph, how ironic that the servants of the "Passage" are so set in their ways — quite unworthy of Janus' name.

C: 那你就继续自己呆着吧！
E: Fine, go ahead and stay alone!

C: 我记得这里有火源，所以一路摸索过来，可这里…这里为什么也那么冷？
E: I remember there was a source of fire here, so I felt my way over... But why... why is it so cold here as well?

C: 天很黑，但我们会一直燃烧下去，呼呼呼！
E: The sky is so dark, but we will keep burning, huff huff huff!

C: 嘁，又在说那些大道理了。
E: Tsk, there he goes again with those grand lectures.

C: 多少次，异邦的兵锋直抵我们城下，几乎要将城墙摧毁；又有多少次，黑潮的造物折断我们的石柱，屠戮我们的同胞。咕嘟——
E: How many times have foreign armies reached our gates, nearly toppling our walls? How many times have the creations of the black tide shattered our stone pillars and slaughtered our people? Gulp—

C: 埃莉诺…埃莉诺…我们愉快地趟过溪流，你提起裙摆走过鹅卵石，走过长着苔藓的小径，我们走进那片森林。风翻动树叶像闪光的浪花，那是多么郁郁葱葱的一片绿色。
E: Eleanor... Eleanor... We happily waded through the stream. You lifted your skirt as you stepped across the cobbles, walked along the moss-covered path, and we entered the forest. The wind rustled the leaves like shimmering waves, it was such a lush, vibrant green.

C: 嗯？蓝色…我是大海？没有啊？呵呵…你也…被秘酿灌倒了…嗯？
E: Hmm? Blue... am I the ocean? Nah, hehe... you got drunk on ambrosia too... huh?

C: 纵使我爱她，又如何…她也不过是一串数据…哎！
E: Even though I love her, so what... She's just another string of data... Sigh!

C: 我只是从此处路过。
E: I am just passing by.

C: 其实没有，不用抱歉。
E: No, you are not. Don't worry about it.

C: 哎，说到底，待在这里，也是无奈啊……
E: Sigh. At the end of the day, I stayed because I don't really have a choice...

C: 虽然交流时间不长，但我能感受到，你已经领悟了我想要表达的所有含义。
E: Although we didn't chat long, I can feel that you already understood everything I try to express.

C: 不过也好，这样我就有更多的时间去追求她，并等待她的回应啦！
E: It's good though. That way I can have more time to pursue her and wait for her response!

C: 嗯哼…我好像没见过你？不过有缘千里来相会，尤其是忙里偷闲这种难得的悠哉时光。
E: Uh-huh... I don't think I've seen you before. Nevertheless, it seems to be our fate to meet each other like this, especially during the leisure time away from work.

C: 人家莱斯莉，那么年轻有作为，本琥珀纪唯一一个去丰饶星域做科研的，哪儿会看得上他这么个地概科小科员啊？
E: Lesley is so young and promising. She's the only person who went to the Abundance segmentum to do research in this Amber Era. She won't even bat her eyes at an ordinary researcher from the DGG.

C: 抱歉，我刚才专心在安排工作，没注意到你来了。
E: Sorry, I was busy arranging work for my team. Didn't notice you were here.

C: 比如有一次深夜，艾丝妲小姐处理工作事务太累，一不小心在办公桌上睡着了。佩佩它独自跑过来找我，把我带到小姐那里，我才能提醒小姐上床休息，避免着凉感冒。
E: One time, it was late at night, and Lady Asta fell asleep on her desk after a day's hard work. Peppy came to me and led me to Lady Asta so that I could escort her back to her room.

C: 我的工作？其实就是帮黑塔女士代为打理一二，并不算难啦。
E: My job? I keep things running on Madam Herta's behalf. It's not that difficult really.

C: 是你呀，空间站的事情多亏了你的帮忙。
E: It's you! Thanks for helping out on the station.

C: 我绝对没听错，它说的就是「温得了」，你不信就去打听打听？
E: I was sure the name is "Wen Deliao." You can find out for yourself if you don't believe me.

C: 阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
E: Ruan Mei... *sobs* She's abandoned us... *sobs*

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 哈哈，谢谢你的夸奖，阮•梅创造了我，她赋予我独特的生存方式与思维模式，或许就是这些东西，塑造出了我这副嗓子吧。
E: Haha, thanks for your compliment. Ruan Mei created me and granted me a unique way of surviving and thinking. Maybe it's those things that shape my voice.

C: 呜呜认得！空间站！英雄！呜呜的！英雄！
E: Yes, I do! Space station! Hero! My hero!

C: 待办事项<unbreak>503</unbreak>个，正在执行序号<unbreak>113</unbreak>，请勿打扰。
E: <unbreak>503</unbreak> tasks pending. Now handling Task #113. Please do not disturb.

C: 机制设计如此——这面盾牌会适时破裂，以便最大程度地吸收力道。假使它完好无损，坏掉的就是持盾人的手臂了。仁厚如吉奥里亚，当然不愿看到这种境况发生。
E: Its structural design is as such: This shield will break in appropriate instances in order to absorb the greatest amount of force. If it were totally unbreakable, it would be the wielder's arm that breaks instead. The benevolent Georios would never wish such a plight on anyone.

C: 还有高手？
E: Another wild flimflammer has appeared?

C: 没想到矛和盾竟然都碎了，这下可全赔进去了。
E: To think the lances and shields have all been destroyed. I've lost my entire fortune.

C: 几次出手间，长矛折断数柄…商人抹了抹冷汗。
E: After a few strikes, a number of the spears had snapped... The merchant wipes a cold sweat from his brow.

C: 教师的名头太过响亮，我倒不喜欢。人们总以为能从我这学到些什么，可我能教给他们的，无非是些思考与谈话的技巧。这算得了什么？
E: I find the title of "teacher" overly flashy. I do not enjoy it, personally. People always think that I can teach them something, but all I can teach them are the skills of reflection and debate. Does this really count as anything?

C: 眼见两人又要为「真理」的定义争吵起来，你赶忙快步离开了现场。
E: Seeing that both of the men before you are hurtling towards another argument about the definition of "truth," you rush away from the scene as quickly as possible.

C: 好…好孩子，谢谢你。都怪老婆子我太没用，出了城只能是你的拖累……
E: Great... Good kid, thank you very much. You can blame everything on me for being so useless. I'll just be a burden once we leave the city...

C: 如何，有什么发现吗？
E: Hmm? Find anything?

C: 首先，波瑟芬妮注意到了探险队里的「劣质物资」问题，一路追查到了拉达曼，并掌握了对方的罪证；但与此同时，拉达曼也得知了此事。
E: First, Possephone noticed dodgy supplies sent to the expedition team, traced it back to Rhadaman, and secured ironclad evidence of his guilt. However, during this process, Rhadaman came to learn about everything.

C: 宁芙提出了一个我并不赞成计划：公开我们的恋情，再逃到奥赫玛城外，用舆论向他的父母施压，直到我们的婚事得到同意再返回……
E: Nympha proposed a plan that I don't agree with: Publicize our relationship, then flee outside Okhema and use public opinion to pressure her parents, only returning once they've agreed to our marriage...

C: 前两天，我这儿有笔十分可疑的交易——一个侍卫模样的男人，竟要出手一颗价值连城的悬锋鹰血红项链。
E: A few days back, I had a really suspicious trade — this guy who looked like a retainer wanting to pawn a priceless pendant made of Kremnos eagleblood.

C: 你这都是哪听来的野史？
E: Where did you hear about these wild rumors?

C: 在你聚精会神地观看记忆片段时，一阵脚步声从身后传来……
E: As you watch the memory fragments intently, the sound of footsteps rings out behind you...

C: 我现在正在改过自新，达利安大叔叔负责监督我。有时他会为我做些吃的…味道很好，总算不用捡剩饭吃了。
E: I've been reinventing myself, and Uncle Dorian has been looking after me. Sometimes he even makes me something to eat... It's really yum, and I don't have to go out foraging for leftovers.

C: 奥赫玛什么时候有推理协会了？
E: Since when did Okhema have a Deduction Society?

C: 之前完全没听说过！按理说这么强的家伙，不应该啊……
E: Never heard of that entity before! Strange for someone so powerful to be off the radar...

C: 非常感谢，年轻人，但请千万别为了我这种糟老头子，置自己的安危于不顾。
E: I really appreciate it, young one, but don't put yourself in danger for an old grandpa like me.

C: 他也好、我也好，即便明知被黑潮吞噬的人什么都剩不下，却依旧…想要去找找他们最后留下的痕迹……
E: He's like me — we both know the black tide doesn't leave anything behind, but still... we want to find whatever that's left of them...

C: 是盗火行者……
E: It's the Flame Reaver...

C: 哈…哈哈…多谢关心。不用担心，麻烦…让我一个人静静吧。
E: *bitter, choked laugh* Thanks, really... but I'll be fine. Could you... could you just give me a moment?

C: 需要我帮忙吗？
E: You need something?

C: 没有大问题，但细节可以调优。你跟我学：「芋波香芒啡也超好喝！」
E: That's pretty good, but it can be fine-tuned. Say it with me: "Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!"

C: 而比作呜呜伯，是为了展示我的学识，毕竟空间站了解这玩意儿的科员可不多。
E: And as for Wubbaboos, this demonstrates my knowledge, because not many staff aboard the space station understand this stuff.

C: 咋回事啊，又坏了？
E: What's the matter? Broken again?

C: 我…嗯，怎么说呢，算是这头大地兽现在的饲养员吧。不好意思，我从云石市集追到云石天宫，才总算赶上它的步伐，可没想到还是出现了受害者。
E: I... Well, how should I put it? You could say I'm currently this dromas's caretaker. Sorry about that. I chased it all the way from the Marmoreal Market to the Marmoreal Palace, and I still couldn't catch up to it. But I didn't expect it to cause harm along the way.

C: 要深深地鞠躬才行！
E: Have them bow deeply!

C: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
E: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

C: 那你倒是告诉我，该怎么在这活下去啊？！我只学过挥剑的本事，菜刀我使不来，更受不了向客人谄媚的生活。我是战士，不是个卖笑的！
E: Then tell me — how do we live here!? All I know is how to wield a sword. I can't handle a kitchen knife, let alone a life of flattering guests. I'm a warrior, not some grinning entertainer!

C: 也感谢你的见证，愿{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}捍卫你。
E: And thank you for witnessing this. May the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} watch over you.

C: 科可波阁下，在这过得还习惯吗，要不要再给你找点红土来？
E: Kokopo, is life here to your liking? Should I bring you more redsoil?

C: 你才活了多大岁数…
E: How old are you, really...?

C: 当然，刻法勒会平等地聆听每一位子民的祈求。
E: Of course. Kephale would listen to people's prayers equally.

C: 英雄总在最后一刻救场！
E: Heroes always arrive at the last moment to save the day!

C: 真是贵人多忘事啊！我们在云石市集摆摊卖矛和盾的时候，还成天看您在街上溜达呢。
E: You really do forget people easily! Back when we were running a stall selling spears and shields at the Marmoreal Market, we used to see you strolling around the streets all the time.

C: 不，这可不行！现在都乱成什么样了，孩子们就该好好待在安全的地方。
E: What? Absolutely not! Look at the sorry state of things, the kids should stay where they're safe.

C: 上个月，小维吉妮娅用悬锋古语给拉比努斯写了首赞美诗，他竟然念反了！
E: Last month, little Verginia wrote a Praisesong in Ancient Kremnoan for Labienus, and he read it backwards!

C: 阁下，辛苦你送信了。
E: Thank you for delivering the letter.

C: 那些宏伟的诗篇，在悬锋城只是擦拭锋刃的废纸。
E: Those grand poems are just scrap paper for wiping blades in Castrum Kremnos.

C: 也许凭借贵客岁月祭司的力量，能够找到阿波罗尼的踪迹吧。
E: Perhaps with your power as a Priest of Time, we can track down Apollonius.

C: 因为我是一位贤人，我是凯撒的参谋，我是逐火的黄金裔。
E: It's because I am a Sage, the Imperator's Advisor, and a Flame-Chasing Chrysos Heir.

C: …对不起，阿波罗尼，我有些失态了……
E: ...I'm sorry, Apollonius, I got a bit carried away...

C: …恭喜你！
E: ...Congrats!

C: 想请您动用「海洋」的权能。
E: I need you to channel the power of the "Ocean."

C: 是吗，岁月已然延伸如此之远…这场永无休止的欢宴间，我几近忘却自己的本职，只是——
E: Oh my... Has it been that long already? With all this never-ending revelry, I've almost forgotten what I'm supposed to do... except—

C: 麻烦你了，救世主——呵，说来也让人惆怅，阁下应该是最后一位欧洛尼斯神迹的使用者了……
E: I'll need your help, Great Deliverer. Hmm... there's a certain sadness in knowing you're likely the last to ever wield Oronyx's Miracle.

C: 阁下，拜托了。
E: Great Deliverer, if you would.

C: 盛放葡萄的池子…看起来很好踩啊，要不要走上去试试？
E: That pool full of grapes... looks way too tempting to stomp on. Wanna take a step and try it?

C: 列车上有不少奇物……
E: There are a lot of Curios on the Express...

C: 那你平时怎么听歌？
E: How do you listen to music?

C: 处理完之前的事情，这几天甚至都有空闲来车上转转了。
E: Now that things have settled down, I finally have time to pay the Express a visit.

C: 我也经常这样。
E: Happens a lot here.

C: 他一定也会被宇宙震撼到吧。
E: He'd probably be pretty starstruck.

C: 我在想——如果我有机会的话，或许也可以和你们一起见识见识雅利洛-Ⅵ以外的世界。
E: I'm thinking... If I have the chance, I'd love to travel with you and see what lies beyond Jarilo-VI.

C: 看来克拉拉很喜欢列车。
E: Seems you like the Express very much.

C: 哎呀，车厢也太酷了吧，那儿是不是可以摆个小舞台了？
E: Oh wow, the train carriages are so cool. Can we put a little stage there?

C: 呃…听起来有点生猛。你们这列车也能在高速公路上飚起来吗？
E: Um... not quite my taste. "High speed" doesn't quite do the Express justice.

C: …咦？我放哪儿了来着？
E: ...aaaand where did I leave it?

C: 列车之旅总算成行了…接下来要怎么参观？按照列车游览路线么？
E: It's finally time for the Express tour... What should we see next? Do we just follow the Express tour route?

C: 但无论如何，和两位前辈聊天使我受益良多，对此我表示非常感激。
E: Anyway, I learned a lot from them. I'm very grateful for that.

C: 找我有什么事吗？
E: Anything I can do for you?

C: 感觉虽然很像……
E: The sense is familiar to me, and yet...

C: 真希望有机会能去空间站看看啊。
E: I really hope I get the chance to look around the space station.

C: 谢谢，收下了。
E: Thank you, I'll take them then.

C: 哈喽。
E: Hello.

C: 你们这么大个车厢，连台街机都没有，真好奇你们平时都是怎么打发时间的，读书？拍照？喝咖啡？东奔西走助人为乐？
E: You all have so much space here on the Express, and not so much as a single arcade machine to show for it. How do you pass the time? Reading? Photography? Sipping coffee? Running around everywhere helping people as a hobby?

C: 希望你们都能好好珍惜彼此。
E: I hope you all cherish one another.

C: 她肯定欢迎你常来找她聊天。
E: I'm sure she'd be keen to continue the conversation.

C: 没错！帕姆真是太可爱了。
E: How can you not! Pom-Pom's so cute!

C: 其实，我还想跟列车长再多聊聊。要不，下次我再带点儿应急药过来？
E: In fact, I miss chatting to Pom-Pom already. How about I bring some more of that emergency medicine again next time?

C: 是长高了。
E: Sure, you're a little taller.

C: 我有些问题想问你…
E: I have some questions for you...

C: 刚才看了星穹列车上的智库…真是大受震撼。
E: I just saw the Astral Express' data bank... What a shock!

C: 这都多亏了你的帮助，现在我有空的时候都会翻出以前的短信温故学习呢！
E: That's all thanks to you. Now I even dig up my old messages from time to time to review and learn from them!

C: 不过，她也向我分享了其他星球采取的对策——其中有些案例与我们的状况很是相似，我正在考虑和杰帕德戍卫官讨论采取类似对策的可行性……
E: However, she shared some strategies that other planets have taken — some of them are very similar to our circumstances. I'm considering discussing with Captain Gepard the possibilities of adopting those strategies...

C: 也有可能是你食量太大…
E: Maybe you have a big appetite...

C: 这种事情，如果只听仙舟人的传说，或者只听桑尔吉斯克人的传说，恐怕永远也不能得出真相吧？
E: If one had heard only of the Xianzhou natives' legend, or the tale of the Sangiske people, it would be impossible to arrive at the truth.

C: （托帕好像在打电话……）
E: (Seems like Topaz is on the phone...)

C: 我这就小睡一会儿…就一会儿。
E: I'm going to take a nap... just a quick one.

C: 那些记录不禁让我想起了母亲说过的话：由人类建立起来的文明真的能对抗神明的意志吗？我觉得……
E: These records remind me of something my mother once said to me — "Can civilizations built by humans really stand against the will of gods?"

C: 登上列车算是个小小的开始，不知道我以后还有没有机会前往宇宙深处——毕竟我答应了布洛妮娅跟娜塔她们，要继续守护下层区，振兴贝洛伯格……
E: Boarding the Express is just one small step — I don't know if I'll ever get the chance to travel the depths of the universe... After all, I did promise Bronya and Nat that I'd continue to protect the Underworld and help rebuild Belobog...

C: …也就是说，雪衣大人其实是认可我的能力吗？
E: So... you're saying Madam Xueyi has faith in my abilities?

C: 不、不过，要是由我去邀请的话，我还得安排时间地点，我肯定安排不好……
E: If it's up to me to do the inviting, that means I have to arrange a time and place, and I'm sure I won't do a good job of that...

C: 不知道下一次，天才俱乐部会员再次会面是什么时候。
E: Who knows when the Genius Society will have its next get-together.

C: 好啊！只是…酒店的事务繁忙，我的假期可能不够了。
E: Great! It's just... the hotel is so busy, my vacation might not be long enough.

C: 那要是以暴制暴，算不算正义？
E: Does fighting violence with violence count as justice?

C: 这个数字有些保守，在那位忆者小姑娘眼中…你这位在「忘却之庭」打捞记忆的天赋型选手，可远远不止这个分数呢~
E: You're too modest. To that Memokeeper girl... salvaging the memories in the Forgotten Hall was worth much more than that.

C: 但银河中的赛道受各种因素的影响，稳定性并不比地表赛道安全。
E: But a Cosmic racetrack is affected by various factors. It isn't exactly as stable as a terrestrial racetrack.

C: 目前剑炉里的神器数量…
E: Right now the number of divine weapons in there...

C: 培养罐中的绿植只是露出新芽，但体积已经十分惊人，你很怀疑它们究竟能长到多大。
E: Although the plants in the incubation jar are only germinating, they are already of a staggering size. You wonder how tall they can grow into.

C: 三缺一速来！
E: We're one player short. Hurry over!

C: 你开始想念黑塔的声音，你有些好奇，她真的能「稳定更新」吗？
E: You are starting to miss Herta's voice, and you wonder whether she can really manage "regular updates" for her manuscript.

C: 「朋友」不是东西…
E: A "friend" isn't a thing...

C: 原来如此，看来还是得从熟人中寻找朋友……
E: I see. I guess I'll just have to seek friends among my acquaintances.

C: 真好啊，要是我能跟你们一起出去看看的话……
E: Sounds nice. If only Pom-Pom could go out on expeditions with you...

C: 就是这本《地底动物百科》，据说是某个银鬃铁卫从地底带回来的，里面记录了好多奇珍异兽呢。
E: This Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology was apparently brought back from the underground by a Silvermane Guard. It talks about a lot of strange creatures.

C: 请抛弃你对基层公职人员的刻板印象，我们的一天可是很忙碌的。
E: Please lose these false impressions of grassroots public officials. Our days are busy ones indeed.

C: 交出未妥投的信封•二
E: Hand over the Misdelivered Letter 2

C: 你捕捉到曼娅的目光扫了一眼旁边的垃圾桶。
E: You notice Manya's fleeting glance at the trashcan next to her.

C: 可城郊全是雪地啊。
E: But the outskirts have only snow-covered fields.

C: 那你为什么不去排练室？
E: Why not use the rehearsal room?

C: 我是黄金歌剧院的音乐剧演员塔米拉，要是你能通过我的作品来认识我就更好了。
E: I am Tamila, a musical performer of the Golden Theater. I'd rather you know me through my works.

C: 换个适合你声线的剧目。
E: Maybe find a project that suits your voice better.

C: 你可真是好奇心旺盛呢，不过小女子这里没有什么好爆料的。
E: You are as curious as a child. But I don't have much to offer.

C: 你自己登台演出不就好了吗？
E: Why don't you perform on stage yourself?

C: 小女子之前担任过一部新剧的女主角，但收到的评价并不好……
E: I had a lead role in a new play, but it didn't get good reviews...

C: 唉，算了，和你说不明白。现在的同龄人啊，根本不懂什么是独立思考……
E: Never mind. It's useless trying to explain it to you. People your age don't know the meaning of independent thinking...

C: …「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
E: ...the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association?

C: 那可不！什么破流动法官，我真是一秒都做不下去了，唉。
E: I know, right!? I can't go on being a Roaming Judge for a second longer.

C: …咳，不过这一切都与我无关。变化就是机会，我要做的事情只有抓住这个机会，想办法让自己坐在法庭上…而不是接着和这帮老头老太太吵架。
E: ...Hmph. Then again, that all has nothing to do with me. Change is opportunity. All I have to do now is take hold of this opportunity and find a way to get myself seated at the court... I don't need to keep arguing with those old hags.

C: 悄悄告诉您，我从报社的人那儿听说，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人…怎么样，可疑吧？
E: On the down-low... I heard from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya... doesn't that seem suspicious?

C: 你好像很激动。
E: You seem excited.

C: 这地底算得上值钱的玩意就只有地髓了——碰巧，我手里最不缺的就是地髓。
E: The only thing that's worth anything in Underground is Geomarrow, which I happen to have a ton of on hand.

C: 不过我先说好，你先前错过了一次好机会，你要找我签约当拳手啊，这底薪和分成的比例可没之前那么高了。
E: Let me be clear, you already missed one chance to sign up, so if you want to be a boxer now, the basic salary and profit share ratio won't be as high as before.

C: 冷血？你说我？怎么着，难道你想说是我把他逼上绝路的不成？
E: Cold-blooded? Me? What do you mean, are you saying that I forced him down that dead end road?

C: 哎？别啊，我这都很坦诚了呀？我真没有骗人！
E: What? Please, I'm being honest. I'm not lying!

C: …唔，你是谁？妈妈说过，我不能和陌生人说话。
E: Wait, who are you? Mom told me not to talk to strangers.

C: 冷静一下，不要着急。
E: Calm down.

C: 不能忘记的事，不想忘记的事，绝对不可以忘记的事…是什么来着？
E: Something I cannot forget... don't want to forget... absolutely must not forget... What was it again?

C: 不必从这里开始…
E: I don't think you need to start from the beginning...

C: ——是什么来着？话明明都到嘴边了…完了完了……
E: Wait! What is it? It was just on the tip of my tongue... Oh, no, no, no...

C: 你、你们不认识老大？
E: Y—You don't know the chief?

C: 你不知道吗？大矿区出乱子了！
E: You haven't heard? There's chaos at the Great Mine!

C: 「正当权益会社」——顾名思义，我们的目标便是维护每个人的「正当权益」。
E: The Rightful Rights Society — as the name implies, our goal is to uphold the rightful rights of every individual.

C: 哎，娜塔莎姑娘可真是个好医生啊。我们磐岩镇能有这样一位大夫，那真是我们的福气！
E: Ahhh, Natasha is such a good doctor. We're blessed to have someone like her here in Boulder Town!

C: 不好意思，我得去拿捕网了…先失陪啦。
E: Sorry, I have to get my net... Excuse me.

C: 贝洛伯格能有你是种幸运。
E: Belobog is lucky to have you.

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 对不起，之前下手狠了点…
E: I apologize if I was a little rough last time...

C: 来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 难道是杰帕德？
E: Could it be Gepard?

C: 我不玩摇滚，不太懂。
E: I don't know much about rock bands, sorry.

C: 除了作战方面的事，我平时也会协助杰帕德整顿军务——简单总结，都是一些涉及脑力的工作。
E: Besides assisting work at the frontline, I also help Gepard to manage military affairs. In other words, my job involves a lot of thinking.

C: 呃，你这不应该直接问她嘛……
E: Um, shouldn't you ask her directly?

C: 那就来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat then...

C: 无法给出明确结论。保护程序无法根除持续产生的信息噪音，且新写入的程序有被噪音污染的风险。
E: Inconclusive. The protection program cannot remove constantly generated information noises. Also, the newly installed program runs risk of being contaminated by the stated noises.

C: 我来和虎克聊聊天。
E: I've come to talk to you.

C: 去吧，年轻人，去干你们该干的事——希望我们有朝一日还能再见。
E: Go well, young one. Do what you all need to do. I hope we will meet again in the coming days.

C: 我们第一次认识是在学校的图书馆里。那时，我捡到了她丢掉的创作——和《奇谭》有关的那种——还给她了。
E: The first time we met was at the school library. At the time, I happened to pick up her unfinished writing, something like Tales, and returned it to her.

C: 多亏了你们，我们最近的活计都轻松了不少。
E: Thanks to you guys, our work has been a lot easier lately.

C: 我可没有说你们坏话的意思，我只是...在为本地人提供更可靠的保修业务！
E: I didn't mean to badmouth you! I'm just... you know... just trying to provide more reliable warranty services for the locals!

C: 可你这里真的像商店。
E: But this place really looks like a store.

C: 扑满歪了歪头，似乎在等你开口。
E: The Trotter tilts its head, as if waiting for you to speak.

C: 小熊发出有些殷切的叫声，挥动起又短又圆的前肢，似乎指望你能帮它做些什么。
E: The little bear cub calls out to you eagerly, flapping its short and round limbs. It seems as if it's asking you for help.

C: 听说那个可可利亚啊……
E: I heard that Cocolia is...

C: 那敢情好啊！这贝洛伯格的交通安全是该整顿整顿了。
E: That's good news! It's time for Belobog's traffic safety to get tightened up.

C: 昨天好像没这么多吧？
E: There weren't this many yesterday, right?

C: 请保持肃静。
E: Please keep quiet.

C: 这玩意也能吃？
E: Is that even edible?

C: 奶奶，我们什么时候回家？
E: Grandma, when can we go home?

C: 哎，人心不古！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
E: Hey, the decline of public morality! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

C: 哎，全完了……
E: Oh, it's all over...

C: 总有一天，我也要当大机器人。
E: One day, I'll become a giant robot.

C: 巧的是，正在我准备放下画笔，彻底和艺术告别的时候，我的母校向我抛来了橄榄枝——他们想要我回去做教授，我也就顺水推舟地同意了。
E: The funny thing is, when I was ready to set down my paint brush and stop doing art for good, but then my alma mater handed me a deal — they wanted me to go back and become a professor, and so I agreed.

C: 博物馆嘛，自然就是展览各种文物的地方了。
E: Well, it's a museum, so naturally, it puts up all kinds of relics and artifacts on display.

C: 慢走！好好享受我们的展览吧。
E: Take care! Enjoy our exhibition.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。如你所见，我正在担任志愿导览员……
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. As you can see, I'm currently volunteering as a tour guide...

C: 到了某些厨子的嘴里，就成了「腕子劲儿」、「巧功夫」、「不传之秘」这些让人越听越糊涂的大词儿…咱听着就觉得奇怪。
E: But spoken from a chef's perspective, it becomes all about the "power in the wrists," "artful skill," "unfathomable secret" — all these pretentious big words that confuse people... Even I'm left scratching my head.

C: 有什么推荐菜吗？
E: Do you have any recommendations?

C: 关于尚滋味…
E: About Spices Supreme...

C: 眼下建木不再生长了，我倒讨了个巧，把这些稀奇玩意儿的价格给压下来了，抛开瞎编的故事不说，有些物什还挺有意思的，算是个意外之喜吧。
E: Now that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing, I've seen an opportunity and acquired those curios at incredibly low prices. To my surprise, some of them are actually pretty interesting and not just cheap gimmicks like I thought they would be. A pleasant surprise, don't you agree?

C: 想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 诗仙机器人们怎么了？
E: What about those Poetic Genius Ingenia?

C: 谁在说话？
E: Who's talking?

C: 其实就是你们的虚拟现实技术罢了。
E: Actually, it's all just virtual reality tech.

C: 灾难过后你们还忙吗？
E: The disaster is over, are you guys still busy?

C: 说来也是机缘巧合，刚进来的时候我也一度迷茫，感觉整个人生就要荒废在这个鬼地方了。那愁的我是整日挠头啊，耳朵上的毛都被我挠秃了。
E: It was purely by chance. When I first arrived, I was totally lost. I thought I was going to rot away here for the rest of my life. I would scratch my head in frustration every day until the fur between my ears fell out.

C: 我还有事，下次再来。
E: I still have something to do, so I'll come back another time.

C: 你这里都卖什么？
E: What are you selling?

C: 哎，没想到这辈子还能见着这么壮观的景象。
E: Wow, I never in all my life thought that I'd lay eyes on such a magnificent sight.

C: 对啊，这不好吗？这可是天大的喜事呢，啊哟，建木可真是个听话的大宝贝！
E: Yes. Isn't that great? That's something worth celebrating! Oh, the Ambrosial Arbor is such a nice baby!

C: 您知道吗？仙舟有句老话是这么说的：「既要星槎飞的高，又要星槎少能耗」……
E: Do you know this old Xianzhou saying? "Starskiffs need to fly high, but not burn energy"...

C: 但有个叫行雪的吗？我不记得了。我想想——虽然未必有印象就是。
E: But was one of them called Xingxue? I don't recall. But I can think about it — despite not really having much of an impression.

C: 哎，这才多大点事啊！打个计程槎不就完事了？我都夸你夸到这份上了，再多出份槎钱总是小意思吧？
E: Ah, who cares about that!? We could just hire a taximeter starskiff. I've already given you so many praises, what's a little taximeter starskiff fare to you?

C: 现在麻烦你写下介绍信。
E: Could you please write me a letter of recommendation?

C: 嗯。他说战阵之上讲究讲究上下威严，神策府里不必如此，让我直呼名字即可。我就照做了，渐渐成习惯了。
E: Yes. He said we have to be strict with our official chain of command during battle, but back here at the Seat of Divine Foresight we can call each other by our first names. Over time, I slowly got used to it.

C: 那日景元凯旋，刚回到神策府门口，就见到一只形容枯槁的老狮子摇摇晃晃地向自己走来…在生命的最后时刻，雪狮子终于等到了景元。
E: On the day Jing Yuan returned, triumphant, he arrived at the gates to the Seat of Divine Foresight and saw a withered old lion slowly staggering toward him... In the final moments of its life, Snowmoon finally reconnected with Jing Yuan.

C: 不知您此番光临神策府所为何事？府内同僚大多公务繁忙，招待不周，还请见谅！
E: What affairs bring you to the Seat of Divine Foresight today? Please excuse us for our inadequate hosting formalities, we are currently busy with official matters.

C: …当然，这些都只是卑职瞎猜的。将军为何允许我们这样放肆？我至今也没能想明白。
E: ...But of course, this is all just an unfounded guess from me. Why does the general let us get away with all of this? I still haven't figured that part out.

C: 总之，只要将改造后的太岁封在一个容器中，只需要不断切换食物的位置，就能不断改变它的连接，使它实现玉兆的功能…当然，计算速度上远不如玉兆。
E: A Lucidum captured inside a vessel only needs for a food source to be constantly switching locations for it to update its pathways and produce similar functions to a jade abacus... But at a far, far slower processing speed, naturally.

C: 唉！枯燥不枯燥都无所谓啦！我跟您不一样——还有大好的人生等待您去挥霍，还有数不尽的传奇等待您去书写……
E: *sigh* Boring or not, it doesn't matter! I'm not like you... You still have a whole life waiting for you to spend and experience, and countless more legendary exploits that await your accomplishing...

C: 我对您「最靠谱」的描述仅表示诚挚的感谢，其他部分不予评价。希望您能继续对地衡司工作保持关注和支持。
E: I can only express my gratitude for your assessment as "most reliable," and would refrain from any comments on the other parts. Hopefully you can keep paying attention to and supporting the work of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 再说了，为什么我会在地衡司工作？要不是我投资失败…图表上所有的曲线往下走，只有物价还在往上走，不工作不行啊。
E: Besides, why do I work at the Realm-Keeping Commission? If it weren't for my failed investments... With all the curves on the chart going down, and only the prices are going up. Working has become a necessary option.

C: 你如果听说了有什么帮富家小姐姐成天遛狗的工作，记得告诉我，我可以随时辞掉地衡司里的工作。
E: If you hear about a rich lady who needs her dog walked all day, let me know. I can quit my job at the Realm-Keeping Commission any time.

C: 怎么，你还需要罪人的建议吗？
E: Huh, still looking for the advice of a criminal?

C: 请您收下这些谢礼吧！
E: Please, accept this as thanks!

C: 大人您或许忘了，但我可是记得一清二楚！
E: Perhaps you may have forgotten, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}, but I remember like it was yesterday.

C: 能介绍下你的工作吗？
E: Can you tell me a little bit about your work?

C: 每次对接工作，我都会要求保留交流记录…事后证明，这样做切实地提高了沟通效率，我正建议整个司部里推广呢。
E: Every time I hand over any work, I'll keep a record of all communication... It's been proven to improve communication efficiency, and I'm in the process of recommending the entire commission to adopt this practice.

C: 你是个刑警？
E: Are you a police detective?

C: 在下知道这答案不能让您满意，但阁下还是别追问了。这个话题就到此为止吧。
E: I know that this answer doesn't satisfy your curiosity, but you really must cease this line of questioning. This topic is closed for discussion.

C: 哎哟，这位客官，我看您不是持明族人，应该不需要蜕生陪伴服务吧？
E: Hello there, dear customer. You don't look like a Vidyadhara, so I'm guessing you don't require any hatching rebirth assistance?

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 当时领导可是允诺的，在学术交流团里混够了资历，回来高低能评上个医士长。所以我就跟着去了。
E: At that time, the leader promised that whoever gained enough experience in the academic exchange program would very likely be promoted to chief healer. So, I joined the program.

C: 再之后啊，司里组织了学术交流团，让一批罗浮丹鼎司的学者出去和域外的学者们交流经验。
E: Later, the commission organized an academic exchange program. A batch of Luofu scholars would be sent off to interact with Outworld scholars.

C: 再后来就是听说她持械袭击云骑，让人家给当场击毙了。直到那时候，我才知道她走了邪路。
E: Later, I learned that she was killed during an armed attack against the Cloud Knights. Only then did I know that she had gone astray.

C: 我也不知道啊！啊，不对，我的确什么都不知道啊！
E: How should I know!? I really don't know anything!

C: 你身为丹士长还问我？
E: Why are you asking me? Aren't you the chief alchemist?

C: 看来你没事。
E: Looks like you're okay.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你又来了啊，正好正好，我刚研究了一种越狱方法，你要不要看看？
E: You're back again, {F#girl}{M#boy}. Perfect timing. I've researched a new way to escape this place. You want to see it?

C: 这种无关紧要的事，没必要知道，也没必要打听。
E: There's no point in asking about meaningless things like that.

C: 好的，您慢走。
E: Okay. See you.

C: 当然，你可能听出来了，我不擅长聊天，只要你不介意的话。
E: You may have realized that I'm not the best at small talk, but I appreciate conversations as long as you don't mind my style of speech.

C: 那我就去反物质军团。
E: Then I'll join it.

C: 以后有机会再聊吧。
E: I'll catch you again next time.

C: 就是旅游攻略啊，「三十天畅玩罗浮最全攻略」，我收藏的就是这篇。虽然热度不如别的罗浮观光攻略高，但个人认为这篇最实用。
E: The tourist guide, of course. "Get to Know the Real Luofu in <unbreak>30</unbreak> Days." That's the one I got. It may not be as popular as the other Luofu sightseeing guides, but I think it's the most practical one.

C: 尝过以后就不会再有人来缠着你要旅游手信了，效果非常好。给自己省点事儿吧，旅行是一个人的放松，别让那些所谓的「人情世故」困住你。
E: Once they've tried it, they won't be pestering you for souvenirs anymore, guaranteed. I mean, come on, you're on a trip. Just relax and stop worrying about the "social obligations" back home.

C: 这不是咱们的老主顾吗，咱们尚滋味的立命之本就是「亲民」，保准道道菜都便宜又好吃！您要是感兴趣就到店里坐坐。
E: Well, if it isn't my regular customer! Spices Supreme is all about making affordable and tasty dishes, so come in and take a seat!

C: 还是说说醒园菜吧…
E: Let's talk about Xingyuan-style dishes...

C: 你自己最喜欢什么菜？
E: What's your favorite dish?

C: 你说这是茶就是茶吧。
E: If you say so.

C: 不知道你对银河的历史有多少了解，在久远的过去，曾经有过一场寰宇浩劫，那是由无机生命的「帝皇」鲁珀特发起的战争。
E: I wonder how much you know about the history of the Cosmos. Once upon a time, there was a catastrophe, a war started by Rubert, the emperor of inorganic beings.

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 是啊，简直就是奇迹！累归累，但能促成这样一件事，可真有成就感啊。
E: Indeed, it is a miracle! Although it's tiring, being a part of something like this gives me so much sense of achievement!

C: 啊，刀和刃都是差不多的东西啦，差一点而已…但「刃鱿鱼」又是什么生物啦！
E: Oh, come on, "barrow" and "barrel" are pretty much the same thing, just a hair's breadth apart... But seriously, why are fish even in a barrel to begin with? Don't they usually live in the waters?

C: 你是太卜司一名人畜无害的小司库，最近从书库中考古发现并复原了「帝垣琼玉牌」，没想到它在仙舟罗浮一炮而红。
E: You are an unimportant custodian in the Divination Commission. Recently, you've discovered and restored the game of Celestial Jade, which you found when you explored ancient texts in the repository. To your surprise, the game became extremely popular on the Xianzhou Luofu overnight.

C: 我们姐妹都是没有未来的人，谢谢你们愿意做她的朋友。
E: We sisters are people whose lives have come to an eternal standstill, yet all of you are still willing to be her friends despite that. For that, I thank you all.

C: 好的家人～下次有杂技表演，一定立刻通知你～
E: Okay fam! I'll let you know straight away next time there's an acrobatics performance~

C: 最危险的分灵尾巴，与第二危险的浮烟已经被十王司镇伏。
E: Th—The most dangerous spirit is Tail, and the second most dangerous is Cirrus. Both have already been subdued by the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 好、好啊，我也想和{NICKNAME}聊聊。
E: Okay! I want to chat with you too {NICKNAME}!

C: 寒鸦最近怎么样？
E: How's Hanya doing?

C: 没有吧…我只是喜欢发发牢骚罢了。
E: I don't think so... I just like to grumble.

C: 我好像见过好几个冥差了？
E: I feel like I've seen a lot of spiritfarers?

C: 想问你些事。
E: I would like to ask you some questions.

C: 金人勾魂使的职责是协助各位判官和冥差进行调查审判。我们没有做出判断的能力，但可以凭借庞大的资料库，协助他人做出正确的判断。
E: The role of an aurumaton spectral envoy is to assist the judges and spiritfarers in investigation and trial. We do not have the capability to make judgment, but we can assist others in making the correct judgment with our extensive database.

C: 作为监察仙舟长生种的法纪机关，我们负责观察和带走即将堕入魔阴身的仙舟人，也负责将那些为恶极深的长生种犯人镇入幽囚狱中，令业报得以彰显。
E: Being the legal mechanism that monitors Xianzhou's long-life species, we are responsible for observing and escorting the Xianzhou natives who are succumbing to mara. We are also in charge of grounding the vicious criminals of the long-life species in the Shackling Prison as a sign of the Karmic Wheel manifestation.

C: 亲亲，我这不是在夸张。这银河中虽然各有各的科技，但只有仙舟玉兆是兼具美学和人文关怀的科技产品，这一块拿捏得稳稳的。
E: Honey, I'm not exaggerating here. Despite all the different techs in this cosmos, only Xianzhou's jade abacus integrates aesthetics with humanistic considerations. It's got that down pat.

C: 遗憾的是，大部分仙舟人对一件上百年的瓶瓶罐罐不感兴趣。要是典当客人不觉得古物值钱，那我们也不便高价典当不是？
E: What's saddening is that most Xianzhou natives are dismissively uninterested in centuries-old ornaments. If a customer here did not think an antique valuable, it wouldn't be appropriate for us to pawn them at exorbitant prices, would it?

C: 客官您要是愿意听点儿闲言碎语，我倒是可以给您讲讲。
E: If you're willing to listen to a bit of gossip, then I can certainly fill you in.

C: 无妨，等客人得闲的时候，再来光顾。
E: It's okay. Come back when you've got more time to spare.

C: 这个事，你得问列车长。
E: You'll have to ask the conductor about this.

C: 什么？你不是管事儿的吗，虽然我一看就知道。那行，我想想办法，找个机会问问你说的列车长。
E: What? Aren't you in charge around here? It was rhetorical anyway. Fine, I'll think of something and ask that conductor of yours when an opportunity arises.

C: 我只是一时间还没改过口来，请你不要再提起了。
E: It was a slip of the tongue. Please do not remind me.

C: 要是人人都像你这样天真就好了。
E: If only the world was as naive as you.

C: 在仙舟这种日复一日没啥变化的地方，难道我还有出头的可能吗？
E: In a place like Xianzhou where nothing changes, how would I ever get the chance to succeed?

C: 此后我用了三十年，才重新学会了怎么一个人生活。
E: I spent thirty years after that learning how to live by myself all over again.

C: …你看这「罗浮」仙舟上这太卜司的卜算啊，虽然准是准，但那是有规矩的。
E: ...Check out this prediction from the Divination Commission of the Xianzhou Luofu. It may be accurate, but there are rules around this stuff.

C: 这马褂儿可真方便，我也得来两件。
E: It's a good story. I should use it one day.

C: 那我得抓紧机会给你签个名，以后还有机会可以升值。
E: Then I'll have to give you an autograph while I can. Who knows how much it'll be worth in the future?

C: 这不调查不打紧，越调查越感兴趣…虽然同事们已经叫我「仙舟通」了，但是我了解的还不过是仙舟文化的九牛一毛而已。
E: The more I studied it, the more fascinated I became... despite everyone at work jokingly calling me "Mr. Xianzhou," my knowledge about Xianzhou culture really is just a drop in the bucket.

C: 不知道你有没有听说过，叫作「息壤」。按照古籍的说法，这是指神话里自己生长、膨胀的土壤。
E: Have you ever heard of something called "Fallow Earth"? The ancient texts claim that it's a kind of legendary soil that grows and expands by itself.

C: 「息土不耗减，掘之益多」…这样土壤不仅挖不尽，不断挖还有更多。
E: "Soil that does not deplete, but self-replicates"... so you never run out of soil, but instead always end up with more.

C: 蛋？
E: An egg?

C: 还想再接着聊聊。
E: There're still some things I'd like to talk about.

C: 在人一生中所有可能遭遇的飞来横祸中，交通事故是最常见也最致命的，所以千万不可以对交通安全放松警惕哦。
E: Of all the accidents that can happen in life, traffic accidents are the most common and most deadly. So please don't let your guard down when it comes to traffic safety.

C: 嗯？你对我平时的工作感兴趣吗？
E: Mmm? Are you interested in my everyday work?

C: 所以，我这里其实也会找一些「交通志愿者」来帮忙。怎么样，有时间的话，要不要和我一起为仙舟做贡献呢？当然啦，说是「志愿者」，但也不会让你做白工的。
E: That's why I've found a few traffic volunteers to help me out here. Say, if you've got the spare time, would you like to contribute to the peace and order aboard Xianzhou? Naturally, it's just a volunteer position but I won't be sending you home empty-handed.

C: 嗯？你问我什么目的，当然是让你喜欢上我呀。姐姐这么可爱，你喜欢我也不会吃亏嘛。有这么意外吗？
E: Hmm? What am I up to? Just to make you like me, of course. I'm so cute, and you've got nothing to lose by returning the favor. Is that so surprising?

C: 关于工作的事 …
E: About work...

C: 「商会」是什么？
E: What is a "merchant guild"?

C: 你问吧，我会考虑之后回答你，有些不便回答的，希望你也能理解。
E: Go ahead. I'll mull it over and tell you what I can.

C: 今天的，星槎，太快了…
E: Today's, starskiff, is too fast...

C: 我倒要听听，能有什么奖品。
E: I gotta know what kinds of prizes you can offer.

C: 哪四门啊？
E: Which four lessons?

C: 你就可以登台了！
E: Then you're ready for the stage!

C: 热闹是他们的。
E: They're the noisy ones.

C: 我都开不了张了…
E: I can't even open up the shop...

C: 你又从哪儿来呢？
E: Where have you come from?

C: 似乎不错，我想想…
E: Sounds nice, lemme think about it...

C: 我再详细地描述一下——头顶着羊角，单片眼镜，戴着火焰做成的冠冕，身披优雅的长袍，洁白缎面的手套，以及很贵的靴子…还有与生俱来的强者气息。
E: I shall describe the person in greater detail: It's a ram's horn on top of their head, wearing a monocle, donning a crown of fire, draped in an elegant robe, alabaster-white gloves, and very expensive boots... topped off with the daunting aura of a powerful warrior.

C: 它涉及到引擎的运行原理、机械结构、材料特性、生产工艺…但是，这些我都不能告诉您，请您不要问这样可能涉密的问题。
E: It involves the operating principles of engines, mechanical structures, material properties, and the artisanship of the engine's production... However, I can't disclose any of these to you. Please refrain from asking such potentially sensitive questions.

C: 不过还好有赛事解说的广播，有震天动地的欢呼声，算是我独有的临场感。
E: Luckily, there's still a broadcast of the competition commentary and earth-shaking cheers — like my very own VIP seat in the heart of the action.

C: 我想问的差不多了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 颠沛流离走失了母亲～
E: Cast adrift, I lost my mom~

C: 这儿便是天舶司的办公地…
E: This is the Sky-Faring Commission's office.

C: 很古老的歌，像你这样的短生种多半没听过。
E: A really old one. Short-life species like yourself have probably ne'er heard it.

C: 熔炬。
E: Apyra.

C: 来求战，就给老夫找个合格的战士身躯…让老夫和你好好比划比划。
E: If you're here to fight, then find me a body worthy of a warrior... So I can have a good and thorough fight with you.

C: 他们吃一样的食物、看一样的风景、在一样的工作岗位上加班几百年升职无望。
E: They eat the same food, view the same sights, and work the same jobs for centuries — with no hope of any promotion.

C: 离开镇妖塔。
E: Leave the suppression tower.

C: 人家想起了一位异星的美男子，他身着一身闪耀瑰丽的银色盔甲，有着一头柔顺飘逸的红色秀发～
E: I'm reminded of a dashing outworlder gentleman who wore a suit of scintillating silver armor, with a full head of silky-smooth, crimson hair!

C: 那人告诉我，世间命途变化转折最为剧烈之处，便是战场。人们的胜负生死在此颠倒变化，莫甚于此。
E: That person told me the battlefield is where the most drastic changes of fate take place. Nowhere else do the destinies of human beings rise and fall with such volatility.

C: 快，打完这轮去避难！
E: Hurry up, finish up this game and evacuate!

C: 年度犯罪率又降低了…
E: The crime rate is down again this year...

C: 传说里的故事都是真的？
E: Are the rumors and legends about it all true?

C: 什么！我这辈子都看不了了吗！
E: What!? Then I'll never be able to watch it in my lifetime!

C: 我想试试它家的新品诶……
E: I want to try their new dish...

C: 老板说它们是茶就是茶。
E: They are, because the boss says so.

C: 好久没见到我，想我了？
E: Do you miss me?

C: 停停停…你能不能让我清净会儿啊？你吵得我头疼。
E: Stop, stop, stop... Can you just pipe down for a bit? You're giving me a headache.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人有这样的想法与愿景…真好。不过，成为一名医师可是很难的哦，要学习满满当当整本手册的知识，学会应对各种情景。
E: It's wonderful that Lady Seliose has such thoughts and aspirations. However, it is no easy feat to become a doctor. You'll need to master entire manuals' worth of knowledge and learn to handle all sorts of situations.

C: 好呀！我会为灰宝准备好茶点的，要常来哦！
E: Great! I'll prepare some snacks and tea for Grayie, so make sure to visit often!

C: 不是哦，是花——朵——
E: Nope, it's a flo-wer~

C: 啊，您就是…阿格莱雅小姐…提到的…英雄吧？原来…是这样的{F#大美人}{M#小帅哥}啊。
E: Ah, so you're... the hero... Miss Aglaea... mentioned? I see you're quite the {F#beauty}{M#handsome one} indeed.

C: 现在他们家里少了点什么物件，都会转念一想：「赛飞儿大人这么做，一定有她的原因吧！」
E: Now whenever something goes missing from their homes, they just think to themselves: "Lady Cipher must have her reasons for doing this!"

C: 能和我逐一辈子火吗？
E: Can you spend the rest of your life chasing the flame with me?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 那你跑步的时候会打嗝吗？
E: Do you get hiccups when you run?

C: 阁下，不要总是拿「那时自己已经死了」来开玩笑啦。
E: Please stop joking about how you were "already dead back then."

C: 缇安，只是不小心……
E: Trianne, it was just an accident...

C: 小心牙口啊。
E: Careful with your teeth.

C: 即便凯撒稍作歇息，逐火军中的诸位也能各司其职，无需太过记挂。
E: Even if you take a short break, everyone in the Flame-Chase Army can handle their duties just fine. There's no need to worry excessively.

C: 这么紧张干嘛…咦？
E: Why are you so nervous... Hmm!?

C: 你的互动指的是随机找被害者讲段子，再把那些不给你捧哏的人打一顿？
E: Your idea of interaction is to make a joke out of someone, and beat them up if they don't play along with you?

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 竟然被一个总角之年的小孩打败了！
E: Only to be beaten by a literal child!

C: 我比他大七十岁，没毛病。
E: I'm <unbreak>70</unbreak> years older than him.

C: 站完岗比赛都结束啦！
E: The match will end when our shift ends!

C: 对手是总角之年的小孩！
E: And lost to a literal child!

C: 我还有事，今天就不检查了。
E: I am busy. I won't investigate today.

C: 硅原-Ⅱ的海螺在进化中，逐渐学会了模仿捕食者的样貌。现在，任何食用它们的人都会触犯人道主义保护条例。
E: The conchs of Silica-II gradually learned to imitate predators throughout their evolution. Now, anyone who eats them is in violation of humanitarian protection legislation.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 为了方便你的代入，现在要为你构建一个紧张刺激的情景。请你在原地给自己添加一些*颠簸感*，毕竟现在这是失事的竞锋舰——
E: To make immersion easier, we need to build an exciting scenario. Please add a little turbulence to where you are now. After all, now the Skysplitter is facing a crash.

C: 据说适当补充糖分，对需要动脑子的人来说很重要——
E: It's said that replenishing sugar is crucial for people who need to rack their brains.

C: 合适！
E: Of course!

C: 一二三四，二二三四……
E: One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...

C: 不如金人司阍。
E: Might as well use an Aurumaton Gatekeeper.

C: 那个红发小子打得不错。
E: The red-haired boy has some moves.

C: 还有我！还有我！
E: Me too! Me too!

C: 唉…我不做智械了！
E: *sigh*...I don't want to be an Intellitron anymore!

C: 你少玩点烂梗吧。
E: You should stop it with the stupid memes.

C: 正好，我们在这里比武吧！
E: Great, let's have a duel here!

C: 这尊瓷器看起来像是巨大的冰块——没准里面也封着反物质军团的虚卒呢。
E: This porcelain resembles a huge block of ice. Perhaps, some Voidrangers of the Antimatter Legion are frozen inside.

C: 除了碳水化物和无机盐，培养液里肯定存在着神秘配方。但这恐怕涉及仙舟生物技术的核心机密，不应深究。
E: Other than carbohydrates and inorganic salts, there must be a secret ingredient in the culture medium. As it involves a highly classified the Xianzhou biological technology, you should not dig deeper.

C: 处在雏形阶段的星槎种子已颇具通常星槎的规模了。哇哦。
E: Wow! A starskiff seed in the embryonic phase is already the size of a fully-grown starskiff.

C: 传闻中，造化洪炉中封存的能源是元素生命「岁阳」——它们在千年前进犯仙舟未果，由此被判令永世为仙舟联盟供应能源。
E: Rumor has it that the energy stored in the Creation Furnace is heliobus, an elemental being. A thousand years ago, the heliobi unsuccessfully attacked Xianzhou and was thus ordered to supply energy to the Xianzhou Alliance forever.

C: 「有观点认为，反物质军团中『践踏者』的出现，意味着慧骃原有的文明遭受了反物质军团的打击和奴役……」
E: "Some view the emergence of Tramplers in the Antimatter Legion signifies the erosion and enslavement of the Houyhnhnm civilization by the Antimatter Legion..."

C: 「星啸是反物质军团的先锋将军，也是烬灭祸祖最常派遣的大君。其部队遍布银河，在群星间织出行军路径和毁灭的道路。」
E: "Celenova is the front-line general of the Antimatter Legion and the Lord Ravager most frequently dispatched by the Ruin Author. Her troops, scattered all over the cosmos, march to and fro among the planets as they bring about destruction."

C: 每个新入行的执事都要通过「四方览镜操作测试」才能获得其使用权限。测试难度不低，有些人入职一年后才勉强通过。
E: Every newly-recruited officer must pass the Foursquare Mirror Operation Exam to be authorized to use it. The exam is quite tough, and it takes some officers one year to pass it.

C: 太好听了，简直是天籁！
E: It sounds like a bop. It's music from the heavens!

C: 完好无损的快递箱，贴在其表面的密封数字单据显示它尚未被正确签收。
E: A courier package in good condition. The digital label affixed to its surface shows that it has not been signed for receipt.

C: 你的勇气令人钦佩，但它却害了你。虽然你只想浅尝一口，但它的味道给你留下的印象实在太过深刻——你两眼一黑，只感觉到天旋地转，身体失去控制……
E: Your courage is admirable, but it has done you harm. Although you just want a small bite, its taste is so sickening that you black out right away. Your head is spinning, and you are losing control of your body...

C: 随便瞥一眼就走。
E: Take a quick glance and walk away.

C: 「琼浆玉液酿余香，美馔佳肴滋味长。」
E: "Lustrous liquor with a fragrance that simmers, delectable delicacy with a taste that lingers."

C: 这是一只崭新的快递箱，看得出来纸箱上被人划开过，塞进箱子的书册露出了一角。
E: This is a brand-new parcel. The cardboard has been slashed opened already, and the corner of a notebook is protruding out.
9 pieces.

C: 拿着吧，这是崇高道德的奖赏，至少你尊重了这本习题册，你值得。
E: Take this. This is a reward from the High Morals. You at least respected this notebook. You have earned it.

C: 你三下五除二拆开了这个危险的包裹，里面竟然装着……
E: You quickly tear into the dangerous package to find that it actually contains...

C: 据说这群人有点奇怪。
E: I hear this bunch is a bit weird.

C: 总之快离远些吧，这些当代艺术都是坐地起价的，真要不小心搞坏了，你把帕姆卖了都赔不起。
E: Either way, best to move away from here. These modern art pieces go for ridiculous prices. If you accidentally break it, even selling Pom-Pom won't cover it!

C: 怎么？
E: Choose what?

C: 墓碑上篆刻的字还算清晰可见，但周身遍布裂痕，它的来头或已腐朽。
E: The words carved on the tombstone are fairly visible, but the surrounding cracks reveal the poor condition it's in.

C: 是、是吗？太好了……
E: Oh, oh really? That's great...

C: 并未完全拆封的礼物，堆在这里等待着有资格打开它们的人。
E: Gifts that have not been fully opened are stacked here, waiting for those qualified to open them.

C: 这座酒店为宾客们准备了许多现实娱乐，但它们都不如梦境有吸引力。
E: This hotel has prepared a lot of real-life entertainment, but they are not as attractive as entering the dreamscape.

C: 继续凝视它。
E: Continue to meet its gaze.

C: 随处可见的自助苏乐达机，拔管即饮。也可以为交通工具添加动力。
E: Self-service SoulGlad machines are seen anywhere. Simply pull out the tube and drink. It can also be used to power your vehicles.

C: 门口贴着这样的标语：「再强调一次，这里不提供打手服务！！」
E: A sign on the door reads: "To emphasize, we do not provide thug-for-hire services!!"

C: 如果足够有闲心，你甚至可以用这把椅子锻炼肱二头肌。
E: If you were feeling idle, you could even use this chair to give your biceps a workout.

C: 温暖的光透过玻璃传来，里面似乎是为舞会准备的布景，但现在空无一人。
E: Warm rays of light penetrate in through the glass. A seeming stage is prepared for a dance performance, except there's naught a soul there.

C: 你被眼前的奇景所吸引，攫取了全部心神；
E: You're mesmerized by the wondrous sight before you — it robs you of your full attention.

C: 沉重脚步拖拽着你前进，就像是夜蛾赴火；
E: Heavy footsteps drag toward you up ahead, like moths to a flame.

C: 如果哪天我打算转行当个小说家的话，光凭改编那些留言，怕不是就够写上好几本大部头了！
E: If I ever decide to become a novelist one day, I'll have enough material to write several books just by adapting those comments!

C: 尽管在匹诺康尼，您的安全会得到家族最大限度的保护——但看看最近的情况，谁敢确定不会碰上个三长两短呢？只需投入极少的资金，就能轻松获得高达数万倍的赔偿！
E: On Penacony, your safety will be completely safeguarded by The Family. Though, seeing the current climate, who knows when one would run into an accident or two? But for just a meager sum, you will be ensured a payout that's over ten thousand times!

C: 收藏库里多了一张重要的证书，是不是说明我也变得更重要了？
E: Another important piece to add to my collection. Does that mean I've become even more important now?

C: 这样啊…我能理解，毕竟大家都是来享受梦境世界的欢乐氛围的…有谁会在意那所谓的真相呢？
E: Is that so... I understand, everyone's here to enjoy the Dreamscape's happy vibes... Who'd ever care about the truth?

C: 没事，我喜欢聊天。
E: It's fine. I like to chat.

C: 愉快的时光总是如此短暂…您若在旅途中又遇到什么趣事，还请记得与我分享，好么？
E: Time flies when you're having fun... If you run into anything interesting on your travels, don't forget to share them with me, okay?

C: 如果有机会的话，您要不要和我一起调查？如果是您的话，或许真能找到些线索呢。
E: If the opportunity arises, do you want to investigate with me? I think we'd find some clues if you were around.

C: 哈。脸皮这么厚的家伙还是第一次见。脚并拢了，背挺直！不准弯膝盖！
E: Ha. First time anyone's tried pulling that one on me. Feet together, back straight! No bending your knees!

C: 你看我像皮皮西人吗？
E: Do I look like a Pepeshi to you?

C: 这时…你的余光似乎瞥到了什么。
E: Just then... you seem to catch a glimpse of something out of the corner of your eyes.

C: 其实谛听是人造的…
E: Actually, Ditings are artificial...

C: 这座城市里还有许多脆筒，我再去找一个训就是了，反正之前那家伙也不怎么听话。
E: There are still many cones in this city, and I can just train another one. The previous one wasn't obedient anyway.

C: 危险？我倒没觉得。
E: Dangerous? I doubt so.

C: 如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 再见了，{F#美丽的小姐}{M#英俊的先生}，祝您旅途愉快——如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: Farewell, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome gentleman}, I wish you a pleasant journey... If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 嗯？您指的是「谐乐大典」吗？那是由家族每纪定期主办的庆典，与「钟表匠」本人无关。
E: Hm? You mean the Charmony Festival? That is a celebration that The Family arranges regularly, and it has nothing to do with the Watchmaker.

C: （「钟表匠」最重要的作品…或许就在我们身边……）
E: (The Watchmaker's most important work... may be right beside us)

C: 我一直抱有希望…希望「钟表匠」所有的的技术能给我带来新灵感。
E: I have always held hope... Hope that the skills of the Watchmaker could bring me new inspiration.

C: 噢，请相信，我不是对皮皮西人抱有什么偏见。相反，我非常尊敬他们，甚至认为他们才应当是这个世界的主宰，有个著名的理论曾表述过相同的观点…你知道是什么理论吗？
E: Oh, please trust me. I don't hold any prejudice against anyone, including the Pepeshi. On the contrary, I have great respect for them, to the point that I think they should rule this world. There's even a famous theory that shares a similar perspective... Do you know what it is?

C: 匹诺康尼现在是真正的「美梦」了。
E: Penacony is now a truly beautiful dream.

C: 或者还有什么你看得上眼的，只管说就是。别看我这一套行头朴素，但在正经事上我可从来不吝啬。
E: Or there might be something else you fancy, just let me know. I may look like a commoner, but I'm never stingy where it matters.

C: 唉，你啊，怎么就是不愿意接受我的长期「资助」呢……
E: Hey, why are you not willing to accept my long-term sponsorship?

C: 你…看来你并不是懂得欣赏音乐艺术，可惜。
E: You... It appears that you don't seem to appreciate the essence of musical artistry, what a pity.

C: 人们总是往我身上贴标签，什么酒店经理，什么完美精英…就好像我不用上厕所一样。
E: People are always trying to put labels on me... such as "hotel manager," "perfect elite"... It's like I'm not even a human that uses the toilet just like everyone else.

C: 这就是苏萨先生的《糖浆主义宣言》，你们都该明白这个道理！
E: That is precisely Mr. Sousa's Syrupism Manifesto. Make sure you understand this lesson!

C: 你自己不就是二次元角色？
E: Are you not yourself an anime character?

C: 所以…我开始动摇了。是不是我们常盘国的所谓「二次元」，已经变质成了一种无趣的定型文，而我们引以为傲的那些创作规范…也许都是错的……
E: So, I began to waver. Could it be that what we call "anime" in Tokiwa had long-since degraded to become a boring set of tropes, and those standards that we once held so proudly... could be incorrect...?

C: 糟糕？那倒不至于，他们都是很优秀的年轻人。只是…我和我的学生们，可能是相互折磨的典范。
E: Bad? They're not. They're all excellent young people. It's just that... my students and I may be the epitome of mutual torment.

C: 本酒店套房为多层密闭结构，每间套房内包含一个独立的会客厅，全天候提供酒水、演奏等服务。
E: Our suites feature multi-story and well-sealed structures. Each suite contains a separate parlor and provides <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7 drink and performance service.

C: 尊敬的宾客，欢迎来到「白日梦」酒店。请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
E: Welcome to The Reverie, dear guest. How may I assist you?

C: 嗯…朗姆和苏打、酸橙、薄荷与糖砂，在那位著名龙裔巡海游侠的方子上做些小小的改良，就成了一杯独属于您的「{RUBY_B#莫吉托}星间旅人{RUBY_E#}」。
E: Well, this recipe is improved based on that famous Galaxy Ranger's recipe... rum, soda, lime, mint, and a touch of sugar, and you will get the unique mix: {RUBY_B#Mojito}Galactic Voyager{RUBY_E#}.

C: 如果您或同伴遭遇任何危险情况，请及时联系我或者附近的猎犬。
E: If you or your companions find yourselves in a dangerous situation, please reach out to me or any nearby Bloodhounds.

C: 停！不用再说了，这位客人，我已经充分了解您的意思了……
E: Please stop! I believe I fully understand what you mean, esteemed guest...

C: 他们说的「谐乐大典」是什么？
E: What is the Charmony Festival?

C: 希儿，别……
E: Seele, don't...

C: 哦，这样啊…那你咋不早说？那行，我就先不动它了，到时候你自己想办法搬……
E: I see... Why didn't you mention it earlier? Fine, I'll leave it alone for now, and you'll move it yourself...

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 这位客人，您这件衣服是不是很久没有换过了？
E: Hi, have you been wearing this outfit for quite some time?

C: 啊，亲爱的主人。从此刻起，我的全部都将只属于你。
E: Oh, my dear owner. I'll belong exclusively to you from now on.

C: 豪华飞车（出租款）
E: Luxury Speedster (Cab)

C: 后面的词是啥来着，怎么搞忘了。
E: What's the rest of my lines again? It's slipped my mind.

C: （一口吃掉）
E: (Eat it in one bite)

C: 有问题先憋着，提前剧透可不是什么好习惯。
E: Keep those questions to yourself for now. I don't want to give any spoilers.

C: 这卡有什么用？
E: What can I do with this card?

C: 欢迎光临美梦小镇主题餐厅，请问有什么需要的吗？
E: Welcome to the Dreamville theme restaurant. How can I help you?

C: 难道说…您是那位大人的客人吗！他最近确实秘密接待了一些客人……
E: Could it be... You are a guest of the Master himself! He has indeed been receiving a number of guests in secret recently...

C: 我有一些疑惑。
E: There are some things I am confused about.

C: 你被迫听了许多不可告人的秘密八卦。希望这些故事中的当事人不会因此来找你麻烦。
E: You are forced to listen to loads of secret gossip that you cannot share with anyone. Let's hope that the people implicated in these stories don't come to find you and settle the score later!

C: 为了奖励，我不择手段。
E: I have employed clandestine means for rewards.

C: 实际上，我并不能恳请祂与我等同在。但我愿意倾听你的话语。
E: Truthfully, I cannot plead with THEM to stoop down to our level. But I am willing to listen to your words.

C: 你好啊，我是艾薇拉，《钟表小子》系列动画的忠实粉丝，也是在这里帮工的志愿者。
E: Greetings, I am Elvira, a loyal fan of the Clockie cartoon series, and also a volunteer here.

C: 你是哈努兄弟的粉丝？
E: Are you a fan of Hanu?

C: 我们都自顾自地沉浸在自己的领域里，自顾自地想要证明自己才是正确的那一个。只不过这一切如今早已没有了意义……
E: We were both obsessed with our fields, trying hard to prove that we were the right one. However, this fight had long lost its meaning...

C: 数种情绪在短短一瞬间划过里奥的脸颊。最终，他仿佛大梦初醒般露出了一抹微笑。
E: Several different emotions flicker across Leo's face in a short time. In the end, he breaks into a faint smile as if he's just woken up from a dream.

C: 哦对，你应该还不知道我「机动骑士」亨德列克的名号……
E: Right, I think you have never heard of me. I'm Hendrick the Mobile Knight.

C: 我怎么看不见？
E: Why can't I see anything?

C: 想问什么尽管问！要说我对这片儿多熟悉——就连艾迪恩公园的地砖有多少块我都一清二楚！
E: Ask whatever you like! To say I know a lot about this place is an understatement... I could even tell you how many floor tiles there are in Aideen Park!

C: 然而——可恶的石头老板觊觎着建造小镇的石料，那个大坏蛋竟然自称是小镇主人的后代，想把大家都赶出去，滴答！
E: However... The evil Boss Stone covets the stones that we used to build our town. That villain even claims that he is the town master's successor and wants to force us all out of here, tick-tock!

C: 无论是否喜欢匹诺康尼，这里都是我无法离开的地方……
E: Whether you like Penacony or not, this is a place that I just can't leave.

C: 造型古典的艺术钟，出现在餐桌上也毫无违和感。
E: The classically-designed art clock looks completely out of place on the dinner table.

C: 呜呜…对不起，我不该动这种歪心思，我会做个乖孩子的，真的，要不…信我一次？
E: Waaa... I'm sorry! I shouldn't think such wicked thoughts! I'll be good, I promise! How about... you trust me just this once?

C: 会…吧？有什么不这么做的理由吗？我可没无聊到以欺负这些小东西为乐。
E: I will... perhaps? I mean, why not? I'm not so bored that I find pleasure in bullying those little creatures.

C: 度假，旅游，约会，享受生活，追杀会飞的皮皮西…哪条比较可信？
E: Resorts, travel, dates, enjoying life, or hunting down a Pepeshi who can fly... Which one is more believable?

C: 来聊聊犯事的家伙们吧。正好，前段日子抓了个筑梦师，足够作为谈资。
E: Let's chat about some people who've committed crimes. It just so happens a Dreamweaver got arrested a few days ago. That should be a decent topic of conversation.

C: 谁又能想到，美梦竟如此令人失望……
E: But who knew that Dreamscapes would be such a disappointment...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 好吧，我不深究了。
E: Alright. That's enough for me.

C: 最近莫名其妙出现的人有点多，我得提防点，要是混进来几只猎犬就麻烦了。流梦礁里都是群想过安静生活的人，不愿意被外面那些破事打扰。
E: There have been a lot of people appearing out of nowhere here lately, I need to keep my guard up. I can't afford to have the Bloodhounds finding their way in here. The Dreamflux Reef is a place full of people who just want to live a peaceful life. They don't want to be disturbed by the chaos of the outside world.

C: ——统一回复：不会，我根本不知道这是啥！
E: ...My straight response: No, I don't even know what it is!

C: 我要告诉塔利亚的那帮人，「盗贼公国」的理想还没有破灭！
E: I want to let the gang back in Talia know that the Kingdom of Banditry's ideals have not been extinguished!

C: 不过，要说会主动留在这里的家伙，到底都是些勇敢的人——毕竟，这种原始的梦境里可没有家族「不会发生危险」的承诺。
E: I have to say, the people who are actively choosing to stay here are extremely brave... A Primordial Dreamscape like this doesn't have the same Family guarantee of "being free from danger," after all.

C: …但是除了几位无名客的衣冠冢外，我什么都没见到。难道它就是「钟表匠的遗产」？未免也太无聊了！
E: ...But I've not seen anything here besides the empty tombs of a few Nameless. Are they really the Watchmaker's Legacy? That's such an anticlimax...

C: 抱歉，扯远了…唉，好不容易才找到可以种地的梦境。这样的日子还能持续多久呢？
E: Sorry, I got carried away... Ah, I finally managed to find a Dreamscape that allows me to tend to my fields. How much longer can days like this continue?

C: 没想到泛银河市场里的星球基本都被开发了个遍，仅剩的几片净土也都是漫天要价的生态旅游区…只有在梦里，才能找到免费的处女地。
E: What I did not expect is that basically every planet in the pan-cosmic market has been completely developed, and the few remaining areas of untouched land are ecotourism areas with ridiculous prices... It's only inside a dream that I can find free, untouched land.

C: 临别之前，让我们为美梦小镇加油吧！
E: Before you leave, let's cheer for Dreamville!

C: 还在筹建之中，真是让人烦恼啊…最紧缺还是资金，以及投资人的信心。
E: It's still in the pipeline, which is a real pain... What we're lacking now is funding and the confidence of the investors.

C: 不过，最近有像你这样的新面孔来到了流梦礁，他们对这里感兴趣，愿意和这里的人们交流。
E: But there are new faces like you who have recently arrived at the Dreamflux Reef. They are interested in this place and willing to interact with the people here.

C: 但我写下的史书却被放在匹诺康尼大图书馆的最底层，被小说、漫画、同谐颂歌和致富秘诀掩盖…但在杜撰的繁荣外，我们还能在这片原始的梦里铭刻真实。
E: Unfortunately, the history books I've authored now rest at the bottom of the Penacony Grand Library, overshadowed by novels, manga, odes to Harmony, and guides on how to get rich quick... However, amidst the facade of prosperity, we can still etch the truth in this primordial dream.

C: 当然，我只是在骗他们，学派不允许篡改历史。可他们不知道啊，就一个个老老实实地坐下来，在我面前装出一副无辜的样子。
E: Of course, I was only bluffing. The Candelagraphos doesn't allow us to modify history. But how would they know? And so, they obediently sat down and acted innocent in front of me.

C: 这地方不赖吧？既没有家族甜言蜜语的蛊惑，也没有四处巡逻的猎犬。
E: Isn't this a great place? Neither The Family's bewitching sweet talk nor the patrolling hounds are around.

C: 不过那时候店里只有我一个，我时不时为人们演奏、偶尔录制些唱片，为拓荒者们单调的生活增添些许调剂。
E: But back then, I was the only one in the store. I'd often perform for people, and sometimes I'd cut a few records — always adding a little spice to shake up the boring lives of the settlers.

C: 咆哮先生歌喉奔放粗犷，呐喊出的乐音震人心弦，就同它的外貌那般狂野不羁——但你要照顾好他那几根总是断掉的弦；
E: Mr. Growl's voice is rough and bold, and his bellows are every bit as wild as his appearance — just take care to avoid his constantly-breaking strings.

C: 那时的梦境蛮荒而原始，那时的人们豪放粗犷、无拘无束。我和我的伙伴、我的太阳——阿斯娜，就相识于彼时此地。
E: Back then, the Dreamscapes were wild and primitive. The people were bold and savage, too — completely unhinged. It was then and there that I first met my partner, the sun around whom my everything orbits: Asna.

C: 让我看看，还有哪个倒霉蛋没被抓到呢……
E: Let's see which unlucky fella hasn't been caught yet...

C: 这是来自折纸小鸟的「谢礼」。拿好，慢走不送。
E: This is a gift from the origami birds. Take it, and don't let me keep you.

C: 等找到它了再来吧，啾啾。
E: Come back again when you find it, tweet tweet.

C: 嘿呀！你居然真把它们都抓回来了，本鸟今天甘拜下风啾。
E: Hee-ya! You really caught them all! I concede to your greatness today, tweet.

C: 你自己去。
E: Go do it yourself.

C: 我就知道，客官您不会丢下人家不管的，这就是故事里的英雄救美啾。
E: I knew it! You wouldn't abandon me in the time of need. You're like my knight in shining armor in the stories, tweet.

C: 哈哈，见笑了。不过面对如此瑰丽奇景，我难免有些心绪澎湃……
E: Haha, I must sound ridiculous. It's only natural that one's emotions would be stirred when overwhelmed by such a resplendent view...

C: 它们起初就像这梦境一样荒芜索瑟，但只要精心雕琢、悉心教养，终究能够变作流光溢彩的美梦。
E: They start out barren and empty like this Dreamscape, but with meticulous carving and careful nurturing, they will one day become a beautiful dream of kaleidoscopic lights.

C: 宾客朝欢暮乐，逐梦客只知名利，我们家徒也都只是沉浸于狂信和愚忠…没人会在意那些已经逝去的人与事，所以不如就配合这场狂欢，讲荒诞的故事。
E: The guests revel in joys from dusk till dawn and dreamchasers only chase after fame. Even Family members like us only have ears for the fanatical faith, pledging ourselves with foolish loyalty... No one cares for the people and the matters that are buried with the dead. So, why not join the crowd in this carnival and narrate the stories of absurdity?

C: 就仿佛…在对方眼中，你只是个尚不完美的半成品。
E: As though... you are but an imperfect work in his eyes.

C: 她曾是名混沌医师，却最终因为「虚无」的侵蚀成为了自灭者。
E: Even though she used to be a member of the Doctors of Chaos, she ultimately became a Self-Annihilator due to the corrosion of the Nihility.

C: 我只是个忠实的记录者，记录万物毁坏湮灭那一刻所绽放出的「美」。
E: I am but a faithful record keeper who captures the moments of "beauty" that are born from the destruction and obliteration of all things.

C: 并且，小心翼翼地藏在口袋里，等待之后送给友人。
E: I'd carefully tuck the shell away in my pocket so I can give it to a friend as a gift later.

C: 但他们谁更重要，现在我倒是完全无法分清了。
E: Which joy is more important? I admit I can't tell the difference anymore.

C: 而不安，就是我这种人的财路。
E: And uncertainty is how we make money in this profession.

C: 总之，忆域的性质想必不用我再复述了吧？
E: You already know the nature of the Memory Zone, right?

C: 切开是漂亮的粉红色，长时间的静置让牛排锁满肉汁。火候完美，入口嫩如吞拿鱼腹的细致，不会有牛肉的纹理，轻轻咀嚼便融化。唇齿间的香味令你着迷。
E: "Upon slicing, it reveals a gorgeous pink hue. Let it rest to unlock incomparable juiciness. Its tenderness compares to tuna belly, effortlessly melting away, leaving behind a lingering enticing aroma."

C: 我好想你们……
E: I miss you lot so much...

C: 也不是说自己有多重要啦…恰恰相反，正是因为自己根本无足轻重，才不能消失太久。不然要是等到领导发现你的消失根本没什么影响，那就彻底完蛋了。
E: I don't mean that I'm very important... Rather, because I'm replaceable, I can't disappear for too long. If my boss sees that my absence makes no difference, I'm done for!

C: 美梦终究是要醒来的。
E: All dreams, however sweet, have to end at some point.

C: 在这个世界上，只有聪明人才能生存下来，而我，无疑是其中之一。
E: In this world, only the smart survive, and I am undoubtedly one of them.

C: 做生意不懂人情世故？那还做什么生意！我都暗示得这么明显了还不懂…那就不能怪我老人家不留情面了！
E: If they don't get the ways of the world, they're not cut out for business! I've dropped plenty of hints, and they still haven't caught on! Don't blame me for being ruthless, then!

C: 别想套我话，我可不想惹上什么麻烦。
E: Don't try to trick me into revealing anything. I don't want to get into trouble.

C: 啾~人家好担心孩子们在外面闯祸，客官快把它们带回来吧！啾啾！
E: Tweet~ I'm afraid that the kids will get in trouble out there. Can you please bring them back quickly! Tweet!

C: 好的，汪。那下次再聊，汪！
E: Alright, woof. Let's talk another time, woof!

C: 我很抱歉，我只是个售货员，实在没有这个权利……
E: I'm really sorry, but I don't hold much authority as a mere salesperson...

C: 如果船长您还有什么需要…我就在这儿值班，随时喊我就好！
E: I'm on duty here, so just call for me if you need anything else, Captain!

C: 还说什么「天价周边」「不实用」…这可是空艇诶？运输成本不要钱吗？买周边什么时候要考虑实用了，这不都是纪念品吗？！
E: They find our merchandise overpriced and impractical... But hello? We're on an airship! Do they think shipping is free!? And when has practicality ever been a consideration when purchasing collectibles? Aren't they meant to be souvenirs!?

C: 上次那个来找我调饮的叫什么来着？…杰克？好像就是哪家唱片公司的老总？不知道找他签约分成能不能高点……
E: The guy that ordered a drink a while ago? What's his name? Jack? He seems to be the CEO of a record label. Will he give me a good cut if I sign with him...?

C: 是的，经过我的严格筛选，我将他从一家餐厅的后厨招了进来。尽管过往经验不匹配，但他的天赋很好，我相信他很快就会成为我们不可或缺的一员。
E: Yes, after a strict screening process, I recruited him from the kitchen of a restaurant. Although he doesn't have the required experience, he's a gifted one. I am certain he will soon become an indispensable member of our team.

C: 船长，看您的表情，是有什么疑惑，请问吧，我很乐意为您解答。
E: Captain, your expression tells me that you have a question. Ask away, I'm more than happy to answer it.

C: 以及…命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
E: And... The Soaring Clock Hand, which features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.

C: 机械侍者不知道自己还能记住几句话——因为记住这件事，也会占掉一句话的空间。
E: The mechanical attendant does not know how much more she can remember — because even remembering that would take up memory.
Me!!!

C: 「随着第<unbreak>550</unbreak>届梦境大学生球笼竞速预选赛落幕，折纸大学终于迎来了历史上第一位皮皮西首席车手。」
E: "As the <unbreak>550</unbreak>th Dreamscape Collegiate Spheroid Race Qualifiers come to an end, Paperfold University finally welcomes their first ever Pepeshi lead driver in history."

C: 学校不管吗？
E: Does the school not care?

C: 谁知最近走了大运，有几个前辈的脱口秀反响很好，梦泡都卖光了。连匹诺康尼电视台都闻声赶来，想跟我们签优先购买协议。
E: Unexpectedly, we had a recent stroke of luck with a few of our seniors received a great reception on their stand-up shows, and our dream bubbles sold out. Even the Penacony TV Station came running to us hoping to sign a priority purchase agreement.

C: 你平时都在忙些什么？
E: What do you usually do?

C: 我的水平是不太够，但技术可以提升，最重要的…是迈出第一步的勇气。
E: I may lack skill, but technique can be honed. Most importantly... it's the courage to take that first step.

C: 谢谢。要是有机会，我会邀请经理、还有乐队的各位成员来观看的。
E: Thank you. If I get the chance, I will invite you and the bandmates to watch me.

C: 正如知更鸟小姐所说，苜蓿草家系撤销了他的学院代表职务。他的渎职行为对学校声誉造成了极大影响，不可能继续在校内任职。
E: It is just as Miss Robin said, the Alfalfa Family has rescinded his academy representative role. His irresponsible behavior has greatly sullied the academy's repute, and will no longer be able to hold his post.

C: 那当然！
E: And I'm pretty good at it!

C: 关于财富学院代表…
E: About the Fortune Academy representative...

C: 因为你是大名鼎鼎的旁听生啊，在同学间很有人气，长得{F#漂亮}{M#帅气}不说， 性格又好，大家都很喜欢你，我想沾沾光嘛。
E: Because you're the renowned guest student! You're famous among the students. You're not just {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, you also have a great personality and everyone loves you. I just want to share in your spotlight too.

C: 唉，也不怕大佬笑话，因为之前我一心只想搞钱，都没怎么和班级里的同学来往。有些人见我学业一团糟，连带着也远离我。
E: *sigh* I'm not afraid of you laughing at me, but because I was so focused on making money, I hardly interacted with my classmates. Some of them saw that my grades were horrible and they kept their distance from me.

C: 可是…我浪费了这么多胶卷，也浪费了大家很多时间，他肯定很生气吧……
E: But... I've wasted so much film, and everyone's time too. He must be really mad...

C: 无论是哪种可能，都意味着…我的人生必须由我自己想清楚，就像甜品师一定要想清楚手下甜品的味道一样——这样想来，我的人生也是自己的甜品呢。
E: No matter the possibility, it all means... that I have to carefully consider how I want to live my life, just like a dessert chef must be clear about how their dessert tastes — when I think of it this way, it sounds like my life is also my own dessert.

C: 我这里还有一个非常古老的笑话，出自过去一位非常糟糕的无名客。这个笑话是这样的——
E: I have a very old joke here from a past, rather terrible Nameless. It goes like this...

C: 一无所知，甚至连名字都未曾听闻。
E: Nothing, I've not even heard of the name.

C: 想了解目的地吗？是哪些方面呢？
E: You want to know about the destination? What would you like to know?

C: 聊聊其他事…
E: Talk about something else...

C: 在寂静中沉思的人偶，未知谜题终得到解答。
E: A puppet contemplating in silence. The unknown puzzle is finally answered.

C: 一扇被糖浆紧紧黏住的门，无法被外力打开。
E: The door is stuck because of a syrupy substance. It cannot be opened.

C: 这位是酸辣口味的汽水，诞生于一场噩梦；这位汽水能把吐出来的气再吸回去；这位更是重量级，联名了仙舟特色的苏打豆汁。
E: This is a soda with a spicy and sour flavor. Created from a nightmare, this soda can draw back gas that was already expelled. This one is even stronger, for it contains elements of the Xianzhou specialty: Mung bean soda.

C: 一切好似命运的悄然安排，你途径此处、你驻足、你沉浸于歌声化作的月光粼粼的海。
E: Everything seems to be quietly falling into place as if ordered by fate. You pass by here, you linger for a while, and you lose yourself in the luminescent moonlit ocean that songs have transformed into.

C: 抱歉，我下次注意。
E: Sorry, I'll be mindful in the future.

C: 该不会是在骗我吧？
E: Are you pulling my leg?

C: 对减重会有效果吗？
E: Could I lose weight?

C: 怎么都想不到好点子。
E: I can't think of any good ideas.

C: 人家就是放心不下嘛…
E: But I just can't stop thinking about her...

C: 走过路过不要错过~
E: Don't miss out!

C: 哎哟，怎么过不去？
E: Why the heck can't I get through?

C: 我还是更喜欢苏乐达。
E: I prefer SoulGlad myself.

C: 这里其实很危险啊！
E: This place is actually quite dangerous!

C: 要是有工具就好了。
E: If only I had the right tools for the job.

C: 就你那小身板，连水面都挨不到。到时候溺水了可别指望我来捞你。
E: With that tiny body of yours, you won't even reach the surface. Don't expect me to rescue you if you drown.

C: 我想不通、想不通啊！
E: I can't figure it out! I just can't!

C: 被打开的宝箱…就像被喝光的苏乐达瓶，只会从梦境里消失……
E: Just like an empty SoulGlad bottle... An opened chest will vanish from the Dreamscape...

C: 在这里可以随意拍照…
E: You can take as many pictures as you like here...

C: 显然不是我的问题。
E: I'm very evidently not the problem here.

C: 这次的盛会巨星肯定是她！这脸一看就是巨星！
E: I bet she'll be the Festive Superstar this time! She's got that superstar look!

C: 这下全泡汤了，你今天必须得给我个解释不可！
E: It's all over! You owe me an explanation right now!

C: 都怪你们两个拖油瓶，连最基本的台词都接不住，如果我一个人上，盛会巨星还轮得到那些人？
E: You two are nothing but burdens. You couldn't even handle a couple of the most basic lines. Do you think anyone else would even have a shot at being the Festive Superstar if I were to take the stage alone?

C: 当然是决赛——我没有内场票所以看的直播，但全程还是激动地直抖腿。
E: The finals, of course. I had to watch the livestream because I couldn't get tickets, but even then, the entire round got me gripping the edge of my seat.

C: 橡木家系那群冥顽不灵的东西，我巴不得他们从天上掉下来。
E: Those pigheaded Oak Family members, I pray they fall out of the sky.

C: 来了也正常，毕竟匹诺康尼的名头这么响，大把人甩着信用点想入场分一杯羹呢。
E: That's normal anyway. I mean, Penacony's pretty famous. Plenty of folks heavy on credits want a piece of the action here.

C: 咦，你们不是说会有个展会吗？展品呢？展品还没送到吗？
E: Huh, didn't you say there would be an exhibition? Where are the exhibits? Have they not been delivered yet?

C: 有什么不可能的！我上次还听说有人在垃圾桶旁边看到怪物呢……
E: Anything is possible! I've even heard someone say that they saw a monster beside the trash can...

C: 晖长石号都启航了…
E: The Radiant Feldspar has already set off...

C: 晖长石号真的改名了。
E: The Radiant Feldspar actually changed its name.

C: 我不管，这就是命中注定的！
E: I don't care. This is definitely destiny!

C: 我刚才做了个噩梦……
E: I had a nightmare just now...

C: 我还想玩嘛！
E: I still want to play!

C: 今天运气真背…
E: So unlucky today...

C: 目前还在搜查中……
E: We're still searching for them...

C: 这种小事你们都办不到吗？
E: You all can't even handle such trifles?

C: 你听见了某位教师暴躁的怒吼声，责骂着学生为何跟不上自己的节奏。说真的，你不明白为何这种老师还能在学院里任教。
E: You hear the irate barking of some teacher, berating students for not keeping pace. Honestly, you don't know how such teachers are still employed in the academy.

C: 许多琥珀纪过去了，《钟表小子》系列动画依旧是匹诺康尼不衰的经典。或许它就像折纸大学曾经的辉煌，永远在人们心中。
E: Many Amber Eras have passed, but the Clockie cartoon series remains an undying classic on Penacony. Perhaps it's no different from Paperfold University's glory days, forever shining in people's hearts.

C: 这盆花的花期只有一天，但原产地的「一天」约等于开拓历的「十年」。你至今没有见到过它们凋谢的样子。
E: This flower blooms for just one day, but in its homeland, a "day" lasts about ten years by our Trailblaze Calendar. You've never seen it wither.

C: 「闭嘴」精心编排的特调饮品单，上面写满了冷笑话。
E: The special drink menu, meticulously arranged by Shush, is packed with dry jokes.

C: 你忽然听见了震耳欲聋的咆哮声，随后一个皮皮西学生被赶到了走廊上。
E: You suddenly hear an ear-splitting bellow, which is followed by a Pepeshi student being thrown out into the corridor.

C: 天呐，那不是盛会巨星嘛？到底是犯了什么错，居然被老师赶出来罚站。
E: My goodness, isn't that the Festive Superstar? What did {F#she}{M#he} do to be sent out to stand in the corridor?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now I understand.

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 热乎乎的炖菜做好了，快来尝尝。尼克？又在给波提欧讲那些牛仔故事啦？
E: The steamed veg is ready. Try it while it's hot. Nick? You telling Boothill those cowboy tales again?

C: 哼哼！哼哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink oink!

C: 你开始装修房间后，这只扑满也随即拓展了自己的探索范围。如今它在你的房间里漫步，好奇地嗅着每一个角落。
E: After you started redecorating your room, this trotter also expanded its exploratory range. Now it wanders around your room, curiously sniffing every corner.

C: 只有收到邀请函的客人才能进入你的私人空间！
E: Only guests with an invitation can enter your private space!

C: 我们离开奥赫玛吧…
E: Let's leave Okhema...

C: 除了陶罐，我这儿还卖四处寻来的奇珍古玩，也是我的心头好，看到感兴趣的请和我讲。
E: Apart from the Dolia, I also offer a range of ancient artifacts I've gathered from all over. If anything piques your interest, just let me know.

C: 只有伏尔甘，他看到的始终是真正的那部分「我」——他总是乐意倾听我的想法、尊重我的意愿、理解我的追求，简直就是「灵魂伴侣」！
E: But only Vulcan sees the real me. He always hears me out, values my thoughts, and supports my ambitions. He's simply my soul mate!

C: 那么再见~有需要的话，欢迎随时光临哦。
E: Catch you later! Drop by anytime if you need a hand with anything.

C: 蜜果羹。
E: Fig stew.

C: 甜汤的用料非常丰富，各种豆子、葡萄干、芋头块，还有最重要的——奶浆果冻。
E: This sweet stew is a mix of various ingredients like beans, raisins, yam chunks, and the star of the show: Milkberry jelly.

C: 被训了？
E: Got told off?

C: 之后，就算认识了，不会拦你。
E: Now that we know each other, I won't stop you in the future anymore.

C: 讲讲守城的故事？
E: How about sharing some stories about guarding the city?

C: 对于那些笃信泰坦的人来说，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}无疑是最可怕的神明。人们说祂催生黑潮，要把毁灭带给{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: For devout disciples of the Titans, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is definitely a horrifying deity. They believe they are the mastermind behind the black tide, destined to bring catastrophe upon {RUBY_B#the world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}.

C: 打扰了，再见。
E: See you next time.

C: 逐火苦旅尚未停歇，我等岂可止步后退
E: Our Flame-Chase Journey goes on. We must not falter.

C: 悬锋人中的悬锋人，万敌！
E: The most typical of the Kremnoans, Mydei!

C: 那就是看*我们*的发型！具体怎么辨别，*我们*就不多说啦，小灰眼睛那么尖，一定能发现的！
E: Look at our hairstyles! You're observant so we don't need to explain in too much detail. We know you'll see the difference in no time!

C: 现在松懈还太早，仍有纷争的眷属在世间徘徊，黑潮也仍在肆虐。只有当战争的目的一并消弭，真正的安宁才能够降临。
E: It is too early to be so complacent. Titankin of Strife still roam this world, and the black tide rages on. Only when the true purpose of war is eradicated can peace descend.

C: 为什么不是你去尼卡多利的试炼？
E: Why are you not taking the trial of Nikador?

C: 你还好吗？需要帮助吗？
E: Are you okay? Do you need help?

C: 你想聊什么？这里的人不太信任我，很少有人愿意听我絮叨。
E: What would you like to chat about? The people here don't really trust me. Very few people are willing to listen to my ramblings.

C: 但只要喝下那杯「法吉娜的祝福」，我就能镇定下来。我猜每个人都有自己的恐惧，想必你也不例外。你呢，你找到你那自己那杯「法吉娜的祝福」了吗？
E: But, if I drink that "blessing of Phagousa," I am able to calm myself down. I imagine everyone has things that they fear. I'm sure you are no different. What about you? Have you found your own "blessing of Phagousa"?

C: 我信阿基维利。
E: I believe in Akivili.

C: 哦，你在意这个啊，放心放心——老婆子我给人占卜这么多年了，就算适当跳过些无关紧要的仪式流程，也完全不会影响结果的！
E: Oh, you really care about that, do you? Don't worry — this ol' granny has been telling fortunes so many years now that even if I skip over a few trivial ceremonial aspects, it doesn't affect the overall result!

C: 只是实话实说而已——大家来占卜不都是为了求个安心吗…嚯，不会真的有人觉得只要知道了一些未来的片段，就能完全把握自己的人生吧？
E: I'm simply telling the truth — don't people come to a diviner in the hope of comfort? Hah, you don't think there are actually people out there who think they can have full control of their lives just by knowing some fragments about the future, do you?

C: 我就说吧，再和我耗下去可就走不了喽…哎呦，今天天气可真不错，不如就去找艾犹卜那老家伙……
E: What did I say? If you continue wasting time here, you won't be walking away... Ah, what lovely weather we're having today. Maybe I should go and see old Albus...

C: 也就是到了前年，因为走路不小心摔了一跤，被迫在床上养了大半年…他这才发现，就算自己的店铺关门了，对街坊们也产生不了多少影响。
E: It was the year before last, he was careless and took a fall which put him in bed for half a year... Only then did he realize that closing up his shop didn't really create much impact on his neighbors.

C: 没关系，等你对大地兽感兴趣的时候再来找我吧，毕竟我的生活就是这么枯燥，除了大地兽就是大地兽，也没什么别的可聊的了。
E: That's fine. Come find me if you're ever interested in dromases. After all, my life is really bland, and I've got a one-track mind when it comes to dromases. There's not much else for me to chat about.

C: 悬锋伙友是悬锋城最精锐的士兵。我们拥有整座城邦最好的武器和最严整的军纪，直接对欧利庞王负责，其他士兵也以我们为榜样。
E: The Kremnos vanguard are the most elite soldiers in Castrum Kremnos. We possess the finest weapons and most stringent military discipline in all the city, and are led directly by King Eurypon. Other soldiers hold us in the highest regard.

C: 和我讲讲克拉特鲁斯。
E: Tell me about Krateros.

C: 在战场上，懂得协作的战士远比孤军奋战的莽夫有用。回去吧，你不配在悬锋的光辉下献身。
E: On the battlefield, warriors who can work together are far more useful than solitary brutes. Go back. You are not worthy of sacrificing yourself under the radiance of Kremnos.

C: 说什么呢？
E: What are you even saying?

C: 没事，观摩一下工匠精神。
E: It's all right. I was just admiring your craft.

C: 他为何在此，你说不清。他邀请你骑上宽厚的背，你们游遍了奥赫玛的每个角落，你们笑语欢声，度过了难忘的一天……
E: Why he is here, you cannot say. He invites you to ride atop his broad back, and you journey to every corner of Okhema, spending an unforgettable day peppered with laughter...

C: 我名为帕西提亚，是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司。换言之，我曾是雅努斯的圣女。
E: I am Pasithea, priestess of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}. In other words, I was once the Holy Maiden of Janus.

C: 你是个幸运的孩子。幸运，亦即安宁。或许你会觉得今天有些无聊，但是……
E: You are a lucky child. Luck denotes peace. Perhaps you may find today humdrum, but...
