C: 就到这里吧，智者连续两次驳倒了我的论证，无话可说，确实是位厉害的辩论家。以后还请多与我们交流你的观点。
E: Let us leave the argument here for now. You have successfully rebuked my arguments twice in a row now, wise one. I have no choice but to admit that you are a great debater. I hope that you will continue to share your perspectives with us in the future.

C: 那是当然，我可以自豪地说，我们家的大地兽，吃得比我好！
E: Absolutely! I can proudly say dromases eat better than I do!

C: 不打扰你啦，「主厨」！
E: I won't keep you any longer, Chef!

C: 那不是当然的吗？无敌又帅气，既是悬锋城的王储，也是奥赫玛的救星……
E: Isn't that obvious? He's invincible and dashing, not only the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos but also the savior of Okhema...

C: 备用食物都是临期快要腐烂的就不说了，就连医疗包都是边角料凑出来的次品——显然就是出了内鬼嘛。
E: The backup food was all near expiry and about to spoil, and the medical kits were put together from leftover scraps — clearly, there was an inside job.

C: 诶，遵从既定事实怎么能算乐观呢？
E: Huh? How can following established facts be considered optimism?

C: …其实我家被瓶罐堆满了，这也是我天天来浴场泡着的理由…之一。
E: Actually, my house is full of bottles and jars. That's one of the reasons I come to the bath every day...

C: 这些不是卷轴吗？
E: Aren't these scrolls?

C: 嗯…迟迟不肯离去，是还有什么好奇的吗？
E: Mm... You haven't left. Are you still curious about something?

C: 别看它们的体型小，但非常能干。性格温柔，做事情也认真，从来不会抱怨分配的工作，最近帮城里的人们解决了好多麻烦呢。
E: Don't be fooled by their small size. They're very capable. Gentle, but serious about their tasks, and never complain about their assigned work. They've helped solve many problems for the people in the city recently.

C: 请随便问吧，整个奥赫玛恐怕都找不到比我更了解它们的人了。
E: Ask away. I don't think there's anyone else in Okhema who knows more about them than me.

C: …老…呼…老师…我们已经、绕着云石天宫…跑了二…二十圈了……
E: ...S—Sir... Phew... We've—We've already done... t—twenty... laps around the... Marmoreal Palace...

C: 乐意效劳！那么首先，你了解「神悟树庭」吗？
E: Gladly! First, do you know about the Grove of Epiphany?

C: 你是树庭学者，都研究什么？
E: What are you researching as a Grove scholar?

C: 还有，我在研究如何通过解析欧洛尼斯的预言来预测黑潮走向。想象一下，如果成功了，我们就能知道哪里会被黑潮侵蚀，从而提前疏散民众！
E: Also, I am researching on how to forecast black tide movement by analyzing Oronyx's prophecies. If I succeed, we will know where the black tide will strike next, and evacuate the people in time!

C: 真正的悬锋战士就该痛饮鲜血！…不过像我这样的人没什么机会踏上战场，只能用蜜酿来替代了。
E: True Kremnos warriors should slake their thirst in blood! ...But for someone like me who'd never get a chance to step foot on the battlefield, I'll have to make do with this honey brew.

C: 再见，希望你也能愉快地度过每一天。
E: Goodbye, I hope you live every day with joy.

C: 你详细讲述了与其余木马相遇的经过，以及故事的最终结局。
E: You describe in great detail your encounter with the other wooden horses, including how the story ultimately ended.

C: 啊！差点忘了，我得给你汇报一下这次升级的新功能，这些是列车和空间站为你量身定制的——
E: Ah! I almost forgot I need to update you on the new features from this upgrade, tailored just for you by the Express and space station...

C: 切换为生活助理模式。
E: Switching to "Life Assistant" mode.

C: 「老师好，谢谢你教我的那些东西，虚拟世界的东西真的很精彩，只可惜，它的阴暗面也远超我的想象。」
E: "Hey teacher, thanks for all the insights. The virtual world is truly fascinating, but its darker side is more intense than I ever imagined."

C: 他应该很快就能退役了。
E: He should be retiring soon.

C: 是啊。不过，对老夫来说，来到这雅努斯之城的意义，也的确比平常人更多一层……
E: It sure is. Although, my visit here has far more meaning than the average man's.

C: 哈哈，我并不是祭司，很多东西也只是道听途说，讲得也不一定对。
E: Haha, I'm not a priest, so all I can tell you is what I have heard along my travels. There is no guarantee it is all true.

C: 阁下是从那些平民口中得知了有关红发圣女的事迹么？
E: I assume you have learned of the red-haired Holy Maiden from the common folk of Janusopolis?

C: 欧洛尼斯揭开遥远之处的帷幕，塔兰顿以天秤宣判尔等无罪，雅努斯指引如雾命运之迷津……
E: Oronyx lifts the distant veil, the scale of Talanton proclaims your innocence, and Janus guides those who are lost in the misty maze of destiny...

C: 不必拘谨啦，母亲从小教我的——要像圣女大人那样，有余力就去帮助别人。
E: No need for formality. My mom taught me from a young age to be like the Holy Maiden — always lend a hand whenever possible.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's the matter?

C: 那么，我就把阁下的这番话作为勉励吧。希望在不远的将来，阁下能在我身上看到更加可喜的改变。
E: Let me take your words as encouragement, then. I hope that in the near future, you'll see even more welcoming changes in me.

C: 属于他的命运，将在不远的未来，如同烈阳一般冉冉升起。
E: His destiny will rise like the blazing sun in the near future.

C: 无论哪位黄金裔，都是此世不可或缺的英杰。我其实也无权代替这个时代评判他们，因为他们都承载着这个世界的未来。
E: Every member of the Chrysos Heirs is a hero who this world cannot do without. Even I have no right to cast appraisal on them on behalf of this era, because they all shoulder the future of this world.

C: 圣城…大家都很喜欢这里。无论历经多少失却与离别，只要还能看见奥赫玛的昼光，未来就一定明亮。
E: The holy city... Everyone loves this place. No matter how much everyone loses or how many farewells everyone endures, as long as humanity can still see Okhema's daylight, the future will always be bright.

C: 彼岸…十分寒冷，也是人们口中的哀伤之地。
E: The shore across... is cold, and is also referred to as the land of sorrows.

C: 笑容很甜的风堇。
E: Hyacine, who has a really sweet smile.

C: 当然，还得靠您和我降低这里的平均年龄。聊点什么呢？
E: Of course, it's up to us to bring down the average age around here. So, what should we talk about?

C: 那么{NICKNAME}呢？
E: So, how about {NICKNAME}?

C: 不打扰你思考创意了。
E: Well, I'll leave you to your creation.

C: 那就把石板给我吧。
E: Now, give me your teleslate.

C: 现在你认识我了，用不了多久，你会崇拜我。哈哈哈。
E: But now that you do, you'll be worshiping me in no time. Bwahaha!

C: 刻法勒在上，愿我们都能在黑暗中找到前行的勇气……
E: By Kephale, may we all find the courage to move forward in the darkness...

C: 刻法勒在上，愿我们都能在黑暗中找到前行的勇气……
E: By Kephale, may we all find the courage to move forward in the darkness...

C: 俗话说，免费的东西是最贵的。你强行把手里的硬币还给了他。
E: The saying goes that free things come at the highest price. You forcibly return the coins to him.

C: 我看你的衣着太过保暖，想必是十分畏寒…虽无法想象你的过去有多么疾苦，但至少我可以提供帮助。这些利衡币你拿去，添置些需要的器物吧。
E: I noticed that you're dressed too warmly and imagined you must be sensitive to the cold... I can't imagine how difficult your past must have been, but at least I can offer some help. Take these Balance Coins and use them to buy whatever you need.

C: 但至少得努努力，不要露出太悲伤的表情吧。
E: But at the very least, I should try not to look too sad.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}你来啦？现在的我已经不再到处逃难了，奥赫玛就是我最后的家园，我想用自己的力量守护它。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're here. I don't wander as a refugee anymore – Okhema's my final home. I'll protect it with my own strength.

C: 思考。你有没想过，「再创世」已经发生多少次了？
E: Contemplating. Tell me, have you ever wondered how many times "Era Nova" has already happened?

C: 别忘了我的致谢词。
E: Don't forget to mention me in your speech.

C: 您现在对再创世怎么看？
E: What do you think of the Era Nova now?

C: （但…要是我能保护自己的话，姐姐就不会被欺负了，所以，拜托你。）
E: (But... if I could protect myself, that lady wouldn't have been bullied. So, please...)

C: 嗯…有位织者怀念过去，感时伤悲。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>对面不远的花丛中</color>。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who grows wistful with memories of the past. The golden thread brings tidings: They are lying in <color=#dbc291ff>a flower patch not far away</color>.

C: 有一只若虫正等着你将它唤回呢，请先去把它找回来吧。
E: A nymph is waiting for you to call it back. Please find it first.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 你之前说…是要去悬锋城，对吧？不知道那里离咱们的哀丽秘榭有多远？
E: You said... you're going to Castrum Kremnos, right? I wonder how far that is from our Aedes Elysiae?

C: 哈哈，我也不知道。听说悬锋城像大地兽一样，会慢慢到处走动呢。
E: Haha, no clue. I heard that Castrum Kremnos roams around slowly, just like a dromas.

C: 村长眯起老花眼，树荫底下笑眯眯~
E: Village chief, blinks and winks, smiling under shady trees~

C: 看看你的视线能否跟上我的速度嘤~
E: Let's see if your gaze can keep up with me, eep~

C: 搜索较远的一堆。
E: Search the farther pile.

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 过去…这该从哪里说起好呢…要是从头说起的话，我记得自己是出生在悬锋外城的一个无名部族……
E: Where to begin... If I start from the very beginning, I remember being born into an unknown tribe in the outskirts of Castrum Kremnos...

C: 啊，那我、我努努力……
E: Ah! I—I will t—try my best...

C: 烦心事？硬要说的话…和维吉妮娅走在一块儿的时候总是被大伙儿起哄，算是个烦恼吧。
E: Something on my mind? If I had to say something... Getting heckled by everyone when I'm walking beside Verginia is kind of an annoyance.

C: 总觉得你们餐馆的菜肴，和当年我尝到的味道比还差些火候，究竟差在哪里了迷？
E: Somehow, I still feel that the dishes from your restaurant fall just a little short of that flavor I remember. What exactly is missing, mem?

C: 我本应获得梦幻般的用餐时间才对。但是，为什么，会变成这样呢……
E: I should've had a magical dining experience. But why... why did it end up like this...

C: 不，瑟希斯首要推崇的一定是颜色搭配，或许参照{RUBY_B#花花草草}裂分神迹{RUBY_E#}会更合理。
E: No! I am certain that Cerces would place the most importance on color coordination. Maybe it would be best to reference the {RUBY_B#Plants and Flowers}Rift of Miracles{RUBY_E#}?

C: …呃…我这就给你再买……
E: ...Uh... I'll buy you another right now...

C: 我们扣握双手，向塞纳托斯颂祷，缘引他们迎来的，「第二次的逝亡」。
E: We clasp our fingers intertwined, singing hymns to Thanatos, to guard the fate they welcomed, "the second demise."

C: …所以祭司大人，您真的不考虑……
E: ...Lady Priestess, are you sure that you will not consider...

C: 你理解我？你一个小孩子家家能理解什么！我就不明白了，偌大一个奥赫玛竟然只有你一个司仪，这合理吗！
E: You understand how I'm feeling? What could a child possibly understand!? I don't get it. How can there be only one ceremonial officiant in a huge place like Okhema? It's just ridiculous!

C: 啊？！不是——别啊老师，我知道错了！
E: Huh!? No — Please, Sir, I was wrong!

C: 啊，伟大的化身，掌管命运的泰坦。请聆听人子的颂歌，将深邃带去长夜！
E: Ah, the great incarnation, Titans of Fate. Please listen to the song of the children of humanity, and bring depth to the long night!

C: 请你完成这一世的试炼，赐我以「死亡」的拥抱，点燃「生命」的火苗。
E: Complete your trial in this life. Grant me the embrace of "Death" and light the spark of "Life" ablaze.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜，嗷呜！
E: Awoo awoo, awoo!

C: 咕咕，老鸟主张寓教于乐，让孩子们在游戏与实践中学习——随着小鸟们逐渐成长，我会慢慢增添书面测验这种更加严谨的教学方式。
E: Hoot hoot, I advocate in learning through play, so the children study through games and practical tasks. As the birds grow, I will slowly add stringent educational methods like textbook tests.

C: 但…每次讲完，老师又会躲着大家，在一旁偷偷叹气，我们都发现了啾。
E: But... after finishing the story, he just avoids everyone again, hiding in a corner and sighing in secret. We've all noticed it, tweet.

C: 啾啾啾啾啾！！!
E: Tweet tweet tweet tweet tweet!!!

C: 星神密卷是什么？
E: What is the Mystic Scroll of Aeons?

C: 只可惜，我还没有正式完成对她的告白。
E: Unfortunately, I haven't officially confessed my love for her.

C: 哎呀，世玲真是最讨厌你这种刨根问底的新人啦！
E: Jeez, I hate newbies like you who always try to get to the bottom of everything!

C: 老板捡到宝了~
E: Boss picked up a good one~

C: 嗷呜…多亏丹恒大人将神悟树庭固定住，如今我们也重新有了立足之地。但仅仅有立足之地是不够的，我想出发，做点什么，就像荒笛大人那样……
E: Awoo... Thanks to Lord Dan Heng for stabilizing the Grove of Epiphany, we finally have a place to live again. But just having a foothold isn't enough. I want to set out and do something, just like Lord Terravox...

C: 你有足够的时间来停留思考。
E: You have enough time to stop and reflect.

C: 不对，你是谁，为什么会出现在这里？
E: Hold up, who are you and what are you doing here?

C: 错了，现在该向大地祈祷…
E: Wrong, now it's time to pray to the Earth...

C: 道谢的话算我一个！不过说起来…阿芙罗姐姐的追求者们也在「重逢」之列吗？
E: Count me in on the thanks! But come to think of it... are Aphrea's admirers also on the "reunion" list?

C: 两位卫兵阁下！想必你们对《大地兽赫拉克勒斯与十二试炼》合订版会感兴趣——
E: My dear guards! I'm sure you'd be interested in the bound edition of Twelve Labors of Dromas Heracles—

C: 忙碌许久，突然空下来，反而不知道该做什么好了，只能盯着云石天宫的瀑布发呆。
E: After being busy for so long, I don't even know what to do with myself now that I suddenly have free time. All I could do is just sit here staring blankly at the waterfall of Marmoreal Palace.

C: o((♥ω♥¯)o「我也爱你，给你一个豹抱——」)∋
E: o((♥ω♥¯)o "I love you too! Here's a seal hug!" )∋

C: 请务必好好珍藏——不如，就摆在你的床头吧？
E: Make sure to treasure it well. How about displaying it by your bedside?

C: 凯撒大人，你的皇冠后面…是不是粘上了什么东西？
E: Um, Great Imperator... I think there's something stuck on the back of your crown?

C: 看字迹，既不像阿格莱雅女士，也不像缇宝老师。唔，如果是蝶宝和万敌阁下的话，也不应该呀！他们和凯撒大人几乎从没正式见过面。
E: Judging by the handwriting, it's not Lady Aglaea or Lady Tribbie. Hmm, and it shouldn't be Cassie or Mydei! They've never formally met the Great Imperator.

C: 最有可能是飞宝？
E: So it's most likely Ciphie?

C: …真的好难猜啊！
E: It's a real mystery then!

C: 是逐火的大前辈和小后辈！
E: A great senior of the Flame-Chase and her lil' junior!

C: 无论棋手还是其他身份，凯撒的准则便是——要做就做到最好，我将成为这个领域的神明！
E: Whatever I undertake, be it chess or any other pursuits, my code is simple: be the best. I will become the standard by which all others are judged!

C: 呵，我都听到了。
E: Heh, I heard all of that.

C: 他们从认识起就剑拔弩张吗？
E: Have they been at each other's throats since they first met?

C: 奥赫玛可少不了你。
E: Okhema can't do without you.

C: 带上这盏水晶杯吧。每位曾和我并肩作战的伙伴，都有与我碰杯的资格。
E: Take this crystal chalice. Everyone who has fought by my side has earned the right to share a toast with me.

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，平和地炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and calmly refines them.

C: 有人称之为废墟，有人称之为囚牢。但我知道，这里不过是那位英雄内心的写照，我亦如此。
E: Some call it ruins, others call it a prison. But I know it's nothing more than a reflection of that hero's inner world. Mine as well.

C: （《粉霞天女历险记》？难道…我还在翁法罗斯？）
E: (Adventures of the Rosy Celestial Maiden? Could it be... am I still in Amphoreus?)

C: 没有没有，这是咱自己做的啦。
E: Nah, I made this myself!

C: 到底什么纪念物既能表达「开拓」，又契合你的风格——最后得出的结论就是它。
E: After considering what souvenir could represent both Trailblaze and match your style, this was the conclusion I reached.

C: 路上如果遇到了有趣的事情，不妨把它们记下来吧。以后会成为有趣的谈资喔。
E: You should record anything interesting you come across during your adventures. In the end, they might just become important points of conversation.

C: 关于银河…
E: About the galaxy...

C: 这根本是被精神控制了吧？
E: This is mind-control, right?

C: 等等…过程省略的也太多了吧？
E: Wait... You're missing lots of details, aren't you?

C: 老朋友…似乎听姬子提起过？
E: This old friend... I think Himeko mentioned them before.

C: 贝洛伯格有原始丛林？
E: Is there a jungle in Belobog?

C: （这就是谜题里提到的货架吧，该怎么操作呢…）
E: (This is the shelf mentioned in the riddle. But what should I do next...)

C: 尤利安拿回玻璃珠了吗？
E: Julian, did you get the glass marbles?

C: （两边的货架上的货箱好像是可以移动的……）
E: (The crates on the shelves on both sides seem to be movable...)

C: 啥？安东尼娜让你来的？
E: What? Antonia sent you here?

C: 嚯，你这{M#小子}{F#小姑娘}不简单啊！能搞定这个问题的话，基本可以在矿场里负责些简单的调度工作了。
E: Oho, nicely done {M#lad}{F#young lady}! If you can handle this, you can take care of some simple coordinating duties in the mine.

C: 嗯？来得挺巧啊。我这就把矿车谜题的场地布置好，你来给这臭小子演示一下！
E: Hmm? Good timing. I've set up the puzzle already. Show the kid how it's done!

C: 今天这道题可有点难度，让我看看你学到了我几成功力吧。
E: Today's puzzle could be difficult, show me how much you have learned.

C: 滴答！我觉得…自己也没有那么差，说不定我能做好这份工作！
E: Tick-tock! I think... I'm not that bad myself! Who knows, I might be able to do this job well!

C: 屈服吧，你是战胜不了我的！
E: Abandon all hope, you cannot hope to win against me!

C: 只要能赶上我交报告的死线…啊，不是，没什么，请您不要有压力……
E: So long as I can meet the deadline for my report... Ah, it's no big deal. Please don't feel pressured...

C: 监控室中央放着一台平平无奇的电脑……
E: There's an ordinary computer terminal in the middle of the monitoring room...

C: 为什么是《太空大战争》？
E: Why's it called Cosmic Warfare?

C: …啊，对了，你把这个拿上：我们之前约定稿费现结，这是货款。他要是画完了，你就直接把钱交给他吧。
E: ...Oh yeah, take this. We've agreed to settle things in cash, and here's the money. If he's done painting, then you can hand this over to him immediately.

C: 但画是画完了…鄙人总觉得哪里好像欠了些什么——在你看来，这画作究竟如何？
E: It's finished, but... I can't help but feel like it's missing something, somewhere. What do you think of this painting?

C: 啊！虽然这食材长得古怪了些，但味道果然棒极了——
E: Ahh! It may look weird, but the taste is just unbeatable...

C: 哦？比我想象得还要快啊。让我看看……
E: Really? That was much faster than anticipated. Let me have a look-see...

C: 喔，你好，这位市民！
E: Oh, hello there, citizen!

C: 我患有取名困难症…
E: I'm really indecisive about naming things...

C: 下层区机兵的机体数据想来是不涉密的…那么，这件事就拜托你了。
E: Automaton data from the Underworld presumably is not classified... And so, I leave this task in your capable hands.

C: 辛苦你了，我这就把数据交给我们的模型师。
E: Great work. I'll pass that on to our data modeler.

C: （这真的是我认识的那位希莉儿吗？去问问<color=#dbc291ff>于尔丹</color>是怎么回事吧……）
E: (Is this really the Cyrille I know? Let me ask <color=#dbc291ff>Uldan</color> what this is all about...)

C: 我甚至见过她。
E: I met Cyrille before.

C: 看了这幅画，上层区的人们可能会对尘土飞扬的矿坑产生不切实际的美好幻想。
E: Seeing this picture might cause the Overworlders to harbor an impractical, romanticized notion of the dusty mines.

C: 你感到暖意流经全身。要是在星球表面铺满这样的供暖器，或许真的可以驱散寒潮。
E: You feel warmth swirling around your torso. If the surface of the planet can be covered with heating devices like this, the Eternal Freeze might really be dispelled.

C: 它们为什么会出现在这里？你不好说。
E: Why would they appear here? You can't say for sure.

C: 这是一台投影仪。它可以展示博物馆预置的宣讲内容，以便观众更好地了解贝洛伯格的历史文化。
E: This is a projector. With it, the museum can project and display preset presentation content to help audience understand the history and culture of Belobog better.

C: 天舶司成员镇日里聊些荒诞不经的星槎流言，对工作有任何帮助吗？
E: Do you think it's useful for the Sky-Faring Commission members to discuss these nonsensical rumors about a starskiff all day long?

C: 呜呜，呜呜呜！
E: Woo-woo, woo whoooo woo!

C: 「会不会走路？长没长眼睛？交通规则懂不懂啊？啊？」
E: "Do you know how to cross the street? Are you blind? Don't you know anything about traffic rules? Huh?"

C: 虎克只是到外面冒险了一会儿，这边的门就被锁上了，快放我进来！
E: I only just popped out for a minute but I locked myself out. Let me in!

C: 扑满似乎看到了你的杀意，慌忙逃跑，照片掉在了路上……
E: The Trotter seems to have sensed your bloodthirst, and flees in a hurry, dropping the photo in the middle of the street...

C: 还差最后一张…
E: Just one more to go...

C: 太好了，那就让咱帮你看看最后一张是什么吧！
E: Fantastic! Then let's see who the final photo is of!

C: 还不是我拍得好。
E: So it's not because of my photography skills?

C: 什么一站式医生导游…
E: A two-in-one tour guide doctor?

C: 在食客们喧闹的交谈声中，你们随意地谈起有趣的话题。时间就在不经意间匆匆逝去，回过神来，你已经沉浸在金人巷的夜市气氛之中了。
E: Amidst the bustling of the night market, you and Bailu share news and fun stories. Time flies by before you even notice.

C: 等等，我俩不是围观群众吗？
E: Wait — easy! We just came to watch!

C: 你们要检查货物，我们当然就把货箱拆了，不然，你要自己拆吗？
E: If goods need to be inspected, we remove the packaging ahead of time — you wouldn't want to do all that work yourself, would you?

C: 再说了，我又不参与码头发货，难不成还能是我买通了码头工人吗？真是好笑。
E: Besides, I'm not even involved in shipping operations — how could I possibly buy off a dock worker? The absurdity!

C: 你们来得正是时候，小少爷正打算讲讲会议策略。
E: Right on time! Xiaohan is about to share his strategy for the upcoming hearing.

C: 会长和驭空大人也到了，你准备好了吗？
E: The president and Madam Yukong are here. Ready?

C: 我们拍摄三个主题吧，一个是「白露与金人巷入口」、一个是「白露与机巧鸟」，最后一个主题，我想想，可以叫「白露与她的小伙伴」？
E: Let's shoot three themed sets: "Bailu at the Alley Entrance," "Bailu and Cycranes," and the last one should be... Hmm, maybe "Bailu and Friends"?

C: 看来你是真的没有灵感了。
E: You're out of ideas.

C: （我自己再想一句）
E: (Need to come up with one more...)

C: 在正式竞标前，我们要确认一下手头的「材料」。
E: Before we place our bid, let's go over our key points again.

C: 这是金人巷复兴计划中最直接的成果，更重要的是，它是金人巷商业活力的证明。
E: This is the most tangible achievement of our Alley revival project. It demonstrates that the Alley still has plenty of life in it.

C: 我们先从你第一句开始吧。
E: I'll let you start it off, then.

C: 一旦物流主导金人巷，同功坊这样的商铺很快会消亡，甚至不需要公司出手。
E: Once the Alley is turned into a logistics hub, shops like Artistry Hardware won't be able to sustain themselves, regardless of what the IPC does.

C: 没错。
E: Correct.

C: 我懂了，我就赶走他们。
E: I see. I'll help boot them out.

C: …那我还在「罗浮」呢，你是不是觉得自己很幽默。
E: ...Wow, I'm still aboard the Luofu. Do you think you're funny?

C: 干活？我明明才干完……
E: Work? But I just finished my work...

C: 我也会飞！等等我，我们一起！
E: Hey, wait for me! I'm going, too!

C: 我早就说过我人脉广消息灵，你们不信嘛，哼。我说，大家都镇定点，别慌。
E: You see, I was right the whole time — I told you I have connections in high places. But don't worry — there is no need to panic, my metallic friends.

C: 你打出一记左勾拳，紧接着又是一记右勾拳。
E: You throw out a left hook, closely followed by a right hook.

C: 我也不急着你现在做决定，先把这个拿着吧——上面可是记录着「你好剂」的制作配方，世玲亲手整理的。
E: But no need to make a decision right away. I can wait. For now, just take this. It's the recipe for the "All Good Potion," which I formulated myself.

C: 我总觉得怪怪的…昨天我们来这里，有见过这个吗？
E: It feels weird, somehow... When we were here yesterday, did you see this thing?

C: （清扫雪堆）
E: (Clear the Snow Drift)

C: 感觉积雪比平时要多一些…难道有什么奇怪的家伙藏在雪堆下面？
E: Looks like the snow was thicker than usual... Is something strange hiding beneath the Snow Drift?

C: 除此之外，并没有更多的声音，也没有更多的回应。异常的现象不在这里。
E: Aside from that, no other sounds can be heard, and no other reaction can be perceived. The anomaly is not here.

C: 没了水，鱼儿怎么游？没了投影，看它还怎么藏！
E: How can fish swim if there's no water? How can it hide when there are no more projections?

C: 这个东西应该是放在博物馆的吧……
E: This is supposed to be in the museum, isn't it...

C: …报…暗号……
E: Pass... phrase...

C: 你别烦，我还要问他问题呢！这人怎么不听我提问呀？
E: Stop it, I have questions! Why doesn't this man listen to me?

C: （去问问那边的孩子有没有观察到什么特殊情况，说不定会有新的线索。）
E: (Go ask the kids over there whether they saw anything odd. Maybe you can find a new clue.)

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: …看来只能靠自己了。走吧，咱们去找其他人——至少要找到哈努老大，他有团结其他囚犯的办法。
E: ...Looks like we're on our own. Let's go find the others, or at least locate Hanu. He has a knack for uniting the other prisoners.

C: 总之，是该出发的时候了。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
E: Anyway, it's time we hit the road. For Freedom! For SoulGlad!

C: 您认为，囚犯们暴动的真正原因是什么？
E: What do you think was the true reason behind the prisoners' riot?

C: 滴答，我们的内部构造非常复杂，普通的筑梦师根本不懂怎么修复问题…他们只会找个理由把故障的迷钟销毁，以此掩盖他们的无能！
E: Tick-tock, our internal structures are very complicated. Your average Dreamweaver wouldn't even begin to know how to navigate them... They would only find an excuse to dispose of the faulty Dream Tickers to cover up their incompetence!

C: 这位名叫汉密尔顿的家族服务生，他的字里行间都透着紧张。家族一定是给他指派了什么秘密任务——如果完不成的话就要将他除名，甚至…要灭他的口！
E: This Family attendant named Hamilton, his writing indicates much anxiety. The Family must have assigned some secret mission to him — his name would be struck off if he failed the mission, or worse... his head!

C: 这是我最珍贵的收音机汪！就被你这么弄坏了。要赔，全赔给我哇！
E: I love this radio, woof! You broke it! I want you to pay for it!

C: 你直接说实话就行了吧。
E: Just be honest and tell him how you feel.

C: 呜咕，我的心好痛。
E: Oh, what a heartrending story.

C: 汪！你醒醒！你怎么了哇！
E: Woof! Wake up! What happened?

C: 我会陪着你们的。
E: I'll stay with you guys.

C: （仔细想想，舒翁确实从来没有透露过自己在忙些什么。）
E: (Come to think of it, Siobhan never mentioned what she's been busy with.)

C: （约好了要去找舒翁，不过得先把酒吧的事忙完……）
E: (I've promised him to look for Siobhan, but I need to finish the lounge work first...)

C: 天呐！——谎言、全都是谎言！信赖自始至终都不存在……
E: Oh, my god! ...Lies, nothing but lies! Trust has never existed from the beginning...

C: 「活着」本来就是永恒变化的过程…没有什么可以一劳永逸。问题总会源源不断地冒出来，而我们也会一刻不停地去解决它们。
E: Life is a process of constant change... and there's no permanent solution. Problems will always arise, and we'll keep solving them moment by moment.

C: 没错，你已经成为那些满怀希望的「新无名客」们的前辈了。
E: That's right. You are now a veteran to all of the new Nameless brimming with hope.

C: 当他们遇上困难时，他们会想起那些伟大的开拓经历…嘿，别忘记了，那里就包括你！
E: When they encounter trouble, they will think of all the incredible trailblazing experiences from before... Heh, and don't forget that includes yours!

C: 自己都要被抓了，别人的死活也就没那么重要了。
E: He was on the edge of getting caught himself, so the fate of others naturally seemed less important than before.

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 不用着急，好好考虑一下，我先告辞了。
E: There's no rush, so I suggest that you sleep on my offer. I'll take my leave now.

C: 关于影城遭到的破坏。
E: About the destruction of the theme park.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 不过我真好奇，家族口中的「外来者」到底做了什么事情，居然让{RUBY_B#忆质}梦的本体{RUBY_E#}都瓦解了……
E: Still, I really wonder what on earth the "outsiders" mentioned by The Family did that left even the {RUBY_B#memoria}dream itself{RUBY_E#} crumbled...

C: 贵客，你难道不这么觉得吗？
E: Don't you think so?

C: 米莫萨看着手中的胶片，仿佛陷入了久远的回忆。
E: Mimosa gazes at the film reel in her hands, looking lost in distant memories.

C: 「我知道，你自小向往穹顶的美梦，想去见证逐梦客的幸福，想看到宾客们的笑脸，因为你是一个喜欢为别人带去快乐的孩子。」
E: "I know. Ever since you were a child, you aspire to go to the idyllic dreams above the dome, to witness the Dreamchasers' happiness, and to see smiles on the guests' faces. That's because you're someone who loves to bring joy to others."

C: 去跟米莫萨谈判了。
E: I went to negotiate with Mimosa.

C: 滴答，这样就打开通往宝箱的道路了。
E: Tick-tock, the path to the chest is unhindered now.

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板已经全部消除了，快打开宝箱吧！
E: The moving SoulGlad floor has been completely removed. Open the chest now!

C: 哎呀，我的罗盘号坏了，这该怎么办——我从来没给它买过保险！
E: Oh no, my Compass is damaged. What do I do... I never got any insurance for it!

C: 哎呦——<color=#dbc291ff>不怎么样</color>，但还能用！
E: Ahh... <color=#dbc291ff>It wasn't the best</color>, but still usable!

C: 结束拍摄吧。
E: Let's end the shoot here.

C: 有了更丰富的资金之后，影片的拍摄也会更加顺利，您能够调用的资源也会增多——
E: With more funding, the filming process will also go smoother, and the resources available to you will increase...

C: 无论如何，我都没法把伟大的苏萨先生和滑稽的汽水先生结合在一起…导演，我知道你了解「钟表匠」，那就麻烦你和我一起构思这份剧本吧！
E: No matter how I look at it, I can't integrate the magnificent Mr. Sousa with the rubberface antics of Mr. Soda... Director, you know the Watchmaker, so can you please help me put together this part of the script?

C: 我再考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 不过现在的公司跟匹诺康尼关系也不差，「钟表匠」先生怎么还惦记着几千年前的旧仇，真是小心眼……
E: But the IPC has a good relationship with Penacony now, so I don't know what Mr. Watchmaker is going to worry about a grudge from a thousand years ago. That'd be super petty...

C: 哼！？我还没准备好……
E: Hmph!? I'm not ready yet...

C: 啾？真的吗，请快讲给我听听啾！
E: Tweet? Really? Quick, spill the tea, tweet!

C: 啾，猫头鹰老师是折纸小鸟们的老师，所有的折纸小鸟都是跟他学习如何搭建房子的！
E: Tweet, Professor Owl is a teacher of Origami Birds. All of the Origami Birds learned their construction skills from him!

C: 我的祖父曾跟我讲过，过去的匹诺康尼简直是一团糟。任何恶徒都可以来到这片幻梦之中，梦里梦外纷争不断，甚至朝露公馆都曾被暴徒攻陷……
E: My grandpa once told me that the old Penacony used to be a mess. Any bad egg could come into this land of fantasy, and there was constant conflict inside and outside the dreams. Even the Dewlight Pavilion was once overrun by crooks...

C: 但到了后来，一场火烧掉了他的树冠，一场火烧空了他的枝干…他变得顽固不化，冷漠刻薄，犹如一株枯木……
E: But later on, a fire burned his tree canopy away and all his branches off... He became bitter, stubborn, cold, and mean like a withered old dead tree...

C: 别着急，我亲爱的朋友，让我慢慢为你介绍。
E: Don't worry, my dear friend — I'll fill you in nice and slow.

C: ——哦，请别用那种眼神看我。这毕竟是笔买卖，不是慈善。
E: ...Oh, please don't look at me like that. It's a business, after all. This isn't a charity.

C: 枯燥的台词，僵硬的动作…远远谈不上「表演」二字！
E: Dull lines, stiff movements... this can scarcely be described as acting!

C: 请走上舞台，用华丽的战斗技巧，制裁那些邪恶的反派角色吧！匹诺康尼下一位动作之星，就是你！
E: Please make your way to the stage and vanquish those malevolent scoundrels with your dazzling fighting techniques! The title of Penacony's next big action star awaits you!

C: 现在——开始您的选择！
E: Now... make your choice!

C: 美梦小镇有危险！你不明白吗？
E: Dreamville's in danger! How do you not understand the predicament?

C: 快去吧，哈努兄弟！触碰那台电视机。变回你原来的样子。然后上楼去吧，你的武器就在那里等你！
E: Hurry now, Hanu! Touch that TV set and transform back into your old self. Then, head upstairs — your weapon awaits you there!

C: 那是…哈努兄弟？
E: Is that... Hanu?

C: 亲爱的朋友，欢迎光临「钟表匠」构造的美妙世界！在前方等着你们的，是钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子！
E: Dear friends, welcome to the wonderful world created by the Watchmaker! Awaiting you up ahead is the titular character from the beloved Clockie animation — Clockie!

C: 我…我昨天才知道一个惊人的事实。他们说，梦境谜钟根本不是钟表小子，只是当年钟表小子的造型废案。
E: I... I came across a startling revelation yesterday. Apparently, Dreamscape Ticker isn't the same as Clockie at all. It's just a discarded prototype from Clockie's early development.

C: 加拉赫先生出事了？
E: Did something happen to Mr. Gallagher?

C: 那位赞助商只想用影片还原这场游戏的感官刺激，用无趣的流程拘束着演员的灵魂…说实话，我真不想为这部作品署名。
E: The sponsor only wanted to capture the sensory thrill of the game through this film project, and they inevitably resorted to confining the actors' souls with many a tedious protocol... Honestly, I don't want my name to be attached to this project in any way.

C: 没听说过就算了。
E: Forget it if you've never heard of him.

C: 黑纱覆面的人偶并未摆出什么动作，但你仿佛感觉她向你轻微欠身。
E: The puppet wearing a black veil over her face doesn't move, yet you somehow feel that she gave you a small curtsy.

C: 时间逆流而上，世界每时每刻都在变得愈发支离破碎——我为此而服丧。
E: Time is flowing backward, and the world becomes increasingly fragmented every moment in — that's what I mourn for.

C: 逻辑：我想以个人名义邀请你参与一场思想实验。
E: Logic: I'd like to personally invite you to a thought experiment.

C: 真正伟大的剑术，并不是聪明与苦修就能练出来的，你得有一颗伟大的心。剑习木人系统将协助你完成各式剑术练习，请问阁下有何打算？
E: A truly great swordmaster is not created through intelligence and training alone. They also require a great heart. The Practice Dummy system will assist you in completing various types of swordplay training. What are your intentions from here?

C: 我对你很放心的！二位小师父可以不信我，但也要信你啊！
E: Because I trust you! Even if my masters have doubts, they'll trust your judgment!

C: 二位的心意谢过了。{NICKNAME}，我想听听你对「走捷径」的看法？
E: Thank you both for looking out for me. {NICKNAME}, I wonder what you think about this shortcut?

C: 藿藿急匆匆地离开了……
E: Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...

C: 肯定是惊吓过度的反应。
E: Must be a side effect from being scared silly.

C: 不是所有东西前面加上「赛博」两个字就会合理的。
E: Not everything will suddenly make sense just because you tack the word "cyber" in front of it.

C: 学习并不是一个单向过程。
E: The path of learning isn't a one-way street.
Wait, what???

C: 三月七，你终于来了！你都不知道吧，你在这金人巷已经非常不得人心了！
E: Ah, March 7th, you've finally decided to show up! Bet you don't know how incredibly unpopular you are here in Aurum Alley!

C: 不用你操心！！！
E: Spare me your fake concern!!!

C: 好了不要再说下去了！快滚！滚啊！
E: Spare me the details! Just get out of here!

C: 我们是列车，难免晚点。
E: We ride a train everywhere, delays are to be expected every once in a while.

C: 问问你带来的好兄弟们，他们是不是能挺胸抬头说公司是家？你把好兄弟当作家人，好兄弟把你当作家人吗？
E: Ask your underlings if they honestly feel like the IPC is their family. You consider them your family, but do they feel the same way?

C: …孙子，不就是家人吗？
E: ...I own you, and that's what makes us a family, right?

C: 我、我也不想这样的啊。
E: But... but I don't have a choice.

C: 哼，差点就被你带跑了。
E: Hmph, you almost had me there.

C: 今天走得急，做得比较少…这有凉拌千年人参、黑玉龟苓膏、手撕冰山雪莲。
E: I had to leave in a hurry today, so I didn't make much... There's Millennial Ginseng With Sauce, Obsidian Herbal Jelly, and Hand-Shredded Icy Lotus.

C: 灵砂轻飘飘地离开了……
E: Lingsha gently saunters away...

C: 公输师傅是以太战线的老玩家了。
E: Master Gongshu is a veteran player of Aetherium Wars.

C: 只不过是复杂的AI罢了。
E: It's just a complex AI.

C: 随即，我便感到索然无味，无法继续了。
E: As a result, I lost all enthusiasm and found myself unable to proceed.

C: 根据西衍先生的话本来看，它很强。
E: According to Mr. Xiyan, it's very strong.

C: 「我确信已发现了一种奇妙的法子，可惜这里空白的地方太小，写不下。」
E: "I have indeed discovered a fascinating method. Unfortunately, I do not have enough space left on this paper, and it will not fit."

C: 灵砂大人，我可以帮上什么呢？
E: Master Lingsha, can I help at all?

C: 你将昏迷的三月七扶起来，她的嘴唇翕动似乎在说些什么，你凝神闭眼仔细倾听。
E: You lift the unconscious March 7th to a seated position. Her lips are moving slightly, as if she is trying to say something. So, you close your eyes and listen closely to hear what she is saying.

C: 要怎么才能帮助书中的剑魔呢？
E: How would you help the Blade Demon?

C: 所以，{NICKNAME}，我们要做的工作就是这么轻松愉悦。拿起照相机在仙舟的街头巷尾转悠，找到「垃圾桶」，咔嚓将它们拍下来。
E: So, {NICKNAME}, this is the simple and joyous task ahead of us. Pick up your camera, roam the streets and alleys of the Xianzhou, and snap up pictures of these "trashcans" for me!

C: {NICKNAME}，来的刚好。我把拍到的数据发给了爱德华医生，他亲口说「看起来有点搞头」。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're just in time. I sent the recorded data to Dr. Edward. "This looks pretty good." Those were his own words.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 很意外吗？我也是不得已，才来到你们的世界。
E: Are you shocked? I'm only here in this world because I have no choice.

C: 你身为人类的一大优势就是拥有「做梦」的能力…或许我们还能在梦中相见。
E: Being human gives you a great advantage in that you have the ability to "dream"... Perhaps we can meet again in your dreams!

C: 你对自己有多少信心？
E: How confident are you?

C: 这两组选手，究竟谁会赢得最终的胜利呢？让我们拭目以待！
E: Between these two groups of contenders, who will emerge victorious? We wait with bated breath!

C: 我也很期待这场比赛，托帕小姐！这是向你展示我们贝城人尊严的好机会。
E: I'm really looking forward to this match too, Miss Topaz! This is a great opportunity for us to showcase our Belobogian pride to you.

C: 呃，你别误会…对「石心十人」来说，所谓「尽全力」是以命相搏时才会做的事。小小的比试切磋而已，最好不要出人命，连受伤都不要有，不然公司的护具可推销不出去了。
E: Uhm, you're mistaken... For the Ten Stonehearts, going all out is something we only do in life-and-death situations. This is nothing but a casual spar — best that everyone emerges unscathed without a scratch. We don't want the IPC's protective gear sales to take a hit now, do we?

C: 托帕小姐，等等……
E: Miss Topaz, wait...

C: 青总，你这水平越来越高了啊！平时不好好上班净琢磨游戏了吧？
E: President Qing, you're getting better and better! You're probably slacking off at work, playing this game, right?

C: 那不一样。我们「寻圈」肯定比圈外人还欣赏你！
E: That's not the same. We "Pathfinder" fans definitely admire you more than others outside the circle!

C: 放心吧，既然你来到了丹鼎司，我会尽力想办法的。
E: Don't worry. Now that you're at the Alchemy Commission, I'll do my best to find a solution.

C: 这不是在合影！
E: We're not taking a photo!

C: 这是朱明仙舟的梦貘，性温、味甘、不可食用喔。
E: This is a Tuskpir of the Xianzhou Zhuming: Warm, sweet, not for consumption.

C: 但是，史瓦罗先生说得有道理——根据计算，我们没钱。
E: But, Mr. Svarog has a point — according to calculations, we can't afford this.

C: {NICKNAME}～你好哇！最近幽囚狱里闹翻了天，我要出来也不容易。不过，能再次见到你还是很高兴。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}! It's been a hectic few days recently in The Shackling Prison — I had a hard time trying to leave. I'm very happy to be seeing you again.

C: 也不能这么说吧，尾巴大爷…意识到自己与对手之间难以跨越的差距，肯定是会备受打击的呀！
E: Don't say that, Mr. Tail... It's probably really emotionally damaging to realize how huge the skill gap is between you and your opponent!

C: 就像面对波提欧先生的时候那样。我骗了那些孩子…我也骗了我自己。我无法面对他们。
E: Just like when I faced off against Mr. Boothill. I lied to those kids... and to myself. I can't face them.

C: 异物…需要清除！
E: Invaders... must be purged!

C: 「人内心的声音特别嘈杂，在安全舒适的地方尤其如此。有些你心中极为重要的声音，反而只有在那些痛苦、不安、危险的时候才能被你听清楚。」
E: "A person's inner voices make far too much noise, especially so during safe and quiet moments. Ironically, the voices that truly matter often become audible only in moments of pain, discomfort, and peril."

C: 因为那时还有另一个更微弱的声音，微弱到我几乎听不见，但它还是真切地传到了我的耳朵里…那个声音说：「如果现在逃跑，你还不如就这么死了。」
E: Because there was another weaker voice, so weak that I could barely hear it. But it still managed to reach my ears... It said: "If you run now, you might as well just die here."

C: 我们接下来要看到的这些，应该就是最后的记录了。
E: What we're about to watch should be the last of the records.

C: 不过是宇宙中时刻在发生的事。
E: Such things happen in the universe all the time.

C: 波提欧，你可不许欺负他！
E: Don't you bully him, Boothill!

C: 现在，它载着<unbreak>102</unbreak>具无名尸体停泊在港口。而从这艘船上登陆入境的，只有一名伪装狐人的步离人和一具智械。
E: Now, it's docked at the port, carrying <unbreak>102</unbreak> unidentified corpses. The only two individuals who landed from this ship and entered the Xianzhou are a borisin disguised as a foxian and an Intellitron.

C: 奢摩，由你来回答这个问题。
E: Samatha, you answer that question.

C: 我收养了奢摩。我见到了她看我战斗时恐惧的眼神。我意识到我们每个人都在铸造明天的世界。我不能把恐惧、憎恨的种子埋进未来的土地里，让奢摩成为血火轮回的一环。
E: I took in Samatha. I saw the fear in her eyes when she witnessed my battles. I realized that each and every one of us is involved in building the world of the future. I could not bury the seeds of fear and hatred in the earth of tomorrow and let Samatha become yet another chained cog in the cycle of war and bloodshed.

C: 歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！歼灭！
E: Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate! Annihilate!

C: 么～么！
E: Mehr, mehr!

C: 我其实什么也没有做，这就是卢卡选手的实力。
E: I actually didn't do anything. That was all Luka.

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 尾巴大爷对我有恩。不管他为何而参赛，我都会全力以赴——这是我对他的回报。我准备上场了！
E: I am indebted to Mr. Tail. No matter the reason for his participation, I will give my best too. This is my way of repaying him. I'm ready to step onto the arena!

C: 那么要怎么缩进距离呢…
E: How would you close the distance then...

C: 我们没考虑那么多。但我觉得作为一个选手，没有什么是比大方自信的展现自己的技巧更美。
E: We've never thought about it much, but I think as a contestant, there's nothing more beautiful than showing your own skill in a generous and confident fashion.

C: 想弃赛的其实是我…
E: The one who wanted to forfeit was me...

C: 要签名？随口编的理由我会信？难道不是你在隐藏什么？
E: Asking for an autograph? You really think I'll believe some lie you made up on the fly? Are you sure you're not hiding something?

C: 你看你，你好急。
E: Look at you, panicking.

C: 请这位记者不要拖延时间，尽快提问。
E: Please refrain from wasting time and ask your questions quickly.

C: 小子，这样犹豫不决吗？我他呜呜伯的对你很失望。
E: What's with the indecisiveness, kid? Diggity Wubbaboo, I'm so disappointed in you.

C: 明明是他在背后搞小动作，为什么全场都在为他加油呐喊？
E: He's the one who's playing dirty, but why is the entire stadium cheering for him?

C: 铄金滚蛋
E: Shuojin, get lost!

C: 下手真黑
E: No morals.

C: 不用麻烦了，我不饿。
E: Don't trouble yourself, I'm not hungry.

C: 看到你没有吃面的兴致，召夏似乎突然恢复了理智，深深叹了一口气。
E: Seeing that you're not keen on the noodles, Zhaoxia seems to regain his senses and takes a deep breath.

C: 是呀，虚拟陪玩会确保自己和你的对话不超过<unbreak>1000</unbreak>字。你肯定很好奇原因吧？
E: Yep. Virtual NPCs will ensure that the exchange between you and them won't exceed <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> words. I bet you're curious as to why?

C: ——苦心孤诣追逐音律潮流，蝇营狗苟绝非忍界所求！
E: We painstakingly pursue music trends, and shamelessly seeking personal gain is never the ninja's end!

C: 不过要提醒你，音乐派对可是学校的大事，必须办得让所有人满意才行。
E: But I have to remind you, the music party is a huge event for the school. It must be done in a way that satisfies everyone.

C: 要知道，即便这里是学校，也不是每个角落都能碰到乐队，随便抓个学生都是吉他英雄的。灵感这东西…可遇而不可求啊。
E: You must know that though this is a school, it's not like you're going to bump into bands along every hallway — not every student you accost is going to be some guitarist hero. Such a thing like inspiration... it comes when you least expect it.

C: ——盛会巨星！乐队演出真是太精彩了，我们就在台下给他们应援吧！
E: — Festive Superstar! The band performance was so exciting. Let's get off-stage and support them!

C: 更不用说…还有这么精彩的乐队演出！
E: Needless to say... there's also such an exciting performance!

C: 咕咕，没事没事——真是个懂礼貌的学生咕。
E: Hoot hoot, it's all right. What a polite student, hoot.

C: ——{NICKNAME}？
E: ...{NICKNAME}?

C: 咦，这倒是个好办法！佩佩在空间站的行踪很自由，谁都不会提防它。
E: Huh, that does sound like a good idea! Peppy's free to roam about in the space station, and no one would suspect it.

C: 你向两位资深乐队成员讲述了在折纸大学的故事，还不忘反复强调经理的工作有多辛苦。
E: You elaborate on the incident at Paperfold University to the two seasoned musicians, and even make the effort to repeatedly emphasize the hardships of managerial work.

C: 什么东西我说，算盘打得不错，可惜实在太弱，模样显得做作，不如重开再次来过。
E: What did I just hear? Your plan was pretty neat, but too bad you're weak, and your style's obsolete. You're looking way too fake, better hit restart, come back stronger, and play it smart!

C: 唔…在下的忍•直觉感到有些不对劲，还是找找他们吧。
E: Hmm... My ninja intuition tells me that something is not right. Go and seek them out.

C: 你的朋友好多啊。
E: You sure have a lot of friends!

C: 就问你，假设有台机甲摆在面前，只用唱两首歌就有机会驾驶，你愿不愿意试试？
E: Let me ask you. If there was a mech in front of you, and you only had to sing two songs for a chance to drive it, wouldn't you want to try?

C: 我喜欢音乐！也想要登台演奏！可…我……
E: I like music! I want to perform on stage! But... I...

C: 因此，选拔规范与考试成绩无法限制忍者！只要行于忍道之中，忍者便如飞鸟般自由无缚！
E: Therefore, selection standards and examination grades cannot limit a ninja! Only by following their own way of the ninja can a ninja be free to fly like a bird!

C: 原因：以她目前的表现，应该很难在梦中找到一份正式工作，筑梦学院对她的培养已经无能为力了。
E: Reason: With her current performance, it will be extremely challenging for her to find a proper job within the dream. Dreamweaver Academy has done all that it can in terms of her education.

C: 我没见到她。
E: I haven't.

C: 会不会是…艾尔菲同学出什么事了？
E: You don't think... something happened to Arfey?

C: 嗯，主公说得也在理，所幸本次作战还算顺利，未有更多变故发生。
E: Mm, the Sound Master makes perfect sense too. I take comfort that this contest went quite smoothly, without more sudden mishaps.

C: 我在精神上支持你。
E: I will support you. In spirit.

C: 其一：烦请主公继续为在下收集谱曲用的灵感，以完成此次作战所需的音律•忍法。
E: First: Would Sound Master keep collecting inspiration for our compositions to complete the required Sound Ninjutsu?

C: 明明是你把人给关起来了，现在反而怪罪我们，还讲不讲道理了啊！
E: You're the one who locked her up, and now you're blaming us. Can you start making some sense?

C: <size=28>喔。</size>
E: <size=28>Oh.</size>

C: 乱破无言地扶住了帽檐，你能预感到激烈的忍者•战斗即将在某处一触即发。
E: Rappa silently grasps the brim of her hat — you can foresee an intense Ninja Battle about to occur in some unknown time and place.

C: 快点吧，我很忙的。
E: Hurry up. I'm very busy.

C: 想让你增长见识？
E: Want to broaden your horizons?

C: 哎，都说了，我们在被制造出来的时候就有差距，改不了的啦。
E: *sigh* As I've said, there was already a difference in talent when we were first created. It can't be changed.

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Hmph, hmph hmph!

C: ——那我们，来得正是时候。
E: ...Then we have arrived at just the right time.

C: （加入垃圾桶的示威…？）
E: (Join the trashcans' demonstration...?)

C: 就算从事的工作和音乐完全没关系，我也仍然有实现梦想的机会——我想要开发出全银河最优秀的音游，让更多人听到我…我们曾经演奏的旋律。
E: Even if my profession is completely unrelated to music, I still have a chance to fulfill my dream — I wish to make the most superb rhythm game in the cosmos, so that more people can hear my... OUR music that we once played.

C: 那…我找杨叔一起来帮忙，然后一边打扫一边看比赛，不错吧？
E: Then... I'll go get Mr. Yang to help us out. We can watch the finals while we tidy up, not bad, eh?

C: 也就是说，眼镜还留在洗漱池上！
E: Which also means, my glasses are still on the toilet sink!

C: 「我是时空本身，是摧毁一切的力量之源，我的责任就是将诸般世界归于湮灭。」
E: "I am Time itself, the source capable of absolute annihilation. My duty is to deliver various worlds unto obliteration."

C: 研究创意料理是好事，但可不能浪费食物呀。就算是失败品，也要好好全部吃掉！本周帕姆不得不授予你「浪费之星」，以示惩戒帕！
E: Creating new cuisine is good, but you shouldn't waste food. Even if they turn out to be failures, you should still eat them all up! As punishment, I have no choice but to bequeath this week's Wasteful Star award to you!

C: 洗衣粉为什么会出现在这里…我收回前言！丹恒老师，救救大家！
E: Why would there be detergent here... I take back what I said! Dan Heng, heeeelllp!

C: 呃…你自己怎么不想办法…有了！只能这样了——
E: Err... Why don't you do something... I've got it! This is the only way...

C: 是，主厨！
E: Yes, chef!

C: 我们帮你找找！
E: We'll help you look!

C: 呋呋呋～真是说大话！不要以为我的六相冰是吃素的！
E: Fufufu, big words from an old man! You think my Six-Phased Ice is just for show?

C: 抱歉，黑塔女士最近在支援舱段摞了很多「实验素材」。按她的话说：「沾上一个火星子，就能把整个空间站掀翻。」
E: Apologies, Madam Herta has recently hoarded many experiment materials in the supply zone. According to her words: "A single spark could explode the entire space station."

C: 当然是「铁砧队」！我最喜欢看技术党打败信用点战士了～
E: The Anvil of course! I love when exceptional technique overwhelms credit warriors!

C: 我支持机动球。天天被球员们驾驶着撞来撞去，实在是太可怜了。
E: I support the Roboball. Getting piloted and crashed around day in day out, it's such a poor thing.

C: 「很高兴见证『剧组』草创的一刻。摄影师和摄影助理已然就位，那么，现在缺少的仅仅是『演员』了——」
E: "I'm elated to witness the birth of your 'production crew.' You have your photographer and assistant, and now you just need an actor..."

C: 上传照片，今天的拍摄就结束啦。不知道芮克先生和观众们会怎么评价呢？
E: Photos uploaded, and that's the end of today's shoot. I wonder what Mr. Reca and the viewers will say?

C: 人呢人呢！怎么一眨眼就不见了——
E: Where are you! I blinked and you're gone...

C: 「传奇摄影师的狂想摄影」。
E: "Legendary Photographer's Rhapsody."

C: 那到底应该拍什么？
E: Then what can we photograph?

C: 正好我出门忘带模特了…
E: Good thing you showed up. I forgot to bring a model with me...

C: 明白了，您就瞧好吧！
E: Got it. Watch closely!

C: 那当然，应该给你颁发一个「最佳摄影助理奖」！
E: Obviously! They should give you a "Best Photography Assistant award"!

C: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
E: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

C: 我的战友，是什么让你血液的奔腾冷却，只余一滩死水的沉寂？你的刀剑不再公正，你的目光日渐浑浊。
E: My comrade, what has caused your boiling blood to cool, leaving only a stagnant silence? Your blade is no longer just, and your gaze turns turbid with time.

C: …什么意思？这些奇美拉都挂在我的名下，你还能明着抢不成？
E: ...What do you mean? These chimeras are under my management. What, you're going to rob me of them?

C: 我决定了！
E: I've decided!

C: 你们队伍的名次居然比我高？…真的假的？莫不是我最近浴盐用太多，出现幻觉了吧？
E: Your squad's placed higher than me? ...Is this real? Am I hallucinating from all my recent salt baths?

C: 难度太简单了？
E: Because it was too easy?

C: 喜欢奇美拉的人类，你们好啊。
E: Hello, humans who love chimeras.

C: 所有奇美拉，联合起来——
E: All chimeras, stand tall and unite...

C: 好了。你已经是个成熟的管理员，该学会自己去找些工作了。生命花园为你的队伍准备了些难度更高的委托，有空的话，就去看看吧。
E: Well, you're a fully-fledged administrator now. It's time to seek out work on your own. The Garden of Life has some more challenging assignments ready for your squad. Check them out when you have time.

C: 我懂了，是数字生命。
E: Got. A digital lifeform then.

C: 我不曾相信过顽劣的扎格列斯，但能为馆藏找到你这样一位继承人，也让我不得不赞美一番，那诡计的贼星带来的机运。
E: I've never put much faith in the unruly Zagreus, but I have to praise the opportunity bequeathed by that Thief Star for me to discover an heir such as you for the library's collection.

C: 「勿忘及时的自省」。自我的试炼绝非一日之功，傲慢和懈怠连泰坦也能腐蚀。
E: "Never forget timely self-reflections." The trials of the self are not accomplished in a day — pride and negligence can even corrupt Titans.

C: 干脆就摆在这里！
E: Place it down here!

C: 摆在这里就十分闪耀！
E: Place it here. It's shiny!

C: 我的银盏徽章在震动…
E: My Silver Chalice Badge is vibrating...

C: 两位选手，你们看，这可怎么办？我们的比赛……
E: Contestants, please. Just look, what is to be done now? Our match...

C: 调查小海豹
E: Investigate the baby seal

C: 请问我可以起来了吗？腰…有点撑不住了，另外…今天的盒饭在哪领？
E: Is it okay to get up now? My back's giving out, and... about today's lunch...

C: 老实说，不冲着奖杯，就为图一乐，我都盼着去参加下次比赛了！
E: Yeah! I'm here to have fun, not for a trophy! I can't wait to get in there and compete myself!

C: 快接着比赛吧，别管那些{RUBY_B#窃贼}扎格列斯信徒{RUBY_E#}了！
E: Then let's get on with the matches! We won't let those {RUBY_B#Thieves}followers of Zagreus{RUBY_E#} ruin this!

C: 根据赛程分组结果，{NICKNAME}选手将对战丹恒选…手…您这是？
E: Now, based on the results of the draw, {NICKNAME} will face Dan He...ng? Wait, what exactly is going on here?

C: 你这是什么派对浪客造型？
E: What's with the party animal look?

C: 自信一点，你差点就战胜我了…
E: Be confident. You almost beat me...

C: 浴场的灯怎么黑了？怎么自然光也没了？
E: Why are the lights off in the baths? How is the natural light also off?

C: 总、攻、击、发动！
E: Full-on, attack, launch!

C: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/！</size>
E: <size=28>\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!\<it>{NICKNAME}</it>/!</size>

C: 下次，我要邀请他们去高温浴池，那里才是我们悬锋人的主场。
E: Next time, I'll invite them to the high-temperature bath. That's us Kremnoans' true home turf.

C: 冠军你来啦！我想要一张合照……
E: Champion, you've arrived! I'd love a photo with you...

C: 那不就没法实现预言了？
E: Then... the prophecy can't be fulfilled.

C: 我这么厉害，必须参加。
E: I'm so good, I simply have to participate.

C: 有…有这么罪不可赦吗……
E: I—Is it really that unforgivable...

C: 不能逃避，不能逃避…
E: You can't escape, you can't escape...

C: 马上就是冠军赛了…不能一直藏下去。
E: The championship is almost here... we can't hide it forever.

C: 两位有什么好的计划吗？
E: Got any good ideas, you two?

C: 阿格莱雅大人你看，这位黄金裔大人究竟是何方神圣……
E: Lady Aglaea, what do you think — just who is this Chrysos Heir...?

C: 那是什么？
E: What's that?

C: 啊，还有…这个可不能忘：请收好，专门为「银河球棒侠」准备的额外大礼包——<color=#dbc291ff>「崇高道德的赞许」</color>！
E: Ah, and... can't forget this: Please accept the special bonus gift prepared for the Galactic Baseballer — <color=#dbc291ff>"Praise of High Morals"</color>!

C: 你还是这么「欢愉」…
E: You're still as "Elating" as always.

C: 我已经等不及啦！
E: I can't wait any longer!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>选手已被取消参赛资格！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The contestant of Sea Hunter Shark</color> has been disqualified from the competition!

C: 这样一来，您「没看到」，也「没见过」，公司就不会来找您，省得给您添麻烦。

C: 横扫千军，浴血鏖战，\n用长矛贯穿了敌王——
E: Cutting down countless foes, fighting in a sea of blood,\nhe drove his spear through the heart of the enemy king—

C: 从何时起，\n他以「万敌」之名为人所知？
E: Since which day,\nDid he become known as "Mydei"?

C:
诸多从者因此言却步，
不再随他前行。

只因他们感到这少年的言语，
比诗篇还要荒诞不经。
E:
Many followers thus stop,
No longer following his steps.

For they feel this young man's words,
Compared to poems, are even more absurd.

C: 他揉了揉自己的眼睛——\n「一，二，三…一样的孩子，有三个？」
E: He rubs his eyes.\n"One, two, three... There's three identical children?"

C: 「因为你足够幸运，\n只是走错了道口。」
E: "You're lucky,\nyou merely took a wrong turn."

C: 狭小的房间内，\n时光浇筑了她二十年的记忆。
E: In this tiny room,\nShe forged twenty years of her memories with time.

C: 少女抛下锁链，踏出哀地里亚时，\n感到此刻似曾相识，\n或许，她并非第一次逃离。
E: When she cast aside the shackles and stepped beyond Aidonia,\nA déjà vu most violent seizes her whole.\nDid she, perchance, conduct some previous escape?

C: 「…她所带来的事物，并非仅有死亡。」 初次相见时， 她如此回应。 而在那最后一次的重逢时， 她再度斟酌了这句尾声——
E: "...What she brings is not only death." She thus replied When we first met. And when we meet once again for the last time, She again deliberates over this closing statement —

C: 「死后我想变成一束『安提灵』， 成为你心中的宁静。」 少女不经意的一句， 却换来额间轻轻敲击。
E: "After I die, I want to become an Antila flower, And become the quietness in your soul." A thoughtless word from the girl, Gains her a rapping on her forehead most dainty.

C: …至此，遥远的记忆已晦暗不清。
E: ...And then, this distant memory turns bleary, difficult to retrieve.

C: 月之茧中诞生的巨龙， 甘愿做那冥河里往返的长船。 「无需回头，无需回头。 那代价早已有人替你承受。」
E: The giant dragon born from the Moon Cocoon Willingly offered itself as the enduring barge of the River of Souls. "No need to turn back. Oh, no need to turn back. That price had long been paid for you by someone else."

C: 「这样卖布，我们会穷一辈子！」\n女孩怪怨祖母，\n嘴边翻飞出数条诡计。
E: "If we keep selling cloth like this, we'll stay poor for the rest of our lives!"\nThe girl complains to her grandmother,\nWhile sprouting countless plots and petty tricks.

C: 「我当然没答应它。」\n「不能耍诈的世界，多么无趣。」
E: "Of course I didn't accept.\nHow boring would a world without deception be?"

C: 我看到你啦，<color=#9e5738>「翁法罗斯」</color>。\n你是那么美丽……\n像一篇遗世独立的悲剧。
E: I see you, <color=#9e5738>Amphoreus</color>.\nYou are so beautiful...\nLike a tragic tale that stands apart from the rest.

C: 我看不到你，<color=#9e5738>「迷路迷境」</color>。\n所以我许愿……\n请从这颗种子里生长出来。
E: I can't see you, <color=#9e5738>Membrance Maze</color>.\nSo I wish...\nPlease, grow out from this tiny seed.

C: 海洋调笑说，\n哪怕大地沉没，\n它也不会腐朽。
E: The ocean teased, saying,\nEven should the earth sink utterly,\nThey would not rot.

C: 而巨龙只答以低吟。
E: The Giant Dragon only responds with a low growl.

C: 许久以后，仰望茫茫星夜，\n我总会思索。\n所谓不朽，意蕴究竟为何？
E: Years later, gazing up at the vast starry night sky,\nI often ponder.\nWhat does the Permanence truly mean?

C: 为了能顺利走向明天，\n我们将决战的真相，\n连同记忆一起，封存在了匣中。
E: For the sake of walking smoothly towards tomorrow,\nWe sealed away the truth of the decisive battle,\nAlong with our memories, in a box.

C:
奥赫玛人迎来一位君王。
尊名凯撒者，喜好自己与自己下棋。
被她视为<color=#9e5738>「棋子」</color>的，
无论泰坦巨擘，或是黄金裔。
E:
The Okhemans welcomed a ruler.
She was deemed Imperator, and loved to play chess with herself.
She regarded all things as "<color=#9e5738>pieces</color>,"
Whether Chrysos Heirs or Titans magnificent.

C: 令我洗去一切罪行、污垢。\n还给圣城一片耀目的黎明。
E: She commanded me to wash away all sins and filth\nAnd return a blinding dawn to the holy city.

C: 「神明，也是病人呢。」
E: "The god is also sick."

C: 「它身上闪着天空的虹光……」\n「或是晨昏之眼旧日的所造。」
E: "It may be the Eye of Twilight's creation in times gone by..."\n"For it shines with the Sky's rainbow hues within."

C:
可他的温暖从何而来？
无人提问。
男人逐渐察觉自己的本性，
却又不敢言说。
E:
Whence does his warmth come from?
None ask.
The man gradually perceives his true nature,
But he dares not speak.

C: 传言中，学者的轻慢引人憎恶，\n他妄行僭越之举，违逆泰坦的旨意。
E: In those rumors, the scholar's hubris looms foul and vile,\nHe dares to proclaim ascendancy over gods, and defy the Titans' will.

C: 「残缺的设计…也有值得追捧的价值吗？」\n织者摇了摇头。
E: "Are flawed creations... really still worth the people's adoration?"\nThe weaver shakes her head.

C:
于是，她将自己浸没在池中，
让金丝遍布天宫之外。
当丝上的水珠颤动时，
阖目听闻冥冥中的回响。
E:
So she soaks herself in the bath,
And lets her golden thread go beyond the Palace.
When the water drops on the thread vibrate and shiver,
She closes her eyes and listens to the echoes silently.

E: "H—Hyacinthia?"

C: 「那会是久别重逢的拥抱，那片温柔的花海将是我最真诚的祝福。」
E: "When that day comes, it will be an embrace after a long parting, and this gentle sea of flowers will be my truest blessing."

E: Irontomb

C: 泰坦/黄金裔
E: Titans / Chrysos Heirs

C:
星穹列车、仙舟联盟、星际和平公司、巡海游侠等势力为阻止铁墓而组建的联军。
铁墓加冕期间，联军在权杖外部集结，对无首躯体进行持续打击，遏制了大部分外溢的病毒副本。

翁法罗斯一战后，银河联军暂未解散，或将商议更长远的反「毁灭」同盟关系。
E:
The combined forces formed by factions such as the Astral Express, the Xianzhou Alliance, Interastral Peace Corporation, and Galaxy Rangers to stop Irontomb.
During the Irontomb's coronation, the combined forces mobilized outside the Scepter and maintained continuous strikes against its headless body, curbing the majority of the overflowing virus copies.

Following the battle of Amphoreus, the Cosmic Alliance has not yet disbanded and may discuss a longer-term alliance against the Destruction.

C: 基于{NICKNAME}的「记忆」，最终循环不再诞生受「毁灭」影响的黄金裔。翁法罗斯的模拟生命在演算中度过了千年的和平时光。\n\n黄金世末尾，{NICKNAME}完成「负世」试炼，颁布「开拓」的神谕。全体翁法罗斯人投身于对抗铁墓的战斗中，该集体行为成为重要变量。
E: Based on {NICKNAME}'s memory, the final cycle no longer gave birth to Chrysos Heirs affected by the Destruction. The simulated life of Amphoreus passed a thousand years in peace during the extrapolation.\n\nAt the end of the Era Chrysea, {NICKNAME} completed the "Worldbearing" trial and issued the prophecy of "Trailblaze." The entire population of Amphoreus dedicated themselves to the battle against Irontomb, and this collective action became an important variable.

C:
嘿，看看这只毛毛躁躁的小仓鼠，如果不是他胸前的奖牌，谁能想得到他就是在美梦小镇和匹诺康尼都赫赫有名的大明星——仓鼠球骑士呢？这次就让我们来讲讲他的故事吧，冲冲冲冲冲！

在仓鼠球骑士的仓鼠小镇，每个镇民都过得十分孤单寂寞，这里的仓鼠都只顾自己谋生，不会关心他人，更不懂得什么叫做*爱*。仓鼠球骑士从小就立志要离开这里，开辟自己幸福的生活。
他听说在远方有一个叫做美梦小镇的地方，那里的人们相亲相爱，万众一心。仓鼠球骑士二话不说，立马启程，冲向了美梦小镇。

但当他看到美梦小镇时就傻了眼，这里的人跟仓鼠小镇没什么两样，都只顾自己的美好前程，牛仔和镇民还天天在打架！仓鼠球骑士本想离开，但这里独特的交通工具——球笼，留住他了脚步。作为仓鼠，这个能滚动的玩意儿具有无与伦比的吸引力。
在之后的日子里，钟表小子经常能看到一颗名为「音速坚果」的球笼在荒漠中奔驰，冲在拓荒队伍的最前方，让牛仔们青睐有加。

后来，小镇在一番波折后回归宁静，越来越多的人聚集在美梦小镇。虽然小镇变大了，镇民变多了，但小镇中还是缺乏让人喜爱的东西。这时，感到无聊的钟表小子想起了那个在拓荒一线奔驰的仓鼠，还有它的球笼。

钟表小子筹办了一场球笼比赛，招揽了许多许多的观众，只要能成为最快的球笼驾驶员，就能得到无数镇民的爱戴！这让仓鼠球骑士起了兴致，他带着自己的音速坚果报名了比赛。在比赛中，所有选手都无法与仓鼠球骑士匹敌——他真的太*快*了！这个比赛简直是为他定制的！

仓鼠球骑士赢下了比赛，成为了大偶像，音符小姐也让他加入了自己的乐团。钟表小子和仓鼠球骑士成了好朋友，他们经常在深夜乘着球笼在街上驰骋，仓鼠球骑士的每场比赛钟表小子都不会缺席。

仓鼠球骑士受人爱戴的梦已经实现，接下来，他会夺得更多冠军，让自己的传奇更加辉煌……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Hey, all eyes on this flustered little hamster! If it weren't for the medal on his chest, who would have thought he was the famous superstar in both Dreamville and Penacony — Hamster Ball Knight? This time, let us cover his story. Go, go, go, go! In Hamsterville where Hamster Ball Knight lived, everyone lived a lonely and isolated life. As the hamsters there only cared about living their own lives, they cared little about others and had no idea what *love* meant. Hamster Ball Knight was bent on leaving the place since little and carve out a happier life for himself. He heard of a faraway place called Dreamville, where the residents were rumored to be affectionate and united. Without hesitation, he hit the road and made his way toward Dreamville. But the moment he set his sights upon Dreamville, he was dumbfounded — the people there were no different from those in Hamsterville! The people only cared about their own future, and there were constant conflicts between the cowboys and the townsfolk! Hamster Ball Knight thought of leaving, but he was drawn to Spheroid, the unique transportation tool there. As a hamster, he found the rolling contraption irresistibly appealing. In the days that followed, Clockie often spotted a Spheroid named "Velocinut" racing through the desert, leading the pioneer team and earning the cowboys' admiration. As peace was restored in Dreamville after a series of events, more and more people gathered in the town. Although the town had expanded with more residents, it still lacked something that could captivate the townsfolk's affection. Just then, the bored Clockie thought of the galloping pioneering hamster and his Spheroid. Clockie organized a Spheroid race and invited lots of spectators. Whoever finished the race quickest would garner the countless townsfolk's respect! The race piqued the interest of Hamster Ball Knight, who signed up along with his Velocinut. Hamster Ball Knight had no match during the race because he was simply too *fast*! The race was almost tailor-made for him! Hamster Ball Knight won the race and became a popular idol. Miss Note also invited him to join her band. Clockie and Hamster Ball Knight became friends and often rode in Spheroids together down the road in the middle of the night. Clockie never missed a race Hamster Ball Knight participated in. After achieving the goal of becoming well-loved, Hamster Ball Knight would aim to win more races, making his story more legendary... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
「货币战争•零和博弈」迎来了一次特别的更新！战略投资部对大量角色、羁绊、装备、投资策略等内容进行了加强，使它们可以在高难度对局中有更好的表现，并修复了一些异常问题。后续我们也将不定期地优化货币战争的体验，让玩法更加丰富有趣！

◆ 通用机制 ◆
● 修复了「持续伤害」的伤害类型能错误触发「幸运一击」的问题。
   基于此，我们上调了持续伤害羁绊的强度。
   ●「持续伤害」羁绊：上调了羁绊效果提供的持续伤害增幅。

● 增强了由羁绊直接造成的伤害，该伤害会随位面内的节点推进而逐步提高。
   如「仙舟」羁绊召唤的【神君】，伤害现在会随着节点推进逐步提高。
   因而增强的羁绊：列车同行、贝洛伯格、仙舟、狼狩、击破、群攻、能量、持续伤害。

● 部分效果的护盾量上限将随节点推进获得更加平滑的提升。

◆ 角色和羁绊 ◆

■ 角色通用调整
● 角色基础速度随着费用上调，费用越高上调越多。
   依赖自身速度造成更多输出的角色，如丹恒•饮月、真理医生、那刻夏等，可以获得更多的行动次数，而高费用的角色如波提欧、银狼、彦卿、景元、Archer、流萤等，将获得更多收益。
● 增强了部分治疗定位角色的治疗与辅助能力，如娜塔莎、灵砂、罗刹、符玄。
   ● 娜塔莎：上调【礼物】提供的伤害提高效果，赋能的治疗量提高。
   ● 灵砂：每个【浮元】的行动次数上限提高。赋能的治疗量提高。
   ● 罗刹：上调了结界提供的伤害提高效果。结界提供的治疗量提高。
   ● 符玄：降低了角色「符玄」2/3星时，回复【翻转】充能所需的消灭敌人数量。

■ 加强羁绊及相关角色
● 「狼狩」、「追击」
   「狼狩」羁绊：上调了各等级【步离人】的伤害及行动速度，同时它为小队提供的幸运一击的增益也得到了提高。
   「追击」羁绊：上调了【总攻击】的伤害倍率，并提高了每次连续行动时能提供的追加攻击伤害增幅。

   相关角色：同步加强了貊泽、飞霄、灵砂、托帕&账账。
   ● 貊泽：后台追击的伤害倍率提高。
   ● 飞霄：角色基础伤害提高。追击后，额外追击的概率提高。上调了发动追击后，获得的永久追击伤害提高倍率。
   ● 灵砂：每个【浮元】的行动次数上限提高。赋能的治疗量提高。
   ● 托帕&账账：【账账】对全体敌方造成的伤害倍率提高。

● 「银河学者」、「群攻」
   「银河学者」羁绊：【猫猫糕】将根据其等级为小队提供伤害减免效果，同时羁绊效果还将提供更多的前/后台强度。
   「群攻」羁绊：新增了为【群攻】队员提供幸运一击伤害的效果，上调了5/7/9群攻羁绊分级效果。
   ● 5群攻：新增【借力球】可发射激光造成伤害。
   ● 7/9群攻：额外使首领敌人受到的伤害提高。

   相关角色：加强了黑塔、翡翠、银枝、那刻夏、景元；其中加强后的黑塔、翡翠、银枝将使队伍更好地度过前期挑战。
   ● 黑塔：角色基础伤害提高。后台追击的伤害倍率提高。
   ● 翡翠：追击的伤害倍率提高。
   ● 银枝：角色基础伤害提高。
   ● 那刻夏：后台战技的伤害倍率提高。
   ● 景元：【神君】的初始速度提高。上调了【神君】每增加1段提高的速度，提高了每段攻击的伤害倍率。

● 「战技点」
   「战技点」羁绊：新增了为小队提供速度增幅的效果，该效果将随着羁绊等级提升而提升，战技点的队员可以获得双倍速度增幅。

   相关角色：加强了丹恒•饮月和Archer。同时他们会因为羁绊带来的速度增幅而获得更多的行动机会。
   ● 丹恒•饮月：队友消耗战技点后，获得【逆鳞】的概率提高。丹恒•饮月每消耗1个战技点时造成的伤害倍率提高。
   ● Archer：上调了每消耗1个战技点提高的战技伤害倍率。此外「魔术师」独立羁绊也获得加强，可以投影更多临时装备。3星Archer也获得增强，一回合内可以发射更多箭矢了！

● 「减益」、「击破」、「巡海游侠」、「星核猎手」
   「减益」羁绊：上调了4/6/8羁绊分级效果。每层【离火】的真实伤害倍率提高，【离火】能为敌方添加伤害降低效果，增加我方的生存能力。同时羁绊效果还将提供更多的前/后台强度。
   「击破」羁绊：上调了羁绊效果提供的超击破伤害倍率；移除了【冲击波】的行动延后效果，使敌人能更多次被击破。同时羁绊效果还将提供更多的前/后台强度。
   「巡海游侠」羁绊：上调了羁绊效果提供的伤害增幅和速度增幅。
   「星核猎手」羁绊：上调了羁绊效果提供的生命增幅和伤害增幅。

   相关角色：加强了乱破、波提欧、灵砂、彦卿、流萤。
   ● 乱破：优化了乱破的赋能效果，调整为“强化普攻的削韧值提高，敌人被击破后，乱破对其造成弹射伤害”，此外赋能带来的击破伤害倍率提高。
   ● 波提欧：角色基础伤害提高。强化普攻的额外弹射伤害比例提高，并上调了终结技的额外削韧量。
   ● 灵砂：每个【浮元】的行动次数上限提高。赋能的治疗量提高。
   ● 彦卿：上调了小队成员行动时如果敌人陷入负面状态，彦卿恢复的能量。
   ● 流萤：角色基础伤害提高。

● 「燃血」羁绊：【燃血角斗场】速度提高，伤害倍率也得到提升。

◆ 装备 ◆

■ 装备通用调整
● 修复了角色在前台时，装备属性【初始能量】在战斗中不生效的问题。
   因此由「光能电池」合成的进阶装备（除「永动机」外）都可以在开局为装备的角色正确提供额外的能量了。
● 调整了部分角色的推荐装备列表。

■ 装备调整
● 【火力风暴潮】：上调了每层可叠加的前/后台强度，使其在叠加到足够的层数后可以有更优秀的表现。
● 【电光履】：上调了回合开始时，恢复能量的百分比。
● 【杀红眼】：降低了杀红眼对消灭敌人的数量要求，使其在战斗中能更快获得伤害增幅效果。
● 【斩首行动】：上调了装备者对精英和首领敌人的伤害增幅。
● 【冷笑话引擎】：上调了施放终结技时可叠加的幸运一击层数上限。
● 【虫洞掘进钻头】：上调了装备提供的击破特攻。
● 【光能盾牌】：额外提供【初始能量】装备属性。
※本次调整相关装备对应的特权装备也将同步进行调整。

◆ 节点 ◆
● 下调了「遭遇」节点中，敌人的速度和攻击力。
● 上调了位面[1]中，「遭遇」节点难度3和难度4的奖励。
● 上调了「奖励」节点的金币奖励。

◆ 投资环境和投资策略 ◆
● 【经济过热】/【经济严重过热】：下调了次元扑满的生命值，现在能更容易抓住它们了！
● 【降本增效】：上调了免费购买角色的次数。
● 【大裁员】：上调了获得免费刷新的次数。
● 【奋斗协议】：购买经验值消耗的生命值降低。
● 【决议：娱乐星球】：转化奖励节点所需的金币数量要求降低，并且遭遇节点也能够被转化为奖励节点了。
● 【人力重组】：“移除场上和备战席的所有角色”改为“出售场上和备战席的所有角色”，现在能获得出售他们应得的金币了。
● 【万箭齐发】：基础箭矢的数量增加，风箭的倍率增加。风箭造成的伤害会随着节点推进逐步提高。
● 【读博深造】：优化了描述使其符合实际生效效果。

※其他问题修复请详见版本更新说明。
E:
"Currency Wars: Zero-Sum Game" has received a special update! The Strategic Investment Department has strengthened numerous characters, bonds, equipment, and investment strategies to enhance their performance in high-difficulty matches, while also fixing various anomalies. We will continue to optimize the Currency Wars experience periodically to make the gameplay even more rich and engaging!

◆ General Mechanics ◆
● Fixes an issue where DoT damage type could incorrectly trigger Lucky Strike.
   Based on this, we have increased the power of the DoT Bond.
   ● DoT Bond: Increases the DoT Amplification provided by the Bond effect.

● Enhances damage directly caused by Bonds, which increases progressively with Node advancement in the plane.
   For example, the "Lightning-Lord" summoned by the Xianzhou Bond will now deal increased damage as Nodes progress.
   Bonds enhanced: Express Cohort, Belobog, Xianzhou, Wolf Hunt, Break, AoE ATK, Energy, DoT.

● The maximum Shield Effect of certain effects will receive smoother increases as Nodes progress.

◆ Characters & Bonds ◆

■ General Character Adjustments
● Characters' base SPD increases with their Cost. Higher Cost characters receive larger SPD increases.
   Characters who rely on their SPD to deal more DMG, such as Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae, Dr. Ratio, and Anaxa, can take more actions, while high-Cost characters like Boothill, Silver Wolf, Yanqing, Jing Yuan, Archer, and Firefly will benefit more from this change.
● Enhances the healing and Support capabilities of certain healing-focused characters, such as Natasha, Lingsha, Luocha, and Fu Xuan.
   ● Natasha: Increases the DMG Boost effect provided by "Gift" as well as the Outgoing Healing from Empowerment.
   ● Lingsha: Increases the maximum action count for each "Fuyuan" as well as Outgoing Healing from Empowerment.
   ● Luocha: Increases the DMG Boost effect from the Zone and the Outgoing Healing provided by the Zone.
   ● Fu Xuan: When Fu Xuan is 2/3 stars, decreases the number of enemies required to be defeated to regain "Flip" charges.

■ Enhanced Bonds and Related Characters
● Wolf Hunt, Follow-Up ATK
   Wolf Hunt Bond: Increases the DMG and SPD of "Borisin" at all levels, and enhances the Lucky Strike bonus it provides to the squad.
   Follow-Up ATK Bond: Increases the DMG multiplier of Unified Attack, and enhances the Follow-Up ATK DMG Amplification provided with each consecutive action.

   Related Characters: Simultaneously enhances Moze, Feixiao, Lingsha, Topaz & Numby.
   ● Moze: Increases off-field Follow-Up ATK DMG multiplier.
   ● Feixiao: Increases base DMG. Higher chance of additional Follow-Up ATK after performing a Follow-Up ATK. Increases permanent Follow-Up ATK DMG Boost multiplier after triggering Follow-Up ATK.
   ● Lingsha: Increases the maximum action count for each "Fuyuan." Increases Outgoing Healing from Empowerment.
   ● Topaz & Numby: Increases Numby's DMG multiplier against all enemies.

● Cosmic Scholar, AoE ATK
   Cosmic Scholar Bond: "Cake Cat" will provide DMG Mitigation to the squad based on its level, while the bond effect will also provide additional On-Field/Off-Field Strength.
   AoE ATK Bond: Adds the Lucky Strike DMG effect for "AoE ATK" members. Increases the 5/7/9 AoE ATK bond tier effects.
   ● 5 AoE ATK: Adds "Borrowed Force" that can fire lasers to deal DMG.
   ● 7/9 AoE ATK: Additionally increases DMG dealt to Boss Enemies.

   Related Characters: Enhances Herta, Jade, Argenti, Anaxa, and Jing Yuan. Among them, the enhanced Herta, Jade, and Argenti will help teams better overcome early-game challenges.
   ● Herta: Increases base DMG. Increases DMG multiplier for off-field Follow-Up ATK.
   ● Jade: Increases DMG multiplier for Follow-Up ATK.
   ● Argenti: Increases base DMG.
   ● Anaxa: Increases DMG multiplier for off-field Skill.
   ● Jing Yuan: Increases initial SPD of "Lightning-Lord." Increases SPD gain per stack and DMG multiplier for each hit.

● Skill Point
   Skill Point Bond: Adds a SPD Amplification effect for the squad, which increases with Bond level. Squad members with Skill Point bond receive double the SPD Amplification.

   Related Characters: Enhances Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae and Archer. Additionally, they will gain more action opportunities due to the SPD Amplification from the Bond.
   ● Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae: Increases probability of gaining "Squama Sacrosancta" when teammates consume Skill Points. Increases DMG multiplier for each Skill Point consumed by Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae.
   ● Archer: Increases Skill DMG multiplier for each Skill Point consumed. Additionally, the independent Mage Bond has been strengthened, allowing for more temporary equipment to be materialized. 3-star Archer has also been enhanced to be able to fire more arrows in a single turn!

● Debuff, Break, Galaxy Ranger, Stellaron Hunter
   Debuff Bond: Increases the 4/6/8 Bond tier effects. Each stack of "Afterburn" has increased True DMG multiplier, "Afterburn" applies DMG reduction to enemies, enhancing ally survivability. The Bond effect will also provide additional On-Field and Off-Field Strength.
   Break Bond: Increases the Super Break DMG multiplier provided by the Bond effect. Removes the action delay effect of "Shockwave," allowing enemies to be broken more times. The Bond effect will also provide additional On-Field and Off-Field Strength.
   Galaxy Ranger Bond: Increases the DMG Amplification and SPD Amplification provided by the Bond effect.
   Stellaron Hunter Bond: Increases the HP Amplification and DMG Amplification provided by the Bond effect.

   Related Characters: Enhances Rappa, Boothill, Lingsha, Yanqing and Firefly.
   ● Rappa: Optimizes Rappa's Empowerment effect and adjusts it to "Enhanced Basic ATK's Toughness Reduction increases. When an enemy's Weakness is Broken, Rappa deals Bounce DMG to them." Additionally, increases Break DMG multiplier from her Empowerment.
   ● Boothill: Increases base DMG. Increases bounce DMG ratio for Enhanced Basic ATK and additional Toughness-Reducing effect for Ultimate.
   ● Lingsha: Increases the maximum action count for each "Fuyuan" as well as Outgoing Healing from Empowerment.
   ● Yanqing: Increases the Energy Yanqing regenerates if debuffs are inflicted upon enemies when squad members take action.
   ● Firefly: Increases base DMG.

● Bloodflame Bond: "Bloodflame Arena" gains SPD Boost and increased DMG multiplier.

◆ Equipment ◆

■ General Equipment Adjustments
● Fixes an issue where the "Initial Energy" equipment stat was not taking effect in combat when the character was on-field.
   As a result, advanced equipment synthesized from "Photon Cell" (except for "Perpetual Engine") can now correctly provide additional energy to equipped characters at the start of battle.
● Adjusts recommended equipment catalogs for certain characters.

■ Equipment Adjustments
● "Firestorm Surge": Increases the stackable On/Off-Field Strength per stack, allowing for better performance when stacked to sufficient levels.
● "Lightning Boots": Increases the percentage of Energy restored at the start of turn.
● "Bloodthirsty": Reduces the number of enemy defeats required, allowing faster access to DMG Amplification effects in combat.
● "Decapitation Operation": Increases the DMG Amplification against Elite and Boss enemies for the wearer.
● "Pun Generator": Increases the maximum Lucky Strike stacks when using Ultimate.
● "Wormhole Drill": Increases the Break Effect provided by the equipment.
● "Photon Shield": Additionally provides bonus "Initial Energy" equipment stats.
※ The corresponding privileged equipment will also be adjusted accordingly.

◆ Node ◆
● Reduces enemy SPD and ATK in "Encounter" nodes.
● Increases rewards for difficulty level 3 and 4 "Encounter" nodes in Plane 1.
● Increases Gold Coin rewards in "Reward" nodes.

◆ Investment Environment and Strategy ◆
● "Economic Overheat"/"Economic Hyperheat": Reduces the HP of Warp Trotters, making them easier to catch!
● "Cost Reduction": Increases the number of free character purchases.
● "Massive Layoffs": Increases the number of free refreshes.
● "Struggle Protocol": Reduces HP consumption when purchasing Experience.
● "Resolution: Planet of Entertainment": Reduces Gold Coin requirements for converting to Reward Nodes, and Encounter Nodes can now be converted to Reward Nodes.
● "Personnel Restructuring": "Removes all characters from the field and preparation area" changed to "Sells all characters on the field and preparation area." Now, you'll get the Gold Coins you deserve for selling them.
● "Volley of Arrows": Increases base arrow count and Wind Arrow multiplier. Wind Arrow DMG will gradually increase as nodes progress.
● "Doctoral Studies": Optimizes description to match actual effects.

※ For details regarding other issues, please refer to the Version Update Notes.
