C: 阿格莱雅女士，你看这身怎么样？
E: What do you think of this outfit, Lady Aglaea?

C: 拼配各种风味的咖啡豆是我的独门手艺，现在就给你泡一杯，推荐不加奶，黑咖啡最佳。
E: I have a knack for blending different coffee beans. Can I make you a cup? I recommend not adding milk — black coffee is proper coffee.

C: 我当了八年的动画师，生活基本是两点一线。和冒险相比可能有些「无聊」，可工作本身就是一件很有价值的事情，是为人们创造梦想。
E: I was an animator for eight years — my life was pretty routine. I guess it was a little dull compared with adventuring, but work is a very worthwhile thing. It brings dreams to life.

C: 索性都干掉吧~
E: May as well kill them all~

C: 你来了，之前调试的观测阵列该出结果了，有空一起来看看？
E: *yawn* You're here! The observation matrix we adjusted should have some results for us now. Free to take a look?

C: 「黑塔」空间站建立至今，我也只见过黑塔女士本人寥寥数面。但每一次会面，都令我终生难忘。
E: I've only seen Madam Herta in the flesh a few times after the establishment of the Herta Space Station, but every one of those meetings was an unforgettable experience.

C: 你这…不行啊。
E: Oh, poor you...

C: 从者须听从御主的命令，但我仍希望与您彼此认同，相互信赖。
E: Though it is the Servant's duty to follow their Master's commands, I do hope we can appreciate and trust each other.

C: 初次见面，叫我Archer就好。幸好你我并不是需要相互厮杀的关系，那就尽可能友好相处吧。
E: First meeting, huh? Just call me Archer. Lucky for us, we're not here to kill each other, so let's keep things civil, if we can.

C: 看起来很冲动，但处事条理却意外清晰…哼，算是个跟我投脾气的家伙吧。
E: Seems to act on impulse, but there's a method to his madness... Hmph, guess he's the kind of person I can get along with.

C: 是个麻烦的对手，该警惕起来了！
E: It's a tough opponent. Be on your toes!

C: 别看她一天天到处疯玩，说不定哪天真能玩出些名堂来。
E: Don't let her appetite for chaos fool you — I think that kid's going places.

C: 真想拆开来仔细看看！
E: Wish I had time to examine its inner workings!

C: 你病得很重。
E: You're in bad shape.

C: 看来是赶上了。
E: Just in time.

C: 我会为您献上完美的胜利，布洛妮娅大人。
E: Expect a decisive victory, Lady Bronya.

C: 我擅长对情报进行研究、记录、分析，至于做出怎样的决断，那是长官的事。
E: I'm good at documenting information and coming up with my analysis. Acting on that analysis is the captain's job.

C: 好啦，该休息就休息…用不着这么防我吧伙计，我不会跑的。
E: Come on, get some rest already! What's the matter? I'm not going anywhere.

C: 在我的带领下，鼹鼠党还招募了「千面尤利安」，「铁臂卢卡」，「狡猾的小孩子」等数位得力干将！
E: Haha! Under my leadership, we recruited Julian of a Thousand Faces, Luka "Strongarm," and Cunning Child! Everyone joins the cause!

C: 哥…姐……
E: Brother... Sister...

C: 别急呀，账账！别急~
E: Easy, Numby! Easy~

C: 怪了，太卜大人是怎么算到我在这儿的？
E: Weird, how'd the Master Diviner figure out I'd be here?

C: 我与天击将军，无论是脾气秉性还是行事作风都截然不同，但对很多事情的看法竟颇为一致…仔细想想，也是挺有趣的。
E: The Merlin's Claw and I couldn't be more different in terms of temperament and how we handle things, but our perspectives on many issues are quite similar... It's interesting if you think about it.

C: 可惜，还活着。
E: I live? *sigh*

C: 愿好事成双。
E: May good things come in pairs.

C: 物皆自成，无所不利。
E: Everything came together.

C: 我的剑术，是否足以再请赐教了？
E: Is my swordplay good enough to learn from a master like him?

C: 剑也需回鞘了…老师，明日再见！
E: The sword needs to return to its scabbard... See you tomorrow, Teacher!

C: 说到工造司的剑器，那我可就不困了。每一种规格我都会购入两件，一柄拆封使用，一柄入室珍藏…不过月底嘛，难免要「吃将军，用将军，可怜巴巴求将军」啦。
E: I can talk all day about swords made by the Artisanship Commission. I always buy two swords per model: One for the battlefield and one for my collection... Buuut my allowances might run a bit short by the end of the month. I'm sure the general will buy me food and things if I nag him a bit...

C: 想知道窍门？不告诉你~
E: Want to know the secret? Well, my lips are sealed~

C: 午餐需讲究君臣相佐。烟熏肉堡两个，奶茶一杯，实是治疗心病、保持心情愉快的不二之选！
E: Lunch is like medicine — it has to have the right balance of ingredients. Two smoked patties and a cup of milk tea is a great way to heal your heart and lift your spirits!

C: 那位小剑士的眼神和身手都颇为了得，但我不打算与人比剑。
E: That young swordmaster has a keen eye and a swift hand, but I have no desire to compete with anyone in a sword fight.

C: 十王敕令，在此成书。
E: The Ten Lords decree — hereby ordained!

C: 藿藿：一开始我觉得「人偶判官」很吓人…但即使尾巴暴跳如雷，雪衣大人却依旧神态自若、面不改色，这样的判官前辈真…真是太了不起了……\n尾巴：对对对，你厉害，你了不起！看老子哪天把十王司烧成灰！
E: Huohuo: The puppet judge? She really scared me at first... but when Tail threatened her, she didn't bat an eyelid. Madam Xueyi is amazing — I really want to be like her one day...\nTail: Amazing!? Let's see if she still has that smirk on her face when I burn the Ten-Lords Commission to the ground!

C: 小桂子你先去！我、我跟在你身后……
E: You first, Little Gui! I—I'll be right behind you...

C: 藿藿：一有空我就拼命折纸人，只要一想到有那么多「朋友」在身边，我就不怕了……\n尾巴：老子最烦那纸人了！半夜一睁眼一纸人凑我眼前还在那笑不瘆得慌吗？！
E: Huohuo: I make paper dolls whenever I get the chance. With so many little "friends" around, there's nothing to fear...\nTail: Don't get me started! Those things stress me out. The mere thought of seeing a smiling paper doll right in front of my face in the middle of the night...

C: 说符太卜是个异类的，真该去她老家玉阙看看，那儿可是遍智天君信徒的大本营。我猜玉阙人的对话，基本都是「他知道你知道我知道他知道吗」……
E: Anyone who says the master diviner is eccentric should pay a visit to her home world, the Xianzhou Yuque. That's the heartland of the followers of the Wisdomwalker. I'm guessing every conversation on the Yuque is some permutation of "he knows that you know that I know that he knows..."

C: 我和驭空司舵一样，自三十年前的那场战争后，多少都对打打杀杀的事有些厌倦了。
E: Like Helm Master Yukong, after the war <unbreak>30</unbreak> years ago, I've grown weary of fighting.

C: 添把火呗。
E: Turn up the heat.

C: 我平生别无所好，唯独无辣不欢。吃辣的时候，人感到的不止有疼痛，还有快慰——这让我感到自己还活着。
E: I've never had any hobbies in my life besides spicy food. When I eat spicy food, I feel not only pain, but also joy and comfort... It makes me feel like I'm still alive.

C: 我走了。希望下次见面时，你我都多打了几场胜仗。
E: I'm heading out. I hope the next time we meet, we'll both have several more victories to our names.

C: 架势不错。要比比「巡猎」的速度么？
E: Nice form. Shall we compete to see how fast our "hunts" are?

C: 不避，不悔！
E: Never back down, never hesitate!

C: 云璃，小心点，可别受伤了。
E: Yunli, be careful, don't get hurt.

C: 他似乎并不享受自己的工作，但却敬责地干到了现在。这点和我一样。
E: He doesn't seem to enjoy his work, but he has still dutifully done it until now. In this way, he is like me.

C: 麻烦你了。
E: Sorry to trouble you.

C: 我记得…我曾送了些稀奇的玩意儿给他，他是个很有礼貌的孩子，碰到心仪的剑器更是眉飞色舞，开心得不行。
E: I remember... I once gave him some rare toys. He was a very polite child, and when he came across a sword he liked, he became absolutely radiant with delight.

C: 直觉、本能…都能通过训练来提升。
E: Intuition, instinct... training can sharpen them both.

C: 被博识尊注视后，我便离开家乡，在秘密的角落开始对生命本源的研究——请别问是哪里。
E: After catching the attention of Nous, I left my hometown and began my research on the origin of life in a secret corner of the universe... please don't ask where.

C: 等待亦是变化。
E: Waiting means change.

C: 一枚不知价值的筹码，一张不知花色的底牌，但…恰恰是她，会决定整场游戏的走向。
E: A chip of unknown value, a card of unknown suit, yet... it is she who will shape the entire course of the game.

C: 你可以随意利用我，也可以在恰当的时机背叛我，利用与背叛都是价值互换的手段。但我从不做赔本买卖，也希望你…不要让我失望。
E: Go ahead, use me as you wish, even stab me in the back if you see fit. Exploitation and treachery are simply tools of the trade. But remember, I don't make deals that don't pay off... So, I hope you don't disappoint me.

C: 唔，有趣的小妹妹。虽然嘴上不说，但我猜她一直很想被人「看见」。她的内心是我见过最混乱不堪的地方，但也却手握最有力的武器——直觉。
E: Hmm, a fascinating young girl. She won't admit it, but I imagine she's always yearned to be noticed by others. Her mind is the most chaotic place I've ever witnessed, but it also possesses the strongest tool of all — intuition.

C: 果然，从很久以前，你就已经开始自己的旅途了。
E: As expected, your journey began long ago.

C: 来到此处，是你…还是命途的意愿？
E: Did you come here of your own volition, or was it fate?

C: 薄如蝉翼的生命，也有璀璨燃烧的可能。
E: A life as frail as a cicada's wings can still burn brightly.

C: {NICKNAME}，不用紧张…就像之前那样配合吧。
E: Don't be nervous, {NICKNAME}... Just cooperate with me, like you did before.

C: 米沙的心愿，就是快点长大。
E: The one thing I look forward to? Growing up, of course!

C: 大功告成！
E: All done!

C: 我想要的…可不止于「珠宝」。
E: What I'm after... is more than just jewelry.

C: 欲望会创造机会。
E: Where there's a will, there's a way.

C: 没有书面记录，无法量化价值，衡断仅凭感受与心意…对那些品格高尚的客人来说，人情才是最昂贵的欠款。
E: Without written records, value cannot be quantified, and judgment is based only on thoughts and feelings... For guests of noble character, favors are the heaviest debt.

C: 你看过公司出版的旅行手册吗？好玩的地方都被标记上了「旅行风险」。这，就是做通缉犯的好处了！既然我就是「旅行风险」，这些地方对我来说就约等于零风险。
E: You seen them travel brochures the IPC puts out? Places worth seein' are all marked as being "Travel Risks." Well, that's the upside of being a wanted man, I AM the "RISK"! So those places? Zero risk for me.

C: 离死亡最近的人，往往最懂得生命的可贵。她的拥抱带来永眠，但这告别却是温暖的。
E: The one closest to death often knows the most about how precious life is. Her embrace brings eternal sleep, but such farewells are always warm.

C: 一针见血才好。
E: Being direct is always preferable.

C: 静息宁神，启示便会显现。
E: Find stillness, and enlightenment will emerge.

C:
缇宝：为了防止旅途被破坏——
缇宁：为了维护旅途的和平——
缇安：我们乘着穿梭在翁法罗斯的火筒！
缇宝：缇宝送温暖~
缇安：缇安打坏蛋！
缇宁：缇宁…
缇宝：嗯，就是这样！
E:
Tribbie: To prevent our journey from being disrupted—
Trinnon: To maintain peace on our journey—
Trianne: We ride on a rocket, traversing Amphoreus!
Tribbie: Tribbie sends warmth~
Trianne: Trianne beats the baddies!
Trinnon: Trinnon...
Tribbie: Yeah, that's how it is!

C: 现在，该是翁法罗斯的胜利了。
E: Now, is the time for Amphoreus's victory.

C: 动手就能解决问题，最简单的道理。
E: Problems are solved by taking action — that's the most basic principle.

C: 缇宝阿姐，起风了，一起飞会儿？
E: Big sis Tribbie, the wind's picking up. Shall we take flight?

C: 身为天空的后裔，雅辛忒丝会与各位一同完成逐火的使命。同时，作为昏光庭院的医师风堇，我也会尽力为大家提供援助。这是我的好助手、好伙伴——天马小伊卡，想揉一揉吗？请放心大胆地来，它很喜欢~
E: As the descendant of Sky, I, Hyacinthia, will fulfill the Flame-Chase duty with all of you. At the same time, I'll do my best to help everyone as Hyacine, healer of the Twilight Courtyard. This is my good friend and assistant, the little pegasus Ica. Do you want pet them? Please, go ahead! They love being petted~

C: 有了大地的帮助，阳光一定会洒遍翁法罗斯~
E: With the Earth's aid, sunlight is sure to shine across all of Amphoreus~

C: 这点小花招，可没法让我感到愉悦啊。
E: These mere parlor tricks cannot delight me.

C: 以前她种下的那片花海，是否能挺过感官之雨的洗礼呢？
E: Would the sea of flowers she planted survive a baptism from the Rain of Sensation?

C: 一个美好的谎言，的确胜过万千残酷的真相。
E: A beautiful lie is indeed better than a thousand cruel truths.

C: 每个人或许都在逃避着什么，但终要奔向真正渴望的方向。
E: Everyone might be running away from something, but in the end, we all eventually head towards what we truly desire.

C: 睡不着的时候，我会数天上的星星，想象一颗流星划过夜空，闯进人家的梦里。然后我就会笑着醒来，开启美好的一天。因为我知道，那不是梦。
E: When I have trouble sleeping, I count the stars in the sky and imagine a shooting star flying across the night and diving into my dreams. Then I wake up with a smile and start a bright new day... because I know it wasn't a dream.

C: 好多好多！当作我们的宝藏，收下吧。
E: What a haul! Take it. Treat them as our treasures.

C: 想打倒我？没那么容易。
E: Wanna knock me down? It's not that easy.

C: 写下，前所未有的结局！
E: Let's write an ending like never before!

C: 不慌，还有我在。
E: Don't panic. I'm still here.

C: 丹恒，继续一起开拓吧！
E: Let's keep trailblazing together, Dan Heng!

C: 跃迁
E: Warp

C: 上升
E: Ascend

C: 攻击
E: Attack

C: 下降
E: Descend

C: 以恐惧充盈失路者的心房。
E: And fill the hearts of the lost with terror.

C: 但在你做出抉择之时，黑白的世界中，会有一点红色再度示现。
E: But when you make a choice, there will be a fleeting red that reappears before you once more in that monochrome world.

C: 呜利呜
E: Wooreo

C: 看乐子
E: Onlooker

C: 蜂蜜绿荚豆
E: Honey Green Pea

C: 车厘比斯和它的好朋友们
E: Krenabis and Its Friends

C: 使随机3只奇美拉<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Increases <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for 3 random chimeras.

C: 自身受到伤害时：减少<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点受到的伤害，最低为1，并有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的概率使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Reduces DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> (down to 1) and has a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> chance to restore <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 队伍中最强的蜜果羹被击倒时：有<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的概率以满<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>复活，自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>，并使下一次攻击时造成的伤害提升<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>。每次成功复活后，复活的概率减半
E: When the strongest Fig Stew in the team is knocked down, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> chance to revive with full <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>, causing this unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>, and DMG dealt to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> on the next attack. Each successful revival halves the revival chance.

C: 同伴概率类技能发动成功时：使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When a companion's probability-based ability is successfully launched: Its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

C: 进入商店时：队伍中最强的昔米露使随机<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>名奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>；随机<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>名专属奇美拉同伴额外经验+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When entering Store: The strongest Cyrup in the team causes <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> random chimeras' <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> random exclusive chimera companion(s) gains additional <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Experience.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得自身当前<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力。攻击时，额外对目标后方最近的奇美拉发动1次等同于<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的追加攻击
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team gains <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP. When attacking, additionally performs a Follow-Up ATK on the nearest chimera behind the target, dealing 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=2 width=1 height=1>ATK.

C: 蹭饭这一块啊。
E: When it comes to mooching off meals.

C: 我要实现装备全收集。
E: I'm gonna collect every piece of equipment.

C: 我的要求只会更严格。
E: My requirements will only get stricter.

C: 我很会蹭局势的。
E: I'm good at riding the wave.

C: 为我而战吧，骑士！
E: Fight for me, Knight!

C: 首先，叫我努努斯。
E: First off, call me Nanus.

C: 挑战赛
E: Challenge Match

C: 黄金嗷呜大师赛
E: Chrysos Awoo Championship

C:
・按照花火的提示，流萤独自来到了橡木之梦，并与梦主留下的「律令」之一相遇，与其一同调查梦主的阴谋。
・很久以前，梦主曾从家族特使处得知了星核的真相——它源于希佩，实为「同谐之癌」。
・据回忆中的梦主所说：由于人们会在混乱中渴求秩序，「秩序」命途曾在寰宇蝗灾肆虐时反倒达到鼎盛。
・在道路的尽头，流萤发现了正在孕育寰宇蝗灾的「死灭之茧」，并揭晓了梦主的阴谋：他想要通过再造寰宇蝗灾，引领入梦者呼唤秩序，借此复生星神「太一」。
・在这里，梦主将完成计划的最后一环：四条律令的其中之一，是梦主的至强一击，足以使「死灭之茧」中的蝗灾提前破壳而出。
・为了将其阻止，流萤决心独自将梦主的这一击挡下，但这反倒中了梦主的算计。原来，「死灭之茧」中只有一颗星核而已。
・梦主深知星核的本质，也知晓格拉默铁骑行于「繁育」的命途——此前种种，都是他营造的假象，真正的目的在于：诱使流萤在星核面前许下「想要活下去」的愿望。
・格拉默铁骑与虫群的力量堪称共生同死，因此，星核将流萤的愿望以极其扭曲的形式实现：寰宇蝗灾在梦境中诞生了。作为首选者，星期日将会因此扬升为星神「太一」。
E:
・ Following Sparkle's hint, Firefly arrived alone at Oak Dream, where they encountered one of the "Divine Laws" left by the Dreammaster, joining forces to investigate the Dreammaster's conspiracy.
・ Long ago, the Dreammaster learned the truth about the Stellaron from a Family envoy. It originated from Xipe and was actually the "Harmonic Cancer."
・ According to the Dreammaster in the memory: Due to people's desire for order in chaos, the Path of Order paradoxically reached its peak during the Swarm Disaster.
・ At the end of the road, Firefly discovered the "Cocoon of Extinction" nurturing the Swarm Disaster, and unveiled the Dreammaster's plot: He intended to recreate the Swarm Disaster to make dreamers beckon the Order, thereby resurrecting the Aeon "Ena."
・ Here, the Dreammaster would complete the final piece of his plan: One of the four Divine Laws was the Dreammaster's ultimate strike, powerful enough to force the Swarm Disaster within the "Cocoon of Extinction" to emerge prematurely.
・ To stop this, Firefly resolved to block this strike alone, but this played right into the Dreammaster's scheme. As it turned out, there was only one Stellaron within the "Cocoon of Extinction."
・ The Dreammaster knew the true nature of the Stellaron and was aware that the Glamoth's Iron Cavalry walked the Path of Propagation. Everything before was his fabrication, with the true purpose being: to lure Firefly into making a wish "to survive" before the Stellaron.
・ The power of the Glamoth's Iron Cavalry and the Swarm are symbiotic in life and death, and hence the Stellaron fulfilled Firefly's wish in an extremely distorted way: The Swarm Disaster was born within the dreamscape. As the chosen one, Sunday would ascend to become the Aeon "Ena."

C:
・在迎接你入梦后，知更鸟尝试调查梦境中的「不协和音」，并发觉其源头在流萤身上——此时，对方被认为是偷渡犯，正被猎犬家系追捕。
・通过「调律」，知更鸟对流萤进行了一段时间的监视，试图确认对方的身份。
・在发现流萤与银狼进行远程通讯后，知更鸟确认对方的身份并不简单，一路追索到了筑梦边境。
・在筑梦边境，知更鸟遇到了伪装成星期日的花火。一番言语试探后，知更鸟因「同谐」力量异常加剧，难以压制花火，遭其「杀害」。
E:
・ After welcoming you into the dreamscape, Robin investigated the "dissonance" within and discovered its source was Firefly, who at the time was considered a stowaway, being hunted by the Bloodhound Family.
・ Through "tuning," Robin monitored Firefly for a period of time to verify her identity.
・ After discovering Firefly's remote communication with Silver Wolf, Robin confirmed her identity was far from ordinary and continued the chase, following her to Dream's Edge.
・ At Dream's Edge, Robin encountered Sparkle disguised as Sunday. After probing verbally, Robin, unable to suppress Sparkle due to an abnormal surge in the power of the Harmony, was "killed" by her.

C: 大丽花：帮助开拓者恢复记忆
E: The Dahlia: Helping the Trailblazer Recover Their Memories

C: 使装备者的击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。进入战斗时，使装备者和另一位开战的队友造成的击破伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，若不存在开战的队友则对装备者和击破特攻最高的队友生效，同类效果无法叠加。装备者为敌方目标添加弱点时，恢复1个战技点，该效果最多触发1次，施放终结技时重置可触发次数。
E: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When entering combat, increases Break DMG dealt by the wearer and another teammate who triggered combat by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. If there is no teammate who triggered combat, applies this effect to the wearer and the teammate with the highest Break Effect. Effects of the same type cannot be stacked. When the wearer applies Weakness to an enemy target, recovers 1 Skill Point. This effect can only trigger once. And resets this trigger count when using Ultimate.

C: 【冰蚀】属于持续伤害类负面状态。【冰蚀】状态下，目标每回合开始时受到等同于自身生命上限一定比例的冰属性持续伤害。
E: "Glacial Erosion" is a DoT-type debuff. When affected by "Glacial Erosion," the target takes Ice DoT equal to a certain percentage of their Max HP at the start of each turn.

C: 众星因何残忍
E: Why are the stars so cruel?

C: 背道者的来信
E: A Letter from an Apostate

C: <color=#f29e38ff>【后排目标】：</color>敌方部分目标处于战场后排，无法被<color=#f29e38ff>【单攻】</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>【扩散】</color>技能选中。消灭敌方后排目标可使敌方首领所受伤害提高，至多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2000%</unbreak></color>，该效果将在敌方首领转换阶段时被移除。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>"Back Row Target"</color>: Some enemy targets in the back row cannot be targeted by <color=#f29e38ff>"Single Target ATK"</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>"Blast"</color> abilities. Defeating back row targets will increase the DMG dealt to the enemy boss by up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2000%</unbreak></color>. This effect will be removed when the enemy boss transitions phases.

C: 负载生命值
E: HP Overload

C: *感激「得赐」的颂歌* 剥星解核，万邦蒙召， 弥撒造化，三相圣灵定运命。 布施甘霖，万法同一， 命种结实，恭友兄弟共连襟。 寰宇诸界，万语齐唱， 得蒙拔擢，千奏万响颂福音！ …… *呼唤「乐园」的颂歌* 星核熠熠，万万仆从得光耀， 令荒场作乐园，贫瘠者饱足，饥渴者痛饮。 星核已降，何其明亮！ 立罪戾之地圣法，义人得蜜浆，恶人得教化。 星核已降，何其辉煌！ 午夜自此明如正午，熟睡者美梦不休，欢欣无涯！ …… *赞美「炼狱」的颂歌* 将他投入鞘翅盘踞的螺旋之地， 祸土待再造，喜乐哀痛，业火洗涤。 让他坠落万千口齿啃噬的深渊， 公义复立约，黏液吞育，得诞新生。 ……
E: *Hymn thanking the "Gift"* Let the star be sundered, its heart laid bare, let every nation heed the summons, By this genesis mass, our destiny is decreed by the Spirit in Three. Let the sacred dew anoint us, uniting all faiths in its truth, The seed of our fates now ripens, binding brethren in sacred fraternity. Let all worlds and all tongues raise a single, glorious chant, For we are the gifted, our hymn of praise a cosmic gospel! ... *Hymn calling forth "Paradise"* Behold the Stellaron's glow, a blessing on us servants all! It turns barren fields to paradise, sating the wretched, quenching the deprived. The Stellaron is upon us, its brilliance blinds! In this fallen land, it writes the law anew: for the just, the sweetest wine. For the wicked, the purest truth. The Stellaron is upon us, its splendor shines! Now the darkest night becomes the highest noon. In our dreams, the sleepers find a joy that never ends! ... *Hymn praising "Purgatory"* Send him to the spiraling pits, the domain of the swarming carapaces, where karma's fire will purge the world of all joy and sorrow, and a wasteland waits for its rebirth. Plunge him to the endless abyss, to be chewed by a thousand maws, where the pact of justice is remade, consumed and nurtured by slime, to be born anew. ...

E: Gate of Yactor

E: I saw

E: What a niche secret

E: Elegy Siren: Insatiable Leviathan

E: Lock on to 2 targets and enters the "Double Waxing Moon" state. "Sixfold Plenilune" will be used with next action.

C: 受到我方一定次数的攻击后立刻施放【致幻哀歌】。
E: After receiving a certain number of attacks from the targets, immediately uses "Psychedelic Elegy."

E: Malignform Elytra

E: Volteggiando

E: Looping Explanation

E: Rise from the Grave

C: 潜伏
E: Lurking

C: 格奈乌斯
E: Gnaeus

C: 流萤怀疑「梦主」倒向「繁育」。大丽花打捞起的忆质显示：美梦虫灾在AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>被歌斐木杀死后清除，铁骑残躯被歌斐木用以为「永恒乐园」奠基。
E: Firefly suspected the Dreammaster had sided with the Propagation. The memoria salvaged by The Dahlia revealed: After Dreamjoy's plague was eliminated when Gopher Wood killed AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>, the remains of the Iron Cavalry were used by Gopher Wood to lay the foundation for "Eternal Paradise."

C: 大丽花故意留出破绽，藉由黑天鹅之手焚毁「律令」施加己身的禁制，得以背叛「梦主」。黑天鹅诘问大丽花此行的目的，得到的回答是——为了「毁灭」。
E: The Dahlia deliberately left a weakness, using Black Swan's hand to burn away the "divine law" and its containment mechanism, enabling her betrayal of the "Dreammaster." When Black Swan questioned The Dahlia about her purpose, the answer was, for Destruction.

C: 星期日计划让梦境与现实交融，创造「秩序」支配的乐园。黄泉认为梦境的真相不止于此，必须告知所有愿意醒来的人，携手终结长夜。
E: Sunday sought to merge the dreamscape and reality into one paradise ruled by the Order. But Acheron believed there was more to the dreamscape's truth. You had to notify anyone willing to wake up, to end the long night together.

C: 累计进行#4次跃迁
E: Warp a total of #4 times

C: 失去所有火漆奇物，获得奇物「开拓火漆」
E: Lose all Sealing Wax Curios and obtain the Curio "Sealing Wax of Trailblaze"

E: Express Fragment Memorial Plaque

E: Occurrence

E: ● Initial Golden Blood's Boon

E: ● Initial Weighted Curio

C: ●初始获得加权奇物
E: ● Initial Weighted Curio

E: Effect RES Boost

E: Break Effect increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 被添加的额外火弱点。
E: Additionally implanted Fire Weakness.

C: 每层使暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层。
E: Each stack increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

C: 受到的击破伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 冰蚀
E: Glacial Erosion

C: 击破伤害提高
E: Break DMG Boost

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 你曾经历过的一切，梦主竟在当中扮演了如此重要的角色…那么，这一切又是如何收场的？
E: To think the Dreammaster played such a crucial role in everything you've experienced... So how did it all come to an end?

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 是我没见过的老前辈？
E: Is this a senior member I haven't met before?

C: 还有他的妹妹，无人不知的知更鸟。她本应登台献唱，却被卷入一连串的意外，直到最后，也像局外人那般不知所措。
E: There was also his sister, the renowned Robin. She was meant to perform on stage, but got caught up in a series of unfortunate events, and in the end, found herself as lost as any bystander.

C: 又来了吗……嗯？
E: Here we go again... Hmm?

C: 就像面具，一旦戴太久，就再也摘不下来。
E: Like a mask... Once you wear it for too long, you can never take it off again.

C: 不，你的猜想没错。只是，这些鸟儿不受另一片梦境欢迎。
E: No, your conjecture is right. It's just that these birds weren't welcome in another dreamscape.

C: 不过，还是进去看看吧，总归能多获得一些线索。
E: Still, let's go take a look inside. We might pick up some clues at least.

C: 不，没关系……
E: No, it's okay...

C: 也许你该先去静一静，很遗憾，这并非忆质，而是真正的格拉默铁骑。显而易见，匹诺康尼是她生命的最后一站。
E: Maybe you should calm down first. Unfortunately, this isn't memoria, but a real Glamoth Knight. Clearly, Penacony was her final destination.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要黄泉有半分拔刀的可能，我就不能让{NICKNAME}在场。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If there's even the slightest chance that Acheron might draw her blade, I cannot let {NICKNAME} be there.</color>

C: 我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
E: I tend to forget things, which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...

C: 我说过了…我的记性不太好，所以你不用担心。
E: Like I said... my memory isn't great, so you needn't worry.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>美梦从未渗入「繁育」，是你将其带来此处</color>。也唯有你的死亡，才能将其除去。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The sweet dream has never been tainted by the Propagation... You brought it here</color>. And only your death can remove it.

C: …你指的是谁？
E: ...Who are you talking about?

C: 怎么，你就这么希望…和我「再续前缘」？
E: What, you're that eager to... "rekindle our past"?

C: 说得对，独自一人，我的确做不到——可我很少会感到孤单呢。
E: You're right, I can't do it alone... But I rarely feel lonely anyway.

C: 最后一条呢？
E: And the last one?

C: 我不需要你来引路，也能做到这件事。
E: I don't need your guidance to get this done.

C: 无路也须前行
E: Press on, even without a path

C: 神主欲将公义还于人世，可人们向他祈求的并非公义，而是「无需恐惧」。
E: The Great One wished to restore justice to the mortal world, but what people prayed for wasn't justice. It was "freedom from fear."

C: 那么你还是做出了不同的选择。
E: So you made a different choice after all.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 但我就没这么幸运了，即便身为忆者，也还是会受到「秩序」的影响，陷入幻觉。
E: Well, I'm not as fortunate as she is. Even if I'm a Memokeeper, I was still influenced by the power of the Order and fell into hallucinations.

C: 但她的结局，会由你来决定。她会为你们破除第二重梦境，然后坠入还没彻底消散的太一之梦。
E: But her fate will be determined by you. She will help you break through the second layer of the dreamscape. Then she'll fall into Ena's Dream, which hasn't fully dissipated yet.

C: 去吧，{NICKNAME}，我想说什么，你一定知道。
E: Go, {NICKNAME}. You already know what I want to say.

C: 前往故事的起点。
E: Head to where the story began.

C: 哎呀，那我也重申一次——我该做的事都做完了，接下来就只等看烟花咯。
E: Owwww. Then I'll reiterate as well. I've done my part, and now I'm simply waiting for the fireworks to begin.

C: 所以，我会离开这里，和你一起。
E: So, I will leave this place, together with you.

C: 对了，{NICKNAME}…你可不可以闭上眼睛？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}... could you close your eyes?

C: 然后，就跳出来几个好凶好凶的流氓，想要欺负你。
E: Then, a bunch of mean-looking thugs jumped out, trying to pick on you.

C: 而那时候，我会挺身而出——对，这一次，让我来拯救你。
E: When that happens, I'll step up to the plate. Yeah! Let me be the one to save you this time.

C: 他们都说…<color=#dbc291ff>你是注定{RUBY_B#跨越}带来{RUBY_E#}「终末」的人。</color>
E: They say... <color=#dbc291ff>you're destined to {RUBY_B#transcend}bring about{RUBY_E#} the Finality.</color>

C: 自古墓中得到神赐珍宝后，你又经历了许许多多的冒险：从黑潮造物手里救下一对逃难的母子、帮助树庭运送濒危植物的种子，甚至短暂介入过悬锋城和奥赫玛的纷争。珍宝总能起到作用。
E: After obtaining the divine treasure from the ancient tomb, you've been through countless adventures: Rescuing a refugee mother and child from Black Tide Creatures, helping the Grove transport endangered plant seeds, and even briefly getting involved in the strife between Castrum Kremnos and Okhema. The treasure always proves useful.

C: 太远了，听不清。
E: You're too far away, I can't hear you clearly.

C: 这颗「死灭之茧」曾捏造出一张悬垂的丝网，如愿诱捕到了寻觅而至的飞萤。
E: This "Cocoon of Extinction" had woven a suspended web of silk, successfully luring and trapping the fyreflies that came searching.

C: 嗷呜！欢迎！我最喜欢的特邀嘉宾来了，做好参赛准备了吗？
E: Awoo! Welcome! My favorite special guest has arrived. Are you ready to compete?

C: 嗷呜！不愧是我们的特邀嘉宾，说话就是硬气。我很看好你哦。
E: Wowza! As expected from our special guest, you've got some real guts! I've got high hopes for you.

C: …这是你现编的吧。
E: ...You're just making this up.

C: 算啦，闲聊就到这里吧。待会就要在赛场上碰面了哦。
E: All right, let's wrap up the chit-chat. We'll be meeting on the field soon anyway.

C: 猎犬家系的洛卡
E: Loka of the Bloodhound Family

C: 神主日
E: The Great Septimus

C: 奇美拉拥有<color=#f29e38ff>稀有度</color>，从高到低依次为彩色，金色，紫色，蓝色，白色。
E: Chimeras have <color=#f29e38ff>Rarity</color> levels, from highest to lowest: Prismatic, Gold, Purple, Blue, and White.

C: 「噩梦」难度可挑战
E: Nightmare Difficulty can be challenged

C: 有趣起来了。
E: This is getting fun.

C: 靠近些…才能更有默契呀。
E: Step closer... that's the only way we'll find real accord.
